C: 仍在建设当中的梦境城市。银河中最有名气的设计师们受邀来到此地，成为匹诺康尼的「筑梦师」。
E: A city of dreams still under construction. The cosmos' most famous architects are invited to this place to become Penacony's "Dreamweavers."

C: 崇尚「纷争之泰坦」的城邦，供奉令人胆寒的尼卡多利。为世间带来恐惧的矛，亦是抵御灾厄的盾。
E: A city that worships Nikador, the Strife Titan who strikes fear into people. The spear that brings terror upon this world is also the shield that protects it from calamity.

C: 矿车工测试
E: Mine Cart Test

C: 「时间——世上最勤劳的窃贼。它不断偷走我们的当下，随手扔进名为『记忆』的仓库。有人沉溺于招领失物…有人对遗失毫不在乎。」 ——佚名，《此生苦短》 世间再无比纯粹的记忆更加包容的存在：它记录一切，不嫌恶，不偏爱；它无私地保留每个基本的事实，每种绮丽的姿态；它是绵延的生命汇聚成的河流，是亘古的智慧堆砌成的宝藏。 ——而浮黎是溯游的鱼群，亦是宝库的钥匙。祂禅坐于净土中央，静观世间万物不知疲倦地重蹈覆辙。传说一切归于终寂之后，浮黎将以宇宙的记忆为蓝图，令诸界复生。 天才俱乐部#83黑塔第三次觐见博识尊时，确认了「记忆」命途的本质：超越时间的因果。如今为人们所知的「无漏主」只是一道记忆的影子，而它的主人：一名无漏净子，将在宇宙的尽头回望过去，用铭记的一切闭合因果，飞升成神。
E: "Time, the hardest working thief in the world. It keeps stealing away our present from us and tossing it away in a warehouse named Memory. Some are addicted to recuperating their losses... Others care not in the slightest." — Life Is Too Short by Anonymous There is no existence more all-embracing than the Remembrance in its purest form: It chronicles everything with neither affinity nor aversion. It unselfishly preserves every single fundamental fact and every single resplendent form. It is a river formed by the continuous flow of life, and a treasure built from the eternal wisdom of antiquity. And Fuli is the fish that swims back upstream in this river, the very key to this treasure vault. Seated in meditation at the heart of the Pure Land, THEY observe in silence the world's tireless repetitions of the same mistakes over and over again. It is said that, after all returns to the silence at the end, Fuli will use the memory of the universe as a blueprint to reanimate all the worlds once again. When Herta, Genius Society #83, had her third audience with Nous, she confirmed the true nature of the Path of Remembrance: It is causality that transcends time. The "Master of Anāsrava" known today is but a shadow of memory. Its master, a Pure Child of Anāsrava, will look back in time from the last moment of the universe, closing the loop of causality with all that is remembered, and ascend to godhood.

C:
若你向「家族」询问他们的家人间是否有尊卑高低，定会得到否定的回答——家族一视同仁，没有任何阶级与权力的划分。在希佩谱写的音律上，每个音符都同样平等。但携手共进亦需有人引领，于是家族成员便有了复归音阶的区分，而第Ⅳ音级以上的人，方能担任「谐乐众弦」的调弦师。

「同谐」汇聚万众的理想，实现理想的路径自然也不止一条。同谐颂诗中定义了「谐乐众弦」的概念——神主希佩的一众化身，数种促成同谐的质朴美德，无论是否皈依家族，只要践行这些善举，便可得到祂的垂青。而在家族属地，人们常以集群为单位施行美德、奏响谐乐，汇聚万千的细丝揉捻作弦，恭迎「同谐」的化身具现人间，降下祝福。此时主持家族仪式，调和众音的那位神选者，便被称作调弦师。

家族从不吝惜向外界传扬千面神化身的美名，如「无限夫长」众命之阿伊里涅夫、「齐响诗班」众愿之多米尼克斯、「万籁剧院」众唱之康斯坦汀娜、「至福舞会」众乐之比雅特丽丝…却鲜有人见证他们的光芒照及家族之外。同谐的反对者称「谐乐众弦」便是希佩的令使——它们不跟随某位具体凡人，而是祂自身的一道道侧面，且在需要的时候，化为家族中的任何一人。
E:
When asking about the presence of a hierarchy within The Family, one can expect a firm denial — The Family treats everyone equally without division of class, with no established levels or power structures. Each note holds equal significance in the music Xipe has composed. However, for collective progress, someone must assume a leadership role. As a result, Family members have returned to a system of differentiation based on scales, with only those above scale degree IV being eligible to serve as the tuner of the Harmonic Strings.

Harmony combines ideals from the multitudes and therefore has more than one way to achieve these ideals. The concept of Harmonic Strings is defined in the Harmony Hymns — they are the multiple embodiments of Xipe the Great One, the down-to-earth virtues that enable harmony. Regardless of whether you place yourself under The Family's rule, the Aeon will look favorably upon you as long as you carry out these good deeds. On worlds ruled by The Family, members often gather in large groups to engage in virtuous acts and play harmonious music. The thousands of tiny ropes come together to form a united string, welcoming the Embodiment of Harmony to manifest on the mortal plane and give blessings. The chosen one responsible for conducting The Family's ritual during that time and harmonizing the varied sounds is known as the tuner.

The Family never shied away from promoting the great names of the embodiment of the thousand-faced god, such as Aelenev the commander of the Eternal Centurion, Dominicus the wisher of the Harmonious Choir, Constantina the singer of the Panacoustic Theater, and Beatriz the merrymaker of the Blissful Ball... However, few have witnessed THEIR radiant presence going beyond the boundaries of The Family. Opposers of Harmony argue that the Harmonic Strings are nothing short of the Emanators of Xipe — These do not follow any specific mortal but are facets of Xipe, and can assume the form of any Family member when necessary.

C: 「侠之极者，心怀星斗。」 ——仙舟，《寰宇通鉴》 并非所有「巡猎」的笃信者都与「丰饶」结仇；宇宙中有这样一批身手矫捷的游侠儿，他们推崇岚的以暴制暴，称颂岚的杀伐果断，相信宇宙的善良与公义须以个人的行为伸张。 「巡海游侠」组成了义侠团体，行走在巡猎的命途之上，籍着星神的祝福放歌宙宇。他们前往一颗又一颗星球，为当地的人们主持正义，猎除邪恶，再踏上新的征途。 成功刺杀了一名绝灭大君（诛罗）令「巡海游侠」声名大噪；多年后，一位游侠又挫败了天才俱乐部#64 会员「原始博士」的返祖实验。但在那之后，「巡海游侠」逐渐淡出银河视界，传说他们与「原始博士」结下深仇，因此遭受了不幸的命运。
E: "The ultimate fighter dreams only of the stars." — Worlds History as a Mirror, Xianzhou Not all devotees of The Hunt hate Abundance. Such a group of talented rangers exists out there. This group admires Lan's policy of using violence against violence and the Aeon's swift decisiveness regarding punishment, believing the benevolence and justice of the universe need to be upheld via personal action. The Galaxy Rangers formed into a group of heroes, walking the Path of The Hunt, and roam the universe thanks to the blessings of the Aeon. They went from planet to planet upholding justice for the locals, hunting down evil, then embarking on new journeys. The successful assassination of a Lord Ravager, Zulo, first brought the Galaxy Rangers their fame. And many years later, a Ranger thwarted the atavistic experiment of the 64th member of the Genius Society, Dr. Primitive. But after that, these Galaxy Rangers gradually faded out of sight in the cosmos. Rumor has it that they fell victim to Dr. Primitive's vengeance.

C:
「智识」的天才如恒星般闪耀寰宇，自俱乐部成立以来，他们留下数之不尽的发明创造，照亮昏蒙的宇宙。但在那无数追逐「知识奇点」的伟业中，唯有一项意义尤为特殊——它属于「第一位天才」：以人类的知识，创造了「智识」的神明。

这位天才生活的时代太过久远，历史为他所留下的文字远不及科学的万分之一。一个对宇宙结构的精妙猜想、大量开基立业的科学著述、些许启发后世的至理名言、几幅看不清容貌的画像——以及启明万物的命途和星神。这就是赞达尔留下的一切。

在天才们带来「第一次繁荣」后，赞达尔的名字迅速消隐于星间，学界再也没有听见他的声音。人们猜测，他或遁世隐居在自己开辟的太平盛世，或以凡人之身正寝于不为人知的实验，亦或殒命在那位寂静领主的刀下……

在众议纷纭的揣测中，最为人津津乐道的说法是：「第一位天才」正投身于又一场伟大的创造，而那造物将会再度改变宇宙的命运，一如博识尊诞生的那日。
E:
The geniuses of Erudition illuminate the cosmos like celestial bodies. Since the Society's inception, their countless inventions have brought light to the obscure universe. Yet one achievement eclipses all others in their pursuit of the "Knowledge Singularity" when the "First Genius" created Nous the Erudition from mere human knowledge.

This genius existed in a time so ancient that history retained barely a glimpse of his scientific achievements: a brilliant hypothesis on universal structure, pioneering scientific works, a handful of inspirational sayings for posterity, a few portraits with blurred features, and his greatest creation — the Paths and Aeons that guide all things in creation. These are Zandar's only remaining legacies.

Following the "First Prosperity" brought by these brilliant minds, Zandar's name quickly faded among the stars, and academia never heard from him again. Some believe he retreated into the utopia of his making, or pursued secret research as a mortal, or met his end at the blade of the Lord of Silence...

Among the swirling speculations, the most popular belief holds that the "First Genius" is engaged in another monumental creation, one destined to reshape the universe's fate, much like the day Nous came into existence.

C: 黑塔（地名）
E: Herta Space Station (Location)

C: 本赛道又名「弯道转转转」，末段飞坡尤其考验车手的节奏和判断力
E: This track is also known as Double-Triple Curve. The final ramp jump is a true test of a racer's timing and judgment

C: 发射飞弹攻击前方目标，可破坏障碍或干扰其他赛车。
E: Launch missiles toward targets ahead to destroy obstacles or disrupt other racers.

C: 故事告一段落后，回到被忆者拯救之处
E: After everything has concluded, return to where you were saved by the Memokeeper

C: 听我说
E: Listen

C: 「齐响诗班」神主日即将再造「秩序」时，来自仙舟的援军抵达战场。在丹恒与景元的合力攻击下，神主日战败倒地。
E: Just as The Great Septimus of the Harmonious Choir was about to recreate Order, reinforcements from Xianzhou arrived on the battlefield. Under the joint attack of Dan Heng and Jing Yuan, The Great Septimus was defeated and fell.

C: 你与三月七、姬子进入画框。此处是幕前剧的第二幕，名为《愚仆颂》。
E: You entered the painting frame with March 7th and Himeko. This was Act II of the Stage Play, titled Ode to Fool.

C: 盗火行者踏入创世涡心，将来古士的头颅斩下。你与白厄做好战斗准备，为「再创世」扫清阻碍。
E: The Flame Reaver entered the Vortex of Genesis and severed Lygus's head. You and Phainon prepared for battle and cleared the path for the Era Nova.

C: 你拔出昔涟的仪式剑，回应翁法罗斯对「救世主」的期待。诸位黄金裔为你献上祝福，你经由彩虹桥来到斯缇科西亚。
E: You drew Cyrene's ceremonial blade in response to Amphoreus' hope for a Deliverer. The Chrysos Heirs bestowed their blessings upon you, and you crossed the rainbow bridge into Styxia.

C: 山峦崩圮，地壑裂分。接过火种的丹恒扶大树于将倾，向「大地」昭告新神的名字。
E: Mountains fell, and the land split apart. Dan Heng, having accepted the Coreflame, held the Great Tree steady as it leaned, declaring the name of the new god to the "Earth."

C: 「空白的愿望」化作金色烈火，将封印燃烧殆尽。「史诗的尾声，三千万世光明消陨，只为此刻迎接真正的黎明。」
E: The Blank Wish transformed into a golden flame, burning the seal to ashes. "The epic draws to a close... thirty million cycles of light, fading into darkness... all to welcome the true dawn at this moment."

C: 列车突然遭遇猛烈震动。你看向窗外，发现有未知的黑暗事物将车厢吞没。
E: The Express suddenly jolted with a violent tremor. When you looked outside, you saw an unknown darkness engulfing the cars.

C: 杰帕德率领银鬃铁卫和自动机兵前来阻止托帕。托帕却动用权限操控自动机兵，反将杰帕德等人团团围困。
E: Gepard led the Silvermane Guards and automatons to stop Topaz. However, Topaz used his authority to control the automatons, turning them against Gepard and his allies.

C: 呼雷斩断彦卿的飞剑，跃起突袭。彦卿回忆起与镜流交手时的一击，以寒冰凝结为霜刃，重创呼雷。与此同时，飞霄赶到竞锋舰。
E: Hoolay shattered Yanqing's Flying Swords and lunged for a surprise attack. Drawing on his memory of the duel with Jingliu, Yanqing formed a Frost Blade from pure ice, landing a devastating blow on Hoolay. At that moment, Feixiao arrived aboard the Skysplitter.

C: 丹恒与素裳苦战负伤。罗刹出手相助，将二人的伤势尽数治愈。
E: Dan Heng and Sushang sustained injuries during an intense battle. Luocha intervened to help, restoring them to full health.

C: 卡芙卡与银狼来到监控室门前。卡芙卡感知到有危险迫近，两只反物质军团怪物旋即破空而出，战斗一触即发。
E: Kafka and Silver Wolf arrived at the monitoring room. Kafka sensed danger approaching as two Antimatter Legion monsters appeared, beginning a battle.

C: 修好能源装置后，你与三月七、丹恒向克拉拉展示「外来者」的身份，并有布洛妮娅为你们作担保。克拉拉最终同意带你们去见史瓦罗。
E: With the device restored, you, March 7th, and Dan Heng revealed your identities as outsiders. Bronya stepped forward to vouch for you. At last, Clara relented — she would take you to meet Svarog.

C: 姬子带来的轨道打击使得造物引擎不再对你构成威胁。接下来你要面临的，是与可可利亚的正面决战。
E: Himeko's orbital strike neutralized the threat of the Engine of Creation. What awaited you next was a direct and decisive battle with Cocolia.

C: 云骑<color=#f29e38ff>素裳</color>称自己由仙舟「曜青」借调至此，所保护的行商自称为<color=#f29e38ff>罗刹</color>。素裳邀请丹恒同行，带领他去安全区寻找同伴。
E: The Cloud Knight <color=#f29e38ff>Sushang</color> stated that she had been temporarily assigned from the Xianzhou Yaoqing, and the merchant she was protecting called himself <color=#f29e38ff>Luocha</color>. Sushang invited Dan Heng to accompany her and led him to a safe zone to search for his companions.

C: 你们再次接近卡芙卡。卡芙卡利用地形与机关将你们阻滞在门后，你们必须绕过传送带继续追击。
E: You approached Kafka once again. Using the terrain and mechanisms, she locked you behind a door. You must bypass the conveyor belt to keep chasing her.

C: 黄泉与萨姆对峙。黄泉称自己已看穿对方的伪装，邀请其脱下装甲谈谈，而萨姆认为尚不是时候。萨姆建议黄泉与星穹列车一起调查家族，揭开梦境的过去与真相，以此靠近「钟表匠的遗产」。艾利欧给萨姆的指示只有一条——<color=#f29e38ff>让星穹列车一同追逐「盛大的遗产」。</color>
E: Acheron confronted Sam. She claimed that she had seen through her disguise and invited her to remove the mecha for a discussion. Yet, Sam believed that it was not time for that yet. She suggested for Acheron to investigate The Family alongside the Astral Express, and unveil the past and truth of the dreamscape to get closer to "the Watchmaker's Legacy." Elio gave Sam a single hint, <color=#f29e38ff>to allow the Astral Express to pursue the "grand legacy" together.</color>

C: 黑天鹅潜入黄泉房间，探查「邀请函」承载的记忆。冥火大公的覆灭过程已被抹去，但自称「康士坦丝」的声音称能给出黄泉的秘密。
E: Black Swan infiltrated Acheron's room, seeking the invitation that bore memories. The process in which Duke Inferno perished had already been erased, but a voice that claimed to be "Constance" said they could reveal Acheron's secret.

C: 瓦尔特觉察异样，认为「梦主」与星期日所奉星神并非希佩。星期日将瓦尔特与知更鸟禁锢，宣称<color=#f29e38ff>于「同谐」之中，我们拥获「秩序」。</color>
E: Welt sensed something was wrong and suspected that the Dreammaster and the Aeon worshiped by Sunday were not actually Xipe. Sunday imprisoned Welt and Robin, declaring, <color=#f29e38ff>"And through Harmony, we obtain Order."</color>

C: 「睡蕉的时刻」被摧毁，匹诺康尼的人们纷纷恢复原貌。乱破与波提欧本想向「蕉授」审问原始博士的去向，只可惜对方已经逃之夭夭。
E: With the "Moment of Slumbernana" destroyed, the people of Penacony returned to their original forms. Rappa and Boothill wanted to interrogate Profnana about Dr. Primitive's whereabouts, but unfortunately, it had already made its escape.

C: 知更鸟发表演讲。希望大家都能在折纸大学找到自己的梦想，然后用一生来贯彻它。欢迎来到彩梦校庆，美梦多彩，理想自由！
E: Robin gave a speech, hoping everyone could find their dreams at Paperfold University and devote their lives to pursuing them. Welcome to the Dreamlight Anniversary, where you could color your dreams and free your ideals!

C: 星期日乔装归来，街头风声暗涌，各大家系议论昔日混乱与橡木家系失势。
E: Sunday returned in disguise. The streets of Penacony were full of rumors as different lineages discussed the previous chaos and how the Oak Family lost their power.

C: 瓦尔特质疑星期日的告别不够坦率，星期日坚持分寸已足，兄妹之间的牵绊如此足以。
E: Welt questioned whether Sunday's farewell was straightforward enough. Sunday insisted that it was enough for the bond between the siblings.

C: 你们在启蒙王座前遭遇黑衣剑士，迷迷察觉到严重威胁，想要逃离杀戮、死亡与毁灭的记忆。为给瑟希斯争取时间，你与遐蝶被迫应战。
E: At the Luminary Throne, you came face to face with the black-robed swordsman. Sensing an overwhelming threat, Mem tried to escape the memory soaked in carnage, death and destruction. To buy Cerces more time, you and Castorice had no choice but to engage the enemy.

C: 克拉特鲁斯与盗火行者对峙，对方嗤笑其不堪一击。克拉特鲁斯仍然举盾，誓以悬锋勇士之名保护缇安，高呼「宁战死，毋荣归」。
E: Krateros engaged in a standoff with the Flame Reaver, who mocked his weakness. Krateros raised his shield anyway, proclaiming, "Valorous Death Before Glorious Return." On his honor as a Kremnoan warrior, he swore to protect Trianne.

C: 卡芙卡与银狼走到星核容器前。在银狼的骇客操作下，星核的解锁与载体的准备很快完成。
E: Kafka and Silver Wolf approached the Stellaron vessel. With Silver Wolf's hacking, the unlocking and preparation of Stellaron were rapidly completed.

C: 你捡到散落的「光锥」。丹恒称这是流光忆庭的技术，能将记忆随身携带以强化自身。阿兰让你将其装备以增强战斗能力。
E: You picked up a dropped Light Cone. Dan Heng explained that this was a technology of the Garden of Recollection, allowing one to bring memories along to enhance oneself. Arlan helped you equip it to enhance your combat power.

C: 丹恒与你对视一眼，互相沉默了起来。也许，一切尽在不言中。
E: You and Dan Heng looked at each other, and you both fell silent. Perhaps, everything had been said without a word.

C: 蜃影中，丹枫带应星来到此地，称给应星一个时辰的时间进行研究。
E: In the Mirage Echo, Dan Feng brought Yingxing to this place, saying he would give Yingxing a dual-hour to conduct research.

C: 黄泉打败巡逻于此的忆域迷因，一张便条从其身上掉落。从内容来看，朝露公馆的工作人员忙于其他任务，黄泉猜测有人故意支开他们。
E: Acheron defeated the patrolling Memory Zone Meme, which dropped a note. From the contents, it seemed like the staff at Dewlight Pavilion were busy with other tasks. She suspected that someone had deliberately sidetracked them.

C: 你们在街道上遇到三月七和一位胆小的家族成员。米沙尝试安抚来宾，家族成员的负面情绪太强烈，引来了附近的忆域迷因。
E: On the streets, you encountered March 7th and a timid member of The Family. Misha tried to calm the guest, but The Family member's intense negative emotions attracted nearby Memory Zone Memes.

C: 黄泉与老者立于虚无之海。老者以超度「血罪灵」来对抗虚无宿命，无所谓其意义。黄泉愿意帮助，以探求「虚无」的意义。
E: Acheron stood with an old man upon the Sea of Nihility. The old man fought against the fate of Nihility by purifying Sin Thirsters, indifferent to whether it held any meaning. Acheron offered her aid, seeking to understand the meaning of the Nihility itself.

C: 三月七告诉你收到匿名按钮的怪事，担忧匹诺康尼的未来。
E: March 7th told you about the weird business regarding the suspicious button and was worried about Penacony's future.

C: 流萤向知更鸟打探典当行的位置，意外得知星穹列车将获家族致谢赠礼。
E: Firefly asked Robin for the location of the pawnshop and learned, to her surprise, that the Astral Express would be thanked and given a gift by The Family.

C: 波提欧查看睡蕉社情况，遇到炫耀自己弄到超级稀有「蕉版卡」的社员。有了这张烫金卡面后，对方甚至茶不思饭不想。
E: While checking on the Slumbernana Association, Boothill encountered a member bragging about getting their hands on a super rare BanaCard. With that shiny card embossed in gold, it had completely lost interest in eating or drinking.

C: 你回到房间收拾行李，准备开始跃迁。
E: You went back to your room to pack up, preparing for the upcoming warp.

C: 你回到浴宫，迷迷出现在你身边。迷迷能说出完整的句子了，称只要继续收集散落的记忆，就会有好事发生。你在迷迷的陪伴下入眠。
E: Returning to the bath chamber, Mem appeared by your side. It was now able to form full sentences, saying that as long as you continued collecting the scattered memories, good things would follow. And so, with Mem beside you, you drifted into peaceful sleep.

C: 万敌与克拉特鲁斯联手解决元老院的眼线，随后讨论悬锋族人的未来。克拉特鲁斯渴望重建荣光，但万敌认为这会将悬锋一族送上末路。
E: Having eliminated the Council's spies, Mydei and Krateros debated the future of the Kremnoans. While Krateros hungers to restore their former glory, Mydei warned this path would only lead their people to annihilation.

C: 你们慰问库娜涅和阿塔卡玛的父亲。原本还担心女儿们在树庭闯祸的老者，在得知噩耗后，唯余震惊与轻微的啜泣。
E: You visited the father of Cynane and Artakama. The old man, who had originally worried about his daughters causing trouble in the Grove, was left only with stunned silence and quiet sobs upon hearing the tragic news.

C: 万敌按克拉特鲁斯所说，来找哈托努斯，试图寻求建议。
E: Following Krateros's words, Mydei sought out Chartonus, hoping for some guidance.

C: 缇里西庇俄丝被闲晃的男子拦住，对方觊觎她的小发明。缇里西庇俄丝不愿多作回应，告辞离去。
E: Tribios was stopped by a loitering man who had his eyes on her little invention. Not wanting to engage further, she bid farewell and left.

C: 那刻夏与遐蝶谈论死亡之旅。那刻夏的灵魂去到了冥界，与潮汐中听到一众英雄人物的谈话。
E: Anaxa and Castorice discussed his journey of death. When Anaxa's soul went to the nether realm, he overheard a conversation between heroes.

C: 风堇召唤出将军特克菈的英魂，谈论逐火的使命，取得其赐福。命运的箴言为风堇揭示：<color=#f29e38ff>「在彩虹桥的尽头，天空之子将缝补晨昏。」</color>
E: Hyacine summoned the soul of General Ektra. They discussed the Flame-Chase duty, and Hyacine gained her second blessing. Such was the prophecy revealed to Hyacine: <color=#f29e38ff>"At the end of the rainbow bridge, the Skyfolk will mend dusk and dawn."</color>

C: 你们进入第三气象单元。白厄清除浑象仪周围的黑潮怪物，与祷言装置的交互则由你负责。
E: You entered the third weather unit. While Phainon cleared out the black tide monsters near the celestial globe, you were trusted with handling the prayer device.

C: 受压迫的旧信徒与「清洗者」合作，意欲铲除僭越的塞涅俄丝。但「清洗者」不敢与泰坦正面对抗，只将匕首对准无辜的黄金裔们。
E: The oppressed believers worked with the "Cleaners," intending to assassinate the usurper, Seliose. However, the "Cleaners" dared not engage a Titan in direct combat, so they trained their daggers on the innocent Chrysos Heirs hidden in the Skyfolk's midst.

C: 塞涅俄丝的人性之声自泰坦残躯中传来，称你们达成了掌控「天空」的功业，配得上一个崭新的黎明。
E: The voice of humanity from Seliose echoed from the Titan's remains, declaring you worthy masters of Sky and heralds of a new dawn.

C: 白厄收回「死亡」的火种，于此已经历两百万三千四百三十二次轮回。
E: Phainon reclaimed the Coreflame of Death. By now, he had already experienced <unbreak>2,003,432</unbreak> cycles.

C: 白厄收回「天空」的火种，第两千三百五十七万次轮回宣告终结。他踏上「毁灭」的必经之途，为世界带来一场万物皆焚的变革。
E: Phainon claimed the Coreflame of the Sky, and the <unbreak>23,570,000</unbreak>th cycle came to a close. He stepped onto the destined road of "Destruction," ushering in a revolution for the world that incinerated all existences.

C: 你们一行人来到大剧院，发现音符小姐挡在路中央。音符小姐解放宝具力量，使众人陷入沉眠。
E: You and the team arrived at the Grand Theater, only to find Miss Note standing in the center of the path. She unleashed her Noble Phantasm, plunging everyone into a deep sleep.

C: 断锋爵与冬霖爵重伤倒地，逐火军团被酣歌的鱼群蚕食殆尽。残忍的凯撒和她的骑士统领伫立于对岸，她们的手上都浸满金色的鲜血。
E: Dux Fragoris and Dux Brumalis collapsed, gravely wounded. The Flame-Chase Army was devoured by warbling fish. On the opposite shore stood the ruthless Imperator and her Knight Commander, their hands soaked in golden blood.

C: 黑塔要求「赞达尔」放弃对「铁墓」的演算。后者却称翁法罗斯是三重命途「死斗」之地，「记忆」和祂的孩子们将趁虚而入，抵达战场。
E: Herta demanded Zandar cease all extrapolations involving the Irontomb. But he claimed Amphoreus was where the Three Paths clashed in a battle to the death. Remembrance and their children would exploit this opening to seize the battlefield.

C: 残像中，对昔涟的格式化即将完成时，权杖系统中出现了罕见的进程错误。昔涟惊讶，然后是欣喜，并对她故事的听众表示感谢。
E: In the afterimage, just as Cyrene's formatting was about to complete, a rare process error appeared in the Scepter system. Cyrene was surprised, then delighted, and expressed gratitude to the audience of her story.

C: 丹恒请海瑟音再度追踪你和长夜月的位置。与先前不同的是，如今层岩已尽在丹恒掌握。而丹恒找回你的决心，也比「大地」更坚不可摧。
E: Dan Heng asked Hysilens to track your location and Evernight's once again. Unlike before, the cliffs were now completely under Dan Heng's control. And Dan Heng's determination to find you was even more unshakeable than the Earth.

C: 黑塔推测，「德谬歌」从一开始就在人们的视线中，只是被当成了另一个人。之所以矩阵里空空如也，是因为「德谬歌」早已逃离。
E: Herta theorized that Demiurge had been in plain sight all along, only mistaken for someone else. The matrix is empty because Demiurge had already escaped.

C: 从诞生到道别，「记忆的幼芽」学习着关于昔涟的一切，直到遭遇未有记忆的空白。连同这份空白，「记忆的幼芽」将昔涟的记忆全都保存下来。
E: From birth to farewell, the Bud of Memory has learned everything about Cyrene, until encountering a blank without memory. Along with this blank, the Bud of Memory preserved all of Cyrene's memories.

C: 应物科科员们正在核对维修报表，损失清单中似乎出现了本不存在的奇物。
E: Researchers from the Department of Implement Arts were reviewing maintenance reports. Strangely, the damage inventory listed a Curio that wasn't supposed to exist.

C: 你阅读阮•梅的投影记录，得知她试图剥去外界纷扰，复现一种不可捉摸的、最本源、也最美丽的「生命形式」。
E: You read Ruan Mei's materialized records. You learned that she had tried to strip away all external noise in search of an elusive, primordial, and most beautiful "lifeform."

C: 面前的房门突然打开，你意识到这是个等待探索的隐藏房间。
E: The door in front of you suddenly opened. You realized it was a hidden room waiting to be explored.

C: 你们向克拉拉征询对合同的看法。克拉拉反对签署合同，不愿意让渡未来，希望让贝洛伯格的大家拥有更多人生的可能性。
E: You consulted Clara about the contract. She opposed signing it, unwilling to give up the future and hoping to create more possibilities in life for everyone in Belobog.

C: 帕斯卡的机体状况仍在恶化。史瓦罗提供的线索显示：下层区仍存在3台与帕斯卡有相同序列号的自动机兵。
E: Pascal's physical condition continued to deteriorate. According to Svarog's intel, there were 3 automatons in the Underworld that shared the same serial number as Pascal.

C: 丹鼎司医士陆英告诫丹恒离开此地，不要干扰白露继承龙尊之位。
E: Luying, a healer from the Alchemy Commission, warned Dan Heng to leave and not interfere with Bailu's succession to the position of high elder.

C: 丹恒一行来到船舶生产的起始处。彦卿想起，一本名为《涯海星槎胜览》的游记就是白珩所作。而在镜流的描述中，白珩正如书中所述，驾驶星槎时运气极差，却又能够每次保住性命。
E: Dan Heng's group arrived at the origin point of starskiff production. Yanqing recalled that a travelogue titled Views of the Universe from a Starskiff had been authored by Baiheng. According to Jingliu's description, just as mentioned in the book, Baiheng had terrible luck when piloting starskiffs, yet somehow always managed to survive.

C: 镜流与罗刹本该被押送至虚陵，然而景元为了阻挠二人的谋划，假借「戎韬将军」之名将他们送往玉阙。
E: Jingliu and Luocha were supposed to be escorted to the Xuling. But to thwart their schemes, Jing Yuan used the name of Seer Strategist to send them to the Yuque instead.

C: 你同帕沃尔了解情况，他认为「孤云」绝非魔剑，而是崇高的君王之剑。
E: You discussed the situation with Paavo. He firmly believed that Guyun was no cursed sword, but a noble sword worthy of monarchs.

C: 椒丘认为，传授适合三月七天性的技巧才能令她事半功倍。椒丘展示医道作为生杀一体之术的双面性，彦卿提议带大家前往「竞锋舰」。
E: Jiaoqiu believed tailoring techniques to March 7th's innate nature would accelerate her learning. As Jiaoqiu demonstrated the duality of medical arts as both life-giving and lethal, Yanqing proposed taking everyone to the Skysplitter.

C: 彦卿急忙劝住迷路的三月七，使其回到跟踪嫌疑人士的路线上。
E: Yanqing swiftly intercepted the lost March 7th and steered her back onto the suspect's trail.

C: 漫长的等待后，货箱重新落地。神秘狐人们前往检查船只，似乎打算利用迴星港的舰船载他们离开仙舟。
E: After a long wait, the crate landed again. The mysterious foxians went to inspect the skiffs, seemingly planning to use the vessels at Stargazer Navalia to leave the Xianzhou.

C: 你顺利结束与飞霄的对话，有效解释了她所提出的问题。
E: Your conversation with Feixiao ended smoothly, having effectively addressed her concerns.

C: 你们没有时间再去询问浮烟，而是直接行动，寻找作乱的岁阳。
E: Without time to interrogate Cirrus further, you decided to take action immediately and find the heliobus wreaking havoc.

C: 会议结束后，<color=#f29e38ff>砂金</color>与托帕通话，表达对同事的安慰。砂金提议与托帕合作，共同开展关于「匹诺康尼」的大项目。
E: Once the conference ended, <color=#f29e38ff>Aventurine</color> reached out to Topaz, offering a few words of comfort to a colleague. He then suggested teaming up with her on a major project involving "Penacony."

C: 刷赞服务私戳，全自动脚本，售后齐全。
E: DM to buy views and likes. Fully automated script. After-sales service included.

C: 铁卫禁区
E: Silvermane Guard Restricted Zone

C: 模拟宇宙
E: Simulated Universe

C: 差分宇宙
E: Divergent Universe

C: 模拟宇宙
E: Simulated Universe

C: 这种坏事，一定是泯灭帮干的！
E: This must be the Annihilation Gang's handiwork!

C: 尝尝标有「木质调」的那碗。
E: Try the one labeled "Woody Notes."

C: 标准的锤砧战术，付出些许损伤后，你们取得胜利。
E: The standard hammer and anvil approach. You gain victory after some minor losses.

C: 筑城新纪元最缺的是什么？人才啊！
E: What's most lacking in the new era of city-building? Talent!

C: 很快就能修好造物引擎、发动「雪鸣」了。
E: The Engine of Creation will be fixed soon, and "Snow's Howl" will be activated.

C: 你基本猜了个八九不离十。
E: Your guess turns out to be almost exactly right.

C: 外面的世界冰冷、坚硬，但也真实。
E: The outside world is cold and tough, but it's at least real.

C: 看看什么叫做工匠精神。
E: Talk about craftsmanship!

C: 「嘿，再靠近一点。爱情是我心中的程序错误。」
E: "Hey, come a little closer. Love is the bug in my code."

C: 椒丘
E: Jiaoqiu

C: 砂金
E: Aventurine

C: 螺丝咕姆
E: Screwllum

C: 仙舟「罗浮」
E: The Xianzhou Luofu

C: 「纵是繁育令使的拟造体，也不过在我的手下活了五十六秒。」——某段消失的记忆中，开拓者如是说。
E: "Even an emulation of a Propagation Emanator only managed to stay alive for <unbreak>56</unbreak> seconds under my relentless attacks." - Said the Trailblazer in a certain disappeared memory.

C: Português
E: Português

C: 花形吊灯
E: Flower-Shaped Chandelier

C: 展阅立柜
E: Display Cabinet

C: 小往小来
E: Mini Back'n Forth

C: 立牌
E: Standing Sign

C: 咖啡厅
E: Coffee Lounge

C: 剧目海报
E: Theatrical Poster

C: 水流
E: Stream

C: 空间站的标志
E: Emblem of the Space Station

C: 觐见装置
E: Communing Device

C: 忆泡：回家的路
E: Memory Bubble: The Road Home

C: 仙舟「罗浮」：乘槎驭风仙窟游
E: Xianzhou Luofu: Windswept Wanderlust

C: 腐烂或燃烧
E: To Rot or to Burn

C: 完成开拓任务「兵士们默默无言」
E: Complete Trailblaze Mission "Soldiers Stay Silent"

C: 点亮了3位逐火者的命路
E: Light up 3 Flame-Chaser's Paths

C: 阅读所有篇章
E: Read All Chapters

C: 完成开拓续闻「未来市场」
E: Complete Trailblaze Continuance "Future Market"

C: 在「星间旅行」活动中累计贡献开拓券#4
E: Contribute a total of #4 in Trailblaze Funds in the event "Cosmodyssey"

C: 将综合区-内的展区等级升至4
E: Level up the exhibition area in the General Hall — Interior to Lv. 4

C: 完成第四遗迹浅层探索的第#1层
E: Complete Surface Exploration level #1 for ruin 4

C: 在「第3折：优势火力」中获得#1分
E: Obtain #1 points in "Scene 3: Superior Firepower"

C: 在匹诺康尼开启#4个「战利品」
E: Open #4 treasure(s) in Penacony

C: 通关「差分宇宙」时，获得#4次及以上战斗胜利
E: Clear Divergent Universe with #4 or more battles won

C: 研究等级达到#1级
E: Reach Research Level #1

C: 完成齿轮星球的首领挑战后解锁
E: Unlock by completing the Cogwheel Planet's Boss challenge

C: 完成冒险任务「初花剑客行•剑斗」
E: Complete the Adventure Mission "Way of Primaveral Blade: Swordspar"

C: 在致命弱点「超巨星」模式中，击败#3波敌人
E: Eliminate #3 wave(s) of enemies in the Fatal Weakness "Supergiant Star" mode challenge

C: 完成「枘凿六合·Remake」困难模式III
E: Complete "Hexanexus: Remake" Hard Mode III

C: 在「翁法罗斯」捕捉#4个「贼灵」，并夺回被抢走的宝藏
E: Catch #4 Spirithieves in Amphoreus and take back the stolen treasure

C: 考核周期结束时，队伍排名达到第1名
E: Your team achieves Rank 1 at the end of the assessment period.

C: 订阅等级达到#1
E: Reach Subscription Level #1

C: 磷火蒐录
E: The Specterlight Collection

C: 竞技段位达到「海豹新星」
E: Reach the arena rank of "Seal Rising Star"

C: 在烈毒盛宴「超巨星」模式中，击败#3波敌人
E: Eliminate #3 wave(s) of enemies in the Venomous Feast "Supergiant Star" mode challenge

C: 在迷境商店完成#4次「以物易物」
E: Complete Barter trades at the Maze Store #4 time(s)

C: 将任意员工培训至3级
E: Train any staff member to level 3

C: 累计服务#4个顾客
E: Serve a total of #4 customers

C: 给1名角色穿戴3件进阶装备
E: Equip 3 advanced equipment on 1 character

C: 【以太涂鸦】利用场景内的涂鸦机关，突破被封锁的区域。
E: Aether Graffiti: Use the graffiti mechanisms in the stage to break out of the sealed sector.

C: 此役战果将决定铁卫能否在下层区重新求取信任——愿众战士在大守护者的注视下旗开得胜。
E: The outcome of this match will decide the trustworthiness of the Silvermane Guards in the Underworld. May all the warriors achieve victory under the watchful gaze of the Supreme Guardian.

C: 哀地里亚——飘雪的死亡之邦，曾在风雪中矗立，也在风雪中缄默。在那里，幼小的圣女学会了生与死的重量——以一种几近残忍的方式。
E: Aidonia — the snow-dusted kingdom of death — once stood tall amidst the blizzards, and now remains silent beneath them. There, the young Holy Maiden learned the weight of life and death — in an almost cruel way.

C: 直面「晨昏之眼」艾格勒，为天空的因缘画上句点。
E: Face Aquila, "Eye of Twilight" and bring the fate of the sky to a close.

C: 梦中冰冷刺骨，少女的过去和未来自此交织……
E: The dream was cold and piercing. Here, the girl's past and future intertwined...

C: 裂界征兆
E: Signs of Fragmentum

C: 收集全部千纸鹤
E: Collect all the origami cranes.

C: 开拓者高级补给包
E: Trailblazer Advanced Supply Pack

C: 6480枚古老梦华
E: Oneiric Shard ×6480

E: ≈<icon SpriteName=CurrencyFTC102 id=0 width=1 height=1>×<unbreak>6.8</unbreak>    <color=#f29e38ff>$<unbreak>2.21</unbreak></color>/<icon SpriteName=CurrencyFTC102 id=1 width=1 height=1>

C: 击破特攻提高<unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>。
E: Increases Break Effect by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>.

E: Increases SPD by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>.

C: 圣骑的沉默誓环
E: Knight's Silent Oath Ring

C: 隐士的驼色夹克
E: Recluse's Camel-Colored Coat

C: 露莎卡的双生航道
E: Lushaka's Twinlanes

C: 筑城者的贝洛伯格
E: Belobog of the Architects

C:
歌德家祖传的旧款军服长期被压在箱底，只有属于军人的荣誉才能将之唤回世间。

面对毁灭士卒的蛮荒推进，银鬃铁卫誓守天险，早已经没有退路。

维瓦洛保卫战中，霍尔斯•歌德率领敢死队苦守隘口长达数月，直到增援的号角回荡山谷，众人才知道英雄们早已尸骨无存。大守护者阿丽萨在嘉奖仪式上亲手为英勇的霍尔斯•歌德后人别上荣誉勋章，小歌德身穿旧制军服，代表逝去的英雄们，挺起了胸膛。

小歌德看到的是军服和勋章，而大守护者看到的却是英雄们留下的遗产——贝洛伯格的未来。

「霍尔斯•歌德是真正的战士，你应以歌德之姓为豪。」这句话是年轻的歌德对大守护者仅有的记忆。
E:
An old-fashioned Silvermane Guard uniform passed down for generations in the Goethe family. This uniform has long been buried at the bottom of a chest, and only a soldier's honor might be worthy of its return to the world.

As the soldiers of Destruction marched ever closer, the Silvermane Guards swore to defend the last barrier even when there was no possibility of a retreat.

During the Defense of Vevalo, Horace Goethe led his squad in the months-long defense of a key mountain pass. When the trumpets of arriving reinforcements finally sounded in the valley, that valiant company of heroes was long gone, and even their remains were nowhere to be found. At the commendation ceremony, Supreme Guardian Alisa pinned a medal of honor on Horace Goethe's young son. The boy stood upright in this old-fashioned uniform, representing those who had made the ultimate sacrifice.

The young Goethe junior saw uniforms and medals on that day, but the Supreme Guardian saw so much more. She witnessed the greatest legacy left behind by heroes — the future of Belobog.

"Horace Goethe was a true warrior. You should be proud to bear the Goethe name." This was the young Goethe's only memory of the Supreme Guardian.

C:
在匹诺康尼关于「钟表匠」的故事里，他总是别具慧眼，能轻易看穿梦幻泡影下的商机，创造出谁也未曾料想的伟大事业。

边陲监狱在万界之癌中争得自由，又在家族的光照下迎来和平与繁荣。据说钟表匠就是在此刻入局，他的目镜映出这片梦境的本质——人们在「薄暮的时刻」挥金如土，只为寻得「梦中的不可能之事」。从此，匹诺康尼的梦中出现了许多不可思议的事物：会讲笑话的茶壶、一边行驶一边旋转的跑车、每天都会变换位置的豪宅…它们大多毫无用处，却标卖着天文数字，而那些远道而来的人们，却愿意为之挥霍无度。

此乃虚幻梦境，何不放肆狂想？一句「独存梦中，独一无二」，便将梦境中的奢侈与价值重新定义。

苜蓿草家系与商界的老逐梦客们总为此事感到懊悔，埋怨自己为何没有早点看到这样的机会。而钟表匠只不过是看得比他们远了一点——每次都远了一点。
E:
In the stories about the Watchmaker in Penacony, he always possesses a unique insight that allows him to easily discern business opportunities beneath the dreamy bubbles, and create grandiose enterprises that none have thought of.

The frontier prison earned its freedom amidst the Cancer of All Worlds, and welcomed peace and prosperity under the radiance of The Family. It is said that was when the Watchmaker entered the fray. His eyepiece reflected the essence of this Dreamscape — People spend like wastrels in the Moment of Dusk only to "seek the impossible in dreams." From then on, Penacony's dreams started to contain many incredulous objects: Teapots that can tell jokes, race cars that twirl as they drive, and mansions that switch their location every day... Most of them are utterly useless, however they are being sold at astronomical prices. And those who visit from afar are willing to toss mountains of cash for them.

This is a fantastical Dreamscape, so why not indulge in madness? The words "Exclusive and only in the dream" are enough to redefine the worth of luxuries in the Dreamscape.

The Alfalfa Family and old Dreamchasers from the commercial world often feel regret about this, lamenting that they did not spot these opportunities at earlier times. The Watchmaker simply saw a bit further than them — Just a bit further every time.

C: ……凭「繁育」的智商，祂大抵没机会知道自己有多悲惨——祂在诞生的数纪后便匆匆陨落，除了漫天的虫群外没给宇宙留下任何东西。证据确凿的是：蠹星那场声势汹涌的屠杀，背后一定另有隐情。但恐怕背后的运作者也未曾预料塔伊兹育罗斯会在「偶然」中飞升成神——又或者他压根不在乎。除了星神，还有谁能扮演这个角色？另外，我还有一个发现：塔伊兹育罗斯在生理上，似乎并不接近虫类物种中定义的任何性别。这个发现有任何意义吗？似乎没有，我只将其记录下而已……
E: ...With the Propagation's intelligence, THEY probably didn't have a chance to realize how pitiful THEY were. Tayzzyronth fell quickly, just several Amber Eras after THEIR birth, leaving nothing behind in the universe except a Swarm as far as the eye can see. The only thing confirmed by the evidence is that there must have been something behind that cataclysmic massacre on Lepismat, but I'm afraid that even the one behind the act never anticipated for Tayzzyronth to ascend to godhood by "chance." Or maybe the mastermind just didn't care. Now, what else but an Aeon could have played such a conniving role? Also, I made another discovery: It seems that, biologically, Tayzzyronth cannot be clearly classified into any of the genders present in sexually reproducing insect species. Does this discovery have any significance? It doesn't seem to. I'm just documenting it...

C: ……岚倒是经常在凡人眼前露面，但祂的速度太快，本体的观察样本少而又少。比较可靠的资料都藏在仙舟联盟，弄到它花了我不少功夫。作为宇宙中极为稀少的，拥有星神完全赐福的派系；联盟是少数能和公司平等交流的存在，所以指望公司这条线根本没戏，最后还得靠阮•梅出面。在仙舟古语中，「岚」的意思是「不可捉摸的雾」，祂在仙舟的正式称呼是「帝弓司命」，按照仙舟人的解释，正是在文明行将陨落的岁月里，「巡猎」的光矢为他们指明了方向……
E: ...Lan, on the other hand, often appears before mortals. However, THEY move too fast, and very few observations have been made about THEIR actual form. Most of the reliable information is kept by the Xianzhou Alliance and it took me a great amount of effort to get. As one of the rare factions in the universe that is completely blessed by an Aeon, the Alliance stands on equal grounds with the IPC, which meant the IPC couldn't help me at all. In the end, Ruan Mei had to step up to help. In the ancient Xianzhou language, "Lan" means "an unpredictable fog," and the Aeon's formal name in Xianzhou is Reignbow Arbiter. According to Xianzhou natives, the Lux Arrow of The Hunt showed them the way as their civilization was about to fall...

C:
当星系内的三百三十三个国家只留下最后的名字，破灭的命运已沿着亡者的诅咒找上门来。结束的争斗并未带走它毫无底线的创伤，全民性的染色体的断裂和粉碎，就连龟缩在地堡的总统也难以幸免。

你用尽了毕生的学识，可畸变和器官衰竭死死地抓住绳索的那头，将人们拽离世间，直到那背生枝桠的异乡使节带着仙药到来。他遏止了溃烂的蔓延，告诉你们，想要救治将亡的国民，唯有祂的神力方可实现。慈怀的药王疗愈众生的苦楚，长生的良药消弭浊世的欲念。

望海星云的舰队扬帆起航，它要从药师的手中求得灵药，断绝死亡和疫病的狂妄。
E:
When the three hundred and thirty-three nations in the planetary system dwindle to mere names, the destiny of annihilation has already visited, following the path laid out by the curses of the dead. The cessation of war fails to heal the wounds that have no bottom line. All residents had their DNA shredded and shattered, and even the president cowering in his bunker has not been spared.

You pull with all the knowledge you've amassed in your lifetime, but the deformities and organ failure grip the other end of the rope tightly, dragging people into the afterworld. Until one day, a foreign envoy with branches sprouting out of his back arrives with a divine elixir. He halts the spread of the festering disease, preaching to us that only with THEIR divine power can salvation for the residents be achieved. The merciful Sanctus Medicus spreads THEIR healing wings, lifting the heavy burden of suffering from humanity's shoulders, and quenches all worldly desires with THEIR immortality elixir.

The fleet from the Seaview Nebula sets sail, seeking the elixir from the hands of Yaoshi, aiming to quell the audacity of perpetual death and epidemic.

C:
湮灭吞噬了眼前的光景，你将耳朵贴到舱壁上，真空里听不见他们的悲鸣。你在目录上划去一个目标，这些该死的名字一次次刺痛你脆弱的母星，直到它最终分崩离析。

其一为布雷塔德人，以教化之名，将贪欲引至洛特-Ⅸ，采矿者，投资人，他们用文明的方式瓜分稚嫩的土地。其二为星际和平公司，收购去行星的百分之九十，将古老的圣殿推倒，修筑星港与工厂。其三为焦土行者，以卑劣的杀戮为乐趣，只为满足沉沦的欣喜……

倒转时光的沙漏，追溯过往。凡曾伤害的，你必要他们付出更多。
E:
Obliteration swallows the scene before you as you press your ear to the bulkhead, unable to hear their wails in the vacuum. You strike out a target from the catalog. These cursed names hurt your fragile home planet again and again, until it ultimately shattered.

First is the Bretaden, who, under the guise of indoctrination, have lured greed to Lott-IX as miners and investors, dividing the nascent land among themselves in a civilized way. Next is the Interastral Peace Corporation, which purchased ninety percent of the planet, bulldozing ancient sanctuaries to erect starports and factories. Lastly, there are the Walkers of the Scorched, who take perverse pleasure in killing, driven solely by the immersive thrill...

Turn back the hourglass and trace the contours of the past. Those who have caused you pain must now pay more.

C:
想知道我此行的目的地吗？被群山环绕的故乡。
崖壁上雕刻着蹩脚的花朵，大地兽俯身休憩，听着笑声入眠。
我们来自翁法罗斯的各个角落，
废墟的深处，因轻雨的冷而发出哭泣，直到被山之民们收养。
他们失去了自己的神灵，失去了一切，
不再冶炼，笨拙的手播撒种子，坚硬的臂膀拥抱新生，
哺育生命，乃是磐岩之脊留存给世人的，最后的天职。
大地已然陨落，背负着火种的巨兽不知去向，
但我仍愿合掌，向创造此间的吉奥里亚祈祷，愿生命茁壮成长。
E:
You want to know where I am going? It's my homeland, surrounded by mountains.
The cliffs there are adorned with awkwardly carved flowers, and the dromas rest in the valley, lulled to sleep by laughter of the inhabitants.
We were from every corner of Amphoreus.
In the deep ruins, we wailed in the cold rains until the Mountain Dwellers took them in.
The Mountain Dwellers lost everything, including their gods.
They stopped smelting. Their clumsy hands started to plow and sow. Their sturdy arms cradled new life.
Nurture was the last calling left to humans by the Pillar of Stone.
The earth has fallen. The Coreflame-carrying beasts have disappeared.
And I'll fold my hands in prayer to Georios. May life flourish again.

C:
这群可憎的恶鸟，天空的顽疾，
窃取艾格勒光辉的败类，戕害生灵。
小麦被你们啃啄，城邦遭你们侵袭，
刀杀不死你们，箭射不穿你们。
只有黄金裔滚烫的金血，才能将你们燃烧殆尽，
可新的种子刚刚播撒，你们又卷土重来。
我对你们立下最恶毒的诅咒，
我诅咒你们饥肠辘辘，同类相食。
我诅咒你们双翅尽折，跌落泥尘。
我诅咒你们全族受戮，根羽不留。
最后我诅咒自己，我愿化身高天之上的雄鹰，
用黄金铸成的爪子将你们碾碎。
不，我的子子孙孙都将化为雄鹰，
世世代代上演猎杀的游戏。
E:
You evil birds, the plague of the skies.
You steal Aquila's radiant glory and wreak havoc on all living beings,
Devouring wheat fields and invading city-states.
Unbreakable by swords and impervious to arrows,
Only the boiling golden blood of the Chrysos Heir can consume you.
Yet, as soon as new seeds are planted, you rise again with relentless ferocity.
Upon you, I cast the darkest curse.
May you suffer hunger, ending up devouring one another.
May your wings snap and crash you into the dirt.
May your entire clan fall, leaving no feather nor trace alive.
As for me, I vow to ascend as an eagle in the sky,
Crushing you under my golden claws.
No, it doesn't end with me — my descendants shall all become eagles,
Continuing the eternal hunt, from one generation to the next.

C: 腐败交易
E: Corrupt Deal

C: 颓唐的自灭者中流传着一个说法：即宇宙万物并无意义，人类在星神眼里亦不值一提。如果星神当真凌驾众生，高高在上，又怎会在乎凡人的爱恨苦乐？沉眠无相者Ⅸ的存在就是明证。为了向自灭者证明星神在乎，混沌医师结合秘学僧侣的巫神术制造了星神火漆，据说盖下这枚火漆，就会遥遥吸引对应星神跨越时空的瞥视——目前还没有成功案例，不过，确实有些自灭者盖下火漆后，重拾了对宇宙、星神及其它一切的信心。
E: There is a saying amongst the dejected Self-Annihilators that the universe has no purpose and humans are nothing in the eyes of the Aeons. If the Aeons truly stand above all lifeforms and rule supreme, then why would they care about the everyday concerns of mortals? The existence of the sleeping and shapeless IX is proof of that. To show the Self-Annihilators that the Aeons do care, the Doctors of Chaos combined the demon god crafts of the occult monks to create the Sealing Wax of Aeons. It is said that stamping with this Sealing Wax will attract a glimpse from the corresponding Aeon from across space and time — There are no successful examples yet, but some Self-Annihilators did regain their faith in the universe, Aeons, and everything else after stamping with this sealing wax.

C: 「我见过帝皇鲁珀特！」这一天机械时傍晚九点，侵入性「奇思狂想」准点步入机械城某罐缸中之脑的思维。它无法辨别自己是有机还是无机，抑或只是一团气体？它声称自己面见帝皇，只为摆脱脑内的「奇思狂想」——它在它脑袋里乱撞，过载的思考令它疲惫不堪，而鲁珀特只是修改了一处不起眼的代码，就令它如梦初醒——它醒来后意识到一切从未发生，这不过是又一次狂想。
E: "I've seen Emperor Rubert!" Following the machine era calendar, on this day at nine in the evening, the invasive "Wildminder" entered the thoughts of a certain brain-in-a-jar in the Machine City. It was unable to distinguish whether itself was organic, inorganic, or just a gaseous lifeform. It claimed to have met the emperor, only to break away from the "Wildminder" in its head — The thought slammed the limits of its brain, overloading its thoughts to the point of exhaustion. But after Rubert fixed a single line of unmarkable code, it awakened from this haze, coming to realize that none of this had happened, that it had only been another illusion.

C: 据不可靠史料记载，在古兽尚且穿行于寰宇的时代，世上只存在一种形式的寿司。当「秩序」崩塌，「贪餮」消失无踪，原初的寿司崇拜信仰也分裂成诸多学派。在一众寿司师傅中，还原主义寿司学派的烹饪理念格外质朴，他们认为，寿司的本质，应该是被一层可食用外皮包裹的能量集合。因此，全宇宙最符合寿司定义的应该是——内燃机。
E: According to unreliable historical records, in the age when the Leviathans still traversed the cosmos, there existed only one type of sushi. When the Order collapsed and the Voracity vanished without a trace, the original sushi faith also splintered into numerous factions. Among the sushi masters, the Sushi Restoration faction's cooking philosophy was simple — They believed that the essence of sushi should be a gathering of energy wrapped within an edible layer. Therefore, the thing most fitting of the definition of sushi in the universe should be — the internal combustion engine.

C: 即使种种迹象表明，对于一直在宇宙中漂流的三月七，她刚醒来的情况并不算糟。 身处于一辆恰好路过的列车上，车上的人看上去也很亲切。 唯一的问题是，即使她对周遭的情况保有合理的认知，对自己却仍旧一无所知。 「我是谁，我来自哪里……」 三月七看着镜子中的自己，一边试穿姬子给她置备的各类服饰，一边为自己想象着几十种身世。 哪一种才是她的过去，哪一种才是她这样的女孩子应有的过去…三月七无法确定。 但三月七能选择的，只有现在的自己；她能望向的，也只有未来。 她恐惧着，又庆幸着。
E: For March 7th, who has been drifting in space, the situation in which she awoke isn't too bad. She woke up on a passing train, and the people on the train looked friendly. The only problem is that even though she has a reasonable understanding of what's going on around her, she still doesn't know anything about herself. "Who am I? Where do I come from..." March 7th looks at herself in the mirror, imagining dozens of potential past lives for herself as she tries on the various outfits that Himeko had assembled for her. But she can't be sure what her past was like, and what kind of past a girl like her should have... The only thing March 7th can choose to be is her current self, and the only thing she can look forward to is the future. She is both frightened and glad.

C: 剑，长五尺，重若千钧，玄黑的锋刃上血色浮泛。 剑以天外金石之瑛百炼所成，不遵兵仗规制，一如锻造它的那位短生种匠人般横逆不可当，狷狂已极。 从来只与剑为友的她，竟有了许多朋友。 她荣任剑首之日，匠人一袭黑衣出席典礼，负手投剑。剑没地数尺，惟余其柄。人人哗然。 「我造的剑，唯有罗浮云骑剑首方能诠尽真妙。」他露齿一笑。 如月般孤高傲岸的罗浮龙尊，因目睹她的神技，竟生出一较高下的胜负心。 枪与剑争锋多年，苦无结果。最终她于显龙大雩殿中一剑分断海潮，终于赢得龙尊钦服。 飞遍星海、见识广博的无名客曾为她操舟转舵，带来星海彼岸酿成的仙醪，与她酣饮畅谈，看天空中的群星熠熠。 「便是天上的星星，我也会斩下。」 她依稀记得酒酣耳热之际的豪言。自童年记忆中扑面而来的那颗燃烧星宿，那时时牵缠不休的恐怖梦魇仿佛也不再可憎可怖。 舞剑至今，她第一次明白了何谓生机。而在此之前，她所怀者，不过是死志罢了。 还有他，她的徒弟。 她想起与他的初识，这个年纪小小鬼主意却极多的孩子，曾问出与当年的自己相同的问题。 「师父为何执着于用剑？能杀死敌人的武器有千百种，就算要消灭那颗星星，仙舟的朱明火怕是也能做到。」 「这个问题就像问诗人为何要写诗一样？表达自我的方式有许多，但属于我的只有这一种。」 如今，他也已成为云骑的翘楚。 她已经没有老师了。戎装女子殒于战阵，无法再教她任何东西。 她也不再需要老师。对关于剑的一切，她了如指掌。它们就是身体的一部分，是行走坐卧间的一呼一吸。 人们称呼她「无罅飞光」，是万载犹不可得的剑士巅顶。但她明白，要「斩下天上的星星」，她的剑，仍然不够—— 即便她手中握着的，是夸称仙舟第一的宝剑…… 剑，长五尺，重若千钧，玄黑的锋刃上血色浮泛。
E: A sword, 5 feet in length, weighing as heavy as three thousand catties. The ebony blade shimmers with a sanguine sheen. The sword was forged from the nonstop tempering of extraterrestrial ores, a complete deviation from conventional weaponry. Untamed and unyielding, the sword mirrored the defiance and hubris of its short-life species creator. Once, she had only swords as her companions, but now she found herself with many friends. The day she was crowned as the Sword Champion, the craftsman attended the ceremony in a black garb and cast out the sword he bore. The sword sank deep into the ground, leaving only its hilt above the soil. All attendees were shocked. "Only the Sword Champion of the Luofu Cloud Knights can tap into the full potential of this sword I have crafted." He gave a toothy grin. The high elder of the Luofu, as haughty and detached as the high moon in the sky, felt an irresistible temptation to duel with her upon witnessing her peerless martial prowess with just one simple glance. The spear and the sword sparred for many years without a conclusion, until she cleaved ocean tides in twain with a single slash in the Dragonvista Rain Hall, and finally won the high elder's concession. A well-traveled Nameless who had flown across the cosmos had steered vessels for her, bringing divine nectar from the other side of the universe to share with her, and gazed upon the scintillating stars by her side. "I will cut down even the stars in the sky." She still vaguely remembers the boasts she made in moments of inebriation. That burning planet rushing towards her in childhood memories, that horrible nightmare that wouldn't let her go — those scenes are no longer so terrifying. This is the first time she understands what "wanting to live" means in all her years of wielding a sword. Before this moment, she was simply someone ready to die. And there was her student. She recalled the first time they met. This young but devious child had asked the same questions as she did. "Master, why do you insist on wielding a sword? There are thousands of weapons out there that can kill an enemy. If you want to destroy that planet, the Zhuming can probably do it with its artillery." "This is like asking a poet why they wrote poems. There are many ways to express oneself, but this is the only way for me." Now, he has also become a shining star amongst the Cloud Knights. She doesn't have a master anymore. The woman in armor perished on the battlefield and can instruct her no longer. Nor does she need a master anymore. She knows everything there is to know about swords. They are a part of her body. They are the intake and release of her breath as she walks and sleeps. People call her the Transcendent Flash, the pinnacle of swordmasters, a once-in-ten-millennia hero. However, she knows that her sword is still not enough to "cut down the star in the sky" — Even if she is holding the greatest sword in all the Xianzhou... A sword, 5 feet in length, weighing as heavy as three thousand catties. The ebony blade shimmers with a sanguine sheen.

C: 丹恒接纳了上一世「饮月君」所遗存的力量，所展露的持明族本相。\n既然接受了额顶的峥嵘角冠，便也要接受那人所负的一切功过。\n但从始至终，他都不是他。
E: Dan Heng's true Vidyadhara form, revealed after accepting the residual powers from the previous reincarnation of "Imbibitor Lunae."\nUpon accepting the majestic horned crown atop his forehead, he must accept all the merits and faults attributed to that person.\nHowever, he was never himself.

C: 她将剑翻了个身，好让火舌尽数吞没剑体。熔兵剑炉里弥散着灼烧的热温，此时却透出一股腥涩的怨味。 云璃面无表情地看着窗外的夕阳。伴随着年龄渐长，以前的疑问也逐渐有了答案。 岁阳…汲取人类的情绪、吞噬人类的感情…然而刀剑是武器，向敌的剑尖铸满杀意。炼入岁阳的利剑持续吸摄着刀光剑影里的嗔怒、嗜杀、暴戾，反噬执剑者的心智，最终成为「魔剑」。 「你知道他挥剑时的心情吗？兴奋…骄傲…唯我独尊！他不过是个普通的云骑，永远的吊车尾！他几百年甚至永远也不可能实现的愿望，是我替他完成了！你凭什么——」 她又添了把火。魔剑之将死，其言也多，啰嗦。 「呵…你知道他曾丢下佩剑，上马临阵脱逃吗？人类如此怯弱！你以为自己在做什么有意义的事吗？只要人类还有一丝一毫的欲望，你就不可能猎尽……」 在那之后，她确实立誓要猎尽魔剑，也想偿付含光罪孽，但那人罪业固然难以罄尽，她也实在不屑与孽债同行。空气被热温烘得有些扭曲，云璃盛气凛凛的神情却无比清晰。 「虽然我看不惯好剑被烂人糟蹋，但我也不想看到好人被恶剑侵蚀。 「是宝剑是屠刀，不由你们这些只想嗜血的邪秽决定。 「坏人当罚，坏剑当熔。你嘛，乖乖回炉重造吧。」 炉火彻底吞噬了魔剑，铁水伴着火星一起沸腾，宛若熔炼时剑髓的新生——这是她给出的答案。 「何不将魔剑熔去？熔为新生的铁水灵液，既断于无心，便等待有心之人再铸剑锋。」 她合上炉窗，高温浓缩，无形热浪裹挟着她的遐思。 一切正在重生。
E: She flipped the sword over to allow the flames to better engulf its body. A sense of bitter resentment rose up within her despite the searing temperature of the Molten Remains. Yunli stared expressionlessly into the sunset outside the window. With age, she had gradually found answers for the questions she once had. Heliobi... absorb human emotions and devour their feelings... The blade, a weapon that when pointed at enemies would be filled with killing intent. When used in battle, the sword infused with a heliobus would continuously absorb rage, bloodthirst, and violent tendencies, and would then eat away at the mind of its wielder until it eventually became a "cursed sword." "Do you know what he felt as he swung his sword? Exhilaration... Pride... A sense of self-importance! He was just an ordinary Cloud Knight who was always at the bottom of the barrel! I realized the wish that he could never have had achieved ever! Just what right do you have—" She added another kindling to the fire. Why did cursed swords have to be so long-winded even in the face of destruction? "Heh... Do you know that he once abandoned his sword and escaped on his horse? Humans are such cowards! Do you really think that there's any meaning in what you're doing? As long as humans retain the slightest desire, your hunt will never come to an end..." From that day onward, she vowed to hunt down all the cursed swords and make up for Hanguang's sins. However, he had committed too many sins to atone for, and she truly felt disdain at having to bear such a sinful burden. Despite distortions in the air due to the high temperature, Yunli's prideful expression could clearly be seen. "Although I cannot bear to watch good swords wasted on trash, I also refuse to see a good person corrupted by an evil sword. "Whether it turns out to be a treasured sword or a butcher's knife is not something for you bloodthirsty and evil filth to decide. "A bad man should be punished, and an evil sword should be melted down. As for you, accept your fate of being reforged in the furnace." As the flames of the furnace completely engulfed the cursed sword, the molten iron bubbled alongside sparks from the fire, resembling the core of a new sword forming during forging — this was her answer. "Why not just melt the cursed sword and turn it into beautiful molten iron? Since the sword met its end due to a lack of care, then it can wait for a worthy one to reforge its brilliance." The temperature rose further as she shut the furnace door, waves of heat enveloping her thoughts. Everything would undergo rebirth soon.

C: 普通模式「永冻幻土的悲鸣」
E: Normal Mode Cry of the Frozen Fantasy Land

C: 游览时长
E: Tour Duration

C: 新的危机——末日兽已经袭来，而你似乎成为了某种「关键」。\n想要摆脱这样的困境，让空间站免于毁灭的命运，或许只有前往月台，与列车、与那个被称为「瓦尔特」的男人会合后，才有解法。\n离开月台已经越来越近了，加快脚步吧。
E: New crisis — the Doomsday Beast is coming, and it seems that you've become some sort of "key element."\nIf you want to get out of this predicament and save the space station from destruction, the only way may be to head to the railway platform and meet up with the Express and the man named Welt.\nYou're getting closer to the railway platform, hurry.

C: 你乘上了神奇的星穹列车，今后，这里就是你的家了。\n新的冒险就要开始了，准备跃迁前往新世界吧！
E: You boarded the amazing Astral Express. From now on, this will be your home.\nA new adventure is about to start. Prepare to warp jump to a new world!

C: 那位戍卫官的言语犹在耳畔：坚定的「筑城者」们建立了这永屹之城；贝洛伯格虽受风雪侵凌，却永远温暖…\n他引用典籍的奇怪语调已经深深烙进了你的脑海…但愿这不会影响你享受高档酒店的床榻。\n话说回来，距离夜幕降临还有段时间，你不妨在这古老的城市中随意游览一番。
E: The Captain's words linger: The steadfast Architects built this Towering Citadel. Belobog remains forever warm in the face of unrelenting cold...\nHis tone was strange, as if he was quoting a historical record, and made a deep impression on you... Hopefully, this doesn't ruin your enjoyment of the fancy hotel's fluffy mattress.\nThere's still some time before nightfall. Why don't you take a tour around the ancient city in the meantime?

C: 可可利亚已经战败，星核的影响也随着她的消亡而减弱。\n为了让娜塔莎能够放心，你们来到铆钉镇寻找偷偷跑来探险的孩子们。\n他们果然在裂界里玩捉迷藏——去把这群小调皮鬼都揪出来吧。
E: Cocolia was defeated and the influence of the Stellaron weakened with her demise.\nFor Natasha's peace of mind, you arrive at Rivet Town to look for the children who sneaked here to have an adventure.\nThey are actually playing hide-and-seek in the Fragmentum — Go get those naughty kids out of there!

C: 工造司，司掌仙舟发明与制造的部门。抵达工造司时，入口处人头攒动。这倒是不出意料：覆巢之灾，难有完卵。只是若不打开大门瞧瞧，也不知里面到底发生了什么麻烦事。
E: The Artisanship Commission is the department responsible for inventions and manufacturing in Xianzhou. People are crowding around its entrance, which is to be expected from individuals when the entire state is in peril. However, it's impossible for you to know what is happening inside without opening the doors to take a look.

C: 工造司，司掌仙舟发明与制造的部门。抵达工造司时，入口处人头攒动。这倒是不出意料：覆巢之灾，难有完卵。只是若不打开大门瞧瞧，也不知里面到底发生了什么麻烦事。
E: The Artisanship Commission is the department responsible for inventions and manufacturing in Xianzhou. People are crowding around its entrance, which is to be expected from individuals when the entire state is in peril. However, it's impossible for you to know what is happening inside without opening the doors to take a look.

C: 流萤继续带领你在城中各处知名景点打卡——下一站是匹诺康尼大剧院前的看台，跟上她吧。
E: Firefly continues to lead you through the various tourist hotspots in the area — the next stop is the Penacony Theater front stands. Follow her!

C: 进入桑博的梦泡，你发现自己回到了贝洛伯格下层区那位大夫的诊所里，但这里比你印象里的要更冷清，更可疑。\n你发现了一张比房间本身更可疑的纸条——这究竟意味着什么？看来只有你离开诊所才能求得答案了。
E: Entering Sampo's dream bubble, you realize that you have returned to that doctor's clinic in Belobog's Underworld, but this place is even more desolate than you remembered and far more suspicious.\nYou discover a note that is even more suspicious than the room itself — Just what does it mean? It seems that you will have to leave the clinic before you can get any answers.

你无法█回自己的过去
