C: 你本以为只要与列车组会合，可如今你们结成的队伍简直堪称浩大——加拉赫、米凯、米沙、流萤、知更鸟、星期日…而促成这一热闹场面的似乎正是那位向来漫不经心的大叔，加拉赫。\n如果不是他太孤单想和大家热闹热闹，那么他一定在暗中策划着某种惊天阴谋…好在他看起来对你们并无敌意，也许你们能以和平的方式得知整个事件的全貌。
E: You originally thought you would just be meeting with the Express Crew, but the group you have now amassed is massive... Gallagher, Micah, Misha, Firefly, Robin, Sunday... And it seems that the person who led to the creation of this lively scene was precisely the seemingly indifferent Gallagher himself.\nIf this isn't just because he's lonely and wants to spend some time with everyone, then he must be secretly formulating some kind of shocking conspiracy... Fortunately, he doesn't seem to bear you any ill will. Perhaps you will be able to grasp the full picture of your surrounding situation peacefully.

C: 醉醺醺的宾客摇摇晃晃地消失在美梦深处。望着他的背影，你陷入了思考：将看不见摸不着的幻象当做赖以为生的唯一选择，这种活法当真是正确的么？\n星期日看出了你的忧虑，提议在「梦主」抵达前再四处探视一番，你的疑虑或许便能得到解答。
E: The drunken guest stumbles unsteadily as they disappear into the depths of the dream. As you watch his figure from behind, you fall into deep reflection: Is it really right to rely on something as intangible and invisible as a fantasy as your only option in life?\nSeeing your concern, Sunday suggests exploring the area before the Dreammaster arrives... Perhaps, there will be an answer to your doubts to be found?

C: 第一次选择！你和流萤来到了「戏梦奇战•动作派挑战」的舞台。根据引导员的说法，你们将在这里接受「动作」的考验……\n你可太熟悉「动作」了——但在这样一个人人都无法欢跳的世界里，你真的能够施展真正的「动作」吗？
E: The first choice! Firefly and you arrive at the stage for Dreamplay Fantasia: Action Challenge. According to the guide, you'll face the trial of "action" here...\nYou can't possibly be more familiar with "action" — However, in a world where no one can jump, can you really perform real "action"?

C: 尘埃落定，阿斯德纳和整个宇宙最终免于成为「秩序」傀儡的命运。距离击败「齐响诗班」似乎已经过去了一段时间…这期间都发生了些什么？\n在「白日梦」酒店里走走看看，与同伴会合，整理一下现状吧。
E: As the dust settles, Asdana and the entire universe have escaped the fate of becoming puppets to the Order. It seems some time has passed since the Harmonious Choir were defeated... What has happened during this time?\nTake a look around The Reverie, regroup with your companions, and find out what's been going on.

C: 又一次回到了白日梦酒店，曾经承载你诸多回忆的入梦港埠。入梦前不必回顾过去的痕迹，因为每次睡眠都会带来一场崭新的美梦…或噩梦。\n该准备入梦了。酒店为你准备了和上次一样的房号，不知道是怕你恋旧，还是懒得打扫其他房间。
E: Once more, you find yourself at The Reverie, the gateway into the Dreamscape that is imbued with many of your memories. There is no need to reflect on your past before diving into the Dreamscape, because each sleep births a brand-new sweet dream... or a nightmare.\nGet ready to dive into the Dreamscape. The hotel has assigned you the same room as last time, whether out of consideration for your nostalgia or sheer laziness to tidy up other rooms.

C: 忍者！忍者！又是忍者…也罢，没必要惊讶。仔细想想，你遇到过能编辑现实的骇客、能华丽变身的公司高管、满嘴宝贝的机械牛仔，一个忍者算什么？\n但是忍者和猴子混在一起，就像番茄酱和羊肉串混在一起，多了一丝奇妙的质感。
E: Ninja! Ninja! It's a ninja again... but really, there's no need to be surprised. You've already bumped into a reality-editing hacker, an IPC executive who has a magnificent shapeshift, and a robotic cowboy spouting "fudgin' ash-vole" all day. So, why not throw a ninja into the mix?\nHowever, this quirky ninja-monkey fusion seems like mixing ketchup with lamb kebabs, infused with a whimsical touch of flavor.

C: 你终于来到了真正的折纸大学，方才的怪梦可能只是厌学症的表现…但看看这所流光溢彩的华丽校园，看看这群热情洋溢的精英校友，还有什么好怕的呢？让玫瑰色的青春吞噬灰色的你吧！\n去找三月七与丹恒——你未来的好同学打个招呼吧。
E: You finally step into the real Paperfold University. The bizarre dream back then might just be a manifestation of your fear of school... But what is there to fear now that you've seen this glittering and magnificent campus, together with the passionate elite classmates? Let the rosy vitality of youth consume your gray!\nGo say hello to Dan Heng and March 7th, your future classmates.

C: 你费了好大工夫，才让被家族管控的迷因把你送到了这个鸟不拉屎的地方。这里没看到什么目标的线索，天气差得要命，但麦芽果汁还凑合。\n没办法，只能自己找找线索了，谁叫你那一枪欠了不少人情呢？
E: You spent a great amount of effort to get the meme controlled by The Family to send you to this dump. Not much here looks helpful, and the weather's been a nightmare, but hey, the malt juice ain't half bad.\nGotta sleuth out clues on your lonesome. That shot you took's got you owing favors left and right.

C: 三月七的缺席为这次的开拓之旅又添了一分不确定性。为了旅程能够尽可能顺利，姬子小姐决定启动「后备方案」。
E: The absence of March 7th has introduced a new layer of uncertainty to this trailblazing expedition. To keep the expedition on course, Miss Himeko decides to activate the Backup Plan.

C: 临行时，三月七似乎身体抱恙……
E: When setting off, March 7th seems to be feeling unwell...

C: 「圣城」奥赫玛…据说是如今的末世长夜中，唯一的永昼之地。我们决定在城中游历一番，了解此处风土人情，同时收集可靠信息。
E: Okhema, the holy city... It is said to be the only place with eternal daylight amidst the end times' long night. We decide to tour the city to familiarize ourselves with the area and gather reliable information.

C: 跟随白厄了解黄金裔的救世苦旅后，我们最终还是决定留在翁法罗斯。经过一番休整，众黄金裔再度集结，准备向尼卡多利所在的悬锋城发起讨伐，夺取「天谴之矛」的火种。
E: After understanding from Phainon the Chrysos Heirs' arduous journey to save the world, we ultimately decided to remain in Amphoreus. After a period of rest and recovery, the Chrysos Heirs reconvened, readying themselves for an attack against Castrum Kremnos, where Nikador was, with the goal of seizing the Coreflame of the Lance of Fury.

C: 遐蝶发觉尼卡多利的不死身源于它对「死亡」的背叛。为揭露深埋于岁月中的谜团，我们需要前往重渊借助欧洛尼斯的力量复现往日。
E: Castorice realizes that Nikador's immortality is rooted in a betrayal of Death itself. To unravel the mystery hidden in the past, we must journey to the Abyss and borrow the power of Oronyx to replicate the past.

C: 我们成功进入了三相神殿。只是，欧洛尼斯并不欢迎我们，反而以各种谜题刁难，阻止我们进入神殿深处。
E: We successfully entered the Temple of the Three Fates. However, Oronyx does not welcome our presence and complicates our path with various puzzles, blocking us from reaching the temple's deeper chambers.

C: 前进路上，自称卡吕普索的神秘人突然出现，她声称已救下那刻夏，并带领{NICKNAME}他们向「启蒙王座」前进。
E: During their advance, a mysterious woman identifying herself as Calypso appears suddenly, stating she saved Anaxa and offering guidance to {NICKNAME}'s group to the Luminary Throne.

C: 克拉特鲁斯的一意孤行，使悬锋一族的宿命与未来再度横亘于你的面前……
E: Krateros' stubborn persistence once again brings the fate and future of the Kremnoan people before you...

C: 借助{NICKNAME}的力量，白厄等人来到了命运重渊的往世——神谕的圣地「雅努萨波利斯」，并在这里见到了缇宝三人千年前的模样。
E: Through {NICKNAME}'s power, Phainon's group journeys to the past of the Abyss of Fate — the "Sanctum of Prophecy" Janusopolis, where they see the Tribbie trio as they were a thousand years ago.

C: 与盗火行者的意外遭遇，导致欧洛尼斯的火种被提前取出。众黄金裔们希望由{NICKNAME}来承担岁月的职责。\n未流淌着黄金血的异乡旅者也接受了泰坦的试炼，希望{NICKNAME}和迷迷一切顺利。\n「那不存在于预言之中，却由我纺入命运的，也并非仅此一例。」我想起了初次见到阿格莱雅时听到的这句话。
E: An unexpected encounter with the Flame Reaver led to the premature extraction of Oronyx's Coreflame. The Chrysos Heirs hope that {NICKNAME} will take on the authority of Time.\nEven as an outland traveler, whose veins carry no golden blood, has accepted the Titan's trial. Wishing {NICKNAME} and Mem the best of luck.\n"I've woven many unforeseen events into the tapestry of fate, this is but one instance." I remembered hearing this the first time I met Aglaea.

C: 与盗火行者的意外遭遇，导致欧洛尼斯的火种被提前取出。众黄金裔们希望由{NICKNAME}来承担岁月的职责。\n未流淌着黄金血的异乡旅者也接受了泰坦的试炼，希望{NICKNAME}和迷迷一切顺利。\n「那不存在于预言之中，却由我纺入命运的，也并非仅此一例。」我想起了初次见到阿格莱雅时听到的这句话。
E: An unexpected encounter with the Flame Reaver led to the premature extraction of Oronyx's Coreflame. The Chrysos Heirs hope that {NICKNAME} will take on the authority of Time.\nEven as an outland traveler, whose veins carry no golden blood, has accepted the Titan's trial. Wishing {NICKNAME} and Mem the best of luck.\n"I've woven many unforeseen events into the tapestry of fate, this is but one instance." I remembered hearing this the first time I met Aglaea.

C: 元老院如你所料派出了使者抢在阿格莱雅行动前将你带到了黎明云崖。在这里，你将接受众元老们的庇护。\n离传令兵返回还有些时间，在这附近逛逛吧，也是为了让好奇宝宝——你脑中的瑟希斯适当安静一些。
E: The Council of Elders dispatched a messenger, as you anticipated, to escort you to Dawncloud before Aglaea could make her move. Here, you will be under the Elders' protection.\nThere's still some time before the Messenger returns. Take a stroll around here, and let the curious Cerces, who resides in your mind, calm down a bit.

C: 你早在心中猜想到接近刻法勒会有意想不到的收获，果然活死人的身体能见到常人所不能见的「贵重记忆」。\n准备炼成吧。
E: You had a feeling that getting close to Kephale would reveal unexpected truths. Indeed, as one of the living dead, you can perceive "precious memories" that others cannot.\nNow, prepare for transmutation.

C: 斯缇科西亚，巨龙与海浪的城邦。如今，那冥河却把这凄惨的城池团团围拢。\n借助欧洛尼斯的奇迹，穿过险峻的冥河之水。
E: Styxia, the City-State of Dragons and Waves... At present, the River of Souls has encircled this pitiful city.\nUse Oronyx's Miracle to cross the treacherous waters of the River of Souls.

C: 「戏剧」实为某人年少时的记忆，舞台是昔日的哀丽秘榭，{NICKNAME}带着一肚子的问题， 扮演着其人「最重要的伙伴」，陪伴他与昔涟一同找寻着某物…
E: The "theater" is actually someone's childhood memories, staged in the Aedes Elysiae of old. {NICKNAME}, with many questions in mind, assumes the role of this person's "most important companion," joining him and Cyrene on their search for something important...

C: 呈现在{NICKNAME}面前的第三幕，似乎是逐火之旅的终点，但与白厄一同见证末世的，是那名在我们的认知中，殒命于他童年时期的少女——昔涟。
E: The third act, as it plays out before {NICKNAME}, appears to mark the end of the Flame-Chase Journey. But the one who witnesses the world's end times with Phainon is Cyrene — the girl we believe to have perished in his childhood years.

C: {NICKNAME}的思绪被拉回了创世涡心，回到了再创世的前一刻，与白厄一同，直面最后的来客——那位燃尽的救世之人，与它所践行的意志。
E: {NICKNAME}'s thoughts are pulled back to the Vortex of Genesis, to the moment before the Era Nova, to when they are standing beside Phainon and facing the final visitor: The one who burned to nothingness for salvation and the will they are carrying out.

C:
你还记得他们吗，无缘黎明的卡厄斯兰那？
昔日，恩师尚能为你指点迷津；还有那捷足的羁客，多洛斯的偷儿，她的家乡尚未因你落入火场。
是了，过去的已经过去，但神样的战士，你是否也曾垂泪，为那美酒似的年光？
难道你们不曾血肉相连，金血不曾浓于水么？
不！就让眼泪尽情流淌吧，别教那怒火蒸干了——
然后，记得痛饮：因为之于诸神，人子的泪水胜过凡间万千般蜜酿。
E:
Do you still remember them, Khaslana, the one who won't reach the dawn?
Once, your teacher could still guide you through the dark. And that fleet-footed traveler, the thief of Dolos, her home was yet untouched by the fires you brought.
Yes, the past is gone. But you, godlike warrior, did you ever shed a tear for those years, sweet as wine?
Weren't you once bound by blood and flesh? Wasn't golden blood thicker than water?
No! Let your tears flow freely. Don't let rage burn them away —
Then, remember to drink deep: For, to the gods, the tears of mortals are sweeter than any honey brew on Earth.

C:
你还记得他吗，无缘黎明的卡厄斯兰那？
礼赞迈德漠斯，最伟大的征服者，最伟大的守护者，最强者；垂死的雄狮，目光如炬，无邦之王。
说啊，倘若刻法勒永志不忘：你已为他刻留多少伤疤，击碎多少骨节，自背后贯穿他的胸膛？
歌耳巴尼帕耳图书馆如何在火海中瓦解，最后一名悬锋人，他的毁灭是何颜色？
可悲的伶人，你不仅适合歌舞、把戏和玩笑，也精于刀口舔血的背叛。
大可用全世之重粉饰你的愚蠢，再用它装点自相残杀，惨剧的风味。
E:
Do you still remember him, Khaslana, the one who won't reach the dawn?
All hail Mydeimos, the greatest conqueror, the mightiest protector, the strongest of all. The dying lion, eyes blazing, the king with no kingdom.
Tell me, if Kephale never forgets — how many scars have you already carved on him? How many vertebrae have you shattered? How many times did you drive your blade through his back?
How did the Library of Garbaniphoro fall to flame? What color was the destruction of the last Kremnoan?
You pitiful jester, fit not only for singing, dancing, and jests, but also for treachery that walks the razor's edge.
Go on, veil your folly with the weight of the world, then adorn your fratricide with it — just to savor the taste of tragedy.

C:
《午夜电锯狂想》
简介：一群星际和平公司的职员，被上级打发到偏僻的星球度假。抵达酒店的他们，却发现，这里原本是隶属于公司的监狱。在古老的年代，无数的犯人因狱警的镇压和恶劣的劳动环境死去，就像这颗匹诺康尼。
而现在，苏醒的怨灵封闭了酒店的出口，誓要向着那些该死的公司狗索命！
呼，终于有人听本导演把故事简介完整地说完了。
E: Midnight Chainsaw Rhapsody Synopsis: A crew from IPC gets sent to a remote planet for vacation. But the resort land in turns out to be one of the IPC's off-world prisons. Back in the day, countless inmates died here, crushed by cruel guards and brutal labor. Just like this very Penacony. Now, the vengeful ghosts have sealed off the hotel exits, hell-bent on dragging those IPC dogs to the grave! Hah, finally! Someone let this director finish his pitch for once.

C:
奥赫玛，最后的城，有着好多好多神话。
她曾像一位天真的宁芙，受着律法的庇护，穿着浪漫的华服，沐浴天空的曙光，在大地上起舞，听海洋的歌声，受着理性的教导，避开追求者的诡计，远离纷争和死亡，在一扇扇漂亮的门径间穿行，背负世界的拥护……
直至岁月带走了她的快乐、容貌、生命和更多。一具骸骨静静躺在石棺中。而在像白玉雕的肋骨下，心还没有枯萎。
扫却美丽心脏的灰，去听，听为你留存的心跳。
E:
Okhema, the last city, was a cradle of countless myths.
Once, she was like an innocent nymph, sheltered by law, draped in flowing finery, basking in sky's dawning light. She danced across the earth, listened to the ocean's songs, followed reason's teachings, slipped past suitors' trickery, untouched by strife or death. Through ever more beautiful passages she wandered, and people supported her in her worldbearing...
Until time took her joy, her beauty, her life, and more. A skeleton lies quietly in a stone coffin. Yet beneath ribs carved like white jade, her heart hasn't withered.
Wipe away the dust from that beautiful heart, and listen... listen to the heartbeat preserved for you.

C:
船呵，波涛又把你推向海上，
怎么办？毅然停住吧，进港！
难道你没有看见，舷边已没有划桨，桅柱已被强劲的西南风折断，帆杆在嗟怨悲鸣，没有缆绳，船体怎经受得住风浪的猛烈冲击？
风帆已经破碎，神像也已失去。
——你要千万当心呵，不要作风暴的玩具。
E:
O ship, the waves are pushing you back to sea.
What now? Firmly stop. Turn toward the harbor!
Can't you see? The oars are gone from your sides. The mast has snapped in the fierce southwest wind. The rigging groans with sorrow. No ropes remain. How will your hull survive the crashing waves?
The sails are torn, and the divine statue has vanished.
— Beware. Do not let the storm toy with you.

C:
于天地境界之海完成征服，长眠于涛声中。长眠于涛声中，于天地境界之海完成征服。
她们从未恐惧这预言，甚至，还有几分期盼。
那时，她们站在吕奎亚的海岸边，看着还未熄灭的太阳沉入海中，想着预言兑现的那日。
但她不知道，她所梦的海，并非方寸大的池。她不知道，她所愿的海，并非空无人的岸。
她不知道，她其实无心长眠。她不知道，她其实不恋征服。
她们想着错位的光景，一起看太阳慢慢、慢慢沉进海里，像是永远不会再升起。
E:
Complete your conquest in the ocean at the boundaries of this world, and eternally slumber in the sound of tides. Eternally slumber in the sound of tides, and complete your conquest in the ocean at the boundaries of this world.
They were never terrified of this prophecy. Rather, they somewhat looked forward to it.
Back then, they stood on the shores of Loukas, watching the yet-unextinguished sun sink into the sea, imagining the day when the prophecy would come true.
But she didn't know that the sea she dreamed of wasn't just a small pond. Nor was it just an empty shore.
She didn't know that she had no desire for eternal rest. And what she truly yearned for was never a conquest.
Thinking of the scenes that were so out of place, they watched together as the sun slowly, ever so slowly, sank into the sea, as if it would never rise again.

C: 在翁法罗斯经历的一切，在列车上又到底经过了多长呢？好像自己还是和星穹列车隔了一层，这究竟是怎么回事？\n总之，别忘记出发时大家的担忧，看看三月现在怎么样了。
E: How long has it really been since everything that happened in Amphoreus, and how much time has passed on the Express? It feels like there's still some kind of barrier between you and the Astral Express. What exactly is going on here?\nIn any case, don't forget everyone's concerns when you set out. Let's see how March is doing.

C: 权杖内核层已严重损毁，宛如废墟。要想在此搜寻德谬歌的痕迹，无异于大海捞针。真是欲盖弥彰呀，这只说明一件事——\n我找对地方了。
E: The Scepter's kernel is severely damaged, little more than rubble. Seeking traces of the Demiurge here would be like finding a needle in a haystack. How revealing... This only confirms one thing...\nI'm exactly where I need to be.

C: 探索遇到阻碍，十四行代数式屏障将空间隔离。螺丝咕姆提议骇入独立信源终端，通过逆转算力来攻击屏障，开启权杖内核层的封印。
E: Exploration hit a snag. A barrier of quatorzain algebraic expressions has isolated this space. Screwllum suggests hacking into the independent signal terminal and using reverse computation to break through the barrier, unlocking the seal on the Scepter's kernel.

C: 银狼的入侵路线最终指向了黑塔的办公室。思考再三，你和伦纳德决定将这个坏消息告知她本人。
E: Silver Wolf's path of infiltration eventually leads to Herta's office. After giving it some thoughts, Leonard and you decide to tell this bad news to Herta herself.

C: 阿德勒的失踪令事件更加扑朔迷离，但温世玲似乎还记得他失踪前的反常举动
E: Adler's disappearance made the case even more enigmatic, but Wen Shiling seems to still remember his odd behavior before his disappearance.

C: {NICKNAME}的开拓日报：\n姬子来了。合同没签，布洛妮娅自有妙计。必须找到托帕。
E: {NICKNAME}'s Trailblaze Daily Report:\nHimeko is here. Didn't sign the contract. Bronya has a plan. Must find Topaz.

C: 果不其然，虎克大人是想让你帮她找到老爹的宝贝。不过，在矿区里还能找到什么线索吗？\n看着虎克大人势在必得的样子，你似乎也觉得有了一些信心。这就是鼹鼠党老大的魅力吗？
E: As you expected, Hook wants you to help her find daddy's treasure. But could there be a clue in the mine?\nHook's confidence cheers you up. No wonder she is the boss of the Moles.

C: 厨子是四位嫌疑人中的一位，没有不在场证据，需要仔细盘问，才能听出破绽。\n据斯薇塔介绍说这几位嫌疑人曾经都十分信任费斯曼老爹，一定是发生过什么，才会在彼此之间出现了裂隙。
E: The cook is one of the four suspects. They have no alibi, and you need to question them in detail to see if they're hiding the truth.\nAccording to Swetta, these suspects used to trust Fersman with all their hearts. Something must have caused a rift between them.

C: 你已经做出了自己的判断，接下来就是要去验证它。跟紧虎克，别让真正的犯人逃走了。\n你也不清楚自己的判断是否正确，但在寻找真相的路上，不能因为犹豫就止步不前。
E: You've made a clear deduction, and now it's time to prove it. Follow Hook, and don't let the criminal run away.\nYou're not sure if your deduction is correct, but one cannot waver in the search for the truth.

C: 卢卡将他的「修炼计划」告知了你和希儿，并且希望你们能够全程陪同，见证他的成长。\n试炼的第一个目标是…帮忙打杂。\n你修好了机器人「小飞」，它的自动寻路功能会带你们找到卡西迪的另一个机械伙伴，「大奔」，的下落。
E: Luka tells you and Seele about his "training plans" and wants you to accompany him the whole way to witness his improvement.\nThe first goal of the trial is to... help with chores.\nYou fix Little Fay the robot. Its auto-navigation function will lead you to Big Ben, Cassidy's other robot friend.

C: 用于投影展示的「微缩胶卷」失窃了，没有了这带胶卷，历史区将无法顺利开放。\n你和佩拉来到了没落的商业街，追查嫌疑人诺尔伯特公子的下落。\n刚一来到这里，你们就看到了嫌疑人的身影——上去听听他们在聊什么吧。
E: The microfilm used to display projections was stolen. Without this film, the History Exhibit cannot open to the public.\nYou and Pela arrive at the desolate shopping street to chase down Norbert, the suspect.\nYou see your suspect as soon as you arrive. Go and listen to what they're saying.

C: 陶德意在研究持明族的历史，但传闻中能见证持明族历史变迁的「鳞渊境」他却进不了。无奈之下陶德拜托你去往鳞渊境，为他拍摄几张照片，以供他完成研究。
E: Todd intends to study the history of the Vidyadhara. However, he couldn't enter Scalegorge Waterscape, where rumors say the history of the Vidyadhara race can be viewed. With no other alternative, Todd asks you to go to Scalegorge Waterscape and take some photos for him to complete his research.

C: 在身体发生进一步的变化前，陶德只想体验孩童应有的快乐。你答应了他的请求，陪着他在长乐天四处转悠，却不料遇见了一些人……
E: Before further physical changes occur, Todd just wants to experience the happiness that children deserve. You agree to his request and accompany him around the Exalting Sanctum, but unexpectedly meet some people...

C: 从梅姐那里没有打听到什么有用的信息，还是得问问其他的目击者。在事故现场四处找找，肯定有人发现了值得关注的线索。
E: You fail to get anything useful out of Mei and have to ask the other witnesses. Look around the scene of the accident. Someone must have found some pertinent clues.

C: 芦慧已经下定决心要辞退梅姐，梅姐不仅没有抱怨，还担心芦慧无法照顾好她自己。也许是有些意外，芦慧愣住了神，去问问她怎么了吧。
E: Luhui had already decided to fire Mei, but Mei was unfazed and was even worried that Luhui won't be able to look after herself. Luhui seemed stunned, probably from shock. Go ask her what's going on.

C: 这次星核灾患，显然有人从中作祟。我路遇妖人，竟然能驱遣孽物。还好我手头功夫没拉下，对方不过是一合之敌罢了。有意思的是，那位姐姐竟然能从我挥剑声响中听出端倪来。待我调查舵航仪，再来试试她。
E: This Stellaron crisis is evidently puppeteered by someone. The villain I accosted along the way could control abominations! Thankfully, my swordplay is adequate to dispatch them all. What was interesting, is the lady could tell who I am just from listening to the sound of my sword-wielding. After checking the navigator array, I have to test her.

C: 太卜司的青雀似乎被太卜大人派去清点灾后情况，遇到了一些「超出工作内容」的麻烦，需要你的帮助。\n话又说回来，青雀的工作内容到底是什么，不就是看管书库吗？
E: Qingque from the Divination Commission has been sent by the master diviner to assess the site post-disaster and seems to have run into some troubles that are "beyond her scope of work," requiring your help.\nSpeaking of, what is Qingque's scope of work? Isn't it to oversee the repository?

C: 青雀提到了十王司也许有机会让铖杰和莱恩老师再见上一面，不管有什么代价，都得去太卜司撞撞机会了。\n世界上怎么会有这么巧的事，需要帮助时，十王司的判官正好就在太卜司里？
E: Qingque mentioned that the Ten-Lords Commission might be able to reunite Masters Chengjie and Ryan for a final time. No matter what the price is, you have to try your luck at the Divination Commission.\nLuck smiles upon you! Just when you need a helping hand, a judge from the Ten-Lords Commission is present at the Divination Commission!

C: 小聪决定再去表白一次，这一次他会带上用心准备的礼物，和一颗真诚的心。总之，现在就出发去买礼物。\n在听完了你的一通分析之后，小聪立刻有了精神气，小聪可真是一个单纯的小伙子呀。\n那么，静斋到底知不知道呢？
E: Cong decided to confess once again, this time with a carefully prepared gift and a sincere heart. Anyway, set off now to buy the gift.\nAfter listening to your analysis, Cong immediately regained his spirits. Cong is really a simple young man. \nIf so, does Jingzhai really know?

C: 想要找到丢失的法什么什么玩意儿羊，仅靠自己大概是有些吃力。去地衡司借一台谛听吧，那是专门干这个的。
E: It may be a bit difficult to find the lost Fa-something-sheep on your own. Go to the Realm-Keeping Commission to borrow a Diting, which was specially designed for this purpose.

C: 黑天鹅开始收集线索，尝试解开花火留下的谜题。你不禁想，花火如此大费周章，究竟是为了什么？但对于花火这样的人来说，考虑「为什么」大概就落了下乘。不如先和黑天鹅一起，玩玩花火留下的推理游戏吧…也许这其中就隐藏着花火的真实目的。
E: Black Swan begins collecting clues, trying to solve the puzzle that Sparkle left behind. You can't help but wonder why Sparkle would go through all this effort. However, when it comes to people like Sparkle, asking "why" normally means you are on the wrong track. Why not play with Black Swan the logic game that Sparkle left behind... Perhaps Sparkle's true motive is concealed within.

C: 「挑战观众」…你也看过一些三月七硬塞给你的推理小说，对这样的桥段并不陌生。但一般在作品中负责挑战读者（或者观众）的，不都是作者或是侦探角色吗？怎么到了花火这里，就变成凶手本人跳出来下战书了？比起「挑战观众」，这大概更接近于「挑衅观众」吧…真不愧是花火。\n无论如何，祝君狩猎愉快。
E: "Challenge the audience"... You have read a lot of detective novels that March 7th shoved into your hands and are no stranger to this kind of plot. Although, normally it's the job of the author or the detective to challenge the reader (or audience), is it not? How is it that in Sparkle's game, it's the murderer who's throwing down the gauntlet? Surely this is closer to "threatening the audience" than challenging...? It's just what you've come to expect from Sparkle.\nEither way, happy hunting.

C: 在丹鼎司新任司鼎的斡旋下，你们顺利打发了来自公司专员的责难，随她一同前往丹鼎司小叙。但这场未期的谈话却再起波折，与彦卿交锋的少女剑客早已等候多时。
E: Under the mediation of the newly appointed Alchemy Commission's Cauldron Master, you all successfully fended off the accusatory blame from the IPC Specialist, after which you had a chat with her at the Alchemy Commission. But more speed bumps threatened this doomsday talk, for the swordswoman had been waiting long for a showdown with Yanqing.

C: 在怀炎半是玩笑、半是试探的邀请下，三月七意外得到了登上演武仪典的机会。受学于罗浮与朱明两大将军的高足，有机会一窥仙舟剑术的堂奥，三月真是前途无量、可喜可贺啊。
E: Under Huaiyan's invitation, laced with both levity and inquiry, March 7th fortuitously earned a chance to participate in the Wardance. Trained by the star pupils of the two great Luofu and Zhuming generals, she was now gifted with the chance to delve into the intricacies of Xianzhou swordplay. March's future prospects were boundless, a matter worth much celebration.

C: 时光流逝，转眼演武仪典即将召开在即。在即将登上擂台的时刻到来前，年轻的剑士们眺望空中的斗舰，与远来之客抒发己见。但关注此刻的并不只有他们，迴星港中，另有不速之客图谋不轨……
E: Time goes by, and the moment of the Wardance has arrived once more. Right before the young swordmasters are about to step into the ring, they look up at the fighter jet in the sky and start expressing their opinions to the visitors from afar. But they are not the only ones focused on this moment, for in Stargazer Navalia, certain uninvited guests weave their schemes...

C: 按照飞霄的要求，你们踏入幽囚狱留下证词。而她派出的曜青信使将自罗浮仙舟接走关押在此许久的步离人首领，呼雷。
E: In light of Feixiao's request, you stepped into the Shackling Prison and left your statements. The Yaoqing messenger that she dispatched whisked away the long-detained borisin leader, Hoolay, who was being held on the Xianzhou Luofu.

C: 沦入狼爪，陈于刀俎之间，曜青医士椒丘正努力寻求拖延与分化步离人的良机……也许在这场狼与狐的周旋之间，他能找到救治其主的秘密，抑或逃出生天的机会？
E: Having fallen into the wolves' clutches and now at the mercy of their blades, the Yaoqing healer Jiaoqiu is trying his best to find an opportunity to stall for time and split up the borisin... Perhaps, in this battle between fox and wolf, Jiaoqiu will be able to find the secret to curing his superior or a way to escape his current predicament.

C: 在你、黑塔、螺丝咕姆三人的注视下，一生受尽外界和内心折磨的查德威克博士终于得以走向平静的终结。\n关闭维生装置，送他最后一程。
E: Under the watchful eyes of you, Screwllum, and Herta — Dr. Chadwick, who has endured external and mental struggles throughout his life, finally reaches a peaceful end.\nDeactivate all the life support devices and send him on to his final journey.

C: 你通过钟表把戏进入了查德威克的心绪空间。\n跟随旧日的影子，见证这位天才的一段段过去。
E: You have entered Chadwick's Emoscape through your Clockwork.\nFollow the shadows of his past and witness a fragment of this genius's life.

C: 接受了折纸小鸟的委托，该去找到「湛蓝爵士」了。
E: You've received the commission from the Origami Birds. It's time to find Dr. Blues.

C: 现在，你已经是白日梦酒店的临时大堂经理了。\n前台还有不少你的同事，他们也有可能分流你的工作——不如让他们去享受假期，把整个前台都留给你。
E: You are now the interim lobby manager of the Reverie.\nEven so, you still have several colleagues at the reception desk who might potentially share your work and undermine your influence. Perhaps it would be best to grant them a vacation and handle all reception duties on your own.

C: 播散文明种子的第一站，雅利洛-Ⅵ！\n原来虎克只是在闹着玩…或许娜塔莎医生会对我的作品感兴趣。
E: First stop for spreading the seeds of civilization: Jarilo-VI!\nTurns out Hook is just messing around... Maybe Dr. Natasha is interested in my work.

C: 去把物资捡起来。为了「鼹鼠党振兴计划」，让你捡你就捡。
E: Pick up the supplies. This is for "The Moles' Reinvigoration Plan." Do not ask why.

C: 民间科学家雷金希望能把他的「大宇宙时间隧道」论文递交给大守护者。\n但他似乎与贝洛伯格教育部的官员有些过节，因此「雇佣」了你来作为他的代理人。\n去上层区转转，找找有没有能帮他递交论文的人吧。
E: The Civilian Scientist, Regin, hopes to submit his thesis about the big universe time tunnel to the Supreme Guardian.\nHowever, he seems to have had some conflict with the Belobog Ministry of Education officers, and "hired" you to be his proxy.\nWalk around the Overworld and search for someone who can submit the thesis for him.

C: 在机缘巧合下，你成了卜筮用具「雅努斯迷津」的辅祭。好人做到底，协助命运三相殿的祭司，完成一批积压的寻物委托吧。
E: By a twist of fate, you're now an acolyte of the divination tool — Janus' Maze. Since you've started, might as well help the priests of the Temple of the Three Fates finish their backlog of "lost and found" assignments.

C: 黑塔要求你以「开拓」的身份进入天才俱乐部制作的「模拟宇宙」，试着从虚拟星神口中套出星神与命途的奥秘。
E: Herta asks you to enter the Simulated Universe created by the Genius Society while pretending to be the Aeon of Trailblaze, and try to glean the secret of Aeons and Paths from the simulated Aeons.

C: 黑塔要求你以「开拓」的身份进入天才俱乐部制作的「模拟宇宙」，试着从虚拟星神口中套出星神与命途的奥秘。
E: Herta asks you to enter the Simulated Universe created by the Genius Society while pretending to be the Aeon of Trailblaze, and try to glean the secret of Aeons and Paths from the simulated Aeons.

C: 帕姆对仙舟上的饮料十分感兴趣，你决定回到罗浮，替帕姆买一份地道的罗浮饮料。
E: Pom-Pom is very interested in beverages on the Xianzhou. You decide to return to the Luofu and get an authentic Luofu beverage for Pom-Pom.

C: 你成功突破了铁卫禁区的封锁线。只要战胜邓恩，这次演习就宣告结束了。
E: You successfully broke through the blockade line of the Silvermane Guard Restricted Zone. Defeat Dunn to conclude the training.

C: 工作圆满完成了，你的表现甚至比一些入行几百年的老员工都要好。\n快去找梓桥领取你应得的酬劳吧。
E: The job is done, and you did even better than some senior employees that have been working for a few centuries.\nGo back to Ziqiao quickly to receive your payment.

C: 滴答！快，拨动指针，滴答——！\n人们的内心正待你去探索，为他们寻回真正的自我吧！
E: Tick... tock! Quick, Adjust the hands... Tick, tock!\nPeople's minds await your exploration. Help them regain their true selves!

C: 从守卫口中得知，一部分守卫黎明云崖的卫兵被抽调去了对抗黑潮的前线，曾经帮助希瑞雅的好心叔叔或许也在其中，去他说的位置打探一下。
E: According to the guard, some of the soldiers defending Dawncloud have been dispatched to the frontline to fight against the black tide. The kind man who once helped Serena might be among them. Go to the location he mentioned to find out.

C: 《太空大战争》的风波暂且告一段落了，再去监控室看望一下忙碌的伦纳德吧。\n希望事件真的就此平息了…
E: The Cosmic Warfare crisis has come to a stop for now. Visit the monitoring room to see Leonard.\nHopefully things have subsided for real...

C: 根据感应仪提供的神秘坐标，勘测现场的异常现象。
E: Examine the anomaly at the site using the mysterious coordinates provided by the sensor.

C: 贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆开展在即。为了展览顺利举行，于尔丹正在收集合适的藏品。\n这一次，鲍里斯希望你为他演示如何使用棒球棍作战，以便他制作对应的复制品。
E: Belobog's History and Culture Museum will be opening soon. Uldan is collecting appropriate exhibits to ensure a successful opening.\nThis time, Boris hopes that you could show him how you wield the baseball bat in combat to help him make a replica.

C: 历史文化展馆的展品似乎已经全部集齐了——为此，馆长于尔丹有话想对你说。
E: All the exhibits in the History-Culture Hall seems to have been collected. Uldan the curator has something to tell you regarding that.

C: 贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆开展在即，导览工作却出现大量职缺。为了迅速填补缺口、提高观众游览体验，佩拉与艾丽斯向贝洛伯格全体公众发出了职位邀请。\n这一次，她们似乎看中了才华横溢的希露瓦。代她们前往机械屋「永动」，了解希露瓦是否有入职意愿吧。
E: The Belobog History and Culture Museum is about to open, but there is a great lack of guides. To rapidly fill up these positions and improve the visitor experience, Pela and Eris are inviting all Belobog citizens to apply for these positions.\nThis time they have their eye on the talented Serval. Head to the Neverwinter Workshop in their stead, and see whether Serval is interested in the position.

C: 贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆开展在即，导览工作却出现大量职缺。为了迅速填补缺口、提高观众游览体验，佩拉与艾丽斯向贝洛伯格全体公众发出了职位邀请。\n这一次，她们似乎看中了下层区的领导者娜塔莎。代她们前往磐岩镇诊所，了解娜塔莎是否有入职意愿吧。
E: The Belobog History and Culture Museum is about to open, but there is a great lack of guides. To rapidly fill up these positions and improve the visitor experience, Pela and Eris are inviting all Belobog citizens to apply for these positions.\nThis time they have their eye on Natasha, leader of the Underworld. Head to the Boulder Town clinic in their stead, and see whether Natasha is interested in the position.

C: 接受了小秘书的邀请，接下来就是正式得到金人巷商会的承认，你将担当「金人巷商业顾问」一职。\n前往陈机铺，去和会长谈谈吧…等等，为什么会是陈机铺？
E: After accepting Mingxi's invitation, what's left is to formally get an official acknowledgment from the Aurum Alley Merchant Guild. To achieve this, you will serve as the "Aurum Alley Business Consultant."\nHead to Oldies Depot and speak to the president and... wait, why Oldies Depot?

C: 为了重振金人巷，商会希望充分利用码头物流，与金人巷的商户们建立紧密的合作。\n商会派你来劝说「美馔阁」与商会建立合作关系。但「美馔阁」的老板矮阿姨此时却碰上了一些麻烦……
E: In order to revitalize Aurum Alley, the merchant guild aims to fully utilize the docks' logistics capacity and establish close collaborations with the stores in the alley.\nThe guild has sent you to persuade Short Auntie, owner of Delicacy Pavilion, to establish a partnership with the guild. However, Short Auntie has encountered some troubles at the moment...

C: 为了抵达「流云渡的决胜乐园」，你和三月只能选择乘坐星槎...仙舟居然会同意公司的这种请求，真是难以想象。
E: March and you have to take a starskiff to reach the Cloudford Victory Zone... You find it hard to believe that the Xianzhou would accept this kind of request from the IPC.

C: 你们已经完成了全部试炼，是时候让公输师傅见识下后生的厉害了！
E: You've already completed all trials. It's time to show Master Gongshu the power of youth!

C: 想要挑战每个决胜乐园的冠军候补，必须先完成乐园对应的试炼。\n呜呜伯们似乎对守护宝藏兴致不高。这哪里是「巨龙」，明明就是「青雀」。
E: You must complete the corresponding trials first if you wish to challenge the championship contenders of the Victory Zone.\nThe Wubbaboos don't seem to be terribly enthused about guarding the treasure. And what kind of "dragon" is this? That's clearly just Qingque.

C: 《以太战线》的核心玩法便是「对决」——挑战不同的玩家，证明自己的实力吧！
E: The core gameplay loop behind Aetherium Wars is "dueling." Challenge different players and show your true strength!

C: 青雀将「更多的人」置于沙盘之中，要创造出第二种解法。\n规则就是用来打破的，去完成「寻径指津」挑战吧。
E: Qingque has placed "more individuals" into the sand table, determined to find an alternative solution.\nRules are meant to be broken. It is time to overcome the Pathfinder challenges.

C: 地衡司公廨被改作了大财团的门房，云骑军成了安保大爷——青雀这个发财梦魇倒是颇有野心。你琢磨着见她时该怎么称她，「青将军」？「青总」？算啦，看了看队伍的长度，你决定插个队先。
E: The Realm-Keeping Commission Chancery has been transformed into a security room at the gates of a corporate building, and the Cloud Knight have become an aged security guard — Qingque's nightmare about getting rich is actually quite ambitious of her. You wonder how you should address her when you meet? General Qingque? Or President Qingque? Whatever. Seeing how long the queue is, you decide to skip it.

C: 在这一次的模拟宇宙更新中，阮•梅培育了模拟「博识尊」，并把时空锁定在了#27 帝皇鲁珀特陨落前！然而，一些不同寻常的情况发生了——公司联系到了黑塔，他们似乎对模拟宇宙项目很感兴趣……
E: In this Simulated Universe update, Ruan Mei has nurtured a simulated Nous and set the time before the demise of #27 Emperor Rubert. However, something unusual has happened. IPC has reached out to Herta, showing their interest in the Simulated Universe project...

C: 错乱的梦境空间中散落着（在辛格勒看来）家族犯事的证据。\n打开空间里的战利品宝箱，收集并拼凑所有线索。
E: According to Singler, evidence of The Family's "crimes" is scattered throughout the chaotic space.\nOpen the treasure chests in the area to collect and assemble all the clues.

C: 你在神秘错乱的空间中发现了一个拼图画框，或许完成这幅拼图能对你们的调查有所帮助。
E: You find a jigsaw frame in the mysterious and chaotic space. Completing this jigsaw might aid your investigation.

C: 小星星准备了用于模拟的思维空间，想要告诉你「美梦剧团」的生存状况。\n在途中，你再次见到了酒吧的怪物们，但这次的情景好像不太一样。
E: Starlet has prepared a Mindspace for simulations and wants to update you on the status of the Sweet Dreams Troupe.\nOn your way, you meet the lounge's monsters again, but the scenario is somewhat different this time.

C: 拍动画貌似也挺好玩的，要不试试看再说？
E: Shooting a cartoon seems pretty fun too. How about trying it out first?

C: 一份赃物，以及故去的家人。
E: Some stolen goods and a departed Family member.

C: 似乎是克劳克影业与家族之间发生了冲突，跟这个戴着钟表小子头套的怪人了解一下情况吧。
E: It looks like there has been a clash between Clock Studios and The Family. Speak with this strange person wearing Clockie headgear to find out more.

C: 乔瓦尼邀请你前往「黄金的时刻」，据说有重要的事需要帮忙…究竟会是什么呢？
E: Giovanni has invited you to the Golden Hour. He seems to need your help with something... Just what might that be?

C: 你收到了一封来自家族的邀请函——鸢尾花家系的缇娜诚邀你去测试一款名为「折纸小鸟对对碰」的三消对战游戏。\n看起来倒不像是诈骗…那么，去看看也没什么损失吧？
E: You have received an invitation from The Family — Tinah of the Iris Family invites you to test a match-3 puzzle battle game called "Origami Bird Clash."\nIt doesn't seem like a scam... So, go take a look? There's nothing to lose.

C: 通过威胁信，尾巴成功进入了斯科特的内心世界。据说，恶人的欲望会被具象化成宫殿的样子，而扭曲的欲望就隐藏其中。\n尾巴已经接近答案了，斯科特最扭曲的欲望就在前方。
E: Tail found his way into Skott's inner world through a threatening letter. The desires of the wicked are manifested as palaces, with their twisted desires hidden within.\nTail is closing in on it. Skott's most twisted desire is located just ahead.

C: 叩关赛的规则非常简单——战胜对手，赢取积分。\n卢卡选手只需要做三件事，胜利、胜利、胜利！
E: The rules of the Knockout Matches are easy — Just defeat opponents and win points\nContestant Luka just needs to do three things: Win, win, and keep winning!

C: 关于托帕的合作邀约，需要和卢卡还有卡美丽共同讨论下。
E: Regarding the collaboration proposed by Topaz, discussion is needed with Luka and Carmella.

C: 卢卡正遭受着巨大的心理压力，这导致他的幻觉愈发严重。\n陪他再去一次丹鼎司吧，也许了不起的灵砂大人可以帮到他。
E: Luka is experiencing severe mental stress, making his hallucinations even worse.\nGo with him to the Alchemy Commission one more time. Maybe the great Master Lingsha can help him.

C: 你与卢卡应邀参加了托帕举办的发布会。\n不知道托帕能否帮你们渡过这场舆论风波……
E: Luka and you attended Topaz's press conference at her invitation.\nWho knows whether she can help you to get through this PR emergency...

C: 完成「枘凿六合」简单模式II
E: Complete Hexanexus Easy Mode II

C: 天哪，还有什么能比复活鲁珀特二世更酷的呢？
E: Oh my, what can be cooler than bringing back Rubert II?

C: 这里将陈列你一路开拓至今的纪念品——那都是你勇气与智慧的明证。
E: Displayed here will be the mementos of your journey thus far — Each one a testament to your courage and wisdom.

C: 拍摄告一段落，和三月七就这幅作品谈谈吧。
E: With the photography session wrapped up, have a chat with March 7th about this work

C: 英雄不可能只击败一个怪物就取得胜利，宝库前也不会只有一道门。
E: A hero cannot take victory by defeating just a single monster. Why would there only be one gate in front of a vault?

C: 当你和丹恒被困在翁法罗斯时，两位天才正在谈论着什么。
E: While you and Dan Heng were trapped in Amphoreus, two geniuses were discussing about something.

C: 你在赛场偶遇了缇宝和缇宁，比赛局势瞬息万变，任何情报都可能颠覆战局。和她们聊聊吧。
E: You encounter Tribbie and Trinnon in the competition area. The competition is constantly changing, and any intel could turn the tides of the matches. Speak with them.

C: 「巨兽卧沉渊」——大地兽占领了赛场，预言中的第二个灾厄也如期而至。\n与此同时，有关「预言梦」的议论也愈演愈烈……
E: "The giant beast rests in the abyss." A dromas has taken over the competition area as the second disaster foretold in the prophecy comes to pass.\nAt the same time, the discussion about the prophetic dream is getting heated...

C: 去找刻律德菈开始今天的经营吧，别让那些饿肚子的妖精们等急啦。
E: Go find Cerydra and start managing today's business. Better not keep those hungry fairies waiting.

C: 裂界的活动加剧了——雅利洛-Ⅵ上正在发生某种变化。

C: 你判断他们是安全的，对吗？
E: So you think they'll be safe, right?

C: 哎呀，我还没跟你说过吧？
E: Oh, I forgot to tell you.

C: 喂——喂喂——
E: Hello? Hello hello?

C: 无限期，直到异常消除！
E: Indefinitely. Until the anomaly is removed!

C: 没！我只是在想象，这次咱们仨会遇到什么有趣的事…嘿嘿！
E: Nah~ I was just imagining all the fun we're gonna have here... hee-hee!

C: 这一点嘛，无可奉告。
E: No comment.

C: 你的心态可真好呀。
E: I like the way you think.

C: 也许「刃」更重要吧。
E: Maybe Blade's more important.

C: 真是意外。
E: How shocking...

C: 完全没看出期待的样子……
E: You don't seem very excited...

C: 这个问题，也许瓦尔特先生能给你更详实的分析解答。不过，既然你想知道我的看法……
E: Welt may be better equipped to answer that. But if you want my two cents...

C: 这就是艾利欧所预见的以及你将抵达的未来…喜欢么？
E: This is your future that Elio has foreseen. Do you like it?

C: 以自己的意志抵达那个结局，我就是喜欢这样的你。
E: Use that will of yours to reach the end of your story. That's the you I like.

C: 唔，也行，那你自己小心喔。
E: Oh, all right. You stay safe.

C: 绝对不能让军团利用电梯侵入到主控舱段，我必须优先考虑科员们的安全。
E: Because I mustn't give the Legion any chance to reach the master control zone by the elevator. I must ensure the safety of the station's staff.

C: 我是空间站「黑塔」的站长，但…其实不过是替黑塔女士代为打理的管家罢了。
E: I'm lead researcher of Herta Space Station. But honestly... I'm more like Madam Herta's "housekeeper" of this place.

C: 如此生死存亡之秋，他们的目光还是那么狭隘。
E: Even now, with death staring them in the face, they still refuse to open their minds.

C: 眼睛忽而变得闪亮，忽而变得哀伤，仿佛阅读着一页页不可思议的故事。直至某一刻，它回过神来：「无法测定！」眼睛不再回应，坚定地望向远方，就像预见了故事的下一页。
E: The eyeball flickers between sparkling and sorrowful, as if reading through pages of incredible stories. Until, at one moment, it snaps back to reality: "Rating invalid!" The eye stops responding, gazing firmly into the distance, as if it had glimpsed the next page of the story.

C: 嗨。
E: Hi.

C: 走了记得常回来看看～提前预个约，找艾丝妲或者阿兰就行，我好把时间空下来研究你。
E: Just remember to come back often. Make an appointment in advance with Asta or Arlan so I can make time to study you.

C: 不，等下——你身体有颗星核啊——你还是走吧，偶尔回来瞧瞧，久住还是太危险了。
E: No, hold on — you have a Stellaron within you. I think it's better if you left and came back occasionally. It might be dangerous if you stay for too long...

C: 对了，交换下信标吧——要是迷路了什么的，随时发短信给我。
E: By the way, we should exchange beacons. If you get lost or something, feel free to text me.

C: 特别鸣谢\n黑塔\n反物质军团
E: Special thanks expressed to\nHerta\nthe Antimatter Legion

E: March 7th's room is right next to the Archives. You can visit him on the way.

C: （他怎么知道的…难道是眼神出卖了我？！）
E: (How did he know... Did my gaze betray me!?)

C: 关于「连结」…
E: About Connection...

C: 怎么了？我只回答「模拟宇宙」相关的问题喔。
E: What's up? I'll only answer questions about the Simulated Universe.

C: 为示尊崇，我们以那位星神为这座堡垒命名。受克里珀庇护的筑城者们也一直引领着这座城市前进，对抗来自外界的种种灾难。
E: To show our reverence, we named this fortress after the Aeon themself. The Architects, under the protection of Qlipoth, have continued to lead this city forward, repelling all manner of disasters.

C: 我也需要点时间，调查一下所有可能与「星核」有关的记载…恕不远送。
E: I too need some time. I will go over our records for anything that may be connected to Stellarons... Please excuse me for not escorting you further.

C: 倒也有可能，只是感觉有点儿浪费能源。
E: Maybe, but the ones outside just seem like a waste of energy.

C: 啊，我知道了！听一个嘴巴不严实的铁卫说，有几位「外来者」跟可可利亚见了一面——就是你们吧？
E: Ah! I've figured it out! I heard a loudmouthed guard say that a group of outsiders had met with Cocolia... You must be them?

C: ——凭城借一！
E: Ace!

C: 哈…真累呀，我现在只想躺在软软的床上昏睡过去……
E: *yawn* ...So tired. I just wanna put my head on a pillow and drift off...

C: 旅店门口来了一群银鬃铁卫，但似乎来者不善。
E: There's a group of Silvermane Guards at the entrance... and I don't think they're here to say hi.

C: 该死的怪物！
E: Darn monsters!

C: 你这话里有话啊。强调布洛妮娅信任我，意思就是你还没信任我啰？
E: You mean to say that you don't trust me completely?

C: 将在下层区的见闻和有关「星核」的信息告诉了希露瓦，并转交了布洛妮娅的信件……
E: Telling Serval about your time in the Underworld and what you know about the Stellaron, and showing her Bronya's letter...

C: 听上去…就我们仨加上希儿，不大够啊。要不要回去地下，让「地火」这就跟我们会合？
E: It sounds like... The three of us and Seele might not be enough. Why don't we go back underground and get Wildfire to come with us?

C: 情报部的同事…要不问问佩拉？
E: Intelligence Department. Maybe ask Pela for help?

C: 佩拉小姐？啊～她刚回去取钱啦，应该就快回来了吧。
E: Miss Pela? Ah! She just went back to get money. She should be back soon.

C: 「开拓者」…在这星球上还是第一次被这么称呼欸！
E: Trailblazers... first time anyone's called us that on this planet!

C: 她在现场，只是待在你们注意不到的地方。
E: She was there. She just made sure no one could see her.

C: 我的评判标准和你不同。
E: My scoring criteria are different from yours.

C: 什么啊，之前都住进豪华客房了，却被那个坏女人给算计了一把…你们不觉得不甘心吗？
E: Not so fast! Last time we were here, that evil Madam Guardian interrupted us before we'd gotten the most out of our luxury suites... Don't you think we should make up for it?

C: 哎呀，真不错！我演唱会前排的摄影师要是有你一半的功力就好了！
E: Wow, that's pretty great! I wish the photographers at my shows had your skills!

C: 嗯？{NICKNAME}，你来得正好——请你也帮忙劝劝她吧。
E: Perfect timing, {NICKNAME} — please talk some sense into her.

C: …没想到隔了这么多年，还能再见到这把吉他。真是一场孽缘…嗐。
E: ...After all these years, I never thought I'd set eyes on this guitar again. *sigh* Guess we're stuck with each other...

C: 这世界上可能也就我和佩拉受得了她了…哦，还有她的那位助手——茉莉小姐。
E: Pela and I are probably the only ones in the world who know how to handle her... oh, and that assistant of hers too — Molly.

C: 那时你们同他爆发冲突是形势所迫，我能理解。
E: The conflict was a product of the situation, I understand.

C: 你可以把随身行李寄存在这里——无人看守，全凭自觉。
E: You can store your carry-on luggage here. The luggage is unguarded, so everything is up to the self-discipline of the people.

C: 你什么也没有错过，垃圾桶里没有值得注意的东西。
E: You haven't missed anything. Nothing worth looking at in this trashcan.

C: …不要解释，我明白，对你来说这种冲动太强烈啦。
E: ...You don't need to explain. I get it. That urge is too great for you to resist.

C: 呃，那为啥{F#她}{M#他}还没醒呢？
E: Uh, then why hasn't {F#she}{M#he} woken up yet?

C: 他们醒得比你早。黑头发的青年是第一个，桑博把他带走了。
E: They've been up for a while already. The young guy with the dark hair left first — he went with Sampo.

C: 是啊，醒来第一件事就是到处找你，这不，看见你有难，{NICKNAME}和我赶来救场啦，感谢我们吧～
E: Yeah! The first thing {NICKNAME} and I did was go look for you! And now that we've found you, we're trying to make sure you don't get your butt kicked! You're welcome~

C: 待在地上很舒服吧？你们知道地下变成什么样了吗？你们有考虑过下层人的死活吗？
E: Do you know what's become of us down here while you live the easy life? Did you even consider the fate of the Underworlders?

C: 这矿山本就是我们的地盘，矿队没日没夜拼命赶工的时候，也没见你们出半点力气，连个耍嘴皮子放酸屁的都没有！
E: This mine is our territory — the mining team is laboring here day in and day out. You guys don't even pretend like you're here to lend a hand!

C: 我也要参战，不能让这伙流氓为所欲为！
E: I'm going too. We can't let these thugs get away with whatever they like!

C: 是这样的：我醒来以后，医生说丹恒被那个坏蛋桑博带走了。我绕了一圈都没找着，恰好遇到这几个孩子说知道他的下落。
E: It's like this: After I woke up, that doctor said Sampo had taken Dan Heng with him. I went around in circles trying to find the blue-haired scoundrel, and bumped into these kids. They say they know where he is!

C: 嘻嘻，明察秋毫，心细如发——说的就是本姑娘我啦！
E: Hehehe... "Those with keen eyes see the dust between the stars!" I came up with that, by the way.

C: 我？我哪有心虚，哈哈哈，我桑博一向问心无愧…天哪，难道我无意中做了什么得罪各位好朋友的事吗！
E: Me? Scared? Hahaha, my friends, what do I have to fear? *gasp* Surely I haven't done anything to offend you?

C: 这是什么问题，咱们一起出生入死，我是你的好兄弟桑博•科斯基啊！
E: What kind of question is that!? I'm your old pal — Sampo Koski — we've been through thick and thin together!

C: 我问得差不多了。
E: That's all I have to ask.

C: 感觉有点头晕转向。
E: I feel a bit discombobulated.

C: 最后是下层区的势力——「地火」组织。
E: Lastly, we have the main strength of the Underworld — Wildfire.

C: 我们互相帮助，或许有转机。
E: Let's work together, maybe we can make a change.

C: 你到底跑哪去了，有没有受伤？我马上找管家过来——
E: Where were you? A—Are you hurt? I'll fetch the butler right away—

C: 铆钉镇可是在裂界里…
E: Rivet Town is in Fragmentum...

C: 这不过是我做过的诸多玩偶之一。说实话，我也没想到她会这么喜欢它。
E: I've lost count of all the dolls I've made. To be honest, I wasn't expecting her to like this one so much.

C: 有什么不合适的？哦，你说这盔甲的尺寸？看上去的确大了点，拿去给铁匠随便改改就行了。
E: What's unsuitable? Oh, you mean the size of this armor? It does look a little big, so just take it to the blacksmith and get it resized.

C: 你在为奶粉发愁？
E: Are you worried about baby formula?

C: 太危险了，我要去找他！
E: It's too dangerous. I'll go find him!

C: 怎会如此？！{NICKNAME}面对如此凶悍的对手竟毫不示弱，甚至在战斗中得心应手，将「灰背鲸」和它的「轻骑兵」们轻松击溃……
E: How can this be so!? {NICKNAME} showed no signs of weakness in the face of such a fierce opponent, and even handled the battle with ease, defeating the Grayback Whale and its Light Cavalries with ease...

C: 菲多拉说得对，他们在矿区救了很多人…我觉得他们值得信赖。
E: Fidora's right. They saved lots of people at the mines... I think they can be trusted.

C: 谈不上喜欢。
E: I can't say I like it.

C: 你们相信这书上写的内容吗？
E: Do you believe in the stuff written in the book?

C: 我还有更重要的事。
E: I have bigger fish to fry.

C: 漫长的十纪中，星际和平公司从未放弃将诸界重新连通的愿景。在博识学会的鼎力支持下，我们已初步掌握了绕过星核污染的技术，并在一百一十三个星系进行了实验，取得了可喜的成果。
E: Over the past ten long eras, the Interastral Peace Corporation had never given up on our hope of reconnecting the worlds. With the Intelligentsia Guild's ardent support, we have established preliminary technologies to bypass the Stellaron's corrosion, and have obtained positive results after experimenting on <unbreak>113</unbreak> star systems.

C: 星际和平公司强烈谴责「反物质军团」的暴行，并呼吁宇宙间的文明联合起来，共同抵御「毁灭」的入侵。
E: The IPC strongly condemns the barbaric atrocities committed by the Antimatter Legion, and calls upon civilizations across the universe to unite and resist the invasion of the Destruction.

C: 不过嘛，还是给太卜司找到了一点蛛丝马迹。
E: But as cunning as she is, the Divination Commission has managed to find something.

C: 虽然追求的目标截然不同，但群星的轨道终将彼此交汇。再见。
E: Our destinations may differ, but the orbits of the stars will eventually converge. See you later.

C: 对不起，请您留步。目前情况复杂，局势尚未明朗，因此我们不得不封锁各区域。
E: My apologies, please stay where you are. The situation is complicated, and we currently do not have a clear view of the situation. We have had no choice but to seal this area off.

C: 闲谈落定，瓦尔特暗暗对你比了个手势。你明白，下面是列车团自己的谈话时间。
E: The chat concluded, and Welt shot you a covert gesture. You understand that this is the Crew's own discussion time.

C: …本座平日虽深居简出，治下是何模样还是认得的。
E: ...I may live in relative seclusion, but I can recognize my own territory.

C: 没办法，总得有人提醒她。
E: Well, someone had to put her in her place.

C: 好罢，恩公既问了，小女子回答就是：太卜司主掌仙舟的情报、运筹与卜算。
E: Anyway, if you must know, the Divination Commission is responsible for gathering intelligence, devising strategies, and performing divination.

C: 你要小心，{NICKNAME}，猎手的每一次出现或许都是暗示，为了修正未来的方向……
E: Be careful, {NICKNAME}. Every time a Stellaron Hunter appears, their objective may be to steer the direction of the future.

C: 呸呸，什么丧气话！这话是你一个医生随便说的吗？
E: Tsk, what's that supposed to mean? Doctors don't give up that easily!

C: 别开玩笑啦，我们走吧。
E: That's enough of that. Come on, let's go.

C: 师姐，这材质很奇特啊
E: Yunche, this material is so unique

C: 请说。
E: Please. Speak your mind.

C: 嗯？说吧，本姑娘知无不言～
E: Hmm? Go ahead. I'll tell you everything I know~

C: 而且那位素裳姑娘说如果我没法离港，她可以带我四处走走呢。
E: Miss Sushang said she could show me around if I find myself unable to leave.

C: 你、你退钱！
E: Refund! Immediately!

C: 不要紧，我们绝不勉强停云小姐。
E: Understood. We won't put you out of your comfort zone, Miss Tingyun.

C: 快快打开小家伙，让它追着这些线索上的味道，动起来吧！
E: No time to lose! Let's give him the scent and let him lead the way.

C: 你们可靠吗？
E: Are you guys up to this?

C: 汪，呜汪！
E: Woof! Woof!

C: 抱歉，为防机密外泄，「药王秘传」之事只有我和将军知晓。
E: Apologies. To avoid dissemination of intelligence, the general and I kept the involvement of the Disciples to ourselves.

C: …走吧。
E: ...Let's go.

C: 我在你的眼睛里看到了对力量的渴望。此生苦短，不是吗？嘻嘻，我可以、我可以让你……
E: I see a desire for power in your eyes. This life is too short for you, isn't it? Hehe, I can... I can help you...

C: 我已收到了前方捷报，应该要不了多久他们就会回来吧？
E: I received the good news from the front lines. They'll probably be back soon.

C: 这么一说，这雕像和你确实没那么像……
E: Y'know, the more I look at this statue, the less "Dan-Hengy" it gets...

C: 试试挣脱这道囚笼吧。
E: Try untangling yourselves from this.

C: 你终于前来履行守望建木的职责了？
E: Have you finally remembered your duty of watching over the Arbor?

C: 倒也不意外。
E: Not a complete surprise.

C: 难得见列车长发话。
E: It's rare for the conductor to make an announcement.

C: 还是一起来吧，机会难得…
E: You should come with us, it's such a rare opportunity...

C: （时候差不多了…找个位子坐下吧。）
E: (It's about time... I should find a seat.)

C: 欢迎光临白日梦酒店，愿您有一段难忘的度假体验！如需办理入住，请直走到酒店前台……
E: Welcome to the Reverie! May you experience an unforgettable holiday! If you need help checking in, please head straight to the concierge...

C: 大家齐聚一堂，享受着欢乐，追逐着机遇，孤注一掷赌上自己的一切，最后将梦想化作现实！
E: Everyone gathers in the hall, reveling in merriment, pursuing opportunities, staking all they have on one desperate gamble, and finally, their dreams become reality!

C: 知更鸟，请你帮助我们的朋友更好地适应这场美梦吧。
E: Robin, please guide our friend in getting more comfortable with the new environment.

C: 当然有。
E: Of course there is.

C: 那么，你，和其他乘客，是否承认对以下恶性事件负责——
E: Do you, as well as the other passengers, take responsibility for the following malicious conduct?

C: 那会儿就有苏乐达了？
E: Did SoulGlad really exist in that era?

C: ——这枚梦泡的内容到此为止了。不知您的感受如何？
E: ...That's all for the content of this dream bubble. How was your experience?

C: 钟表匠？
E: Watchmaker?

C: 有棱有角的小鸟…可我好像什么都没看见欸。
E: A bird with sharp edges and points... Umm, I don't think I saw it.

C: 你什么眼神，三月七长这样？
E: You should get your eyesight checked. Are you sure March 7th looks like this?

C: …大人的娱乐？
E: ...Entertainment for grownups?

C: 星穹列车的开拓客，我们又见面了——哈哈，您还带着两位有趣的朋友呢！
E: Trailblazer of the Astral Express, here we are again! Haha, I see you've brought two friends with you! They seem like fun people!

C: 流光忆庭…是那群奉侍「记忆」星神的人吗？
E: Garden of Recollection... Is it the group that serves the Aeon of Remembrance?

C: 钟表小子？你是个动画人物？
E: Clockie? Are you a cartoon character?

C: 小的们，给我列队！好好欢迎我们的贵客！
E: Come on now, line up and give our honored guests a warm welcome!

C: 还记得邀请函上的问题吗——生命因何而沉睡？
E: I still remember the question on the invitation letter — Why does life slumber?

C: 我们就快到了。
E: We're almost there.

C: 我的尊严已经所剩无几——行行好，求您别把我这仅存的一点也踩碎了。
E: There's little dignity left in me. Please be nice and don't trample on it.

C: 嗯…就这样吧。再挣扎下去也无济于事。
E: Well... I'm going to leave things as they are. Getting upset about it won't help anything.

C: 他的思维真发散…这就是艺术家吗？
E: His thinking is very spontaneous... Is this typical of artists?

C: 尝试洞察他的内心。
E: Try reading his inner thoughts.

C: …好像绕不开，只能把它们敲晕了……
E: ...I don't think we can get around them. Knocking them out is the only way to go...

C: 杨叔会想办法转移话题…
E: Mr. Yang would try to change the subject...

C: 呼…总算搞定了。过了这里，后面就没什么阻碍了。
E: Phew... finally. There won't be too many hindrances after this.

C: 米哈伊尔…
E: Mikhail...

C: 又是这样…不对，难道……
E: This again... No wait, could it be...

C: （唔…这是哪儿？）
E: (Ugh... Where's this?)

C: 我愿意。我会与你一同点燃反抗的狼烟，将王国从危难中拯救。
E: I will. I will stand with you and ignite the rising smoke of rebellion until the kingdom is saved from absolute peril.

C: 一定有什么办法的...
E: There has to be a way...

C: 谁？
E: Who?

C: 嗯，这可不好…你是家族的骄傲，别让那些多余的情绪影响你完美的音韵。
E: Hmm, this is not good... You're the pride of The Family. Don't let those unnecessary emotions affect your perfect pitch.

C: 你平安无事就好。为你介绍一下——黑天鹅小姐，流光忆庭的忆者。
E: It's good to see you're unharmed. Allow me to introduce you to Miss Black Swan, Memokeeper of the Garden of Recollection.

C: 这扇门…也上锁了吗？
E: This door... is locked too?

C: 当时和{NICKNAME}遇见的那个东西……
E: That thing I encountered with {NICKNAME} back then...

C: 他们是我的孩子，同曾经的我一样，是尚未白热的火苗。他们还年轻，我不会责备。
E: They are my children and, just as I was, they are flames that have yet to burn white-hot. They're still young and I don't blame them.

C: 至于砂金那边…瓦尔特，我想听听你的看法。
E: As for that Aventurine... Welt, I'd like to hear your thoughts.

C: 啊…好烦！好想喝点冰冰凉凉的汽水冷静冷静……
E: Ahh... what a mess! I really want a nice cool drink of soda to help me calm down...

C: 在没有任何证据的情况下，他直接指控那位巡海游侠是杀死知更鸟的嫌犯。可对于她和「忆域迷因」的联系，以及为何要潜伏在你身边，却只字未提。
E: He accused that Galaxy Ranger of killing Robin without any evidence whatsoever... but said nothing about her connection to that Memory Zone Meme, or why he was stalking you.

C: 砂金想要扳倒家族，就必须制造出足够大的破绽。他至今为止的行动…目的究竟是什么……
E: If Aventurine wants to bring down The Family, he'll have to create a big enough chance. After everything he's done so far — what is his goal...?

C: 更何况，应邀而至的可疑人物不在少数。他们当真觉得…一柄长刀要比你手中的「黑洞」更危险么？
E: And what's more, there were plenty of suspects invited. Do they really think... that a blade is more dangerous than that "black hole" you're wielding?

C: 和我分享你的发现吧——就你我二人，在找到确切的证据前，我不想用模棱两可的揣测干扰其他人的判断。
E: Share your findings with me, and me alone. I don't want vague conjecture to interfere with other people's judgments before we find solid proof.

C: …电话？要听听看吗？
E: ...A phone? Want to listen in?

C: 「赢」？到底发生什么事了？告诉我。
E: Won? What happened exactly? Tell me.

C: 哦，密室逃脱，我喜欢。
E: Oh, an escape room — my favorite.

C: 喔啊啊啊…！
E: Waaaaaah...!

C: 它崩溃了，可能需要一些时间重启。
E: It has crashed. It may take some time to reboot.

C: 您的脸色看起来不太好啊。姑且确认一下，让您感到焦躁的是我吗？
E: You don't look too well. Am I making you anxious?

C: 如果我没理解错，你这番话…可是对*家族*提出了极其严重的指控。
E: If I wasn't mistaken, you'd just made a serious accusation against The Family.

C: 「你的记忆是否没有遭到任何形式的篡改、删除，包括但不限于流光忆庭的技术。」
E: "Is your memory free from any kind of tampering or deletion, encompassing but not restricted to the techniques of the Garden of Recollection?"

C: 但人体终有其时，神躯亦然。
E: But the human body has its limits, and so does the divine's.

C: 只是点出事实，瓦尔特先生一定比我更能参透个中滋味。
E: Just pointing out the facts. Mr. Yang will definitely have a better sense of what's going on than I do.

C: 这是…给我的礼物？确定没有搞错？
E: Is this... a gift for me? Are you sure this isn't some kind of mistake?

C: 告诉你吧——「哑巴」，符合这个定义的人，原先一共有两个。但知更鸟已经死了，而另一个…「她」还在匹诺康尼，但你恐怕再也找不到了。
E: Let me tell you something. There were two mutes, but one is dead now, and the other... Though "she" is still in Penacony, I'm afraid you'll never find "her" again.

C: 你以某种形而上的方式将「崇高道德的赞许」放入了空杯里……
E: You put "Praise of High Morals" into the empty cup in a metaphysical manner...

C: 我猜，现在该说到那位「米哈伊尔」的故事了吧。
E: I guess it's time to tell the story of that "Mikhail."

C: 你很敏锐。星穹列车也收到了那只八音盒，对不？知道里面藏着什么秘密么？
E: You're very perceptive. The Astral Express has received that music box, too, right? Do you know the secrets it holds?

C: 家族在很久以前就将「钟表匠」视作敌人，但苦于后者神龙见首不见尾，只活在他一手缔造的商业神话中，猎犬们迟迟抓不到他。
E: The Family has considered the Watchmaker as an enemy for a long time, but the Hounds haven't been able to track him down, as he seems to be living only in the characters and stories he created.

C: 所以明白了么？为什么我肯和你们说这么多…因为那姑娘的死一定和「钟表匠的遗产」有关。而在重重迷雾的尽头……
E: So, do you understand why I'm spilling all this info...? Because I believe the girl's death must be connected to the Watchmaker's Legacy, and at the end of all these mysteries...

C: 这也解释了星期日先生迟迟没能抓住叛徒的原因。
E: That would explain why Mr. Sunday has been having such difficulty in catching the traitor.

C: 愿你的诡计永不败露。
E: May your schemes be forever concealed.

C: 等骰子落定我们就知道了。
E: We'll know when the dice falls.

C: 「星际和平播报快讯：公司市场开拓部发言人证实无主星区茨冈尼亚爆发小规模叛乱，目前局势已得到有效控制——」
E: "Newsflash from the Interastral Peace Broadcast: The IPC Marketing Development Department's spokesperson confirms that a small-scale rebellion has broken out in the unclaimed region of Sigonia. The situation is now under control..."

C: 我…成功了么……
E: Have... Have I succeeded?

C: 是「那个人」的身份，对吧？
E: It's that person's identity, isn't it?

C: 「你的好运是我们，也是所有埃维金人最宝贵的财富……」
E: "Your good luck is the most precious wealth we — all Avgin have."

C: 但我受到的阻拦比预想更甚。<unbreak>11</unbreak>次，我做出尝试，却以失败告结，不知不觉中，我与这世界的联系变得太过紧密，难以逃离「剧本」的约束。
E: But I encountered more roadblocks than expected. Eleven times, I've tried, but ended in failure. Before I knew it, this world and I became too intertwined and it became too difficult to escape the constraints of the "script."

C: 我可不能让自己身陷危险，是这个道理吧。所以你们得先证明自己…哎，往哪走呢？
E: I can't allow myself to be exposed to danger. That's just the way it goes. So, you all have to first prove yourselves... Huh, where are you going?

C: 然后你会死。我的意思是…「你们」都会。
E: And you will die. I mean... all of you will.

C: 不用害怕，迎接我们的人…来了。
E: Don't be afraid. The one who has come to greet us... has arrived.

C: 在你们开展调查时，他提供了关键信息：米哈伊尔——曾经的「钟表匠」——与家族一同建立起如今的匹诺康尼，又因为某些原因与家族决裂。
E: During your investigation, he shared a vital piece of information. Mikhail, the former Watchmaker who collaborated with The Family to construct the Penacony we're familiar with today, had a falling out with The Family for specific reasons.

C: 那位「熔火骑士」的真身竟是一位少女…于她而言，这断然是个不可轻易告人的秘密。从这点来看，可以相信她有合作的意愿。
E: Who would've thought that the Molten Knight's true identity was actually a young girl... For her, this is a secret that she cannot allow others to know. That being the case, I think we can believe she's willing to cooperate.

C: 我们对拉扎莉娜女士的成就很感兴趣，可否展开讲讲？
E: We're very interested in Madam Razalina's achievements. Could you tell us a little more about them?

C: 如此说来，那颗星核现在在哪儿？
E: If that's the case, where is the Stellaron now?

C: 嗯，你们也多保重。如果有任何闪失…不用管我，一定要封印星核。
E: Well, you take care too. If anything goes wrong... don't worry about me. Just make sure to seal the Stellaron.

C: 为什么这么觉得？
E: Why would you say so?

C: 咦，那是…我自己？
E: Wait, is that... me?

C: 从未有过。
E: Never.

C: 仙舟人不是有句话吗，帝弓仅以光矢宣其轮椅——
E: Isn't there a saying among the Xianzhou people that "the Reignbow sect lets their Lux Arrow do all the beating..."

C: 我没这么断定，只是觉得蹊跷，也可能她真的认识巡海游侠，也可能是她出于某种原因要引我们现身…不知道。
E: I'm not entirely sure, but I do have my suspicions. Maybe she knows a Galaxy Ranger, or perhaps she's trying to lure us out for some reason... which I can't figure out.

C: 骑士脑袋硬！岚哥一根筋！比赛不必赢！乐子不能停！
E: A knight's head is hard as steel! Brother Lan's focus is stubborn as a heel! We don't all have to be winners, but if we don't have fun, we'd all be sinners!

C: 大家好，我是三月七！一个喜欢到处冒险的普通女孩！
E: Hello everyone, I'm March 7th! I'm an ordinary girl who loves adventures!

C: 大家安全第一。
E: Safety first, everyone.

C: 好啊。我会给你们的列车智库再添上几笔的。
E: Alright. I'll have to add to that data bank of yours you've got on the Express.

C: 「敌人已经来到家门口，我们没有退路，为了美梦小镇的未来——」
E: "The enemy is at our doorstep, and we have no path of retreat. For the future of Dreamville..."

C: 谢谢你，纯美骑士！我们的时间已经不多了…有缘再见。
E: Thank you, Knight of Beauty! We don't have much time left... May we meet again.

C: 世界以痛吻我，我报之以苏乐达™…呜喳喳喳……
E: The world kisses me with pain, and I provide with SoulGlad™ in return... Whoosh...

C: 「纯美」荣光在上，没想到我们竟再次见面了。二位温暖的面庞在这燥动的时刻仿若春风，照拂着我热砂般的心！
E: By the glorious light of Beauty! I never thought I would see you again. In such turbulent times, your kind faces are as spring's gentle breeze, bringing solace to my scorched heart!

C: 请放心，只是给了他们一点独自沉思命运的时间。
E: Don't worry. I just gave them some time alone to ponder their fates.

C: …我应该会选择<color=#dbc291ff>请求猎犬家系停止追捕</color>。
E: ...I'd probably choose to <color=#dbc291ff>ask the Bloodhounds to cease their pursuit</color>.

C: 总觉得，我在某些夜晚梦见过类似的场面。在梦中，我看见一群模糊的面孔，虽然不知道她们是谁，但我们情同家人。一直在与某种超然的存在抗争……
E: I often feel like I've dreamt of similar scenes on certain nights. In the dream, I see blurry faces. I don't know who they are, but I sympathize with all of them, fighting for survival against some unfathomable force...

C: 要做出这个选择吗？
E: Will you make this choice?

C: 各位的主张，我已明了。
E: I am now aware of everyone's stances.

C: 抱歉，我不太清楚「钟表匠」的事。但「米哈伊尔」……
E: I'm sorry, I don't know much about the Watchmaker, but Mikhail...

C: 站住。先告诉我，这表是你修好的？
E: Wait, first tell me, did you fix this watch?

C: 当然记得！你跟我说过，小时候你住在钟表房里，那些挂钟、怀表陪着你长大，是你最好的朋友！
E: Of course! You told me that when you were a kid, you lived in a room full of clocks. Those wall clocks and pocket watches grew up with you and were your best friends!

C: 我想小米沙也没有忘记身为引导者的使命，所以才会误把自己当作酒店门童，出现在{NICKNAME}入梦的第一刻。
E: I don't think Misha has forgotten his role as a guide. He remembered it, and that's why he mistakenly appeared as a hotel {RUBY_B#bellboy}doorman{RUBY_E#} in {NICKNAME}'s dream from the very beginning.

C: 感觉他好光明磊落…
E: But he's such a gentleman. If evil, why so nice?

C: 我恳求他把我带上，他却说我的冒险不在这里，让我留在家中，耐心等待门外的声音。
E: I asked him if I could go with him, but he said that my adventure lay elsewhere and told me to stay home and patiently await a certain sound at the door.

C: 祝你在那里找到想要的答案…或者，解脱。
E: I hope you find whatever you seek there, be it answers... or salvation.

C: 开幕的时刻近了。去吧，孩子。窃夺「同谐」的权柄，揭晓你的报应。
E: The opening is near. Go, my child. Seize the power of the Harmony and reveal your karma.

C: 「孩子，你不曾为旧主效命，而不清楚他的威能。他能夺走我们自由，便也能赐予我们自由。」
E: "My child, you did not serve the old master and know not of his power. Just as he can strip us of our freedom, he can also grant it to us."

C: 「希望你喜欢这片焦土之上的——自由之地。」
E: "I hope you like this land of freedom... on a scorched earth."

C: 怎么会呢，我可从来没动过歪脑筋…至少在你们面前没有。
E: Why would you think that? I've never harbored any ill intentions... well, not when you were around, anyway.

C: 这…不是我说的。
E: I... didn't mention anything to him.

C: 呵，有点意思。
E: Heh, now that's something.

C: 接下来，我将用这张记录了你全部记忆的「空光锥」，为你重新讲述此前发生的一切。而当故事的尾声来临时，相信聪明的你一定会发现……
E: Next, I'll use this empty light cone that carries all your memories to relive everything that happened before. And when this story reaches its end, I'm sure someone as clever as you will notice that...

C: 至此，如梦似幻、跌宕起伏的匹诺康尼之旅到此为止了。想必你已经有所察觉了，对吧？
E: This marks the end of the thrilling journey in Penacony. I'm sure you've already noticed something unusual, haven't you?

C: 第三个选择是<color=#dbc291ff>江户星</color>。那颗行星藏身在一片广阔的离子暴潮区中，正在遭受反物质军团的侵略。但近期那里的求救信号突然中断了，公司希望我们能去确认状况帕。
E: The third choice is <color=#dbc291ff>Edo Star</color>, a planet nestled within a vast ion storm region, currently under assault by the Antimatter Legion. However, the distress signals from there have recently ceased, prompting the IPC's wish for us to check in on the situation.

C: 我拿不定主意…
E: I can't make up my mind...

C: 真理医生
E: Dr. Ratio

C: 托帕 翡翠
E: Topaz and Jade

C: 这也正是「太一之梦」的可怕之处。在「秩序」支配的乐园里，每个人都能获得各自美满的梦境，幸福快乐地生活下去。
E: This is what makes Ena's Dream so powerful. In this paradise governed by the Order, everyone indulges in their delightful dreams and lives happily ever after.

C: …这幻觉太过甜美，让我清醒地意识到它不过是一场梦。
E: ...The illusion was so impossibly blissful that I realized it was just a dream.

C: 这是计划的第一步。在流光忆庭的帮助下，像各位一样足够坚强的人会逐渐从梦中清醒，苏醒的自由意志会成为撼动太一之梦的「不协和音」。
E: This is the first step of our plan. With the assistance from the Garden of Recollection, those who possess a strong will, like you, will gradually awaken from the dream. These free wills are the "discord" that will sway Ena's Dream.

C: 有些事即便没有意义，也总是要去做的。类似的事…我已经历过太多。
E: Some tasks have to be done, even if they are pointless. I have... experienced that much already.

C: 听起来短时间内没我什么事了，意思是我可以好好享受假期了？
E: Sounds like I'll be out of the action for a while. Finally, a chance to kick back and relax?

C: 其他人在哪里？
E: Where are the others?

C: 是啊，我记得那时你的回答是「不」。但发生了这么多事以后，我觉得你还挺中意它的。
E: Yeah, and you said "no" back then. But after all this madness, I'd say you've grown fond of it.

C: 如今，扰乱梦境的不稳定因素已被消除。但因为…唔…*特殊原因*，原计划在匹诺康尼大剧院举办的谐乐大典不得不临时推迟。
E: Thankfully, the factors that disrupted the Dreamscape have been resolved. However, due to... well... certain special reasons, the Charmony Festival, originally scheduled at the Penacony Grand Theater, had to be temporarily postponed.

C: 当然。谈判的三步式：先聆听；再试探；最后展露刀芒。这是你教我的。
E: Absolutely. The three steps of negotiation: Listen, test, and strike. That's what you taught me.

C: 这场改革理应来得更早些，无奈橡木家系是一群被「秩序」冲昏了头的木头脑袋…人如其名，他们的思维活络程度还赶不上我一个老头。
E: This reform should have been implemented earlier, but unfortunately, the Oak Family were a bunch of blockheads blinded by "Order"... Their level of intellectual flexibility doesn't even come close to an old fellow like me.

C: 与其落入腹背受敌的境地，不如主动退让一步，邀请公司上桌谈判，名义上是合作，实则是在为自己谋取更多存续的机遇。
E: Instead of falling into a situation where they are plagued by both external and internal threats, Penacony would rather take a step back and invite the IPC to negotiate at the table, ostensibly to cooperate, but in reality, to secure more opportunities for their own survival.

C: 「开拓」的旅途中，很少出现所有乘客一起下车的情况，但匹诺康尼…确实具备让我们这么做的意义。
E: It's rare for all passengers to leave the Express together during a Trailblazing expedition, but for Penacony... it seems most appropriate.

C: 但如今，宇宙中有更多势力知道了这个秘密，银河形势…会变得更加复杂吧。
E: However, now that more powers in the universe are aware of this secret, the situation in the cosmos... will become more complicated.

C: 你不也一样么，翡翠女士？如果我们不跟注，你的「翡翠石」也没法这么顺利地入境，将流淌在美梦中的欲望尽收眼底，赢得谈判的筹码……
E: Are you not in the same boat, Miss Jade? Without us playing along, your "Jade Stone" wouldn't have made it across the border so easily, allowing you to see all desires that flow through dreams to gain a bargaining chip in negotiations...

C: 你知道「典当行」该怎么走么？
E: Do you know how to get to the pawnshop?

C: （不好意思啦，{NICKNAME}。我得先去找到那位「慈玉女士」。）
E: (Sorry, {NICKNAME}, but I've got to find Lady Bonajade first.)

C: 萨缪尔，很好的名字呢。那么萨缪尔小姐，你想要什么？又愿意为之付出什么？
E: Samuel, nice name. So, what do you need, Miss Samuel? And what are you willing to give up in return?

C: 嗯？这么直接，不怕我当真？
E: Hmm? So direct. Aren't you afraid I might take you seriously?

C: 你与流萤边走边谈，待到视野更加开阔时停住了脚步。
E: You walk and talk with Firefly, and stop in your tracks when the view becomes more expansive.

C: 并以…我个人的名义，对各位嘉宾表示热烈欢迎！
E: And on behalf... of myself, I'd like to extend a warm welcome to all our guests!

C: 不过，看在你这么努力的份上，我就告诉你一件事好了：炸弹不在这里，有的只有我精心布置的恶作剧——时间不多了，快去找到真正的炸弹吧～
E: But, seeing as you've put in so much effort, I'll throw you a bone: The bomb's not here. This is only a prank I've craftily set up. Hurry, time's running out. You'd better find that real bomb quickly!

C: 「哦，阿哈！若你问我对您的感受，请别对我说你视而不见！」
E: "O Aha! If you ask me how I feel about you, don't tell me that you pretend not to see!"

C: 「折纸小鸟」？你看不出来吗？我是「折纸」娃娃啾！
E: Origami Bird? Can't you tell? I'm the Origami Doll, tweet!

C: …啊，你来了！
E: ...Ah, you're here!

C: 但在离开前，我们还有最后一件事要做。
E: But before leaving, we still have one last thing to do.

C: 看来你们也发现了，那位虚构史学家的身影从匹诺康尼消失了，就和他来时一样悄无声息。
E: Looks like you've also noticed that history fictionologist is nowhere to be found in Penacony, disappearing just as quietly as when he first showed up.

C: 我知道，但让我很难释怀的…就是「当下」。
E: I know, but the thing that I can't get out of my mind... is the present.

C: 没想到帕姆的反应会那么大……
E: I never expected Pom-Pom would be so distraught...

C: 欢迎光临「白日梦」酒店，尊敬的股东们。
E: Welcome to The Reverie, distinguished shareholders.

C: （还有，那又是什么？）
E: (Also, what's that?)

C: 完全不一样啊！
E: That's not what I said!

C: 当然是「校友群」啦，开学前先加群混个脸熟，这不是常识嘛。
E: From the campus group chat, of course. I joined the group before school even started so I'd get to know more people. That's just common sense.

C: 就是这儿了。人好多啊，都是来参加考试的吗？
E: Here we are. There's so many people. Is everyone here for the exam?

C: 这样呀，你的选择未必正确，但错误的选择往往能让故事更加精彩。
E: I see. Your choice may not be correct but a wrong choice can often make a story more exciting.

C: 那你呢？
E: What about you?

C: 正是。在下与球棒•忍者是出生入死的忍道挚友，曾在邪祟幻境中遭遇围困，同休共戚。
E: Indeed. Baseball Bat Ninja and I are comrades who will risk life and limb for one another. We were besieged in the fiendling fantasia and survived together.

C: 这都哪跟哪啊，你还是先回去吧，这几天的活动特殊得很，随便跟风是进不去的。
E: What nonsense are you spouting? You'd best go home for now. The events we're holding over the next few days aren't like any other! Jumping on the bandwagon isn't going to nab you an entrance ticket.

C: 况且就算能混入其中，我的身份也太过…招摇。所以我还是把精力放在了杂音这件事上。
E: Besides, even if I did succeed in infiltrating them, I... would stand out too much. It makes more sense for me to focus on studying the noise instead.

C: 用不着给我看脑子！还问起诊来了？
E: There's no need for my head to be checked... let alone a consultation!

C: 三月同学……
E: March...?

C: 我…也会尽力帮忙的。
E: I—I'll help out wherever possible.

C: 波提欧先生，你回来了？
E: You're back, Mr. Boothill.

C: 放心吧，大明星。给你讲个乐子，看见我这副身体没，刚改造完的时候，储存记忆的模块说坏就坏，明明你碰都没碰它。
E: Don't overthink it, singing queen. Let me tell you something funny. I'm sure you can tell I've been through some modifications on my body. When I just started out as a cyborg, my memory module fizzled out every so often. And I didn't even mess with it.

C: 他们没有理你，依然在继续自己的话题。可能对于小群体的日常来说，三个人就是闲聊的极限，四个人就会想去组乐队，五个人就会发生一段复杂的爱恨情仇故事。
E: They ignore you and continue with their conversation. For a small group of friends, maybe three people chatting is already their limit. With four, they might consider starting a band, and with five, a complex love story riddled with love and hate might unfold.

C: 想想浩瀚的星空…
E: Visualize a starlit sky...

C: 谢谢你帮我解围！能教教我你的涂鸦…忍法是怎么做到的吗？
E: Thank you for standing up for me earlier. Um, could you show me how you did that graffiti, I mean, your ninja move?

C: 什么声音？
E: What was that?

C: 姐啊！我这不卖芋圆，也没有什么屑人，您饶了我吧！
E: Give me a break, Miss! I'll repeat this for the millionth time: I'm not evil, nor do I sell any gorge roe!

C: 蕉蕉，蕉蕉……
E: Bana, bana...

C: 芮克先生，我、我还想再试一次！
E: Mr. Reca, I—I want to try this role again!

C: 《银河忍法帖》有云：「忍心当如磐石，凌轹之下不离析，谰言之风难磨蚀。」
E: As stated in the Cosmic Ninjutsu Inscriptions: "The stone heart of a ninja is immune to pressure, immune to lies, come wind, rain, or shine."

C: 这些蕉师绝不是普通的教职员工…你们的目的是什么？
E: There's no chance those BananAdvisors are actual faculty members... Just what is your goal?

C: 它看着是不错，但用它取了谁的命？我可没这意思。
E: It's a nice gun alright. But using it to take a life? I have no such intention.

C: 没错，你应该也猜得到，毕竟只是一场空梦，即便在梦中变成猴子，人们在现实中的身体，也不会产生生理性的退化。
E: That's. Right. ...This is merely a hollow dream, so even if they turned into monkeys here, their physical bodies in the real world will not be subjected to any biological deterioration.

C: 什么香蕉意思，就这？
E: What's the big fudgin' idea here, is this all there is?

C: 哼。我见过最破的酒吧也要比这儿气派，你们管这叫显圣？
E: Hmph. I've seen rundown saloons fancier than this place. You call this a theophany?

C: 有很多社员到过这里，试图得到些什么，真理、幸福、平静…无非就是这些。
E: Many other members before you have come here seeking something. But these tend to be the usual... truth, happiness, peace, and the like.

C: 忍侠？看来在下的试炼已然告终……
E: Ninja Hero? Huh, it seems that my trial has finally come to an end...

C: {NICKNAME}演员…不，现在你是代理导演了。请前往忍者演员的「片场」拍摄吧。
E: Actor {NICKNAME}... No, I should be calling you interim director instead. Please go to the "set" where ninja actor is to begin filming.

C: 初入忍道的女孩，老夫认可你的决心。今日起，你便是缭乱•忍法的传人了。
E: O child new to the way of the ninja, I recognize your determination. Henceforth, you shall be the successor to my Dazzling Ninjutsu.

C: 我们的牺牲不是为了这种庸俗的东西，而是为了能让人类幸福、让宇宙进步、让博士满意的未来啊！
E: The sacrifices we made are not for such vulgar things. Rather, they're meant to create a future where humans can be happy, where the universe can continue to advance, and one that the Doctor can be proud of!

C: 你瞧着吧，老爹，我今后一定能在匹诺康尼闯出个名堂来！
E: Just watch, Dad. I'll be sure to make a name for myself in Penacony!

C: 飞龙•忍者
E: Ninja Hiryū

C: 歌耳戈之子居然是个路痴吗，迈德漠斯？
E: Seems like the son of Gorgo has a poor sense of direction, huh?

C: 在新伙伴迷迷的协助下，众人将尼卡多利的神性拼凑完整，于决战中夺取了泰坦的火种。终于，在圣地创世涡心，年轻的英雄白厄迎来了自己的试炼……
E: With the help of their new friend Mem, everyone pieces together Nikador's divinity and obtains the Titan's Coreflame in the final battle. At last, the young hero Phainon faces his own trial in the holy Vortex of Genesis...

C: …你怎么得出这么精确的数字的？
E: ...How did you even arrive at that number?

C: 可惜，太晚了！你们挡不住圣城的兵锋——就先拿你这可悲的臣子祭旗！
E: It's a pity, though... You're too late! You will never stop the holy city's army. Watch as I make this pathetic warrior of yours the first sacrifice!

C: 够了，闭嘴！你根本不是哈托努斯——
E: Enough, be quiet! You are not at all Chartonus—

C: … 遐蝶，生命因何而沉睡？
E: ...Castorice, why does life slumber?

C: 好耶！那我要好好设计一下调查问卷了……
E: Yay! Then I'll get started on my questionnaire!

C: 当然可以。
E: Sure.

C: 已是{RUBY_B#午时}践行时{RUBY_E#}了，缇安大人休息得如何？
E: It's already {RUBY_B#Noon}Action Hour{RUBY_E#}. Lady Trianne, I hope you're well-rested?

C: 迷迷…迷迷迷…
E: Memem... mememem...

C: 不，这次是认真的。
E: No, I'm being serious this time.

C: 可惜，既已事发，只怕元老院又会乘机有所动作…我会尽可能封锁消息，你也要留心，防患于未然。
E: Alas, it's too late. The Council will likely take this opportunity to do something... I will try to keep this under wraps for now, but you must also take care and be prepared for anything that may happen.

C: 这下我完全理解了…
E: Ah... That makes complete sense...

C: 怎么又接住人家的话了…你真是记忆的回声吗？
E: But how is it that you can respond to me...? Are you really the echoes of a memory?

C: 很简单，我让它转不就是了。
E: It's simple, I'll just have to turn it.

C: 也是喏…孤掌难鸣，量力而行吧。
E: Indeed... You can only do so much by yourself.

C: 承认自己只想开个玩笑。
E: Admit that you were only joking.

C: 这也是一道无比珍贵的记忆呀。
E: This is indeed an incredibly precious memory.

C: 故弄玄虚可没有意义哪。
E: There's no point in making this unnecessarily complicated.

C: 不过，言归正传！阿雅给的纺锤好厉害，缇安好像找到小那刻夏啦——
E: Wait a minute, let's get back on track! The spindle that Agy gave us is so powerful that Trianne seems to have found Nax...

C: 我尽力了，蝴蝶纹丝不动。
E: I did what I could, but the butterfly didn't even move an inch.

C: *泰坦悲伤的低鸣*
E: *Titan's sad cries*

C: 既然如此…也该告诉我们，您为何要大费周章，设下如此谜题了吧？
E: Well... Shouldn't you also tell us why you went through all the trouble of setting up these riddles?

C: 好壮观！{NICKNAME}，快记录下来吧。
E: Wow, it's so majestic! {NICKNAME}, hurry up and capture this moment!

C: 哈哈…那一定是人家忍不住释放的优雅魅力吧？
E: Haha... That must be because I can't help giving off an irresistible charm.

C: 各位，麻烦互相看好背后！
E: Everyone, watch each other's back!

C: 如果接过神权的是你，他们一定会心甘情愿追随的…因为你是悬锋城的英雄。
E: If you take on the divine role, they will have no reservations about following your lead... After all, you're the hero of Castrum Kremnos.

C: 这老顽童…我正好有事找他，克拉特鲁斯在何处？
E: That old man can be such a child sometimes... Do you know where Krateros is? I happen to be looking for him.

C: 随你一同离开故乡的悬锋孤军，还有他们的后人…支撑我们走到现在的，正是对旧日荣光的渴望。
E: Think about all the warriors of the Kremnoan Detachment who left their homeland with you! Think about their children! ...Only the yearning for our former glory days has kept us going all this time.

C: 至少让*我们*好好道个别吧。
E: We want to say a proper goodbye at the very least.

C: 怎么昏光庭院也来了！到底出了什么事？
E: Even the Twilight Courtyard is involved? What in the world happened here?

C: 我没在你身上感受到特别的气息…半神的考验，你通过了么？
E: I don't feel anything special from you... Have you passed the demigod trial?

C: 它望其项背。
E: It set its sights on the other's neck, nearly within reach.

C: 这么空旷的浴场是难得一见……
E: Such an empty bath is indeed a rare sight...

C: 他死后，我本想过带领族人回归故乡。但彼时的悬锋已是一片荒芜，能在其中生长的只有黑暗与疯狂。
E: Following his demise, I considered leading my people back to our homeland, but Kremnos had already turned into a wasteland. Only darkness and insanity thrived there.
Alright.

C: 知道了。我会择日整理好遗物，给他挑一处好的坟墓。
E: I see. I'll select some of his possessions and pick a nice resting place for him.

C: 抱歉，遐蝶小姐…阿格莱雅女士此前已吩咐过我，她现在无暇接待任何人。
E: My apologies, Miss Castorice... Lady Aglaea has just informed me that she has no time to receive anyone at the moment.

C: 人们称之为「黑潮」，但其实和大海无关。它无形无貌，却能把动物、人、甚至泰坦一口吞下…把他们变成黑色的怪物。
E: We call it the "black tide," though it has nothing to do with water. It has no shape or form, but it can swallow up animals, humans, and even Titans... turning them all into monsters.

C: 「黎明的光沉负于肩，金色的血落向大地。」
E: "With light of dawn heavy upon their shoulders, golden blood spills unto the land..."

C: 什么？怎么突然……
E: What? Where did that come from...?

C: 毕竟，当年夺走了它至亲{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}火种的人…就是*我们*。
E: After all, it was us who took the Coreflame from {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#}... From Oronyx's kin.

C: …还有其他人在。
E: ...Has other people in it.

C: 缇宝、缇宁…快过来看看。
E: Tribbie, Trinnon... Come check this out.

C: …你已下定决心了，是么？
E: ...You've made up your mind, haven't you?

C: ——「纷争」已被人类执握在手。终有一日，他们也能触及「天空」。
E: ...Humanity has already taken hold of "Strife," and one day, they will also reach the "Sky."

C: 融入奥赫玛的过程中，他们一定会遇到阻力…我唯一的遗憾，便是无法与他们同担这段时光。
E: They will undoubtedly face challenges while assimilating into Okhema... It is my sole regret that I cannot stand by them during this time.

C: 我不再相信任何誓言或教条。现在，我的身份只剩下一个——
E: I no longer put my faith in any oath or doctrine. Now, I have just one role...

C: 新鲜的石榴汁，一起尝尝嘛？
E: We've got fresh pomegranate juice. Want to try some?

C: 它深爱着自己的造物，不会忍心用谎言带领我们走上歧途。
E: It loves all of its creations dearly, and would never bear to lead us astray with lies.

C: 迷迷，出来上工！
E: Mem, time to work!

C: 没错，*我们*当年的住处…是一座隐蔽的地下室。
E: That's correct. The place we once called home... was a concealed basement.

C: …动手吧。
E: ...Bring it on.

C: 动手…干掉她！
E: Do it... Kill her!

C: 光历<unbreak>3760</unbreak>年 长夜月
E: Light Calendar <unbreak>3760</unbreak>, Month of Evernight

C: 没想好，是迷迷出的主意…
E: Still on the fence. It was Mem's idea...

C: 我一直很好奇：如果当真能用这圣杯实现一个愿望，你想实现什么愿望？
E: I've always wondered: If the Grail really could grant you a wish, what would yours be?

C: 嗐，瞧我这欠爱的破嘴，跟你提这茬干什么？对不起。我对什么呜呜伯爱的「圣杯」没兴趣，但「圣杯战争」？这听起来太他宝贝的危险了。
E: Ahh, dadgum, my stupid mouth. Why'd I bring that up? Sorry. Listen, I don't care about any muddle-fudgin' Holy Grail, but a Holy Grail War? Now that sounds dangerous.

C: 的确，我也有同感。
E: Yeah... I get that feeling too.

C: 不，我的意思是…纵观这批登场角色的前史，主要可以分为三类：{RUBY_B#砂金}和你的部门有着竞争关系的{RUBY_E#}、{RUBY_B#波提欧}和你的部门有个人恩怨的{RUBY_E#}、{RUBY_B#无名客}和你个人不共戴天的{RUBY_E#}。
E: No, what I mean is... If you look at the backstories of the participants, they generally fall into three categories: {RUBY_B#Aventurine}those who are in direct competition with your department{RUBY_E#}, {RUBY_B#Boothill}those who have a personal grudge against your department{RUBY_E#}, and {RUBY_B#Nameless}those who see you as their sworn enemy{RUBY_E#}.

C: 这当然不是我的「真名」，但你马上就要退出这个游戏了，所以我的「真名」对你也没什么价值。
E: That's not my True Name, of course, but since you'll be out of the game soon... well, does it even matter?

C: 而我这样完全不为人所知的异界英灵，更是无法因「知名」或「神秘」而获得额外的力量…如此一来，想要维持战斗力…就只能依靠巨量的能量摄入。
E: And as a Heroic Spirit from a completely unknown realm, I can't draw power from "fame" or Mystics. So, to maintain my combat strength... I need a lot of energy intake.

C: 如果您是第一次来流梦礁，那我强烈推荐您品尝一下咱们这里的「天环翅堡」——您在别处都吃不到这么好吃的汉堡。
E: If this is your first time in Dreamflux Reef, I highly recommend the Halovian Winged Burger. It's a burger you won't find anywhere else.

C: 如果有幸获得胜利，我希望……
E: If I'm lucky enough to win, I hope...

C: 你这话就有些过分了。
E: Hey! That's a bit harsh.

C: 幕布簌簌落下，掩去舞台上的一切。
E: The curtain fell with a soft rustle, veiling the stage in silence.

C: 这里是……？
E: Where's this...?

C: 她把我们干哪儿来了？
E: Where did she send us?

C: 不列颠因此得救了吗？
E: So was Britain saved?

C: 迁徙的无形鲢，会和钓客搏斗的硅基软骨鱼，上次我甚至还钓到过一只扑满。
E: There's the migrating invisible carp, the silicon-based soft-boned fish that put up a fight. I even caught a Trotter last time.

C: 姬子皱了皱眉，似乎你的问题让她感到意外。一阵违和感掠过心头，你从未登上列车，那么你提到的帕姆…是谁？
E: Himeko frowns, as if your question has caught her off guard. An unsettling sensation flickers through your mind. You've never boarded the Express. So who is this... "Pom-Pom" you speak of?

C: 小三月…我不知道该怎么…哎，希望忆庭的朋友能治好她。
E: March... I'm not sure how to put it... *heavy sigh* I hope that friend from the Garden can cure her.

C: {NICKNAME}，这是你在空间站工作的第几天？第三十天？第九十天？还是更久？
E: {NICKNAME}, how many days has it been since you started working at the space station? Thirty? Ninety? Even longer?

C: 还在想星穹列车的事吗？你已经为这事纠结了很久，但仍没能做出决定。
E: Still thinking about the Astral Express? You've been wrestling with that choice for ages, and still haven't made up your mind.

C: 御主，在平和幸福的梦境中想必已经休息够了吧？现在，让我们一起离开这里了！
E: Master, you've had enough rest in your happy dream, haven't you? Now, let's leave this place together!

C: Lancer，你把这位老先生满脑子坏水的脑袋当战利品，标准实在太低了些。
E: You see this evil man's old head as a trophy? I thought you had better taste than that, Lancer.

C: 以玷污所有人愿望为代价的圣杯，不过是个该被打碎的假货。我说的没错吧，御主？
E: A Holy Grail that sullies everyone's wishes is just a counterfeit for us to smash to pieces. Isn't that right, Master?

C: 终于可以见识见识这家伙的从者了吗？Archer，准备战斗！
E: Ho? Do I finally get to see this shrimp's Servant in action? Archer, get ready for a fight.

C: 就让相机启动，胶卷旋转，回到那<size=36><color=#dbc291ff>「永不腐朽的默片恐怖秀！」</color></size>
