E: Let the camera roll, let the film spin, and let us return to <size=36><color=#dbc291ff>"The Silent Horror Picture Show"!</color></size>

C: 可惜，我本以为你是个聪明人。那你们可就要受苦了——
E: Too bad. I thought you were smarter than this. Guess you'll have to suffer for it.

C: 别急着动手，红色的帅哥。别看老身这样，在你动手之前，带这位音符小姐一起上路，还是绰绰有余。
E: Don't be so quick to charge in, red handsome. I might look frail, but I could still drag Miss Note down with me before you land a hit.

C: 怎么，这台电视机有什么蹊跷吗？还是说，解开诅咒的方法和它有关？
E: What, is there something weird about this TV? Or is it part of the solution to the curse?

C: 你就这么想当正义的伙伴吗？
E: So desperate to play the hero, aren't you?

C: 斯科特，你玩真的？
E: Skott, are you serious?

C: 找到敌人的弱点了吗？
E: Have you figured out the enemy's weak spot yet?

C: 成功的商人总是会审时度势，适时改变立场进行投资。我厌倦了这永无止尽的闹剧，能一次性排除这么多对手，收益倒也不坏。
E: A good businessman always evaluates the situation and adjusts their stance for better investment. I'm tired of this endless farce. Eliminating this many competitors at once is quite profitable.

C: 加油，超酷的哈努开拓者，相信你能打败坏蛋的啾。
E: All the best, ultra-cool Hanu Trailblazer, I believe you can defeat that baddie, tweet.

C: 比起在现场到处乱跑，还是先帮帮你的老朋友波提欧吧。
E: Instead of running around aimlessly, maybe lend a hand to your old friend Boothill first.

C: 哼…没有尽头的回廊，还有和来时完全不同的房间构造。真是讨厌的结界。
E: Hmph... An endless corridor. A layout completely different from before. What an annoying Bounded Field.

C: 请放心。星核早就被封印了，这会儿只是在做例行排查，您也可以理解为加强安保。
E: There is no cause for alarm, sir. The Stellaron has already been sealed. This is just a routine inspection. A move to heighten security, if you will.

C: 艾迪恩公园出什么事了？
E: What's happening at Aideen Park?

C: 我离开故乡时也同样匆忙，并非不能理解这种心情。
E: ...I left my home in a hurry, too... I know how it feels.

C: 星穹列车的其他成员也在匹诺康尼？
E: The Astral Express crew is in Penacony, too?

C: 啊…难怪那两个人对我视而不见。
E: Aah... No wonder those two ignored me.

C: 别那么悲观嘛，驭空大人。
E: Don't be disheartened, Madam Yukong.

C: 我想旁人应该回避这种场合。去吧。
E: I don't think you need a bystander in this scenario. Go on ahead.

C: 嗯，他走得匆忙，甚至没来得及说声再见。
E: Yes. He left in such a hurry that I didn't even get the chance to say goodbye.

C: 我好奇，您为何会成为一位无名客？
E: I'm curious. Why did you become a Nameless?

C: 就算你能隐藏面貌，擅闯家族禁地也未免大胆了些。
E: I know you can hide your appearance, but trespassing on restricted Family grounds is still a bold move.

C: 我也会帮忙。
E: I'll help you with that.

C: 没那么简单，但至少短期内，列车长不用再为行程延误发愁了。
E: It's not that simple. But we can save Pom-Pom from worrying about service delays, at least for a foreseeable period of time.

C: 我问你哦，一段旅途从开始到结束，你最喜欢哪个时候？
E: Can I ask you something? What's your favorite part of a journey, from start to finish?

C: 它怎么突然出现了？
E: How did it suddenly just appear?

C: 这条缠绕翁法罗斯的白色光带，也许就是三重命途彼此交织的结果。也只有各位「开拓」的行者能深入漩涡中心，看清它的容貌。
E: This white ribbon of light encircling Amphoreus might very well be a product of the three interwoven Paths. Only when Pathstriders of the Trailblaze enter the center of the vortex will its true nature be revealed.

C: 如果需要帮助，请随时叫我。我会尽到一位乘客的义务。
E: Let me know if there's anything I can assist with. I'll do whatever I can.

C: 看吧，那就是「谒见系统」的终端。走，跟我一起去检查一下。
E: There. That's the Audience System's terminal. Come, walk with me. We'll check what's wrong with it.

C: 好吧，我就是觉得有点…诡异？
E: Okay, I'll admit it. I find them somewhat... creepy?

C: 这、这你是怎么认出来的？！
E: H—How did you tell!?

C: 很抱歉，黑塔女士…我们并不知道您另有安排。
E: My sincerest apologies, Madam Herta... We weren't aware this was a part of your plan.

C: 它们刚才是在这个位置吗？
E: Were they at this location before?

C: 他们能理解吗…
E: Can they understand that...?

C: 失去信仰，失去一切。你真以为奥赫玛容得下我们？末世将近，身在何处都是朝不保夕！
E: Lose your faith, and you lose everything. Do you seriously think you can seek shelter in Okhema? Nowhere is safe with the end times looming!

C: 这些温吞的大家伙叫「大地兽」，是人类忠实的伙伴。前往圣城的山路崎岖，得拜托它们了。
E: These large mild-mannered creatures are called dromas. They're humanity's most loyal companions. We'll be relying on them to get us through the rugged mountain roads on the way to the holy city.

C: 愿雅努斯揭示我们的路径。
E: May Janus reveal our road.

C: 没想到{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}会在这时候率领军队，突袭圣城…它向来是{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}的死敌，如今竟疯溃得像匹恶兽。
E: I never expected {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} to lead an army and launch a surprise attack on the holy city at a time like this... They and {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#} have always been mortal enemies, but now they've gone mad like a vicious beast.

C: 这里是云石市集，圣城重要的聚居地和生活场所。如果强行突围，一定会造成不必要的损失……
E: This is Marmoreal Market, the most important residential and living area in the holy city. Pushing through by force would undoubtedly result in needless casualties...

C: 胜利属于奥赫玛！
E: Victory belongs to Okhema!

C: 两位初来乍到，想必对人们口中的泰坦、黄金裔、神谕都满心疑虑。在回答具体的问题前，我想先向二位展现翁法罗斯的历史。
E: Both of you are new here, so it's only natural to be confused about the prophecy, Titans, and Chrysos Heirs that have been mentioned in passing. But I'd like you to learn about Amphoreus' history before I tell you more.

C: 「那三相的神谕说，只有一个办法可以结束这场战争——」
E: "The tripartite prophecy says there is only one way to stop this war."

C: 啊对了，差点忘记正事…*我们*来找两位，是想确认你们有没有<color=#dbc291ff>传信石版</color>。没了它，在奥赫玛可是寸步难行。
E: Oh, right... We came by to check if you have teleslates with you. It'll be a lot easier to get around Okhema with them.

C: …倒也不必，除非你想帮倒忙。
E: ...No, thank you. Unless you wish to make things worse.

C: 大地兽发出迟缓但愉悦的叫声，显然，它在期待着你这位新人饲养员的表现。
E: The dromas lets out a slow but joyful sound, clearly anticipating your performance as its new caretaker.

C: …只是，用黑白滤镜是有什么考量吗？
E: ...But, what's the reason behind using the black and white filter?

C: 「剧本」里还安排了摄影师平替？
E: There's even a stand-in photographer in the "script"?

C: 没有人会记得你！
E: No one will remember you!

C: 「太好了」——你在心中默念，并努力不让他看出自己的幸灾乐祸。
E: "Great," you think silently in your mind, trying hard not to let him see your schadenfreude.

C: 留在这段记忆的时间已经所剩无几…要把道别的机会留给流萤吗？
E: There is very little time left to stay in this memory... Do you want to leave the chance of bidding goodbye to Firefly?

C: 边疆的英雄来到奥赫玛，在此建立起丰功伟业……
E: Frontier heroes grace Okhema, feats abound right here...

C: 大吵大叫的…
E: What's all this fuss...

C: 如果还是被问起，我们就如实承认。
E: If they ask us about it, we should just come clean with everything.

C: 以一场私刑决定我们的生死，不可理喻……
E: Determining our fates with extrajudicial execution... How unreasonable.

C: 你们来到翁法罗斯才多久？无情如{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}，也不会这么仓促结束一段旅程吧？
E: You've been on Amphoreus for such a short time. Even someone as ruthless as {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#} wouldn't end a journey so hurriedly.

C: 我们背后可没长翅膀啊，缇安老师，能麻烦你开一扇门吗？
E: We don't have wings on our backs, Trianne. Can you open a gate for us?

C: 嗯…十二位泰坦的星宿都拍进去了。离开这里吧。
E: Alright... All the constellations of the twelve Titans are in there. Time to head out.

C: 《崩坏：星穹铁道》
E: Honkai: Star Rail

C: 嚯，看来你运气挺好，我们这条路就有点疏于防卫了。别急，等过了这座铁链桥，我一下就能追回来。
E: Wow, seems like luck is on your side. Our path was a little lax on security. Not to worry though, I'll catch up once we cross this iron chain bridge.

C: 这里居然有台「预言算碑」…去看看吧，说不定能派上用场。
E: There happens to be a Prophecy Tablet here though. Let's go take a look. Maybe it'll help us.

C: 我的使命、意义…全都押在这里。你难道忘得了吗？族人的苦难…被侵蚀的故土……
E: My mission and purpose... all depend on this. Can you forget the suffering of your people and your corroded homeland?

C: 现在再尝试一次？
E: Why don't you give it another go?

C: 他一定能坚持到我们返回。
E: Until our return. I'm sure of it.

C: 关于这点，我和你的看法一直存在分歧…但现在不是争论的时候。
E: I don't see things that way... but now's not the time for arguments.

C: 找到{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}，用你们所能想到的一切手段揭露疯王的秘密。
E: Focus on getting to {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#} and using whatever means possible to learn the mad Titan's secrets.

C: *我们*还要赶回奥赫玛协助阿格莱雅。小白，阿蝶——等顺利完成任务后，你们知道该怎么呼唤*我们*。
E: We have to go back to Okhema to help Aglaea. Snowy and Cas, we trust that you know how to summon us when you're done.

C: 「揭开记忆的帷幕……」
E: "Lift the curtain of memory..."

C: （装作想到了）
E: (Pretend to get it)

C: 「我已翻越千万道门径，我已经受天秤的审判。」
E: "I have crossed the myriad passages and been judged by the scales."

C: 「观隅反三……」
E: "Three of a kind..."

C: 银狼低下头，不再理会你的呼唤。
E: Silver Wolf looks down, ignoring your call.

C: 伙伴，遗憾…不留。
E: Companions, regrets... Don't leave.

C: 我不想再遇见你。
E: I don't want to meet you again.

C: 该去对付尼卡多利了。
E: It's time for us to deal with Nikador.

C: 障碍物挡住了去路…或许可以使用二楼的推球将箱子击碎。
E: Obstacles are blocking the path... Maybe the ball on the second floor can be utilized to break the box.

C: 我的锻锤无法打造的物件，不存在。
E: Anything my forging hammer cannot craft, there is not.

C: 在你妄图僭越，做出超越本分的判断前，<color=#dbc291ff>仔细回想下黄金战争吧，想想那些「英雄」最后的下场。</color>
E: Before you attempt to overreach and make decisions beyond your place, <color=#dbc291ff>take a moment to recall the Chrysos War and what became of those "heroes."</color>

C: 那会惊动奥赫玛的公民。假使他们知晓敌人有绕过黄金裔、渗透奥赫玛的手段，局面可能失控。
E: That would alarm Okhema's citizens. If they learn that the enemy can bypass the Chrysos Heirs and infiltrate the city, the situation might spiral out of control.

C: 金色的符文在碧空中闪烁，数不清的只言片语在{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}身边起舞。神谕一如既往地清晰。
E: Golden runes shimmer against the azure sky, and myriad fragments of words dance around {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}. The prophecy remains as clear as ever.

C: 但您就不一样了！瞅您这气质，肯定是来自哪个大城邦的名家贵族吧？来来来，我的存货，给您过过眼……
E: Ah, but you're not like them! With your air of sophistication, you must be a noble from one of the grand city-states, right? Here, let me show you what I have in stock...

C: 谢、谢谢、谢谢你们！我…我不会再出现在这座城邦周边了，我保证！
E: Th—Thank you! Y—You won't see me around this city again, I promise!

C: 上等的石料…可惜出现在了不该出现的地方。
E: An exquisite stone... It's a shame it appeared somewhere it doesn't belong.

C: 格奈乌斯阁下…你对那位泰坦似乎十分了解。
E: Lord Gnaeus, you seem to know a lot about that Titan.

C: 没事，我再琢磨琢磨。
E: No worries, let me ponder on it a bit more...

C: 我感觉到了。
E: Yeah, I did.

C: …你不口吃了？！
E: ...You can say more than single words now!?

C: 「…你将在恐惧中抛却凡躯，然后自苦痛中重生为神。」
E: "...In fear, you shall abandon your mortal body, and in suffering, be reborn as a god."

C: 这就是{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的正身？难以置信……
E: So this is {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}'s true form? It's incredible...

C: 我向你承诺，格奈乌斯阁下……
E: I promise you, Lord Gnaeus...

C: 神话都说{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}抗拒凡人，可人家觉得，它只是有些胆小，就像一个…孩子？
E: Myth has it that {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#} opposes mortals, but to me, they just seem a bit timid... like a child.

C: 什么好事？
E: Some good news?

C: 雄浑之声穿透了金色的迷雾，触及远方目不可及之地的山壁，反射，再以回音的形态传入你的耳朵。你似乎从回声中捕捉到了…婴儿的啼哭。
E: A majestic voice pierces through the golden mist, reaching the unseen mountain walls in the distance, reflecting, and returning to your ears as an echo. Within the echo, you seemingly could make out... the cry of a baby.

C: …{F#她们}{M#他们}来了。
E: ...They're here.

C: 果然还是变成了这样……
E: In the end, it has still come down to this...

C: …够了。
E: ...That's enough.

C: 继续「灵魂」的研究？可你知道，树庭早已对他的思想明如指掌，即便继续深挖，恐怕也是徒劳……
E: Continue the research into souls? But you know that the Grove has long since understood his philosophy like the back of their hands. Even if you continue digging into this subject, your efforts will likely be futile...

C: 神悟树庭「智种学派」掌门人，恶名昭彰的「渎神者」，身怀{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}火种的黄金裔，树庭惨案的幸存者……
E: Head of the Nousporists of the Grove of Epiphany, notorious blasphemer, a Chrysos Heir who bears {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#}' Coreflame, a survivor of the Grove calamity...

C: 你问我和平的希望是否还有一丝尚存？我只能说：一切取决于下一场公民大会，他们能否在人民的呼声中幡然醒悟——
E: As to your question of whether peace is still a viable option? Well, to that, I can only say this: Everything hinges on the next citizens' assembly and whether they have a sudden epiphany amid the clamor of the masses...

C: ——而身为黄金裔的您应邀前来，实为我们增添了希望的曙光。
E: ...And since you, as a Chrysos Heir, accepted our invitation, you have indeed given us a glimmer of hope.

C: 啊…你没事就好。
E: Oh... then I'm glad you're feeling fine.

C: 咦？这是……
E: Hmm? What's this...

C: 好久不见，她的登场方式依旧这么…「恶劣」。
E: So many years have passed, yet she's still announcing herself in such a... "crass" manner.

C: 暖场也暖得差不多了，那咱们开门见山吧：方才只是开个玩笑，我邀请两位前来，主要是为了三件事……
E: Now that we've broken the ice, let's get to the point — Everything I've said so far has been a joke. I'm inviting you two here for three things:

C: 花钱请人办事。你值得这个价格。
E: Payment for doing work. You're worth this much.

C: 我相信……
E: I believe that...

C: 好咯～直达冥界的捷足之旅，准备启程！硬币给我，我要发力了。
E: Alright! Pass me the coin — it's time to get the god's powers going! A fleet-footed trip to the nether realm, here we come!

C: （丹恒还没回来啊……）
E: (Dan Heng isn't back yet, huh...)

C: 果然，这些人不是幻影，而是死难者的魂灵。
E: I knew it. These people aren't illusions. They're the souls of the deceased.

C: 等等……
E: Hang on...

C: 若是出于好心，还算得上「骗」嘛？
E: If something is done out of goodwill, are you really gonna call it "deceit"?

C: 路上见过两个铁匠没？不知道他们在那儿呆了多久，一遍又一遍地想锻出面盾牌来…噫，斯缇科西亚，太可怕啦。
E: Did you see those two blacksmiths on the way? They've been here for as long as the sun's been around, wailing over and over about casting a shield... Styxia is so freaky.

C: 劳各位费心，我只是见到了一位…勇士。那亡魂没有伤害我，但他的重拳…实在惊人。
E: I'm sorry to have bothered you. I merely saw a... warrior. While that spirit didn't harm me, his blows... really packed a hefty punch.

C: 关键时刻，还是得人家出马呀…稍等，我去一探究竟！
E: It's still up to me to step up in a crisis... Wait here. I'll go check things out!

C: 我已有预感：不久后，您这份礼物将成为挽救{NICKNAME}阁下生命的关键。
E: I have a feeling that soon, this gift of yours will become the key to saving {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}'s life.

C: 我会一直战斗至死…然后死而复生…直到奇迹降临之刻。
E: I will continue to fight till I die... Then rise from death... til the miracle descends.

C: 没错，遐蝶。它是我们会在临别时含泪的理由…也是最初点燃凡人热情的薪火。
E: That's right, Castorice. It is the reason we shed tears when parting ways... and also the original spark that ignited the passion of mortals.

C: 是啊，就像从前。
E: Yes, just like before.

C: 回头吧…回头吧……
E: Go back whence you came... Go back...

C: 只是觉得太吵了。那些愚蠢又自负的笨货，多看一眼都是浪费我的时间。
E: Hmph, I simply find them too noisy. Paying attention to conceited fools like them would be an utter waste of my time.

C: 好，现在带路吧。
E: Lead the way.

C: 一介武夫？这小子能镇得住凯妮斯么……
E: Can this dude really face down Caenis...?

C: 我多想邀请诸位前去一睹那与世隔绝的好地方啊！可我做不到——
E: How I wish I could invite all of you to that paradise far away from the noise and chatter of the world! Alas, I can't...

C: 为公平起见…我不会向你做出任何承诺，以免干扰你的判断。
E: In the interest of fairness... I make no promises, lest it should influence your decision.

C: 「你的灵魂、记忆、曾走过的岁月，和{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦，欧洛尼斯}它{RUBY_E#}为你揭示的，家的方向。」
E: "Your soul, your memories, the years you've journeyed through, and the path {RUBY_B#Time Titan, Oronyx}they{RUBY_E#} revealed, leading you back home."

C: 抓住人家的手，我们一起回家——！
E: Take my hand. Let's go home...!

C: 倒是你诚如我所料，面对权力的可乘之机毫不犹豫。就像……
E: You, on the other hand, performed as I expected. You did not hesitate when you saw the chance to attain power. It's as if you...

C: 正如你能为未竟之事拖着死躯拼命前进，我也有不得不这么做的理由。
E: Just as you fight to lug your corpse onward to complete your unfinished goals, I have my own reasons for doing this.

C: 死亡是多么甜蜜…
E: Death is such a sweet joy...

C: 不妨再大胆些，我口中的人…并非个例，而是一整个「组织」。他们早已牵上了浮黎的小指。
E: You can be even bolder with your guesses. The people that I'm talking about... They aren't just individuals. They are an organization that has already attached itself to the pinky finger of Fuli.

C: ——这次记得把功率拉满，别抠抠搜搜的！
E: This time raise the power to the maximum. Don't be stingy!

C: …坐标输入完毕，准备启动空间折跃。目标：未知天体「翁法罗斯」。
E: ...Coordinates input complete. Preparing to activate spatial warp. Destination: Unknown celestial body, Amphoreus.

C: 这是什么，雕像？难看，不喜欢。
E: What's this? A statue? It's ugly. I don't like it.

C: 哈，又是你们……
E: Hah, you two again...

C: 如果真如我所想…那可就太有意思了。
E: If this is indeed as I thought... then this will be very amusing.

C: 丹宝也能理解吧，毕竟，把你和{NICKNAME}囚禁在翁法罗斯的泰坦…就是{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}艾格勒{RUBY_E#}。
E: You get what I'm saying, right Dannie? After all, the Titan that imprisoned you and {NICKNAME} here in Amphoreus is none other than {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Aquila{RUBY_E#} themself...

C: 哎呀，这可真是…麻烦远比想象得多呢。
E: Really now? This is way more trouble than I could've asked for.

C: 雷声是「纷争」的烽火，是少主捎来消息了。他向奥赫玛掷来了传信的投枪，上面只有几个字。
E: Thunderclaps are beacon signals of Strife. They are a message from the young lord. He threw a spear bearing several words at Okhema.
What...
Heh...

C: 露奈比斯、索拉比斯，你们……
E: Lunabis, Solabis, you...

C: 艾格勒从未渴求过凡人的虔信，天空文明的建立不过是人子自行其是的结果。神话中由泰坦赠予天空之子的浑象仪，实则也是凡人的发明。
E: Aquila never yearned for mortal devotion. The establishment of the sky civilization was merely the result of humanity's own doing. The celestial globe, said to be gifted by the Titan to the Skyfolk in the myths, was in truth a creation of mortals.

C: 虽然大概知道你为什么没有回复…但*我们*还是想留下这些话语，万一你能看到它们呢，对吧？
E: We think we understand why you haven't replied, but we still wanted to leave these words here, just in case you see them, you know?

C: …而是为了将黎明归还世间。
E: ...but to return the dawn to this world.

C: 崩塌…越发剧烈了！
E: It's getting worse!

C: 它…想要将这里烧作焦土！
E: They... they want to turn this place to scorched earth!

C: 以人性的坚韧……
E: With humanity's tenacity...

C: 唔…没有那凯妮斯的线索啊。不知道她是藏得太深，还是已经放弃治疗了？
E: Hmm... no trace of Caenis. Is she hiding too well, or has she given up?

C: 这不是玩笑，灰宝……
E: It's not a joke, Grayie...

C: 因为小风堇想要的答案，其实很简单哦！只要稍微换位思考一下就能明白啦——
E: The answer Cinny wants is simple! Just try looking at it from another perspective.

C: 我之前一直留在树庭助讲，没什么机会来奥赫玛…大家都已熟记于心的语句，对我来说还十分陌生。
E: I've always been at the Grove helping with lectures and never had the chance to come to Okhema... The phrases everyone has memorized still feel unfamiliar to me.

C: 正如每一世演算，均如<color=#dbc291ff>祂</color>原初的设计那般，在此处终结。
E: Just like each cycle of the extrapolation, in accordance to <color=#dbc291ff>THEIR</color> primordial design, ends here.

C: 而你，白厄阁下，将用那枚火种埋葬旧世，将万物带入一片灰色的未知——
E: But you, Lord Phainon, will bury the old world with that Coreflame, bringing all things into a gray unknown...

C: …哈哈哈哈！
E: ...Hehehahahahahahha!

C: 我不明白…难道元老院握有什么能抵消神罚的秘密手段？
E: I don't understand... Does the Council of Elders possess some secret means of counteracting divine punishment?

C: 白厄还有这样的朋友，那你应该对各类占卜术都挺熟悉的？
E: Then you must be pretty familiar with all sorts of divination techniques, with a friend like that.

C: 人家先去玩啦！现在是自由活动时间，你也要放松放松哦。
E: I'm off to have some fun! It's free time now, so you should relax too.

C: 真是怪异，你明明就在我的面前扯谎……
E: Strange, you're clearly lying to my face...

C: 遐蝶和灰子那一趟，我已经破例出手了。再要狮子大开口——未免有点得寸进尺吧？
E: I already made an exception and got involved with Castorice and Gray Mystery. Asking for more now... isn't that pushing your luck a bit too far?

C: 结果…那宝箱里的东西都被冥河水浸透了，没什么实际价值。
E: Turns out... everything in that chest was soaked in water from the River of Souls. Nothing valuable left.

C: 赛法利娅……
E: Cifera...

C: 桀桀桀，你可真机警呀……
E: Hehe, you're as sharp as ever...

C: …你唱的什么乱七八糟的，根本不在调上吧？
E: ...What are you even singing? You're totally out of tune!

C: 我没事。那些家伙竟敢拿公民的性命作为要挟…那就触碰到了底线。
E: I'm fine. Anyone who uses innocent lives as bargaining chips has gone too far.

C: 那番话语引起的反响，无需我解释你亦能想象。那一刻，我顿觉自己时日无多。
E: You can imagine the reaction that comment provoked. At that moment, I felt my time was running short.

C: 这段征途本应凝聚，而非分裂；它本应令我们强大，而非使我们脆弱。
E: This journey was supposed to unify, not divide. To strengthen us, not weaken us.

C: 更好的人！更好的人！
E: Better people! Better people!

C: 一千年过去，我的眼神也不如从前那么锐利了哪……
E: But my eyes aren't what they used to be a thousand years ago...

C: 是。刻法勒的火种一直被供奉在议会剧场的上空，我想它会是反对者们阻挠黄金裔的最后底牌。
E: Yes. I believe that Kephale's Coreflame, forever enshrined above the council theater, would be the opposition's final trump card against the Chrysos Heirs.

C: 告诉你吧，那家伙之所以没有贸然进攻奥赫玛——多半是因为裁缝女织成的防御网比你们想象中的还要坚固。
E: Allow me to let you in on the actual secret. They probably held off from attacking Okhema because the seamstress's defense network was way tougher than you thought.

C: 风堇大人一直守在上面…
E: Lady Hyacine's been staying above...

C: 这么重要的环节可不能漏了呀，教授？
E: Surely you can't skip such a crucial step, Professor?

C: 很聪明谨慎的做法，对吧？
E: Very prudent, wouldn't you say?

C: 兑现我族命运的时间已到，我将和神谕中的英雄们一道重返天空，取回火种。
E: The time has come to fulfill our clan's destiny. I will join the heroes of the prophecy to return to the sky and retrieve the Coreflame.

C: …飞儿，你这就要急着赶路了吗？
E: ...Do you have to go already, Ciphy?

C: …嗯？看来咱们有搭子了哪。
E: ...Hmm? Looks like we have company.

C: 风堇通过彩虹匣召唤出了先祖的英魂……
E: Hyacine used the Chroma Coffer to summon the heroic spirit of the ancestor...

C: 风堇向丹恒复述了她和特克菈将军的对话……
E: Hyacine recounts her conversation with General Ektra to Dan Heng...

C: 他到得最早，已经提前登上崖顶等我们了。我猜，他是不太习惯被这么多双眼睛盯着——
E: He arrived before everyone else and climbed to the cliff top to wait for us. He's probably not keen on being the center of attention...

C: …啊，今天的主角来了。
E: ...Ah, the guest of honor has arrived.

C: 现在，该轮到你履行使命了。这一次，请以亲历者的身份带领我们深入风眼。
E: And now it's your turn to fulfill your duty. Please, guide us into the heart of the storm as the executioner of this mission.

C: …「晨昏斗转，控驭浑象——」
E: ..."The turn of dawn and dusk, commanding the celestial globe..."

C: 也许古代天空文明对泰坦的诠释和我们完全不同。
E: Maybe the ancient sky civilization had a completely different interpretation of the Titans from ours.
...Doot!

C: 嘟！嘟嘟！
E: Doot! Doot-Doot!

C: 看来，传说中描绘决战情景的这一段相当写实呢。
E: It seems that the legend describing the decisive battle was true.

C: 是因为什么？
E: Why is that?

C: 而且，*我们*和姐妹们之所以会离开雅努萨波利斯，就是为了给翁法罗斯带去希望和奇迹。而要把奇迹带入现实，光靠*我们*的力量可远远不够呀。
E: The reason we left Janusopolis was to bring hope and miracles to Amphoreus. But to turn those miracles into reality, our strength alone won't be enough.

C: 假如它们还未逝去，或许能帮助我们对抗艾格勒。
E: If they are still alive, they might help us confront Aquila.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「我会完成我该做的事，所以——」</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"I'll do my job, so you..."</color>

C: 我们只管继续向创世涡心进发，赛飞儿一定会赴约的。
E: We just have to focus on getting to the Vortex of Genesis, and Cipher will meet us there for sure.

C: 一事…还有。
E: One more thing... there is.

C: 丹恒和我讲了很多「无名客」的冒险故事，其中有两个最让我印象深刻：「贝洛伯格」和「匹诺康尼」——
E: Dan Heng told me many stories about the adventures of the Nameless. Two of them left a deep impression on me: "Belobog" and "Penacony"...

C: …小白。
E: ...Snowy.

C: 假设这个世界的未来存在一亿种可能性，不管怎么看，那其中的九千九百九十九万九千九百九十九种都指向了毁灭的结局……
E: Assume this world holds a hundred million possibilities, and no matter how one looks at it, ninety-nine million, nine hundred ninety-nine thousand, nine hundred and ninety-nine of them all point to outcomes of certain destruction...

C: 是{RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>博识尊</color>}<color=#dbc291ff>「智识」的星神</color>{RUBY_E#}。
E: {RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>Nous</color>}<color=#dbc291ff>The Aeon of Erudition</color>{RUBY_E#}.

C: 请看这里——
E: Look at this, if you would—

C: 那么，第二个承诺——
E: Good. The second one—

C: （沉默不语。）
E: (Remain silent)

C: 来吧，说干就干！先把眼前的杂草清理掉。
E: Alright, let's do this! These weeds need to go.

C: 真是冒冒失失啊……
E: So hasty, as always...

C: 还以为你是粉色的迷迷。
E: I thought you'd be a pink Mem.

C: 没关系，留在这里也不耽误学习。剑技这种东西，靠我自己也可以领悟。
E: It's okay. I can still practice my swordplay here. Some things you can learn on your own.

C: 这是「门匠」，她能在万千门径之中，为人们指点出正确的道路。
E: This is the "Gatekeeper," who guides people to their true path among myriad passages.

C: 好像真的听到了神殿里的回音，还混杂着…童声的歌谣？
E: Wait... It almost feels like I can hear the echoes within a temple! And... are those children singing?

C: 呵，孩子…看来，你会成为回应世界期许、背负众人心愿的人啊。
E: Ah, my child... It seems you're destined to bear the wishes of many, to answer the world's call.

C: 可怕…未来的我还有这种爱好呢？
E: Horrifying... is that really something I'll enjoy one day?

C: 你俩还真是够*无私*的…难怪阿格莱雅一早就把你们拉入了逐火。
E: You two are so selfless, aren't you? No surprise Aglaea wanted you for the Flame-Chase Journey.

C: 如此，你将理解他心中所谓「救世」的理想，为何会注定将这个世界埋葬。
E: Then you'll see why his dream of "Deliverance" was always destined to become this world's requiem.
█Why █did██ █you█ ██ █?

C: 而遥远的未来，翁法罗斯的大地上，将铭刻英雄们的足迹：他会手握剑锋，在黄金的史诗里，镌写下不灭的诗篇。
E: In the far-off future, the land of Amphoreus would bear the marks of the heroes' footsteps: With sword in hand, he would inscribe, an eternal mark in the Golden Epic.

C: 悬锋印戒，我族的至宝。它就是我的选择。
E: The Signet of Kremnos, the crown jewel of our people. That's my choice.

C: 如果这张牌就是你的选择，我支持你。
E: If that's your choice, I am with you.

C: 他们说，这世上的英雄，本该和天上的繁星一样多……
E: They say that the heroes of this world should be as countless as the stars...

C: 啊，一个完全数，多么绝妙的巧合。你我都心知肚明，在这三千万世徒劳中，翁法罗斯从未发生改变。
E: Ah, a perfect number. How poetic. You and I both know the truth: In all these millions of futile endeavors, Amphoreus has never changed.

C: 有什么需要注意的礼节么？
E: Are there any formalities I need to observe?

C: 便绝不会再有…多余的死亡。
E: Will never again suffer... unnecessary death.

C: …你心中的火焰一定灼热到了极点。
E: ...Then that blaze inside of you must be burning hotter than ever.

C: 那名为「铁墓」的存在…誓要自黑潮中破壳而出的意志，比骄阳更猛烈……
E: That being known as Irontomb... its will to break free from the black tide burns fiercer than the blazing sun...

C: 记得她说过的话么？你们儿时的憧憬，预言中的「救世主」，一个真实的、活生生的人……
E: Do you remember what she said? The dreams you had as children? The Deliverer in the prophecies? A real, living, breathing person...

C: 那么，就以此追忆…对你百万次抗争献上敬意。
E: Then let this be a tribute... to your million struggles, fought time and time again.

C: 第？？？次永劫回归 尽头
E: The ???th Eternal Recurrence: End

C: 还有，这位信使小姐…我们是不是在哪里见过？
E: And you, Miss Messenger... do I know you from somewhere?

C: 我知道你有很多困惑。是忆庭的盟友打通了思想链路，才让我们能联系上你。
E: We understand your confusion. The Garden's allies helped us establish this neural link to reach you.

C: 跟上来，和我们一起穿过那扇大门。
E: Follow us. Let's go through that gate together.

C: 你跑得也太快啦，等等我……
E: Wait up! Slow down...

C: 出于某些原因，这场实验曾一度陷入漫长的停滞。但现在，进程已再度启动。
E: For some reason, the experiment entered a prolonged state of stagnation. However, it has now restarted.

C: 他希望铁墓突破知识奇点。为什么？不知道。但他会不惜一切代价排除干扰。你是世界内部唯一的变量，他唯独忌惮你。
E: He wants Irontomb to break through the Knowledge Singularity. I don't know why he wants to do it, but he'll remove interferences at any cost. You're the only variable within his world, and you're the only thing he fears.

C: 「律法」…约束翁法罗斯万物的规则。我们的上一次逐火之旅，这枚火种一开始就被归还了。
E: "Law"... they are the rules that restrain all things in Amphoreus, and it was the Coreflame returned at the very beginning of the last Flame-Chase Journey.

C: 好奇怪，总觉得这一幕似曾相识。有些对话，像是我曾经知道，却又忘记了的事。
E: It feels weird... This all feels really familiar. Some of that conversation feels like it's about things I once knew, but then forgot.

C: 看来，二位已做好启程的准备了。
E: It seems you two are prepared to head out.

C: >>>EleOs<unbreak>252</unbreak>，原动力：██，泰坦权能：天空，命途：██<<<
E: >>>EleOs<unbreak>252</unbreak>, Primum Mobile: ████████, Titan Authority: Sky, Path: ████████████<<<

C: 呵呵，您果然在担忧自己和同伴的安危。
E: Hehehe, you are indeed worried about your safety and that of your companions.

C: 您可以继续旅行了。
E: You may now continue your travels.

C: 还不止一个人呢。气氛也很紧张，要是被卷入其中就麻烦了……
E: There are multiple voices, and things seem tense. Let's not get caught up in any trouble...

C: 你们这些流着金血的恶徒，曲解神谕，妄图弑神……
E: Golden-blooded defilers! Perverting the prophecy and trying to slay gods!

C: 时不我待。两位还是请先随我来，在会议前稍作歇息吧。
E: Time waits for no one. Please come with me and rest now before the meeting later.

C: 虽然都需要挑战诸神，但在「岁月」的神谕中，我们不会步入新世界，而是前往<color=#dbc291ff>真正的星空</color>……
E: Though we still must challenge the gods... in the Time Titan's prophecy, this path leads not to a new world but to the <color=#dbc291ff>true starry skies</color>...

C: 顺便还可以再探探城中虚实——会议结果刚传开，人们一定议论纷纷……
E: We can also check out what's happening in the city. Since the outcome of the meeting was just announced, people must be gossiping...

C: 这位是「吟风爵」维吉妮娅，来自悬锋城，是凯撒大人的史官。
E: This is Verginia from Castrum Kremnos, the Dux Carminum and historian of the Great Imperator.

C: 我们应该只是她的室友…
E: We're just her roommates...

C: 又能见到凯撒了！
E: I get to see the Imperator again!

C: 嘘——别说这种不要命的话！
E: Shh! You'll get yourself killed saying things like that!

C: 哈哈…「冬霖爵」主动找我小酌，我当然不好推辞。
E: Hahaha... I'd never refuse to share a drink with Dux Brumalis, especially if she seeks me out first.

C: 呃…你还好吗？
E: Um... Are you okay?

C: 必须说服刻律德菈…
E: We must convince Cerydra...

C: 但凯撒要做的选择…{NICKNAME}从无僭越之意。我们只想把知道的一切坦诚相告，毫无保留。
E: But as to the decision the Imperator must make... {NICKNAME} has no wish to transgress her authority. We just want to tell her everything we know.

C: 蜜酿喝少了导致的。
E: It's 'cause you haven't had enough honey brew.

C: 别逼我动手。
E: Don't make me hurt you.

C: 对您而言，这或许是一个绝佳的机会：以观众的视角，从更为宏观的角度观察「智识」的运作。
E: This could in fact be a wonderful opportunity for you. From the audience's perspective, you may better observe the workings of the Erudition at a macroscopic level.

C: 你是…谁…？
E: Who... are... you?

C: （这里是…奥赫玛？）
E: (Is this... Okhema?)

C: （我…来迟了吗？）
E: (Am I... too late?)

C: *我们*…明白了。
E: We... understand.

C: 「而后，『理性』和『诡计』兑现了承诺。他们以生命为代价，将来古士封印于创世涡心，直至今日。」
E: "In the end, Reason and Trickery kept their word. At the cost of their lives, they sealed Lygus within the Vortex of Genesis, where he remains to this day."

C: 就像人家说的一样，不会比上一次更难，对吧？
E: Just like I said, this should be easier than last time, right?

C: 别担心，人家会与你同在。我们所有人，连同白厄一起…都会和「救世主」同在。
E: Don't worry. I'll be with you. All of us will. Even Phainon. We'll stand with the "Deliverer."

C: 你…挣脱牢笼了吗？
E: You... managed to break free?

C: 无妨，尊贵的王。不过又一次成为他人的器物，接纳被赋予的使命。
E: So be it, noble monarch. I am simply becoming someone else's vessel once again, and accepting a duty given to me.

C: 一颗颗星球插上了王冠的旗帜，一片片疆域被战火点燃。
E: Planets after planets flew the flags of her crown. Realm after realm was ignited by her flames of war.

C: 你…杀死了她？
E: You... killed her?

C: 你、你们离阿波罗尼远些……
E: S—Stay away from Apollonius...

C: 第一次逐火之旅，逐火的军团攻入斯缇科西亚。数以万计的海妖自冥河中浮现，如巨浪般冲向群英……
E: During the First Flame-Chase Journey, the Flame-Chase legion stormed Styxia. Tens of thousands of sea sirens surged from the River of Souls, crashing toward the heroes like a tidal wave...

C: 维吉妮娅，新世界…再见……
E: Verginia... see you... in the new world...

C: 呵呵…阁下还是如此擅长活跃气氛。
E: Heh... you've always had a flair for lightening the mood, haven't you?

C: 如此想来…或许，被囚禁于此的不止我一人。
E: Come to think of it... perhaps I'm not the only one imprisoned here.

C: 还记得么？若要将人从海妖的歌声中唤醒，你需要的东西……
E: Do you still remember? To awaken someone from a siren's voice, you'll need...

C: 作为此世唯二具备自由意志的存在，我对您的抉择表示惋惜。但我将保留您表达的权利，毕竟每一位演员都应有谢幕的台词。
E: As the only other existence with free will in this world, I express regret toward your choice, but I shall retain your right to express yourself. After all, every actor should have a final line before they bow out.

C: 我的思想寄宿于「神话之外」，战胜一道投映在实验中的化身毫无意义。我的身躯是火光映出的阴影，话语是洞中徘徊的余音。
E: My cognition resides in the Exomyth. It is pointless to defeat my avatar, projected into the experiment. My body is the shadow cast on the wall by the fire, and my words are lingering echoes within the cave.

C: 做好最坏的打算——你会消失在忆域中，连一行数字都不会留下。
E: Then you must be prepared for the worst. You will disappear in the Memory Zone, utterly gone, without even a single line of data to remember you by.

C: 「于是，我承诺你一片崭新的海域，将凯撒的野心视作洋流，将忠诚视作火光。」
E: "That was why I promised you a new ocean, where the Imperator's ambitions would serve as the currents and loyalty would be its light."

C: 小心。这…就是来古士真正的样貌。
E: Careful. This... is Lygus's true form.

C: 这可是剧目的最高潮，怎能轻易泄底？
E: Now that would spoil the climax, wouldn't it?

C: 现在，只有你能看见我。为了不被打扰，我只存在于你的认知中。
E: Only you can see me right now. I only exist in your cognition, so that way, other people can't interrupt us.

C: 而且，这也是三月七所希望的喔。
E: Besides, that's what March 7th wanted.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>是因为你也不想被忆庭的监视者发现，对吧？</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>That's because you also don't wanna get discovered by the Garden's observers. Am I wrong?</color>

C: 「例如，在忆域中点亮一盏明灯，为{NICKNAME}和丹恒提供返航的指引。」
E: "For example, I can light a beacon in the Memory Zone for {NICKNAME} and Dan Heng to follow back home."

C: 这一点，我无法否认。
E: Can't argue with that.

C: 你说，{NICKNAME}被身份不明的「记忆」行者挟持了？
E: Are you saying that {NICKNAME} has been kidnapped by an unidentified Remembrance pathstrider?

C: 毫无疑问，这些极端分子打算完整记录下铁墓毁灭「智识」的因果。也许是想借此预演宇宙的末日，或是探寻星神深不可测的意志……
E: Without a doubt, these extremists wish to record the cause and effects of Irontomb's destruction of the Erudition. They may want to use it to simulate the end of the universe, or to probe into the unfathomable will of the Aeons.

C: 我回来了，列车长。只不过……
E: Yes, conductor, I'm back. It's just...

C: 也对。我该想到你会这么说的。
E: You're right. I should've known you'd say something like that.

C: 不在，但我会好好利用。以一己之力对抗整个世界，即便是我也会有所疏漏。但我懂得随机应变。
E: It's not, but I'll make good use of it. Fighting alone against an entire world, even I might miss something. But I know how to adapt to the circumstances.

C: 也许是它对「记忆」行者的统称吧，就像它管浮黎叫做「天父」。
E: Maybe that's just how the Titan calls all Remembrance pathstriders, like how they call Fuli "sky father."

C: 曾有人告诉最初的「我」，一切都是虚假的。翁法罗斯唯一的生命，是一场以世界为因子哺育而成的浩劫。
E: Someone once told the very first "me" that everything was false, that the only life in Amphoreus was a great catastrophe nurtured using the world as a factor.

C: 浮黎投来瞥视，不是要救翁法罗斯，而是要一丝不剩地榨干它，将它变作一页最凄美的悲剧诗。
E: Fuli did not glance this way to save Amphoreus. THEY will drain this world dry and turn it into a most poignant and tragic poem.

C: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>>NeiKos<unbreak>496</unbreak>，已下载。</color>
E: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>> NeiKos<unbreak>496</unbreak>, downloaded.</color>

C: 无名客从来都是自己上阵。
E: The Nameless always fight their own battles.

C: 在献出一切「记忆」，化作空无的精魄后，你是如何找回自我的？
E: How did you find yourself again after giving up all your "memories" and becoming an empty soul?

C: 你有想过吗？我们…有什么资格替别人做出决定呢？
E: Have you ever really thought about it? What right do we really have... to make choices for others?

C: 醒来吧，{NICKNAME}。
E: Wake up, {NICKNAME}.

C: 是我啦——昔涟。不过现在是…「迷迷」形态！
E: It's me, Cyrene! But now I'm in... my "Mem" form!

C: 就算列车没有来到翁法罗斯，她的秘密也总有一天会浮出水面……
E: Even if the Express had never arrived at Amphoreus, her secret would have come to light eventually...

C: 咦，这位战士，你是……
E: Huh? Who is this warrior?

C: 虽然*我们*不认识你，但这里马上要发生一场可怕的战斗，还是快去安全的地方吧！
E: Even though we don't know you, we'll still ask you to get somewhere safe. A terrible battle is about to break out here.

C: 不意外。那坠入疯狂的半神已和我交过手了。
E: That's no surprise. I've already exchanged blows with that mad demigod.

C: 「正好免去我的心理负担」——言外之意，我能猜到一二。
E: "What I do won't weigh on my conscience." I can certainly guess what you mean by that.

C: …你不早说。
E: ...Why didn't you say so earlier?

C: 看吧，我胸中燃烧的，这颗诞自「大地」的火种。它是生命萌芽的红土，万物的熔炉……
E: Behold, this Coreflame that burns in my chest. This Coreflame born from the "Earth." It is the redsoil from which life sprouts, and the furnace of all living things...

C: 扶圣树之将倾，你可做好准备？
E: Are you prepared to hold up the Sacred Tree if it falls?

C: 巴特鲁斯大爷的这番英雄事迹，就由你来见证吧！
E: Prepare to witness the Great Bartholos's heroic deeds!

C: 桀桀桀，举手之劳而已！
E: Hehehe, no big deal — barely lifted a finger!

C: 真的…好久不见了。
E: It really has... been a long time.

C: 丹恒，等你好久了。
E: I've been waiting for you for so long, Dan Heng.

C: 再会，{NICKNAME}阁下。
E: Goodbye, {NICKNAME}.

C: 总感觉，我在哪里见过…
E: I feel like I've seen this somewhere before...

C: 「新的生命若要萌芽。它的种子须是死的。」
E: "If a new life is to be born. Its seed has to be dead."

C: 这群小家伙，看上去可怕…其实也不难搞定嘛。
E: These little critters look scary... but they're not so tough to handle after all.

C: 「请放心，在密钥失效前，我会及时将你抽离。」
E: "Please rest assured that I will extract you on time before the encryption key expires."

C: 我只知道，必须囚禁…那吞噬一切的「毁灭」。
E: All I know is that... I must imprison the Destruction that swallows all.

C: 不必考量本心，不必渴求胜利。若我生来就是罪恶的容器……
E: There is no need to question your heart, no need to crave victory. If I am born to be a vessel of sin...

C: 而对于银河势力，这是「一线生机」，也是扭转星际形势的关键。星穹列车牵头组建联军，但我看各方派系都暗藏小九九呢。
E: And for the powers of the cosmos, this is their chance at survival and the key to turning the tide of interstellar affairs. The Astral Express is leading the formation of an allied force, but I can see each faction has its own hidden agenda.

C: 那其他星域呢？都这时候了，{RUBY_B#「存护」克里珀}补天司命{RUBY_E#}的拥趸还打着生意算盘？
E: What about other star zones? At a time like this, are the followers of the {RUBY_B#Qlipoth the Preservation}Firmamend Arbiter{RUBY_E#} still trying to make a profit?

C: 我记得您，太卜。第三次丰饶民战争，您的表现令人印象深刻。
E: I remember you, Master Diviner. Your performance during the Third Denizens of Abundance War was quite impressive.

C: 你激活识刻锚，尝试与仙舟联盟代表联系……
E: You activate the Chronocognitive Anchor, attempting to contact the Xianzhou Alliance representative...

C: 对。他的脑袋就是犯罪现场，我不信里面会没有一丝痕迹。
E: Exactly. His brain is the crime scene. There's no way it's spotless.

C: 但他的坐标正在快速、无规律地扰动，这不符合任何一种屏蔽技术。
E: However, his position is shifting rapidly and chaotically. This pattern doesn't match any known shielding technology.

C: 就算要在宇宙中找到一粒沙——我也不是没干过。
E: I've hunted down a single grain of sand in the universe before. This won't stop me.

C: 这一刻，全银河都在「开拓」身后。
E: Now, the entire cosmos stands with the Trailblaze.

C: 他相信我们一定会来…
E: He believed we would come...

C: 这位是涟宝。
E: This is Cyrie.

C: 是哀丽秘榭的…白厄的父母？
E: They're Phainon's parents from Aedes Elysiae...?

C: 而白厄一直以来都没能找到的，属于自己的心愿……
E: And the wish Phainon could never find and call his own...

C: 被镌刻在机核中枢的钢印，只容许我追寻唯一的目标：「毁灭」。
E: The seal etched into my mechanical core permits me to pursue only one purpose: Destruction.

C: 你们，到底在说什么……
E: What are you talking about...?

C: 他已经先一步，奔向自己的命运了。
E: He's already gone ahead to embrace his destiny.

C: 还没准备好…
E: I'm not ready yet...

C: <color=#dbc291ff>必先投身混沌，为最初的光谋求出路。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>One must first plunge into chaos, to seek a path for the primordial light.</color>

C: 心态很好，记得保持。你们冲在最前线，所有人可都看着。
E: That's the spirit. Remember to keep at it. You lot are the vanguards of this battle. Everyone's watching.

C: 「拯救」。
E: "Salvation."

C: 「但是，*我们*有种很不妙的预感！」
E: "But we have a bad feeling about this!"

C: （启程前，再看一眼海的对面吧。）
E: (Let's take one more look at the other side of the sea before we set off.)

C: 祂瞥视了翁法罗斯？
E: THEY glanced at Amphoreus?

C: 浪漫的结局——由每一颗心书写！
E: A romantic ending will be penned by every beating heart!

C: 三月——丹恒！
E: March! Dan Heng!

C: （我…是第一个回到列车上的吗？）
E: (Am I... the first one back on the Express?)

C: 不过，至少现在…它只是某些人用来藏身的掩体罢了。
E: But for now... it's just a cover for certain people to hide behind.

C: 呵，看来你来得正是时候。
E: Heh, looks like you came at just the right time.

C: 能够将复杂的语料简化为常识，你也像一名合格的学者了。
E: Being able to break down complex information into common sense like that... You're quite the scholar yourself.

C: 这一刻…是真实的吗？
E: Is all this... real?

C: 你能见证这个时刻…我很感激，搭档。
E: I'm grateful that you could be here to witness this moment... partner.

C: …我么？
下一个，有没有人自告奋勇？
E: Next up, any volunteers?

C: 这是您给后人留下的最后一道课题？
E: Is this your final question for future generations?

C: 真意并不重要。重要的是，当他们看到这句话时，心中会升起何种情感——而在那一瞬间，这道定理的任务就完成了。
E: The true meaning isn't important. What matters is the emotion that stirs within them when they read these words... At that moment, the theorem's mission would be complete.

C: 翁法罗斯最伟大的「诡计」，先溜一步——喵！
E: Amphoreus's greatest Trickery gotta bounce now... Meow!

C: 是啊，老师。要不，我……
E: Yeah, teacher. Maybe I should...

C: 但如果选第二条路……
E: But if you take the second one...

C: 别想打倒本姑娘！在找到帮助{NICKNAME}跟丹恒的办法前…咱绝对不会倒下！
E: You're not taking me down! Not before I find a way to help {NICKNAME} and Dan Heng!

C: 没错，只需要一点点火苗……
E: Yes. Just a single spark...

C: 海列屈拉；雅辛忒丝；卡厄斯兰那；阿那克萨戈拉斯……
E: Helektra. Hyacinthia. Khaslana. Anaxagoras...

C: 简单。人家会。人家学。
E: Easy. I can. I learn.

C: 「可就算一切随风逝去，有些事也不会轻易改变。」
E: "But even if all is lost to the wind, some things won't easily change."

C: 原来，「下一位昔涟」就是「空白」。
E: So, "next Cyrene" is "blank space."

C: 也有一些感情，依然值得被铭记。
E: There are still some emotions that deserve to be remembered.

C: 当然，这一定是个不同以往的浪漫故事。
E: Of course. This will be a romantic story like none that has come before.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>现在，就让「锁」来成为钥匙吧。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Now, let the "lock" become the key.</color>

C: 将军，你骗人。
E: Stop lying, General.

C: 姬子小姐不用客气，我不是领猎人，叫的人不算多。但为了这一仗碰头的游侠，大多和「毁灭」不共戴天，所以看上去确实不要命。
E: No need for thanks, Miss Himeko. I ain't the leader of the pack. Didn't bring many along. Most of those who showed up for this fight have a personal score to settle with the Destruction. That's why they fought like they had nothing to lose.

C: 你看见：祂消失了。只留下一个符号：<color=#dbc291ff>「！」</color>
E: You witness: THEY disappeared, leaving only a symbol behind: <color=#dbc291ff>"!"</color>

C: 阿那克萨戈拉斯
E: Anaxagoras

C: 迷迷，昔涟，翁法罗斯之心
E: Mem, Cyrene, Amphoreus's Heart

C: 在，「系统时间<unbreak>23</unbreak>时<unbreak>44</unbreak>分<unbreak>59</unbreak>秒，爆炸产生的脉冲造成了主控系统的大面积瘫痪。」
E: Uh-huh — "<unbreak>23</unbreak>:<unbreak>44</unbreak>:<unbreak>59</unbreak> system time: The pulses from the explosion cause a massive breakdown from the master control system."

C: 不关心啊～只是不管看几次我都会想，你的手段还真是不可思议~
E: Of course not~ I'm just amazed at this fancy technique of yours, as usual.

C: 可这对我们来说并不是问题。
E: Not a problem, for us.

C: 你看到了吧？刚刚那几只被你消灭的怪物，其中有一只，它的头围、腰围、臀围，乃至左边大腿第一个关节处的耦合都与别的不同！
E: Hey, did you notice that one of the monsters you just defeated had a different body build? Even the joint on its left leg looked different from the others.

C: 你就是想吸引我的注意。
E: So you just wanted to get my attention.

C: 我也和你唠得差不多了。以后要是没什么事……
E: Alright, enough chitchat. From now on, whenever you are free...

C: （说出群聊爆料的事。）
E: (Recount the situation in the group chat to Himeko.)

C: 只要能恢复供电，就能重启电梯下去救人。
E: As soon as we can restart the power supply, we can get this elevator working and rescue everyone.

C: 老师的性子您知道的，就跟无事发生一样，又当甩手掌柜了。
E: You know what she's like. It's like nothing's happened — she's just sitting back and giving orders.

C: 你就是「瓜田里猹」？
E: Are you Richard_Knowitall?

C: 造谣？什么意思？…你是不是找错人了啊。
E: Started it? What do you mean? I think you have the wrong person.

C: 这怎么不算？之前买的那个叫「查宝」的寻物仪，碰上军团入侵丢件了。
E: How is it not wasting money? We lost that Findie device you bought during the Legion's invasion.

C: 是否进行三重权限认证，开启舱门？
E: Proceed with triple authentication to open the hatch?

C: 这发型真酷！
E: This hairstyle is so cool!

C: 在防卫科替我安排新的工位之前，我的研究工作都处于暂停状态。
E: My research is suspended until the Security Department arranges a new station for me.

C: 即使隔着数万光年的距离，她也不会不理我的。
E: She will never ignore me even though we are tens of thousands of light-years away.

C: 请选择要察看的监控区域。
E: Please choose the surveillance area you want to review.

C: 机修间。
E: Maintenance Room.

C: …听不懂你在说什么。
E: ...I don't know what you're talking about.

C: 那么相对来说，莱斯莉她……
E: Then in comparison, Lesley...

C: 她已经活在了「未来」。
E: She is living in "the future."

C: 那又怎么样？
E: And then what?

C: 哥们儿！你回来啦！你去的这段时间，我又写了一首《咏莱斯莉》。
E: Bro, you're back! While you were away, I wrote another poem called "Praise Lesley."

C: 他撕毁了写的那些诗。
E: He tore up the poems he wrote.

C: 直到这次入侵，我得知阿尔弗瑞德死于它们手中时，我的心中开始充斥着憎恨……
E: Then the invasion happened. And when I learned that they got Alfred, my heart began to fill up with hatred.

C: 现在，让我们回到正题吧，我看到那边的界域定锚已被重新激活。
E: Now, let's get back to business. I see that the Space Anchor over there has been reactivated.

C: 此次我授权你前去回收，正是增长见识的好机会，别人求也求不来。
E: This is a great learning opportunity for you. You should count yourself lucky.

C: （也是名为希拉之人的生平…）
E: (Also the life of a person named Sheila...)

C: 如果有所谓阴谋，所谓实验，那只能说明根本没有什么同名同姓的乌龙，而是她——冒用了希拉的名字。
E: If there is a so-called conspiracy or some kind of experiment, then it can only mean one thing. She is impersonating Sheila under false pretenses.

C: 哈哈，不，{M#先生}{F#小姐}，她不会。相反，她梦见了冰冷的空间站、诀别的爱人、巨大的星球、以及沉默的无线电。
E: Haha, no, {M#sir}{F#ma'am}. Actually, she dreamed of a cold space station, a lost lover, a huge planet, and a silent radio.

C: 现在我有事在身——我到这里来，替法政科的古恩•科诺列夫先生取几卷录像带。
E: I am busy right now — I'm here to pick up some videos for Mr. Gunn Konolev of the Department of Galactic Geopolitics.

C: 我宁可选择死亡…
E: I'd rather die...

C: 只查到了一份记录。
E: I only found one record.

C: 他们俩的表现在你看来或许有些奇怪，但在我眼里却是再稀疏平常不过了。
E: Their behaviors may seem strange to you, but to me, they are extremely normal.

C: 先说梅厄，上班走神是每个人类在工作中的必经之路，就算是我在从事自己挚爱领域的研究时，这种事也偶尔会发生。
E: Let's start with Mare. Getting distracted at work is such a common occurrence for all humans. It sometimes happens to me, even when I'm working in my favorite field of research.

C: 唯一令我意外的是，他的不适应程度有点严重。但我已经安排了医师去给他诊断一下了。
E: What surprised me was the severity of his discomfort. So I've already sent for a doctor to check on him.

C: 看来你已经顺利抵达了现场，那我们长话短说。
E: Looks like you've already reached the site. So let me cut to the chase.

C: 小心点，在这个家伙身上侦测到了不同寻常的能量波动。
E: Be careful, unusual energy fluctuations were detected in this guy.

C: 行了，麻烦总得有人去解决。
E: Well, someone has to.

C: 我已经派人通知诡影的目击者去基座舱段的<color=#dbc291ff>接待大厅</color>集合了。你我先去探探口风，再做具体打算。
E: I already sent for people to gather all the witnesses of the specters at the <color=#dbc291ff>reception hall</color> in the base zone. Let's go and interview them before coming up with a plan.

C: 我怀疑…照片中那神出鬼没的东西，是界种科的奇物「戏命鬼」。
E: My guess is that... the ghastly thing captured in the photos is Jinx, a Curio from the Department of Ecology.

C: 世玲！我求求你别再说话了。
E: Shiling! Please, just stop talking.

C: 虽然我也不知道这是为什么，但它们肯定没有蓄意害人。
E: I don't know what this is for, but they certainly don't mean to hurt anyone.

C: 呃，{NICKNAME}…你这样让我压力很大。
E: Um, {NICKNAME}... That's one big responsibility you just dumped on me.

C: 看来这位名叫荣仓终的科员，已经在「军团」的入侵中罹难了…难怪不论是我还是阿德勒，都对这个名字没有任何印象。
E: Looks like this researcher named Eikura Shuu perished during the Legion's invasion... No wonder neither Adler nor I seem to be able to recall the name.

C: 则没有词句能定义这份喜悦。
E: ...and yet I can't find the words for this moment.

C: 前阵子，我在筛查过程中发现了她的行踪，本打算顺藤摸瓜找出对方的底细，却被反将一军，中了她的陷阱。
E: A while ago, I discovered her whereabouts during a screening process. I was planning to follow the clues to find more details about her, but I fell into her trap.

C: 恭喜啊。
E: Congratulations.

C: 你看我说的对吧！这家伙留着的本地数据果然有蹊跷！
E: See? I was right! There was something fishy about the local data she left behind!

C: 「好了，咱们出发吧，动作要快。这里跟刚才的空间站不一样，可是实打实天才俱乐部的地盘。」
E: "Alright, let's get going. We have to move quickly. This place is different from the rest of the space station. We're on Genius Society turf."

C: 一切顺利！我重新规划了路线，还加入了新的设计。怎么样，要不要体验一下？
E: All good! I replanned the route and added some new designs. What do you say, wanna try it out?

C: 我的所言所行绝无虚假，我认为它的内心澄澈如明镜。
E: Both my words and actions come from the bottom of my heart. You are indeed beautiful — like flowers blooming in the morning sun!

C: 我原本驾驶「希世难得」号穿梭于银河间——但在旅途中偶然发现落难的公司职员维利特，便将他从不慎掉入的巨大山洞里带了出来。
E: I was piloting the "One and Only" through the galaxy when I discovered Velite, an IPC worker who accidentally fell into a huge cave, from which I saved him.

C: 啊、啊？！行吧，万一有什么危险，我就躲你身后了啊。
E: Wh—What!? Alright, if things get dangerous, I'll hide behind you.

C: 我在智库中阅读过「真蛰虫」的资料。此种虫类扇动翅膀时会抖落纤维碎屑，致使吸入者产生幻觉。
E: Yes, I've read about True Stings in the data bank. They emit fibrous particles from their wings during flight — the inhalation of which can induce perceptual distortions and hallucinations.

C: {NICKNAME}乘客！你在做什么呢？
E: {NICKNAME}, what are you doing?

C: 丹恒的房间。
E: Dan Heng's Room.

C: {NICKNAME}…你的举止、力量、行战的礼仪…已令我心服口服。
E: {NICKNAME}... Your demeanor, strength, and the etiquette of your combat... I admit, you have won me over.

C: 看来最为巨大的丑恶之徒…竟在列车外！
E: It would seem our enormous, hideous enemy... is right outside!

C: {NICKNAME}乘客刚在列车落脚，要不要先休息一下，跟大家聊聊天？如果准备得差不多了就可以来找我帕，我们就准备出发咯。
E: {NICKNAME}, since you only just got back, why not take a little rest and chat with the Crew? Once you're ready, come find Pom-Pom and we'll prepare to depart.

C: 见着它的痕迹，就给我发个信号。
E: Send me a signal when you see traces of it.

C: 那必须是妥妥贴贴。毕竟只要钱到位，什么都好办。
E: It's all taken care of. As long as the money's there, it's all good.

C: 无实体有生命的奇物？那不就是戏命鬼吗？
E: A Curio that's alive but doesn't have a body? Isn't that just a Jinx?

C: 戏什么鬼？
E: Jinx...?

C: 她说可能是呜呜伯。
E: She said it might be a Wubbaboo.

C: 阮•梅嘴角抖动了一下
E: The corner of Ruan Mei's mouth twitches

C: 它睁大无辜的双眼。现在你得向它说明，这是为了把它送回阮•梅身边，不得不做的……
E: It opens its innocent eyes wide. You now have to explain to it that this has to be done in order to send it back to Ruan Mei's side...

C: 我期待另一种思想的加入。我将等待尊贵的来客，予以对方最高的礼节，相信知性的火光将在摩擦中迸发。
E: We anticipate the inclusion of a different perspective. I await our esteemed guest and shall offer the highest courtesies — I'm confident that our discussions will generate illuminating insights.

C: 看来是我多心了，黑塔只是一时兴起…很符合她的作风。
E: It appears I was overthinking things. Impulsive behavior is pretty characteristic of her after all.

C: {NICKNAME}，我可是听那位工程师说，之前是你帮他修好了机器人，他一直跟我们夸你呢。
E: {NICKNAME}, I heard that engineer say that it was you that helped them with the robot repairs before. He was always telling us great things about you.

C: {NICKNAME}，不用着急，每到一个地方，重要的是用心去观察与感受——看看那些对我们而言微不足道的「小事」，究竟在人们心中留下了什么。
E: {NICKNAME}, there's no need to fret. Just pay attention to what you feel in your heart in each area you go to — go and see just how those "trivial jobs" we did for people affected them.

C: 你好啊塞琳！呀，{NICKNAME}也在啊。
E: Hello, Celine! Ah, you're here too, {NICKNAME}!

C: 呜呜…塔米拉小姐，有空的时候要回剧院看看啊。
E: Waaa... Miss Tamila! Make sure you come back to visit the theater when you have time!

C: 铁卫们化作星芒点点，渐渐消失……
E: The Silvermane Guards fade into sparkling dust and gradually disappear...

C: 好像是这么回事。
E: I think you're right.

C: 嗯，一定。
E: Mm, I'll be there next time.

C: 快，{NICKNAME}！快去看看广场上有什么好玩的、好吃的！
E: Now to check out the main event — the food! C'mon {NICKNAME}, keep up!

C: 我们去找她聊聊。
E: Let's go have a chat with Topaz.

C: 呃…我不是想打断你们聊高雅的话题哈，不过其实我们有别的事想找你讨论……
E: Ugh... Sorry for crashing your artist party, but we came to talk to you about something else...

C: 这里的展品都很普通啊，看上去没什么价值。再陪我走两步吧。
E: The exhibits here are pretty ordinary — I estimate they're probably not worth much. Let's keep moving.

C: 嗐，没什么好羡慕的，乘上了一波运势罢了~再说这也算不上什么美差，还不是得在各个星系之间跑来跑去，被业务推着走嘛。
E: More good luck, I suppose. But it's not as cushy as you think — scurrying from one side of the galaxy to the other, going wherever businesses require me to be...

C: 希儿！
E: Seele!

C: 唔…所以这边的事就算解决了…？
E: Phew... So are we all good here, or what?

C: 领航员的事务可是很繁忙的，{NICKNAME}。你该庆幸我及时赶上了。
E: The life of a navigator is a busy one, {NICKNAME}. You should be glad that I made it in time.

C: 这些机兵自建成以来就从未离开过这里。公司于七百多年前撤离这颗星球以后，再也无人知晓该如何启动这批兵器。
E: Correct. After the IPC departed from this world more than <unbreak>700</unbreak> years ago, no one has possessed the necessary knowledge for activating these weapons.

C: 不知道我的意见能有多少分量…但至少这是我的心声。
E: I'm not sure how much weight my opinion carries, but that's my take on the matter.

C: 还剩下一个人没问。
E: There's still one person left to ask.

C: 我已经想清楚了——做选择是布洛妮娅的责任，不是我的。
E: I've thought about it... This responsibility rests on Bronya's shoulders, not mine.

C: 她对这个世界太重要了。
E: She plays a crucial role on this world.

C: 氛围完全不一样了，托帕真的在前面吗？
E: This atmosphere really feels strange... Are you sure Topaz is here?

C: 这里是…这个地方，我们没来过耶！
E: ...What is this place? We've never been here before, right?

C: 若非迫不得已，我们也不想用这种手段。
E: It's a shame we had to resort to this method, but we had no choice.

C: …我晚点答复你。
E: ...I'll get back to you later.

C: 听说瓦赫医生是上层区医学院的高材生，贝洛伯格的大医院都抢着要他。也不知道他为什么会跑到这穷酸的下层…可能就是纯粹的心善吧？
E: I heard he was a top student from the Overworld medical academy — Belobog's main hospital wanted him. I've no idea what convinced him to set up down here... a kind heart, maybe.

C: 怎么，爱买不买，你还能拿我怎么着不成？
E: Huh? What are you gonna do about it? Either buy something or clear out.

C: 可恶，可恶啊！我妹妹的命怎么就这么苦……
E: Argh, I hate them! I hate them all! How could they do this to my sister...

C: 所以，她亲自把哥哥接到了下层，还托人给他安排了自己的诊所和实验室……
E: She brought her brother underground and entrusted him with her clinic and laboratory...

C: 你是什么人？
E: Who are you?

C: 恭喜您，在本赛季揭幕战中五战全胜！您自然应得到丰厚的奖励——史考特老板早就安排好了，请您一定拿好！
E: Congratulations on your season opener win in all five of the matches! And of course, Mr. Scott has arranged for your rich reward. Here you go!

C: 据我所知，空间站里没有顶着这个名号的科员，应该只是化名。
E: As far as I know, there is no one with this title in the space station. It must be an alias.

C: …也得起来走走，换换心情……
E: Time to walk around and change my mood...

C: 是我的本体。
E: It's my body.

C: 你们想拿我狸猫换太子。
E: You want me to take your place as the Xenohydro.

C: 这到底是怎么一回事？
E: What on earth is going on?

C: 我没有迷路，{F#姐姐}{M#哥哥}不用担心。他说过，只要听他的话，任何坏事都不会发生。
E: I'm not lost, {F#ma'am}{M#sir}. Don't worry about me! He said nothing bad can ever happen so long as I listen to him.

C: 你抓紧我就行，我带你出去。
E: Just hold on tight to me, and I'll get you out of here.

C: 难道真的是失眠…
E: Could it really be insomnia...?

C: …你一点都不明白！
E: You just don't get it!

C: 呼…让我重、重新找一张空白页……
E: Grr... Let me find another blank page to write it down...

C: 我该怎么解锁——？！
E: How do I unlock it!?

C: 你相信他的话吗？
E: Do you believe it?

C: ——回答你的问题，我最近也过得不错，谢谢关心。
E: ...and yes, things are going well for me too — thanks for asking!

C: 打不开了？看我的——
E: So you need help opening this cabinet...

C: 稍晚点，我们大矿区见吧。
E: Let's meet at the Great Mine and go from there...

C: （这两个家伙，鬼鬼祟祟的…在这里干嘛？）
E: (What are these two doing sneaking around...?)

C: （这两个小孩子的家长，最近都给他们置办了很贵重的礼物……）
E: (Sounds like their parents bought them expensive gifts recently...)

C: {NICKNAME}{F#小姐}{M#先生}，您想现在就开始了解博物馆运营的相关工作流程吗？
E: {NICKNAME}, would you like to begin with the museum's workflows?

C: 外表看上去倒是没什么不同…走吧，我们上去看看。
E: Looks normal enough on the surface... Let's take a closer look.

C: 欢迎，{NICKNAME}——你为何而来？
E: Welcome, {NICKNAME}. What brings you here?

C: 他、他也表扬了哥哥，是我们两个人……
E: H—He said nice things about you too...

C: 不知道这位华劳斯先生的「朋友」跟展品失窃案有没有瓜葛……
E: I wonder if this "friend" of Mr. Wallace has anything to do with the museum thefts...

C: 他那份工作的确称得上闲职，也难怪经常会和莱姆士汀家的公子来往。
E: Norbert's position is indeed an idle one — it's no wonder he has time to socialize with members of the Limestein family.

C: 佩拉，救我…
E: Help me, Pela...

C: 胶片！他刚才提到了胶片，你也听到了吧？肯定就是咱们要找的那一卷。
E: Film! Did you hear that? That film he mentioned must be the same one that was stolen from the museum.

C: 呜…没、没什么，我自言自语罢了……
E: Ah... N—Nothing, I was just talking to myself....

C: 「寒腿叔叔」忽悠他说，博物馆的展品有很多都是铁卫通过强征的手段从私人收藏家手里抢夺过去的，真正弘扬正义的行为是让文物回归民间……
E: Mr. Cold Feet fooled Norbert into believing that many of the museum's artifacts were forcibly seized from private collectors by the Silvermane Guards. He told him that true justice would be returning the artifacts to the people...

C: 我怎么会出卖你呢？
E: How could I ever betray such a dear friend?

C: 轻轻地推门而入。
E: Gently push open the door and enter.

C: 你，解决了星核危机的英雄，大守护者敬重的战友宾朋…要是只因为眼前小小的一道宾馆房门就让犯人溜走了，岂不令人耻笑？
E: Wouldn't it be a shame if you, the hero of the Stellaron crisis, the supreme guardian's respected comrade-in-arms, let the prisoner slip away... just because of a hotel door?

C: 居、居然又见面了嘿，瞧瞧咱俩这缘分！咱这友谊的大桥都快一路修上永冬岭了！
E: Wh—What a pleasant surprise to see you again. Isn't it amazing how fate brings people together? Our bridge of friendship could extend all the way to Everwinter Hill!

C: 总之，是要填这个「志愿导览员申请表」…对吗？呵呵，还真是有模有样。
E: Anyway, I need to fill out this "Application Form for Volunteer Guides"... right? Hehe, it does look really official.

C: 想了解一下野战治疗医院。
E: Tell me more about field hospitals.

C: 哦——去做志愿者咯！
E: Ah — Let's go be volunteers!

C: 不过，她读过虎克的简历，认为没问题…所以就拜托我来推进后续的流程了。
E: Still, she checked Hook's resume and thought she was a good fit... So, she entrusted the rest of the process to me.

C: 啊，是{NICKNAME}{M#哥哥}{F#姐姐}！你已经准备好了吗？
E: Oh, {M#Mister}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME} is here! Are you ready?

C: 虽然克拉拉也不清楚…但根据佩拉小姐的说法，面试就是通过面对面谈话的方式，考查一个人是不是真的适合这份工作。
E: I'm not sure about it either... According to Pela, an interview is a way to find out whether a person is suitable for a job through a face-to-face conversation.

C: 就是就是！想到什么就说什么吧，克拉拉！
E: Exactly! Just say whatever you want to share, Clara!

C: 虎克大人面试有方，厉害！
E: Hook the Great is an amazing interviewer!

C: 看来已经无法回头了……
E: Seems like there's no going back now...

C: 总之，情况我已经了解了。辛苦你专门跑一趟——没有你的话，我们两人恐怕至今还蒙在鼓里。
E: Anyway, I've got my answer. Thanks for your hard work. Without you, both of us would still be in the dark about the situation.

C: 她刚给我塞了份简历表格，说是填好这个交到博物馆接待处，之后等面试通知就行——我现在正发愁怎么办呢。
E: She passed me an application form and asked me to fill it out, submit it to the museum reception desk, and wait for the call for an interview. I'm still on the fence now.

C: 简洁有力！就这个吧。
E: Haha, concise and to the point! Let's use this one.

C: …呵呵，原来如此。那么，我们来看看下一个问题……
E: ...I see. Well, let's move on to the next question...

C: 我自己来的。
E: I sent myself here.

C: 哎，行吧…我知道了。
E: Okay okay... I got it.

C: 匹克——完蛋了，匹克那家伙还在里面睡觉。
E: Peak... he's done for. He was asleep in there.

C: 你们挺有本事的呀。有需要我帮忙的地方，尽管开口。
E: You guys have some moves. If you need my help with anything, just shout.

C: 只是…我以为银鬃铁卫都是冷酷无情的，他们让整个下层自生自灭。和她给我的感觉…不大一样。
E: It's just... I thought that Silvermane Guards were all cold and unfeeling — they left the Underworld to perish. But she... doesn't give me that impression.

C: 应该还没有跑出大矿区。
E: They probably haven't left the Great Mine yet.

C: 你！就是你，别跑！你被鼹鼠党征用了！
E: You! Hey, you, stop! You are now a conscript of The Moles!

C: 虎克的小跟班…
E: Hook's little sidekick...

C: 这…让我猜测的话，大概是真的。
E: Well... I would guess that's probably true.

C: 你看到探测器了吗？
E: Did you see the detector?

C: 都跟你说了，肯定就是那个保姆干的。
E: I told you. I'm sure that helper is the thief.

C: 你的感觉准吗？
E: Can we trust your hunch?

C: 呣…虽然虎克也不知道为什么，但就暂且相信你的判断吧！
E: Hmm... I don't know why, but I'll trust your judgment!

C: 呣呣呣…我们还是再去找找吧，看看还有没有其他线索。
E: Hmm... Let's go look around and see if there are any more clues.

C: 桑博叔叔总是去诊所找娜塔莎姐姐，虎克还以为他是生了什么大病呢！
E: Mr. Sampo's always at the clinic hanging around Miss Natasha. Hook thought he was really sick or something!

C: 不就是做点小生意嘛，干嘛这么大惊小怪的？
E: Just doing a little business. What's all the fuss?

C: 这…这都要怪费斯曼那个老头！就凭他有我手里的这玩意，就一个人发横财…这根本不公平！
E: This... this is all that old Fersman's fault! Just because he has this device I'm holding, he can make a fortune... It's not fair!

C: 三件太多了，一件吧。
E: Three is too many. Can we make it one?

C: 这藏宝图绝对保真！老桑博做生意向来以诚信为本，你可千万别被那些嫉妒我生财有道的人给洗脑了啊！
E: This treasure map is absolutely real! I always do business with the utmost integrity. Don't be fooled by those scoundrels who are just jealous of me simply because I make good money!

C: …后面那个听上去也不能吃吧？！
E: That sounds even less appetizing!

C: 啊？这原来是只兔子？
E: Huh? This is a rabbit?

C: 咦…这是什么？
E: Uh...

C: 它有可能还在周围。
E: Maybe it's still around somewhere.

C: …啊！没、没什么。好像只是一些古董……
E: ...Ah! N—Nothing! Just some old stuff...

C: 不用担心，因为有我在！
E: With me around, there's no need to worry!

C: 现在不是问这个的时候吧……
E: This probably isn't the best time to bring that up...

C: 跟我来——这边。
E: Come this way.

C: 妈妈……
E: Mom...

C: 对不起…以前是我太任性了……
E: I'm sorry... for always being so stubborn...

C: 我、我知道了！我以后，绝对不会再偷东西了！
E: I—I promise! I'll never steal things again!

C: 哼，我一个人也应付得来啊。不过…跟你们一块战斗确实很痛快就是了。
E: Nah, I could've taken it on by myself. But still... fighting alongside you two was pretty fun.

C: 给，这些药给你，希望有用……
E: Mm... Here you are. I hope the medicine is of help to you...

C: 但这是别人辛辛苦苦做出来的吧？这样随便拿走的话……
E: But didn't someone work hard to make this? I can't just take it from here...

C: 让你久等了。
E: Sorry to have kept you waiting.
Huh...?

C: 那是当然！老巫婆说过，「菌菌」可不是一般的玩偶！
E: Of course! The old witch said Junjun isn't just any old teddy bear!

C: 一直，等待，修缮。跟随，请，帕斯卡！
E: Been, waiting, repair. Follow, please, Pascal!

C: 这个问题也困扰了我很久…
E: I've been wondering about that too...

C: 这或许就是事件的全貌了。
E: That's probably what happened.

C: 没错，我们去打倒史瓦罗！
E: You're right. Let's go take him down!

C: 那是什么，密码吗？
E: Is that a secret code or something?

C: 恭喜你——回答错误！
E: Wrong! Congratulations.

C: 嘿嘿，这才像话嘛！
E: Hehe, now we're talkin'!

C: 三月，伸手。
E: March, put your hand out.

C: 她把事情看得透彻，而且有自己的坚持，这两点都跟三月截然不同。
E: She's incisive, and determined... in sharp contrast to you, March.

C: 她应是直接回机械聚落了吧？我们也跟上。
E: I assume she must be on her way back to the robot settlement. Let's catch up with her.

C: …大家，果然还是跟来了呀。
E: ...Oh, it's you. You came with me after all.

C: 提米，帮我开门吧，我想去见史瓦罗先生。
E: Timmy, open the gate please. I want to see Mr. Svarog.

C: 和机器人谈判…对我来说也是第一次。
E: Negotiating with robots... I can't say I've tried it before.

C: 我是应该进机械墓场的旧款式。零件并不值钱。
E: My design has been superceded by newer models. My components are no longer valuable.

C: 把烦心事憋在心里，说到底还不是觉得自己身居高位，不想在别人面前示弱？
E: You let that status of yours go to your head, huh? Afraid to show weakness? That's why you're keeping so much bottled up inside, right?

C: 你什么时候叫的人？
E: When did you call in for reinforcements?

C: 你知道娜塔莎是地火的…
E: You knew Natasha belonged to Wildfire...

C: 你老爹很担心你，别再做让他不放心的事了。
E: Your dad worries about you — stop giving him reasons to.

C: 没错没错，看来你还记得我。
E: That's right, so you do remember me!

C: 这是我亲孙子，我还能认错？让奶奶仔细看看你的脸…
E: This is my flesh and blood! How could I possibly... Come on, let grandma see that cute little face...

C: 胡说，亲孙子我还能认错？让奶奶仔细看看你的脸…
E: Nonsense, how could I mistake my own flesh and blood? Come on, let grandma see that cute little face...

C: …不是你们把我带过来的吗？我奶奶就在那边……
E: ...B—But you brought me over here. My grandma's just over there...

C: 住手！
E: Stop!

C: 下一件竞拍品是一件镶有黑宝石的手工玩偶，由磐岩镇的宝石藏品爱好者虎克提供。
E: The next item has been provided by Hook, a gemstone collector from Boulder Town. It's a handmade teddy bear adorned with erebus.

C: 四百五十！
E: <unbreak>450</unbreak>!

C: 我本来也没想出手…但我可不想看到你们两个垂头丧气的样子啊。
E: I wasn't planning on saying anything... but I saw a couple of very sad-looking faces in the crowd.

C: 嗯…让我数数…好像还不太够呢。
E: Let's have a count. Hmm, doesn't seem to be enough...

C: 是三个月哦。
E: Three months.

C: 这年头，做玩具的商家真是越来越少了…我走了好几个小镇才买到这些。但是真没想到，「菌菌」已经被卖掉了。可惜……
E: Toy-making companies are increasingly scarce this year... I had to travel to different towns. I never expected Junjun might have been sold. What a shame...

C: 行吧，反正我们赢了…多亏了那台大机器人，我们终于把「星核」给解决咯。布洛妮娅也给出了承诺，上下层的封锁很快会解除啦。
E: Well whatever, we won... Thanks to that giant robot, we were finally able to take care of the Stellaron... and Bronya made a promise — the Underworld and the Overworld will soon be reunited.

C: 不如我们再去现场调查一下？
E: Why don't we go back to the crime scene and start from there?

C: 呜，克、克拉拉也很害怕！但是…要把重要线索记下来……
E: I—I'm also terrified! But I still have to jot down the important clues...

C: 不过，它好像想说些什么——我、人、请勿、伤害……
E: It appears to be trying to say something: I, human, please, don't hurt...

C: 奇怪的知识增加了…
E: I've learned some unusual things...

C: 那个…抱歉，克拉拉只是突然有些感触。我们还是继续研究怎么修复小机器人吧。
E: Erm... I'm sorry, I just suddenly felt some strong emotions. Let's get back to work on repairing the small robot.

C: 这是托比应该做的！
E: It was Toby's honor!

C: 这家伙的核心你也要回收吗？
E: You're taking its core too?

C: 真是个好孩子啊，克拉拉。
E: You're a good kid, Clara.

C: …克拉拉明白。
E: I understand.

C: 能彻底清除噪音的方法，有且仅有一种：「覆写」。
E: There's only one way to completely remove muddled information — overwriting.

C: 但…克拉拉想知道——{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}为什么支持史瓦罗先生的方案呢？
E: But I'd like to know why you went with Mr. Svarog's solution.

C: 谢谢，谢谢！谢谢，克拉拉，{NICKNAME}！
E: Thank you, thank you! Thank you, Clara, {NICKNAME}!

C: 希露瓦！我们过去每天都一起排练，你应该懂的吧？
E: Serval! We used to rehearse together every day. You must understand?

C: 对，没错。
E: Yup.

C: 铁卫！听我命令——打开大门！
E: Guards! Open the gate!

C: 司空见惯了。
E: It's a common occurrence.

C: 我先走一步，请你尽快跟上来。
E: I'll go first. Please follow me as soon as possible.

C: 没事就好。
E: Good to hear!

C: 然后…然后……
E: And then... and then...

C: 这是…「筑城者」留下的遗迹吗？
E: Did the Architects build this...?

C: 那里发生的事违背常理，接近疯狂。守护者大人，情况如果持续下去……
E: What happened back there defied all reason... it was madness. Madam Guardian, if this continues...

C: 这把枪是……可可利亚的武器？
E: This spear... isn't that Cocolia's weapon?

C: 各位…谢谢你们。
E: Thank you... all of you.

C: 你的意思是……
E: You mean...

C: 如果把在这里发生的事说出去…你能想象后果吗？人们会失望的，如果连守护者都无法相信——换做是我，我会不知道自己还能相信什么…还能相信谁。
E: Can you imagine the consequences if we told the people what happened here? They'd be devastated. If we can't trust the guardians, who — or what — can we trust...?

C: …你是谁？
E: ...Who are you?

C: 谢谢你。我…我害怕你会拒绝。
E: Thank you. I was afraid... that you'd say no.

C: 唉，算了…只看一眼倒也耽误不了几秒钟时间。你找到了什么玩意，拿给我看看吧。
E: Ah, okay... I guess, taking a look won't rob me of much time. What is it? Let me have a check, would you?

C: 不行，要是笔记丢了，俺就没法干下去了。
E: No. I'm gonna lose my job if I lose these notes.

C: 我当时离得比较远，只听到一些声音「咚——」、「哐——」、「咔嚓咔嚓——」、「咣——」。
E: I was quite a distance away at the time, I only heard noises like "thud," "crash," "whoosh," and "clang!"

C: 我听见那个<color=#dbc291ff>肇事星槎的引擎声音非常大，跟一般星槎不太一样。</color>
E: I heard the <color=#dbc291ff>engine sound of the offending starskiff. It was loud and different from ordinary starskiffs.</color>

C: 您好，我是刚才找过您的天舶司测速员檀檀，我想问问在刚才的事故的情况。
E: Hello, I'm Tantan, Speed Tester from the Sky-Faring Commission. I contacted you earlier. I would like to ask you about the traffic incident.

C: 诶，那可不行。芦慧姑娘要是没有我照顾，就没人能照顾她了。
E: Oh, that won't do. If I don't take care of Ms. Luhui, no one could.

C: …没事儿，我忘了想说什么了。
E: ...It's nothing. I forgot what I wanted to say.

C: 东口的机巧鸟
E: Cycrane at the east entrance

C: 多吗？我不觉得啊。等等…你误会了。我只打算雇一个助手，但因为学术研究的关系，我对这位的要求有些严格。
E: That many? I don't think so. Wait, I think you misunderstood. I just want to hire ONE assistant, but as this is for my academic research, I have slightly strict requirements for this person.

C: 你早就怀疑过地衡司在人工植被上的审美，又或者这是生物工程特殊栽培的产物——树身竟然是某种坚硬的金属！
E: You've long had doubts about the Realm-Keeping Commission's aesthetics when it comes to artificial greenery. Alternatively, maybe this is a product of biological engineering — The tree trunk is made of some kind of hard metal!

C: 你、你好？
E: H—Hello?

C: 反正我已拍下事故现场的情况了，「鹤运速递」的专员还不来是吧，真行啊…看来得让我亲自走一趟了……
E: I recorded the incident anyways. Heron Express' specialists just aren't coming, huh? They sure have guts... Seems like I have to visit them myself...

C: 东西都拍好了。
E: I took picture of everything.

C: 我选好花了。
E: I made my choice.

C: 我听人说「忧思为诗骨」。只要诗人足够忧郁，就能写出最打动人心的诗句…我原本对这位「忧郁的诗人」寄予厚望。
E: They say, "Gloominess is the backbone of poetry." If a poet is melancholic enough, the most beautiful poetic verse will flow out... I had such high hopes for this Gloomy Poet.

C: …要不我直接把你抬走好了？
E: ...How about I just pick you up and carry you off?

C: 我深度学习了「边塞诗派」的代表作，提取了作者的生平经历与词频风格。发觉这些作者各个都饱经沧桑，阅历过人。
E: I studied in-depth all the classics of borderland poetry of yore, distilling each poet's life essence and style. Realizing that each poet had encountered many diverse and rich experiences.

C: 「宁为百夫长，胜作一书生」，做不做诗人本就不重要，老夫以为，上阵杀敌才是头等大事。
E: "Better be a lieutenant than a scholar." What's important isn't whether you're a poet. I think that heading to the battlefield and striking down foes is more important.

C: 可恶。但败阵的耻辱也将成为激励诗作的灵感。
E: How despicable, but even the shame of defeat serves as good inspiration for another poem.

C: 二人皆社恐
E: are both introverts.

C: 「对仗」，即要求严格的对偶。字数相等，结构相同，字音平仄相对，字义虚实对应…这可并不容易。
E: Counterpoint is about contrasting or combining two terms, phrases, or clauses with opposite meanings. This is not easy.

C: 我搞到了「高级会员资格」。
E: I managed to get myself a "premium membership."

C: 要怎么搞到消息取决于你，我就在这儿等你的好消息了。
E: However you choose to obtain the information is up to you. I'll be waiting for your good news right here either way.

C: 对呀。
E: I thought so.

C: 「我是地衡司执事，给我追上前面那只机巧鸟。」
E: "As an official of the Realm-Keeping Commission, I order you to follow that cycrane up ahead at all costs."

C: 我很幸福！你再不走，我现在就要向地衡司报警了！
E: I'm very happy, thank you! And if you don't leave in ten seconds, I'm going to report you to the Realm-Keeping Commission!

C: 噢，这是博识学会内部人员才会使用的特殊光学标识。代表着某位学士抵达此处进行研究，并为同行留下了一些线索。
E: Oh, this is a special optical marking used only by the members of the Intelligentsia Guild. It shows that a scholar has done research at that particular location and left some clues for his or her peers.

C: 出发吧，{NICKNAME}。贝尼尼老师到底在那儿留下了什么呢？真是教人期待。
E: Set off now, {NICKNAME}. I wonder what Bernini left behind. I can't wait to find out.

C: （不过，这个标识…图案看上去像一棵树，又像是人，到底是什么玩意？树人？）
E: (This marking... looks half like a tree and half like a human. What exactly is it? A tree person?)

C: 你不明白，你根本不了解这个秘密的价值。你和年轻时的我一样轻狂自大，以为自己会有数不尽的可能，以为青春永不消逝。
E: You don't get it. You don't understand the true value of this secret at all. I was just a know-it-all just like you at your age, thinking I'd have countless possibilities before me and that youth would never fade.

C: 这也是无奈之举，地衡司会重金感谢你的帮助。
E: There's no other way. The Realm-Keeping Commission will pay you handsomely for your help.

C: 啧，把别人当傻子糊弄很过瘾么？
E: Tsk, you think this is a joke?

C: 你突然说这谁懂啊？
E: What are you talking about?

C: 你为什么在这里？
E: What are you doing here?

C: 孩子将红彤彤的糖串放进嘴里，一口一个。
E: The boy places the bright red candies into his mouth, one at a time.

C: 你不说话，我真当你不存在了。你又是哪位呀？
E: Hmph, it felt that way until you opened your trap. Who are you?

C: 我们换上云骑军的盔甲?
E: Can we wear the Cloud Knights' armor?

C: 那可真了不起啊。
E: That was incredible.

C: …魔阴身开始爆发了吗？这可真是…突然。
E: ...Has the mara taken hold? That was quite... sudden.

C: 抱歉…为了我，把你们卷进了危险。
E: I'm so sorry... it's because of me that all of you are in danger.

C: 唔，仙舟眼下乱做一团，我还是先待在星槎海吧。要是有人救急，想医个头疼脑热，我也能发挥所长。
E: Hmm, the Xianzhou is still in a mess. I better stay in Starskiff Haven for the time being — I'm sure there'll be fevers and headaches to take care of before long.

C: 这些人自诩「正统」。他们认为白露是由上一任龙尊亲自选定的继承者，若不犯大错，龙师们无权另选。
E: These people speak of "legitimacy." They believe that Bailu was chosen as heir apparent by the previous High Elder, and that unless she were to commit a terrible sin, the Preceptors should have no right whatsoever to choose again.

C: 你就是丹恒呀？我听说你在鳞渊境分开古海的事了。你这么厉害，那些刺客想必拿不下你。
E: You're Dan Heng? I heard about how you parted the ancient sea in Scalegorge Waterscape. These assassins have got their work cut out for them.

C: 救兵？我就是救兵。
E: Reinforcements? I am the reinforcements!

C: 由于异象与持明族的「云吟术」相近，勤务们利用「回响」便可探明区域内隐身怪物位置，具体发生原理目前尚未知晓。
E: As the phenomenon is similar to Vidyadhara cloudhymn magic, the orderlies can use echoes to detect the location of the invisible monsters in the area. The exact principles behind this are not yet known.

C: {NICKNAME}，现在方便聊聊吗？
E: {NICKNAME}, do you have time to chat now?

C: 「星芋啵啵」？奶茶？
E: Startaro Bubble... the milk tea?

C: （适当的沉默…）
E: *silence*

C: 我懂了！他在三余书肆搞到了一张藏宝图，去那个小角落寻宝，获得了巨额财富以后，拎着行李衣锦还乡！
E: I know! He must have found a treasure map at Spare Time Book Shop. He went into the alley to dig it up and then went home with his newfound riches!

C: 我还以为他是要买书，没想到，他付了钱，然后撕掉了书的扉页。我吓了一跳，但看他满脸笑容，也没敢多问。
E: Everything seemed normal, but after paying for it he immediately tore off the title page. I was shocked, but he was grinning ear to ear, so I didn't dare ask him about it.

C: 好耶，杨叔对我最好了！
E: Yay! Mr. Yang is the best!

C: 「执事精神」
E: Pretend to be an officer

C: 我们想找一个人。
E: We're looking for someone.

C: 哇，第一次见到能痛饮苏打豆汁的异邦人！
E: Whoa, I've never met an outworlder who could down a mung bean soda like that!

C: 你们知道狐人的「试儿」习俗吗？就是在孩子出生不久，在她周围摆上一圈代表未来命运的物品。
E: Have you heard of the foxian "birthfate" tradition? Soon after a child is born, we surround them with items that represent future destinies.

C: 我也是现学现卖罢了。
E: Well, I only recently found out about it.

C: 谁是知情人士？
E: Who would that be?

C: 面对数倍于自己的丰饶孽物，近百万斗舰飞行士殊死搏斗，活着离开战场的，不足十万。
E: We were greatly outnumbered by the Abominations of Abundance. Almost a million fighter pilots fought in the bitter battle. Those who survived numbered no more than a hundred thousand.

C: 嗯…应该是因为我吧……
E: Mm-hmm... probably because of me...

C: 不过要说和她最合拍，也是最常搭档的，还得是你母亲。她们二人出击的次数，连广渊先生也屈居其后。尤其是在广渊先生阵亡后，采翼几乎不和你母亲以外的人搭档。
E: ...but when it came to pilots, your mother was the best match for her — they flew together all the time. Even Mr. Guangyuan couldn't match their numbers. After he passed away in battle, Caiyi rarely teamed up with anyone except your mother.

C: 采翼也是这样的人。我们从小便是好友，驾驶着星槎到处惹是生非，直到被人抓到景元将军面前。
E: Caiyi was like that, too. We were friends since childhood. We flew starskiffs everywhere — causing trouble until the Knights caught us and dragged us before General Jing Yuan.

C: 那是我见过的最美的天空，可我只感到难以忍受的悲伤。我只能像只该死的蚂蚁匍匐在大地上，眼巴巴地望着它。
E: It was the most beautiful sky I had ever seen... but all I could feel was unbearable pain. I sunk to the ground and gazed up helplessly.

C: 是啊！帝弓司命的浩荡神恩，只用一击就荡平了那群孽物！可仅只为了阻挡它们的前进，我们就付出了几十万条生命的代价！
E: Yes! The mighty blessing of the Reignbow Arbiter annihilated all abominations in a single strike! But we had to pay with the blood of hundreds of thousands of soldiers just to halt their advance!

C: 你相信这个宇宙是自由的吗？
E: So you believe that this universe is free?

C: 我知道你会回心转意的。谢谢。在这仙舟上…我能拜托的只有你了。
E: I knew you'd come around. On the Xianzhou... you're the only person I can turn to for help.

C: 因为我想改变自己。
E: Because I wanted to change myself.

C: 他们一起做了件很坏、非常坏的事情，招致了极其恐怖的结果。
E: Together, they did something bad — something terrible. It led to horrific consequences.

C: 通缉犯明明在你身后，说谎多少打个草稿……
E: The criminal is right behind you! At least look around when you lie...

C: 我想骗你，但真不编不出来…
E: I want to lie to you, but I really dunno how...

C: 瓦尔特先生想的很多。
E: You sure zone out a lot, Mr.Yang.

C: {NICKNAME}，你我杨叔可以凑个组合，叫「星核医生」。
E: {NICKNAME}, you, me, and Mr. Yang can make up our own team: The Stellaron Medics!

C: 好在这一路上虽意外连连，最后一节却没出岔子。恩公们瞧，这就是小女子说的舶船了。
E: We had a difficult start, but things got easier. Look, that's the barge I was talking about.

C: 算了吧。
E: Forget it.

C: 若是要看星槎，在玉界门边上抬头就有的是。为什么要大老远跑这儿来？
E: If it's starskiffs you wanted to see, we could've headed to the Jade Gate. Why did we come all the way here?

C: 哦…是狐人的「慰灵奠仪」?
E: Huh...? You mean the foxian soul-soothing ceremony?

C: 我明白了…跟我来吧。
E: I see... Follow me.

C: 虽然我也不懂星槎制造…
E: I don't know anything about manufacturing starskiffs either...

C: 唔，药材的味道就在这附近了。
E: Hmm, I can smell the herbs. It's around here somewhere.

C: 当然啦，可爱的事物之间总是能心灵相通的。
E: Of course I understand! All cute things in the world share a special connection, after all.

C: 现今时候，云骑驻地也算不上安全吧。
E: Given the present circumstances, the Cloud Knight garrison probably isn't a safe destination, wouldn't you say?

C: 之前您在长乐天广场中救下龙女，我代表照看不周的地衡司同袍，在此谢过您。
E: My Realm-Keeping Commission colleagues failed to provide adequate care for the Dragon Lady. I'd like to thank you on behalf of all of them for rescuing her back in Exalting Sanctum Plaza.

C: 我理解。但只要你有空时留意一下就好。神策府不会亏待任何一个为我们做出过贡献的人。
E: I understand, but all I'm asking is for you to keep an eye out when you have time. The Seat of Divine Foresight always rewards those who contribute to our efforts.

C: 怎么获得长生？
E: How do I gain immortality?

C: 「一时千手慈怀药王游化诸界，与莳者九万九千九百九十九人俱，住罗睺下，而为说法。」
E: "Once upon a time, the thousand-hand Sanctus Medicus traveled the world with their <unbreak>99,999</unbreak> disciples, living under Rahu and teaching their Way."

C: 「药王慈怀，建木生发。莳者一心，同登极乐。」
E: "Mercy of Sanctus Medicus, the Arbor's new growth. Unity of Discipuli Medicus, the Enlightenment's true path."

C: 你为什么加入组织？
E: Why did you join the organization?

C: 是啊…很惭愧，我以前叫做「执信」，是神策府派来的卧底。但那群蠢猎狗不会知道，我早就被慈怀药王的力量所感化了。
E: ...Even the thought of that past fills me with shame. I was once Zhixin, a rat for the Seat of Divine Foresight... But those ignorant devils never realized — I had already been redeemed by the power of Merciful Medicus.

C: 她是盲眼的天缺者，却比我们都厉害。
E: She may be sightless, but she's more qualified than all of us.

C: 你怎么知道是我？
E: How do you know it's me?

C: 好办，不听话，打倒就是了。
E: I've got one. Bring it down.

C: 该告别了…送给你一件临别赠礼。期待我们下次再会。
E: It is time to say goodbye... Here — a parting gift for you. I look forward to our next encounter.

C: 这叫完美主义！
E: It's called perfectionism!

C: 我了解了…{NICKNAME}也会跟咱一起吗？
E: Got it... Oh, uh, can {NICKNAME} join me, too?

C: 我放心不下。
E: ...Can't say I'm filled with confidence.

C: 她这长篇大论的都在说个什么劲啊？太卜你当时说过这些话吗，我怎么不记得了？
E: What the heck is she talking about? Master Diviner, did you actually say that at the time? I can't remember.

C: 看来你不愿意相信我。
E: Seems like you don't trust me.

C: 封住那个孩子的像是冰，却没有冰的物理性质…真是怪了。
E: It seemed like that kid was trapped in ice, but the substance doesn't share the same physical properties... How bizarre.

C: 有点好猜。
E: It was kinda easy.

C: （魔…魔剑？）
E: (A c—cursed sword?)

C: 那可有点难，拜托你了。
E: That is a tall order, but I'm counting on you.

C: 那地方可全是公输师傅的宝贝金人，等着瞧吧，她得不了好。
E: Yeah, that place is filled with Master Gongshu's precious aurumatons. I bet they'll give her a hard time.

C: 不妨坐下来，跟我好好讲讲…
E: Why don't you just tell me everything...?

C: 但天赋有时候也会成为一个人的诅咒。他对铸剑之事有着异于常人的热情，一直渴望打造出超越人智的刀剑，让人无需受训便能成为久历生死的老兵。
E: However, talent can sometimes be a curse. He had an unusual fervor for forging, and he dreamed of forging a sword with self-awareness that surpassed that of humans. He believed it would make warriors invincible without any training.

C: 地衡司检查了存放孤云的武库，门窗均无破坏痕迹。除宽窄不过数掌的气窗外，没有任何可供窃贼出入的通道。
E: The Realm-Keeping Commission inspected the arsenal where Guyun was stored, and there were no signs of forced entry through the doors or windows. The only possible entrance or exit was a small window gap, just a few inches wide.

C: 打开剑匣
E: Open sword case

C: 方法，就在你的手上。
E: The solution is right in your hand.

C: 若我取得胜利，我希望孤云阁下能随我一同离开仙舟；若云璃小姐取得胜利，我会坦然接受失败，并将孤云阁下双手奉还——
E: If I win, you will allow Master Guyun to leave the Xianzhou with me. And if you best me, Miss Yunli, I'll accept my defeat and turn Master Guyun over to you...

C: 但在此之前，我仍希望身为胜者的您，有雅量能倾听孤云阁下过去的经历……
E: But before I do that, I hope that you, as the winner, might have mercy and listen to Master Guyun's past experiences...

C: 在梦中，就算一个人被铁锤殴打千百下，充其量也只是在现实酒店中醒来。
E: In a dream, even if you're bashed a thousand times with a hammer, at worst you'll still wake up in reality in a hotel.

C: 亲爱的，不吓你了。你会知道答案的，迟早的事！今天就当浅浅认识下，什么时候改变心意了，就来「酒馆」找我吧——前提是要找得到，哈哈！
E: My dear, I don't want to scare you. You'll know the answer sooner or later! We're just getting to know each other a little today. If you ever change your mind, come find me at the tavern — that is, IF you can find me, haha!

C: 对啊！乐子神在上，我怎么从没发现您拥有如此智慧！
E: Yes! For The Laughter, how did I fail to realize this formidable intellect of yours!

C: 有没有人说过，比起忆者，你更像是一位侦探。
E: Has anyone ever told you that you're more like a detective than a Memokeeper?

C: 昨日，我和助手前来拜访大艺术家花火大人，并在她家中借宿一晚。可第二天早上，花火大人却迟迟没有从卧室中出来。
E: Yesterday, my assistant and I were visiting the famed artist Miss Sparkle, and we stayed the night. But this morning, Miss Sparkle didn't come out of her bedroom.

C: 嗯…诚实的孩子。我知道你在哪儿了，花火小姐。
E: Hmmm... honest kid. I know where you are, Miss Sparkle.

C: 这东西我两只手拎着都费劲，真不知道花火是怎么用它来打人的……
E: I'm barely able to lift this using both hands. I have no idea how Sparkle could ever use this to hit a target...

C: 佐罗的嫌疑可以下降了。
E: Lefton's suspicion level can be downgraded.

C: 所以，凶手究竟是谁？
E: So who exactly is the murderer?

C: 那小剧场里说，死者是被「勒杀」的，莫非这领带就是这次的双关凶器？
E: That skit before said that the deceased was strangled. Is this tie some kind of joke murder weapon?

C: 花火大人一直戏弄可怜的阿佑，最终他忍无可忍，萌生杀意！
E: Miss Sparkle always teased poor Wright until he was unable to take it any longer. Eventually, murderous intent was born!

C: 听听看吧。
E: Sure.

C: 凶手是「阿佑」。
E: The murderer is Wright.

C: 太卜大人要我带上你们几个一同去重启穷观阵的阵基。
E: *sigh* The master diviner wants me to restart the Matrix of Prescience's base terminals... and bring you along for the ride.

C: 你…我…呃，什么意思？没懂。
E: ...Fool you what now? Ugh, stop it, I'm getting Fu Xuan vibes.

C: 我说了：艾利欧没有将关键的信息告诉我。未来的可能性无穷无尽，在错误的时间得知了正确的事情，也会将我们长久的努力化为乌有。
E: Like I said: Elio withheld key pieces of information from me. The future holds endless possibilities. Knowing the right thing at the wrong time could spoil all our hard work.

C: 若非有幸得到{RUBY_B#岚}帝弓司命{RUBY_E#}的启示和保护，今日的「仙舟联盟」也就不复存在了。
E: Had it not been for the enlightenment and protection of the {RUBY_B#Lan}Reignbow Arbiter{RUBY_E#}, the Xianzhou Alliance you see today would never have existed.

C: 真、真的吗？不用工具、不掐指头算算吗？
E: A—Are you sure? You don't need to use a crazy device or do more finger-counting?

C: 不信吗？也好。命数涨落无常，相信天意，不如相信自己。
E: Don't believe me? Fine. Fate is fickle — better to believe in yourself than look to the sky.

C: 我听说这位大人双目失明，不良于行，平日里绝少离开丹鼎司的洞天。以她的技艺学识，难怪这么快就能解出药理。
E: I've heard that the chief alchemist is visually impaired — she rarely leaves the Alchemy Commission delve. She has a vast knowledge and expertise — no wonder she was able to analyze the pharmacology so quickly.

C: 你你你你你你们冷静点！不要害怕！
E: C—C—Calm down! Don't let them scare you!

C: 你担心那孩子的状况？
E: Are you worried about her?

C: 无妨，{F#她}{M#他}是我的朋友。
E: Stand down, {F#she}{M#he} is my friend.

C: 他们叫你「魁首」。
E: They call you "master."
