C: 我吃了。
E: I did.

C: 既然你我都不愿刀兵相向，那么就此别过吧。
E: Since neither of us is eager to engage in combat, let us respectfully part ways.

C: 在下这些日子一直在想…妖弓祸祖不是善神，慈怀药王亦不是恶神。你站在景元那边，只是因为你先认识他们罢了。
E: I have been thinking... The Devilish Archer Author is not a benevolent god, nor is Merciful Medicus a malevolent one. Your choice to align with Jing Yuan was simply due to meeting him first.

C: 接下来要罚款了是吧？
E: You will impose a fine on me next?

C: 这位老兄是仙舟本土人。不过他最近被其他三个联合从「四大善人」里除名了。
E: This fella is a local, but he's just been jointly ousted from the Four Benevolent Ones by the other three.

C: 我想想…嘿！你还别说，虽然你这个想法乍一听很离谱，但仔细一想…更离谱！
E: Hmm... Your idea sounded outrageous at first, but now that I think about it... it sounds even more outrageous!

C: 「植物」的定义很自由…
E: The word "plant" has a broad definition...

C: 唔，引擎还在转动，这一台的状态似乎还不错嘛？
E: Oh, the engine is still running. This machine seems to be in pretty good condition.

C: 那里已经无法再生产…
E: The place is no longer capable of manufacturing...

C: （钟珊这家伙，到底是谁？）
E: (Who in the world is Zhongshan?)

C: 大家…没事吧？！
E: Is everyone okay!?

C: 按它自己的话说，岁阳融聚时会形成脆弱的平衡。
E: Cirrus said it themselves. There's a fragile balance when heliobi fuse together.

C: 浮烟，为什么不试试把本大爷也吸收了？
E: Hey Cirrus, why don't you try swallowing ME too, huh?

C: {NICKNAME}，久仰久仰。
E: I'm {NICKNAME}. Nice to meet you.

C: 那些溜出来作祟的东西，是非常危险的能量寄生物「岁阳」。
E: The roaming entities you saw are extremely dangerous energy parasites... We call them "heliobi."

C: 你和我依附过的所有人都不一样。你的身体深处有什么东西？一颗太阳？它好烫！
E: You're different from anyone else I've ever possessed... but what is this at your core? A Sun? Agh! It burns!

C: 景元还有这段过去？
E: I didn't know Jing Yuan had such a history.

C: 请、请不要揭穿我！我也是…好不容易才鼓起这一点点勇气的！身为判官，这一路上没帮上什么忙，净躲在{NICKNAME}{F#小姐}{M#先生}的背后了……
E: Don't point that out! It took me a lot of effort to be this brave! All this time I've just been hiding behind {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}. I'm such a bad judge...

C: 这个葫芦，好漂亮哇，这就是仙舟上的法宝吗？
E: This gourd is so pretty! Is this what they call a "sacred vessel" on the Xianzhou?

C: 我很期待十王司手忙脚乱的样子。
E: I look forward to seeing how the Ten-Lords Commission responds in the coming days...

C: 此时此刻，唯有相信自己，来吧。
E: You must trust yourself. Come.

C: 呵，一句话就把你的目的暴露出来了。
E: Ha, you've given the game away.

C: 娜娜最近就在努力吧？上课的时候老是走神，肯定又在写新歌吧？
E: Cocona, have you been working hard recently? You're always in a daze in class — you must be writing a new song again, aren't you?

C: ——「想象一朵未来的玫瑰」。
E: ..."Envision a Rose Forthcoming."

C: 别担心，我会第一时间赶回来。话说回来，娜娜…你是不是还有什么东西没给我？
E: Don't worry. I'll hurry back first thing. Speaking of which, Cocona... Is there something you're forgetting to give me?

C: 两张门票消失在茂盛的叶片之下，没有发出任何声响。
E: The tickets disappear among verdant leaves, making nary a sound.

C: 和我谈谈心吧，柯柯娜…
E: Please talk to me, Cocona...

C: 我不想…再挣扎下去了。
E: I don't want to... struggle any longer.

C: 那个声音…它现在散去了。它还会回来的，我很清楚——不过至少在当下，在现在这个瞬间，我暂时不受它的摆布了。
E: That voice... It's gone now. It will be back, that I'm sure of. But at least for now, in this very moment, I am not being wielded by it.

C: 啊，是您…刚刚，我好像做了一场很长的梦中梦——您也在我的梦里出现了。
E: Ah, it's you... I felt like I just had a long dream within a dream — and you were in it too.

C: 啊…我理解了。
E: Ah... I see.

C: 还是难以置信…
E: This is unbelievable...

C: 不管是谁，阻挠家族执法活动的行为已经违反了入梦协议——和异常个体一并清除便是。
E: It does not matter. Interfering with Family enforcement is a breach of the Dream Agreement. They must be removed along with the anomaly.

C: {NICKNAME}{F#小姐}{M#先生}，您回来了。
E: You've returned, {NICKNAME}.

C: 《紫雨》…哈里最喜欢的就是《紫雨》了。我们约好的，总有一天要亲眼见到莱斯利•迪恩本人，要让他给我们签名……
E: Purple Rain... Harry's favorite movie is Purple Rain. We promised, one day we would meet the real Lesley Dean and get an autograph from him...

C: 看来姬莲小姐也曾是一位疯狂的影迷，甚至在「我」离开之后还维持着那份狂热。不知道她有没有意识到，这份病态的热爱已经开始摧残她的生活了。
E: It seems that Ms. Jillian was also one of these crazed fans once, fanatical to the point that she still continues to maintain this version of "me" even after I am gone. I wonder if she has even realized that this sick love has begun to destroy her life?

C: 在你们看不见的角落里，我堆砌着自己的不堪和脆弱。我犯过的错误数不胜数，它们只是被精心地埋藏了起来。
E: My shortcomings and weaknesses are piled up high in a corner that you just cannot see. I have made too many mistakes in my life to count, and they have all become meticulously hidden skeletons in my closet.

C: 那股欲念已经在她身上扎根太深，单靠我一人没法应付。
E: The roots of this desire have grown too deep. I will not be able to handle this alone.

C: …谢谢您。您以后也要多保重身体。
E: ...Thank you. You take care of yourself, too.

C: 我一直都…一直都喜欢……
E: I always... I always loved...

C: 我想是的。
E: I think so.

C: 船长好！
E: Hi, captain!

C: 船长好！
E: Hi, captain!

C: 帮我弄好看点。
E: Make me look nicer, please.

C: 这就是传说中的船长吗？
E: Is this the legendary captain?

C: 你有什么好的建议吗？
E: Do you have any good suggestions?

C: 快挂上去让我看看！
E: Quickly, hang it up for me to see!

C: 我们的团结与过硬的专业技能，是保证航行成功的关键。能为您效力，我们深感荣幸。船长，我们将竭尽所能为您服务！
E: Our unity and world-class professional skills are the key to guaranteeing a successful voyage. We are deeply honored to be under your employment. Captain, please allow us to serve you with everything we've got!

C: 那么，这里的工作就交给您了——不瞒您说，我在黄金的时刻还有未竟的使命——
E: Now then, I'll leave the work here to you. Truth be told, I have other unattended duties in the Golden Hour...
...Huh?

C: 呃…{F#女士}{M#先生}？您不是说要查询一下系统吗？
E: Er... {F#Madam}{M#Sir}? Did you just say that you'd like to check the system?

C: 宝了个贝的，你以为我想和别人一起行动？巡海游侠一向独来独往，谁承想这回居然让我摊上个赖着不走的跟班！
E: What the fork — you think I WANT to work with someone else? Us Galaxy Rangers always work solo. Never thought I'd have to put up with someone clinging to me like this!

C: 为什么你手下的人少，原因应该不用我来点破吧？与其质疑别人的管理能力，不如花时间反思一下自己的工作习惯吧？
E: You don't need me to explain to you why you have so few people working for you. Instead of blaming others' management skills, you should spend a little time reflecting on your own work habits!

C: 这里的苏乐达请您都拿去吧，想拿多少就拿多少。只要能协助您做好工作，我时刻愿意效劳……
E: Please take all the SoulGlad here, as much as you want. We're always willing to help you, so long as it helps you perform your job well...

C: 你现在感觉还好吗？
E: How are you doing now?

C: 停、停下！阴暗的巨人族，前方禁止通行！
E: S—Stop! Evil giants have no access here!

C: 我们都是「四尺神子」…
E: We are all the Four-Foot Followers...

C: {NICKNAME}的拍照技术不错嘛，是不是和三月小姐待久了也耳濡目染了？
E: {NICKNAME}'s camera skills aren't too bad. You've been hanging out with Miss March, haven't you, and picked up things from her?

C: （怎么感觉有点累了…原来大堂经理这份工作这么消耗精力吗？）
E: (Why am I feeling a little tired? ...Who knew being a lobby manager could be so tiring?)

C: （硬闯看来不是好主意…还是去启动小小哈努行动的电视机吧。）
E: (Barging in might not be a good idea... I better go activate that Hanu's Adventure television set instead.)

C: 老朽只是醉心匠艺，对争胜斗狠之事的兴趣早已乏了。
E: I am but an old man that has grown to love craftsmanship. My interest in competitions and fighting beasts faded long ago.

C: 青雀，快逃。
E: Qingque, run!

C: 我们也不知道，你们家太卜大人是这个时候到这里吗？
E: How would we know? When did your Master Diviner even get here?

C: 这也是公输师傅说的？
E: Is that what Master Gongshu told you?

C: 突然就不想去上班了。
E: Suddenly, I don't wanna work on the job anymore.

C: （你也说点儿什么吧，我要开始感到愧疚了。）
E: (Say something, or I'll start feeling guilty.)

C: 走吧，我们看看铖杰还有没有别的想去的地方。
E: Let's go. I wanna see if Chengjie has ideas about any other places.

C: 虽然我也很想喝，但是就这样让铖杰看着我们俩嘬饮料…不就本末倒置了嘛。
E: I want to drink some too, but if we only let Chengjie watch us two drinking... Well, it'd be putting the cart before the horse, wouldn't it?

C: 手稿就像是你们仅剩下的联系。
E: That manuscript is all that's left of your bond.

C: 他经历过困难的岁月，看到你孤立无援的样子就像短生种的他在工造司内。
E: He went through hard times, and seeing you isolated and alone reminded him of being a short-life species at the Artisanship Commission.

C: 你也说话太直了……
E: Ha, you don't sugarcoat things, do you?

C: 一动不动，确实很稳定…你真是太客气了，你应该问星槎是不是坏掉了。
E: It's because it isn't moving at all. Thanks for being so considerate of my feelings. In fact, you should ask whether the starskiff is broken.

C: （钟型机动）
E: (Bell maneuver)

C: 莱恩老师也这样说过，公…公输师傅，拜托你了！
E: Master Ryan told me the same thing before. M—Master Gongshu, I really need your help!

C: 我说，如果莱恩师傅能亲口告诉你呢？
E: What if Master Ryan could explain to you face-to-face?

C: 老师！手稿——
E: Master! The manuscript...

C: 我很久没见过那家伙了…希望他这段时间有所成长。
E: I haven't seen him for a while... I hope he's grown up a bit since then.

C: 看，这儿就有一架无人机！不过该怎么判断是不是卡西迪丢的那架呢……
E: Look, there's a drone over there! But how can we tell if it's the one Cassidy lost...

C: 成了！小家伙又能飞了。
E: Done! The little one can fly again!

C: （什么也不说。）
E: (Say nothing)

C: 哈哈哈，我理解你的担心，希儿！但是你得知道，我是个格斗家…不断修炼、不断变强可是我的职责。
E: Hahaha, I understand what you're saying, Seele! But you know, I'm a fighter... It's my duty to keep training and get stronger.

C: 卢卡！喂，卢卡——！
E: Luka! Hey, Luka...!

C: 嗯哼…怪不得。
E: Ha... no wonder.

C: 希望你们两个能找到宝贝！
E: I hope you two find the treasure!

C: 还有还有，连赶两场「盛会」活动，是不是显得有些不务正业了？列车的正事该是恢复星图和航路数据，顺带做些严肃的科考工作吧？
E: But wait, won't it look unprofessional if we attend two ceremonies in a row? Aren't we supposed to be focused on restoring astral charts and doing some serious scientific exploration?

C: 跃迁结束后……
E: After the warp ends...

C: 我们会尽快将这些人犯送往幽囚狱的。
E: We'll make sure these prisoners are sent to The Shackling Prison as soon as possible.

C: 云骑军安抚了人群，随即散去，长街再度恢复了平静。
E: The Cloud Knights calm the crowd, then dispersed, and the street was restored to its peaceful state.

C: 你可别在爷爷面前提这个。爷爷说啦，浮名伤人，徒然惹来挑战和争端。朱明剑士只以全军克捷为荣，不以一己胜利为喜。
E: Just don't mention it in front of Grandpa. He always says that empty titles bring pointless challenges and conflicts. We Zhuming swordmasters pride ourselves on the success of the group over the individual.

C: 我原本也无意留下他的剑，想着趁这次机会把剑还他，不过眼下我改主意了。
E: I didn't intend to keep his sword. I was planning to take this chance to return it to him, but now I've changed my mind.

C: 现在就算了吧！
E: So he can forget about it for now!

C: 斯科特，怎么是你啊！
E: Skott, what are you doing here!?

C: 哇！好厉害～能教教我吗？你都擅长模仿什么动物呀？
E: Whoa, you're amazing! Can you teach me? Which animals can you imitate?

C: 别问了，别问了……
E: J—Just forget it...

C: 尝试按照公司的法条解决问题
E: Try to resolve this according to IPC regulations.

C: 对于我的情况，龙女也无法可施，只是让我「吃点好的」。
E: Well, the Healer Lady couldn't do anything about my condition. She just told me to "enjoy some tasty food."

C: 挂了那么多年号才轮到我！
E: I've been waiting for years for my turn!

C: 这是我为演武仪典的奖品准备的剑匣。其中暂时空空如也，但过不了几日，便有一柄宝剑即将抵达此处，收纳在其中。
E: This sword case is intended for the Wardance's award. It's empty now, but in a few days, a precious sword will be delivered and stored inside.

C: 「狐人大敌」，「永世不赦」，「直至天地荒灭」之类的…我记不住那么多判词，就是那个家伙。
E: "The nemesis of the foxians, who will never be forgiven and shall be imprisoned until the end of the cosmos..." I can't quite remember the exact wording, but yes, the very same Hoolay.

C: 青丘军按照你提供的航路，找到了「鸣火」商会的舰船残骸。很遗憾，里面没有货物，也没有任何幸存者。
E: The Verdant Knights followed the route you mentioned and discovered the wreckage of the Whistling Flames ship. Unfortunately, there were no survivors, and no cargo.

C: 猎人与猎物，将在罗浮仙舟上展开追逐。
E: A pursuit between the hunter and the hunted will soon play out on the Xianzhou Luofu.

C: 哼哼，小少爷真不愧是空想理论派啊！
E: You're quite the theorist, huh?

C: 哎，是毒药还是救命良药，端看医者用心如何。为病人做伐骨洗髓、开膛破腹的手术前，只消一滴，便能让人不知疼痛。但……
E: Well, it depends on how it's used. With just one drop, it's able to numb a patient's body during surgery, making them painless throughout the entire process. However...

C: 以<unbreak>3.0</unbreak>倍率拍摄到清晰证据
E: Take a clear photo of the evidence using <unbreak>3.0</unbreak>× zoom.

C: 应该宰了刚才那三只贱畜的。
E: We should have just killed those lowly beasts.

C: 我曾经见过另一个名叫路君的值守武官，那是在几周之前，押送步离人犯的时候。
E: I encountered a patrol officer named Lujun before. It was a few weeks ago when we were transporting the borisin prisoners.

C: 幻胧渴望建木之力
E: Phantylia was eager to obtain the power of Ambrosial Arbor.

C: 我不相信
E: No, I don't.

C: 罗浮的幽囚狱…与曜青截然不同，竟是被压在水下的。
E: The Shackling Prison on the Luofu... is completely different from the one on the Yaoqing. It's completely underwater.

C: 来历不明的药，我是不会吃的。
E: No, I'm not taking random medicine.

C: 我奉劝诸位及早投降。
E: I suggest you surrender now.

C: 是狱卒，拦住他们！为了呼雷大人，万死不辞！
E: Prison guards, stop them! For our great lord Hoolay!

C: 看首日赛事安排，作为东道主的守擂剑士一口气接下了四场挑战？听说他只是个半大孩子，真的假的？巴铎，你下注哪边赢？
E: I saw the schedule for the first day of the tournament. Can you believe the ringmaster accepted four challenges? And he's just a kid! So, who are you betting on, Bardeau?

C: 怎么，我吃就可以，你吃就不行？
E: Oh? You'd give me time to enjoy a meal but not yourself?

C: 若无生血生肉吞食，步离人便会饥渴难耐，他们虽为长生种，但却更接近掠食的兽类。听说幽囚狱中对呼雷禁绝饮食……
E: Despite being a long-lived species, borisin are actually more like predatory beasts that must feed on raw blood and flesh. I've heard that Hoolay was deprived of food and water in The Shackling Prison...

C: 真是难以想象，七百多年不曾进食饮水，他一定压抑饥饿许久。不知道那位被他劫持的曜青人质能否逃过一劫？
E: It's hard to imagine how he managed to suppress his hunger for over seven centuries. Will the hostage from the Yaoqing be able to avoid being his meal?

C: 你没猜错。在步离人看来，月狂是解放力量的恩赐；但对狐人来说，这是血脉中避之不及的疯狂。曜青的医士们世世代代都有人试图破解这一谜题，但始终不得其法。
E: Exactly. While borisin see Moon Rage as a blessing that unlocks their true potential, foxians see it as an inevitable curse within their bloodline. Countless healers of the Yaoqing have attempted to unravel this mystery, but to no avail.

C: …步离人？在这儿？你认真的吗？
E: ...Borisin? Here? Are you serious?

C: 步离人躲在长乐天，你要把消息带给云骑军。
E: Borisin are hiding in the Exalting Sanctum. You must deliver this news to the Cloud Knights.

C: 首先是那两个天舶司职员。打从我们来到这里，他们就在悄悄观察我们。
E: First, look at those two Sky-Faring Commission staff members. They've been observing us in secret since we arrived here.

C: 唉…啊！彦卿骁卫！还有飞霄将军？
E: Ahh... Ah! Lieutenant Yanqing! And General Feixiao?

C: 根据我的观察，你一直在盯着竞锋舰的方向，所以你发现了什么状况吗？
E: Looks like you've been keeping an eye on the Skysplitter. Have you noticed anything unusual?

C: 说到这个，你可提醒我了，眼下不是讲故事的时候。貊泽，迴星港这边已经放出了「警告」，你这边情况如何？
E: Speaking of stories, you've reminded me that now is not the time for them. Moze, we've sent the "warning" from Stargazer Navalia. What's the situation on your end?

C: 呼雷…你知道身为医士，最可悲的事情是什么吗？
E: Hoolay... do you know the saddest thing about being a healer?

C: 这一切也并没有出乎我的意料。
E: That doesn't surprise me at all.

C: …你还有问题要问吗？
E: ...You have questions?

C: 请问您是受邀参加比赛的选手，还是观赛的观众呢？
E: May I ask, are you an invited contestant, or are you a spectator?

C: 哼，失败者不配知道本姑娘的名字。
E: Hmph. Losers have no right to know my great name!

C: 三月七，站在你面前的是…习练剑法超过两百年的云骑老战士！
E: March 7th... Standing before you is a seasoned Cloud Knight who has practiced swordsmanship for over two hundred years!

C: 但是三月七并不是{NICKNAME}，三月七的精神状况也没有…那么糟糕。
E: But March 7th isn't {NICKNAME}, and her mental condition isn't... that bad.

C: 长椅看着三月七的背影，流下了一滴汗。
E: The bench gazes at March 7th's back as a single bead of sweat drops from it.

C: 听说彦卿骁卫不会登场…
E: I hear Lieutenant Yanqing isn't competing anymore...

C: 爷爷说的倒是轻松，尽给我出些难题。
E: That's easy for my grandfather to say, but this mission doesn't seem so simple anymore.

C: 哎…慌慌张张的。
E: Ah... She's still a nervous wreck.

C: 正是。呼雷出逃，本该立刻终止演武仪典的举行。谁也不能预料这头凶兽会袭向哪里，似仪典这样的节庆，反而更容易成为他逞凶的目标。
E: Precisely. When Hoolay escaped, we should have canceled the Wardance immediately. No one can predict where a wild beast like him will attack, yet festivals and celebrations like this are likely to become targets.

C: …彦卿师父，你怎么回来了？
E: ...Master Yanqing, what are you doing here?

C: 就连你们所{RUBY_B#「巡猎」的岚}信奉的神{RUBY_E#}也无法将她从这个结局中拯救出来…相反，祂倒是可以为她带去解脱。
E: Not even {RUBY_B#Lan, The Hunt}your God{RUBY_E#} can save her from this fate... Although, THEY can lead her to liberation.

C: 你竟然没把计划告诉我…
E: I can't believe you didn't tell me the plan...

C: 凝梨！跟我一起跑啊！
E: Neergul! Run with me!

C: 我今天随灵砂小姐来，并非为了叙旧。
E: I didn't come here with Miss Lingsha today to reminisce.

C: 你相信灵砂的判断，这焚香里显然做了手脚。得立刻熄灭它才行。
E: You trust Lingsha's judgment. Clearly, the incense has been tampered with. It must be extinguished immediately.

C: 故而长久以来，联盟虚伪地维持着这其中危如累卵的平衡。但我却有超脱困局之道。
E: Thus, the Alliance has deceitfully upheld this precarious balance. However, I have a way to escape from this dilemma.

C: 从建木灾异开始，罗浮仙舟所经历种种变乱，全都与绝灭大君「幻胧」息息相关。
E: From the onset of the Ambrosial Arbor Crisis, the Xianzhou Luofu has experienced numerous disturbances, directly linked to the Lord Ravager Phantylia.

C: 我可从没听人说起过，「十方光映法界」连嚼舌根的密谈都能算得一清二楚。看来元帅不止派了两位将军前来罗浮观礼，还有第三位客人不请自来啊。
E: I've never heard anyone mention that the Deca-Light Reflection Barrier could eavesdrop on even the quietest whispers. It appears that the marshal sent not just two generals to the Luofu but an uninvited third guest as well.

C: 这家伙是谁？你的保镖？
E: Who's this person? Your imperial guard?

C: 现在每当朕落单时，都有可能被那伙人袭击。有几次他们甚至下了死手，让朕从梦境中醒了过来——这和刺王杀驾有什么区别！
E: Each time I'm alone, I would be attacked by those scoundrels. There have been a few times when their attacks were even fatal, waking me from the Dreamscape — how is this any different from regicide!

C: 全体目光向我看齐！
E: Everyone! Eyes on me!

C: 危险总与无名客有关系。
E: The Nameless and danger are never too far departed.

C: 现在自责也于事无补，快走吧！
E: No point blaming yourself now. Let's go!

C: 那座城市五年内发生了三次叛乱。你要朕相信叛乱已经「平息」了？开什么玩笑！
E: Three rebellions have occurred in that city within five years. You want me to believe that the insurgency has been quelled? Cease with your jesting!

C: 既然你这么喜欢帕斯德鲁克…来人，把这个老东西送到帕斯德鲁克上空，和炸弹一起扔下去！
E: Since you love Pasdrak that much... Men, take this wizened thing up to the airspace of Pasdrak and toss him out along with the bombs!

C: 革命党人冲进皇宫时，朕已经收拾好财产，逃亡匹诺康尼了。
E: When the revolutionaries barged into the palace, I had already packed my valuables and fled to Penacony.

C: 能。
E: It will.

C: 所以朕必须成为下一位皇帝，确保善意尽可能长久地留存。
E: Hence, I must become the next Emperor, to ensure that kindness will endure.

C: 我这就走，别动粗…
E: I'm leaving. Don't you dare lay a finger on me...

C: 提问：家族采用何种手段延长了卡尔德隆•查德威克的寿命？该手段是否得到了星际医学组织的认可，并且符合匹诺康尼自身拟定的规制？
E: Question: By what means did The Family extend the lifespan of Calderon Chadwick? Has that means been approved by the Interastral Health Organization? Does it comply with the regulations of Penacony?

C: 我理解了，查德威克博士。我会协助你拿到那样药物。
E: I understand, Dr. Chadwick. I'll get you that drug.

C: 我从他们派来的人口中得到了一些零碎的消息。再加上我自己的推断…公司可能计划着等待我的肉体死亡后，对我大脑中残留的忆质做手脚。
E: I've gathered bits and pieces of info from the people they sent. Combined with my own deduction, I believe the IPC might be scheming to tamper with the memoria left in my brain after the death of my physical body.

C: 如此发展下去，公司总有一天会再次掌握「虚数脉冲」的技术，并垄断它。到头来，我的一切努力都会变成徒……
E: At this rate, IPC will one day regain control of the Imaginary Pulse's technology and monopolize it. My efforts will all be in vain when the time comes...

C: 他为什么会在梦中？
E: Why is he in the dream?

C: 是你在恶作剧吗，螺丝？！
E: Are you playing a prank, Screwllum!?

C: 你向湛蓝爵士转述了在匹诺康尼发生的一切——关于「秩序」的阴谋，以及「钟表匠」的遗愿。
E: You tell Dr. Blues about all that has happened in Penacony — about the Order's conspiracy, and the last wishes of the Watchmaker.

C: …等等，喂，你要干什么？！
E: ...Wait, hey, what're you doing!?

C: 打扰一下，{F#小姐}{M#先生}——请问您认识建造这里的筑梦师吗？
E: Excuse me, {F#miss}{M#sir} — do you know the Dreamweaver that built this place?

C: 话题扯远了。看来奥尔拉确实在这附近，我想与他见一面，能麻烦您带路吗？
E: I digress. It seems like Orla is indeed nearby, I wish to meet with him, could I trouble you to show me the way?

C: 回忆对小鸟虚构的身体来说太过沉重，他希望你就此放手。
E: Memories are too heavy for a birdie's illusory body. He hopes you can let him go.

C: 你回来的速度比我想象中快许多，调查已经结束了吗？
E: You're back faster than I thought. Is the investigation over already?

C: 哦，瞧瞧谁来了？连跟黄金裔并肩作战的英雄都站在我这边——果然公道自在人心。
E: Oh, look who's here? Even the hero who fought alongside the Chrysos Heirs stands with me — justice does lie in the hearts of people.

C: 那是因为站在你身后的并非只有支持者，拉莱德大人，他们也可能是为了看你出糗。
E: That is because those standing behind you aren't just mere supporters, Lord Liluder, they may be anticipating your fall from grace.

C: 所以，你到底是谁？
E: So, who exactly are you?

C: 那可不能白跑。
E: It can't be a wasted trip.

C: 放心，这儿的食物都是奥赫玛最好的。就算不是最好，也是数一数二的。
E: Don't worry, the food here is Okhema's finest. Even if it's not, it's still pretty up there.

C: （如果我选择中立，就没法在二人接下来的辩论中插嘴。我真要放弃站台发言的机会吗？）
E: (If I choose to stay neutral, I won't be able to jump into their debate. Do I really want to abandon a chance to speak at the podium?)

C: 你说处死，问过元老的意见了吗？这案子到底该怎么判，可不是你能决定的，不然我们还站在这搞什么公民法庭？趁早回家算了。
E: You speak of execution, but have you asked for the Elder's opinion yet? If you had the final say on this trial's outcome, why would we even need to stand here in front of a public court? Might as well call it a day.

C: 别忘了，拯救这里的黄金裔英雄中还有几个外邦人呢！
E: Don't forget, the Chrysos Heirs who saved this city contain outlanders!

C: 人早晚是要死的，这座城邦也终会被攻破——我见过太多类似的事了。
E: Everyone dies sooner or later. This city will inevitably fall as well. I have seen such similar outcomes too many times.

C: 随着最后一个音节落地，伊特罗元老伸出手，制止了拉莱德的进一步发言。公民们回味着刚才的交锋，感到义愤填膺……
E: As the final syllable drops, Elder Etro stretches out his hand and halts Liluder's subsequent elaboration. The citizens recall the exchange that just happened, indignation aflame within them...

C: 希望各位公民在判断时考虑到吾师面对的难题，不要对施助者过于严苛。永恒之城不应该是一座冰冷如铁的城邦。
E: I implore the citizens to take into account the challenges my teacher faced when passing judgment, and not to be overly harsh on those who offered aid. The Eternal City is not a cold and iron-hearted state.

C: 你好，元老伊特罗。我来得应该还不算太迟。
E: Hello, Elder Etro. I think I'm not too late.

C: 自从蛮神陨落，这只眷属就时常在附近徘徊，袭击戍卫与过往的商队，这次倒霉的就是「阿尔戈商队」的老板伊阿宋。
E: Ever since the fall of the savage god, this Titankin has been roaming the surrounding area, attacking guards and passing trade caravans. This time, it was Iason, leader of the Argo Caravan, who fell victim.

C: 英雄，城外黑潮凶险，我们普通人也帮不上什么忙，只能请您多加小心了。
E: Hero, as the black tide outside the city is perilous, we mere citizens can offer you no assistance. All we can do is ask you to take great caution.

C: 导航…哦，你是说「神启石镜」吧，这我可帮不了你。
E: GPS... Oh, you mean the "Stone Mirror of Revelation." I cannot help you there, I'm afraid.

C: 你听说过阿卡迪亚吗？
E: Have you heard of Arcadia?

C: 尼卡多利的孩子们，将你们受辱的姊妹带往监牢，让她与另一个懦夫一同等待命运的裁决吧。
E: Children of Nikador! Take your humiliated sister to the prison and have her await her fated punishment alongside her fellow coward.

C: 怕啥？咱们是后方，背锅也是前线背…等会儿，这是谁在偷听呢。
E: What are you so worried about? We're backline forces, and the frontline is always going to be the scapegoat... Wait, someone is listening.

C: 战。
E: Fight.

C: 有人闯进来了——穿着不是悬锋城的士兵，你是何人？
E: Someone has broken in... You do not wear the armor of a Castrum Kremnos soldier. Who are you?

C: 天谴之矛串串香！
E: Lance of Fury skewers!

C: 不过还有另一个原因，那便是我对你的言行感到不快！
E: However, I have another reason. Your words and actions displease me!

C: 对了，你刚刚提到新的《金毯密传》，这次的内容有提到阿卡迪亚吗？
E: So, this Secret of the Golden Carpet you mentioned, does it say anything about Arcadia in it?

C: 奥赫玛的城中…有好多这样的蝴蝶。
E: The city of Okhema... There are so many butterflies here.

C: 诸位，请不要当面侮辱我们的客人。
E: Everyone, do not insult our guest!

C: 欧洛尼斯送的小狗不够可爱！
E: The puppy Oronyx gave me wasn't cute enough!

C: 而伴随纷争的，是死亡。我听说无数的将士死在圣城前，那血流似溪水，几度要使冥河示现。
E: And with strife, comes death. I hear that countless warriors have died before the holy city. Their blood flows like a stream, almost summoning the River of Souls to Earth.

C: 没错，你是叛徒，你背叛了悬锋城，背叛了自己的同袍父兄，还想抛下这救赎你的圣城，你是不忠的叛徒。
E: That's right. You are a traitor. You betrayed Castrum Kremnos and your family. Then you set to abandon the holy city that saved you. You are exactly the traitor they made you.

C: 在那之后，我做了一个漫长的梦。
E: From that moment on, I've been into a long dream.

C: 失去生命的眷属尸首与碎石无异。你知道过不了多久，悬锋城带着血腥味的风会卷起沙砾，将这块巨石磨蚀成尘，飘往远方。
E: Having lost her life, the Titankin's body is no different from a pile of rubble. You know that before long, the blood-stained winds of Castrum Kremnos will whip up the surrounding gravel and reduce it to dust, carrying it far into the distance.

C: 希望阿格莱雅能保管好它…
E: I hope you will keep it safe, Lady Aglaea...

C: 先别走…
E: Don't go...

C: 那个幽灵？
E: That ghost?

C: 年幼的你无法理解，在神谕之外，{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}究竟是以何种方法向你揭示了那些命运。
E: Your young self would not understand what methods {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#} employed to reveal those destinies to you beyond the prophecy.

C: 你必须成为圣女，否则，她将在黑潮中死去。
E: You have to become the Holy Maiden, or else she'll die in the black tide.

C: 命运或许并不存在。
E: Destiny might not exist after all.

C: 但是，你或许可以选择一些不同寻常的方法，譬如，让某位「伙伴」窥探她的记忆……
E: However, you can choose a more unconventional method. For example, letting a fellow companion delve into her memories...

C: 听克拉拉说，她用洞洞机帮忙挖矿，结果功率太大摔坏了腿。恐怕…再也不能坐星际航班了。
E: I heard from Clara that she was using Diggertron to help with mining, but the power was too much, and she fell and broke her leg. I'm afraid... she won't be able to take interstellar flights anymore.

C: 感觉你把它当成童话了…
E: Feels like you're treating this like a fairy tale...

C: 一朝离乡背井，百年辗转飘零。又是那，千劫轮回、万火同归。
E: Once he left his homeland, and for a hundred years he wandered in exile. Again came the cycle of a thousand tribulations, the return of ten thousand flames to one.

C: 这不愿为虎作伥的痴儿，从头走起，再赴漫漫逐火路；重入轮回，引火焚身作柴薪。
E: This stubborn youth, unwilling to serve as the wolf's thrall, began anew, setting forth once more upon the endless road of Flame-Chase. He entered the cycle again, taking flames into his own flesh as kindling.

C: 把故事讲给我听，我教你做小众的艺术吧。只要沉浸在自己的世界里，就不会受伤。
E: Tell me your story, and I'll teach you about niche art. As long as you immerse yourself in your own world, you won't get hurt.

C: 我相信翁法罗斯。
E: I believe in Amphoreus.

C: 贝洛伯格没受到什么影响，太好了。
E: Belobog wasn't affected much, thank goodness.

C: 你快替我找来3个「超镍零件」，作为回报，老爹的独门手艺、银河至味「卡利白」，那是一定管够！
E: Now hurry, find me 3 Ultra Nickel Parts. In return, you can have all the Kapo-Kali you want!

C: 怎么样怎么样，想到了嘛？
E: So? Have you got anything?

C: 这事儿听着就古怪！
E: It definitely sounds bizarre!

C: 虽然不知道你是谁，不过你来的正好，我有件私事想请教你——
E: I don't know who you are, but since you're here, I wanna ask you something—

C: 在目光锁定的刹那，他的脑电波像是被某种第三方信号劫持。就这样，他鬼使神差的靠近，最后…按下了冲水键！
E: The moment he laid his eyes on the toilet seat, it was as if his brainwaves were hijacked by a third party. And that was how he ended up approaching the toilet seat and... flushed!

C: 你好歹用心编一下…
E: At least try to make it a good story...

C: 醒来之后的实验室位置。
E: Where was the lab you woke up in?

C: 是不喜欢那个颜色吗？
E: You didn't like the color after all?

C: 我之前委托过几个关系不错的银鬃铁卫，让他们在出外勤的时候顺便帮我留意野生动物的动向。
E: Previously, I asked some Silvermane Guards I knew to help me look for traces of wild animals when they go out on patrol.

C: 「朋友」不是东西……
E: A "friend" isn't a thing...

C: 华劳斯现年三十八岁又两个月，没有担任任何公职，传闻他整日游手好闲，莱姆士汀家族也不是很喜欢他……
E: Wallace is <unbreak>38</unbreak> years and 2 months old. He's never held a public office, and I hear he's a complete loafer. The Limestein family doesn't appear to like him much either...

C: 你怎么这么了解…
E: How do you know so much about...

C: 华劳斯？你是说莱姆士汀家的那个华劳斯？
E: Wallace? You mean Wallace Limestein?

C: 你先看看这张照片。
E: Please take a look at this photo first.

C: 你看——「一个人的诞生，就像垃圾落在垃圾桶中，发出悦耳动听的声音，令人心生喜悦」，多么精妙的比喻呀，我仿佛从中读出了古代战争年代的苦涩……
E: Look — "The birth of a person is like rubbish landing in the trashcan. There's a pleasant sound and it brings joy to people." What a wonderful metaphor. It's like I am reading about wars in the distant past...

C: …哎呀，不管了，还是用老办法吧！一二三四五，矿区打地鼠；地鼠跑得快，伤筋又动骨……
E: ...Ugh, whatever, I'll stick to my old trick! Eeny, meeny, miny, mole, catch a little mole by its toe. If he hollers, let him go, eeny, meeny, miny, mole...

C: 唔…这么一想，我们的人手会不会不够呢？得想个办法，把整个磐岩镇——不对，是要把整个下层的小孩子全都纳入鼹鼠党的旗下，嘿嘿！
E: Hmm... in that case, we probably need more people. We gotta figure out a way to recruit all the kids in Boulder Town — no, the whole of Underworld, hehe!

C: 只是复述虎克老大的原话而已——这才不是重点！
E: That's beside the point! The point is to recite the original words spoken by Boss Hook!

C: 带路吧。
E: Lead the way then.

C: 收件人是匹克…哦，就是那个一直睡懒觉的矿工叔叔吧？
E: The recipient is Peak... Oh, I guess is the miner who is always sleeping in.

C: 荣誉队员，快把快递交给老奶奶吧！
E: Honorary member, hand over the package to grandma now!

C: 湛蓝星…
E: The Blue...

C: 这…这写出来谁信啊？算了，我还是写点稍微靠谱的东西吧。
E: This... Who would believe this? Forget it, I'll just write something a little more realistic.

C: 我和叫史瓦罗的机器人对战过…
E: I fought against a robot named Svarog...

C: 莉拉…你可千万不要看不起老爹啊，哎。
E: Lila... Please don't be ashamed of Daddy! *sigh*

C: 请问，这些花是打算送给谁的？
E: May I ask who these flowers are for?

C: 从我记事起，老爸就喜欢在我面前逞英雄、说些不着边际的大话…他大概是觉得，如果自己在部队里没有获得什么名头，家人的脸上也会没光吧？
E: Ever since I can remember, he always liked to act like a hero in front of me and exaggerate things... He probably thinks that if he doesn't achieve something big in the Silvermane Guards, he will be a shame to the family.

C: …哎呀，你也知道我脸皮薄，哪能拒绝这么真情实意的邀请！
E: ...Ah, you know me, too shy to turn down such a sincere request!

C: 当然！我这就帮您挑上几株……
E: Sure! One moment, please.

C: 是帮「你」递交。
E: Submit the paper for "you," you mean.

C: 当然，也请您不要气馁，继续加强学习。到那时再来挑战吧。
E: Of course, you shouldn't be discouraged! Keep working on your studies, and then come back to try again.

C: <unbreak>162</unbreak>
E: <unbreak>162</unbreak>

C: 题目比预想中要难…
E: This is harder than I thought...

C: 咳咳…这也就是个初步的想法，三分钟热度罢了！「大宇宙时间隧道」才是我毕生的心血结晶…我不会轻易放弃的！
E: Ahem... it's just an idea, still way too undercooked! My big universe time tunnel theory is still the masterpiece brainchild of all my life's work... I can't just throw that all away!

C: 嗯…很遗憾，回答错误。
E: Hmm... I'm afraid that's incorrect.

C: 前几天小女子在后台听到塔米拉小姐抱怨说，家里的加热器坏掉了…既然加热器坏了，那她一定会去机械屋修理。
E: A few days back, I heard Tamila complaining backstage that her heater at home is broken. That being the case, she'll definitely go to the workshop to get it fixed.

C: 并非是舞台上的角色和演出塑造了她独一无二的气场，而是舞台下，她对生活的热爱，将她的灵魂变成了一颗璀璨的宝石~
E: It's not her character and performance onstage that shape her unique soul, but rather it's her offstage everyday love for life that makes her so precious and dazzling~

C: 别这么说，能不能用来赚钱，可不是评价艺术水平优劣的标准。
E: Don't say that! Good art isn't determined by whether or not you can make money off of it.

C: 哎，算了算了，回头想起来再说吧。总之请收下我的谢礼！
E: Never mind. I'll get to it when I remember. Anyways, please accept my thanks!

C: 话说回来，我手里有个战前留下的小玩意，能与人隔空通讯，还能凭空留下周遭的画像。只可惜它已经坏了，如今也没人懂得修理的技术……
E: Hmm, I do have a gadget with me from before the war. It can help us talk to people across the skies and memorialize your surroundings in images. Pity it's broken now, and no one knows how to fix it anymore...

C: 最开始的那段时间根本联系不上他，但后来我从亲戚那里得到了他的电话，也便有了联络，嚯嚯。
E: At first, I couldn't find him at all. Then I got his contact number from a relative and got back in touch, haha.

C: 你怎么了？
E: What's wrong?

C: 他们马上回来，你要乖乖等着。
E: They'll be back soon. Just wait right here.

C: 裂界的回响也能吃饭吗？
E: Can Fragmentum echoes eat?

C: 哦？这难道是你的设计图纸？介意让我观摩观摩吗，大兵？
E: Oh, are these your design blueprints? Mind if I have a look, soldier?

C: …有种跑腿的预感。
E: ...Sounds like a menial job to me.

C: 这毫无疑问是一个漂流瓶，还是漂洋过海的那种。
E: This is undoubtedly a drift bottle, one that has crossed the ocean, too.

C: …你只是生气了，对吧？
E: ...You're just angry, aren't you?

C: 海边的陌生人笔直地离开了海岸。那天，你仍不知道「放生原创故事」到底是什么意思。
E: The stranger from the shore turns and leaves the beach. On that day, you still have no idea just what "unshackling original stories" meant.

C: 好家伙，可让我抓到放生帮了！
E: At long last! I've finally caught an Unshackled in the act!

C: 辛苦你了，这是你应得的报酬。
E: Good work, here are your well-deserved remuneration.

C: 手、手枪？这不是一本书吗？
E: P—Pistol!? I thought this was a book?

C: （漂流瓶也不知道去哪了。看来海滩也没有其他情况了，巡逻就到此结束吧。）
E: (I have no idea where the drift bottle went. It seems there is nothing else out of the ordinary along the beach. I'll end my patrol here.)

C: 美好的爱情。
E: A perfect romance.

C: 来来来，先喝这杯试试，你若是觉得这一杯还不够滋味，别急，喝了这一杯接着还有一坛子呢。
E: Here, feel free to give it a try, and if you feel like drinking more, there's plenty where that came from.

C: {NICKNAME}你没事吧？你这怎么喝完就睡着了，睡就睡吧还说梦话，这也忒……
E: Are you all right, {NICKNAME}? You fell asleep right after drinking the tea, and you were even talking in your sleep. This is just...

C: 这「烈焰浓茶」新品，已经按照你先前的建议，保证「燃」味十足。
E: This is the new flavor for Flaming Potent Tea. I've followed your suggestions from last time, and this one is sure to lift your spirits with its spicy kick.

C: 你找我是有什么事吗？
E: Did you want something?

C: 「蛊惑之手」的广告牌，设计者想表达的思路一目了然——趁着你目光被吸引住的工夫，扎格列斯就会把你的钱包顺走。
E: The Bewitching Hands' signboard. The designer's thought processes are clear — while your eyes are distracted, Zagreus would pilfer your purse.

C: 此处日色正好、气氛宜人，鲜果与秘酿齐备，只待一位有缘人来消磨一段慵懒的时光。
E: The sun here is just nice, soaked in a pleasant vibe, fresh fruit and ambrosia galore, awaiting that one fated person to while away idyllic moments.

C: 「断造、修里、打摩，乒器、凯甲、工巨，卖、定制，回收。」…其他的你也看不懂了。
E: "Forging, repairs, grinding, weaponry, armors, tools, selling, custom products, recycling." ...You don't recognize the rest of the words.

C: 「各位客人：受黑潮影响，云石旅舍已被元老院征用，负责临时安置避难的外邦人。恢复原业务时间另行通知。」
E: "Dear Guests: Due to the black tide, the Marmoreal Inn has been requisitioned by the Council of Elders to function as a temporary shelter for outlanders. Restoration of normal business services will be announced at a later date."

C: 餐桌
E: Dining Table

C: 据称，她在最近一次犯罪时，目击到一位神秘的女士正在和异问魔交谈。该女性身着糖果色长裙，容貌难以分辨。
E: According to reports, during her most recent vandalism attempt, she saw a mysterious woman conversing with an Inquisition Spirit. This woman was wearing a candy-colored dress, but her face was not clearly visible.

C: 最后的圣城在你眼前展开，阳光掠过负世泰坦之肩洒向人间，奥赫玛人皆可窥见那宏伟的身影——
E: The last holy city lays before you, as the sun, on the shoulder of the Worldbearing Titan, shines down on humanity. All Okhemans can catch a glimpse of the majestic silhouette...

C: 「嘘，静静地听，黑潮在疯笑。待太阳再度熄灭，它们要倾巢而出。」
E: "Shhh... Listen to the black tide's maniacal laugh. They will come out in droves when the sun goes down again."

C: 火山为座的巨湖
E: The Great Lake Cradled by a Volcano

C: 随着时日推移，又有什么成为了往日的一部分，不复存在。
E: With every passing day, something else becomes a part of the past, never to exist again.

C: 据说学者们设计这些荷叶浮台的初心，是为了让荷叶上的露水能洗涤求知者的困惑。不过现在看来，它们更像是漂浮在废墟上的救生筏。
E: It is said that the original intent behind designing these lotus leaf platforms was to let the dew upon them cleanse the doubts of seekers. But now, they seem more like lifeboats drifting amidst ruins.

C: {NICKNAME}当上了树庭之王。
E: {NICKNAME} has become the Sovereign of the Grove.

C: 呵…辅祭大人，你只是怕布利萨王绝望之下收回进奉的大笔钱财吧？
E: Hah... Sir Acolyte, you're just concerned that the King of Bulsa will take back the large amount of money he paid in his desperation, aren't you?

C: 你们如何摆弄神谕，我早已无从过问。
E: I have never overly pried into how it is that you manipulate these prophecies.

C: …怎么会，黑潮怪物围过来了…什么时候把大家都……
E: No... When did the black tide monsters... The others... they're all...

C: 你是懂得保留一丝钝感的。
E: You've mastered the art of maintaining a bit of insensitivity.

C: 你有孩子吗？
E: Do you have children?

C: 哎呀哎呀，人类如果想要认真生活，可真是太难了。
E: Oh dear. If humans want to live seriously, it's so hard!

C: …还是说你一直坐在这里，未曾离开？刚才你凑近圣烛的经历不过是一时的想象。
E: ...Or have you been sitting here the entire time, never having left? Was your encounter with the holy candle merely a fleeting illusion?

C: 本狮从不拒绝真诚的夸赞。异乡的勇士，大胆说出你的答案吼！
E: I never turn away genuine praise. Warrior from outlands, boldly speak your answer!

C: 嗯…<color=#dbc291ff>「艾格勒的启目集」附近</color>……
E: Hmm... <color=#dbc291ff>near "Aquila's Enlightenment"</color>...

C: 嗯…<color=#dbc291ff>启蒙王座的壁画前</color>……
E: Hmm... <color=#dbc291ff>before the mural of the Luminary Throne</color>...

C: 我找齐了这里的所有若虫。
E: I have gathered all the nymphs here.

C: o((='ω´= )っ「那就记得多检查，不要等问题豹露了才来找豹豹欧~」)∋
E: o((='ω´= )っ "Then remember your regular check-ups! Don't let it get sealrious and then come running for me~" )∋

C: \派对/  \狂欢/ ！
E: \Partying partying/ \Yeah/!

C: 你感到一阵晕眩。
E: You feel a rush of dizziness.

C: 我在别的地方也见过它……
E: I've seen it somewhere else...

C: 嘿…没什么，就是想告诉你——我可不怕。不过就是去和那位蜗居公主团聚罢了，能有多吓人？
E: Heh, it's nothing, I just want to tell you that I'm not. I'll simply reunite with Princess Homebody, that's all. What's there to be scared of?

C: 记忆的残像沉默不语，因为这是不曾发生过的对话。
E: The shadow of the memory remains silent, for this conversation never truly occurred.

C: 云层游移，雨水落下，溪涧流淌，河流逝去。
E: The clouds drift, the rain falls, the streams flow, the rivers pass...

C: 出去闯荡一番挺好的。哪怕什么都学不到，也比在家种麦子更能涨见识。
E: Heading out into the world is not a bad idea. Even if you don't learn a thing, it still beats staying home growing wheat.

C: 总有些东西是刻进人们DNA里的——就比如即便世殊时异，翁法罗斯壁画的美术风格也如出一辙。
E: Some things must be etched into our DNA. Like how, no matter how much the world changes, the art style on the Amphoreus murals looks exactly the same.

C: 注意步伐！舞场即战场！
E: Mind your footwork! The dance floor is just another battlefield!

C: ……抱歉，我无法…回头。
E: ...I'm sorry. I cannot... turn back.

C: 当我睡下时，这是「8」。
E: When I'm asleep, it says "8."

C: 此番美景，肯定要邀你共赏喀！
E: A sight this stunning deserves to be shared. Please join me, crrk!

C: 真棒呀…
E: Awesome...

C: 没有，你还差得远呢。
E: No, you are still far from it.

C: 赶快想想办法，{NICKNAME}！
E: Come on, {NICKNAME}, think of something!

C: 好的，随时欢迎你参观那里的工程。
E: Very well, you are always welcome to visit and view the construction project.

C: （还要去追踪失窃的奇物呢，走吧。）
E: (We still have to track down the missing curio. C'mon.)

C: 这东西我见过，但不是我偷的，我连碰的资格都没有呢。
E: I've seen it before, but I didn't steal it. I don't even have the right to touch it.

C: （门禁系统彻底坏了汪！）
E: (The access control system is completely done for, woof!)

C: 少废话，把奇物还回来。
E: Enough of that. Hand over the Curio.

C: 啊？
E: Ah?

C: （帮帮我，{NICKNAME}{F#姐姐}{M#大哥}！）
E: (Help me, {F#Miss}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}!)

C: （这些「阮•梅」造物明明也会吃东西的，它肯定在撒谎！<color=#dbc291ff>我们有什么证据可以打它脸吗？</color>）
E: (These creations of Ruan Mei clearly eat. It's definitely lying!<color=#dbc291ff> What evidence do we have as rebuttal?</color>)

C: 出示
E: Present Evidence

C: 哼，我们手里可是有证据的，你看看这个！
E: Hmph, we have the evidence. Look at this!

C: （我告诉你，你知道你把谁关在里面了吗？那可是 {NICKNAME}！）
E: (Do you know who you have trapped inside? That is {NICKNAME}!)

C: （调查奇物一事算是告一段落了，你接下来打算怎么办？）
E: (The investigation of the Curio has come to an end. What do you plan to do next?)

C: （嗅嗅嗅……）
E: (Sniff sniff...)

C: 很像海盗。
E: Looks like a pirate.

C: 啊对了，人家想起来了，是魔术师啦……
E: Oh, right, I just remembered — that one is a magician!

C: 是否会有一天，{NICKNAME}的样子也会出现在这本书中呢？永远永远，被很多很多人看到。
E: Do you think that one day, your likeness will also appear in this book, {NICKNAME}? Forever and ever, for so many people to see.

C: 也许这就是「故事」的魅力吧，让人流连忘返……
E: Maybe that's the charm of "stories"... They really draw people in and captivate them.

C: 你记得这么仔细？
E: You remember all that?

C: 那可太多啦！难以入睡的夜晚，出神发呆的瞬间，还有…哎呀，不能剧透。
E: Oh, so many examples! Restless nights, distracted daydreams, and... oops, can't spoil everything.

C: 忘了跟你说了，现下流云渡一片混乱。有人趁机用货运星槎运送危险品，也有犯罪分子妄图利用货运星槎偷渡……
E: I forgot to tell you, Cloudford is in chaos now. Some people take advantage of the opportunity to transport dangerous goods with freight starskiffs, and there are also criminals who try to use freight starskiffs to smuggle people...

C: 小鸟转转转！
E: See me going round and round!

C: 老夫就知道你对「匣里流光」感兴趣，哈哈哈哈。正好，老夫刚刚想到了突破容量限制的办法，你刚好可以来试试。
E: Hahaha, I knew you would be interested in Luminflux Pyxis. Coincidentally, I just thought of a way to break through its capacity limit. Let's give it a try.

C: 要是我那些蠢货徒弟能有你这样的干劲儿就好了。
E: If only my blockheaded apprentices have your drive.

C: 我还是觉得金人的设计有些落后——工造司的近地悬浮技术已经这么成熟了，自重那么大的金人为什么还要装上双脚？这不累赘吗！
E: I still feel that the aurumaton's design is a bit backward. As the near-ground levitation technology of the Artisanship Commission matures, why do aurumatons, which are heavy, have to have two feet? Isn't that cumbersome!

C: 这次测试结束之后，老夫我应该会回格物院改改设计了，武器测试能进行得这么顺利真是多亏了你啊。要准备现在开始吗？
E: After this test is over, I should go back to the Sapientia Academe to modify the designs. It is thanks to you that the weapon test can go so smoothly. Ready to get started now?

C: 那再好不过了，我还怕你不肯收报酬呢。
E: That's wonderful. I was afraid you'd turn down any payment.

C: 没想到{NICKNAME}是个好奇心这么重的人呀，呵呵。
E: I never thought you'd be such a curious soul, {NICKNAME}. Heehee.

C: 往好了想吧，在短生种短到不可思议的生命里，能有机会翻身过几天暴富的日子，哪怕就几天，这盼头也足够他们去奔命了。
E: Thinking over it more positively, short-life species have such ridiculously short lives that a chance to be a millionaire — even if only for a few days — is enough to keep them going at it.

C: 占算结果已经拿到，辛苦了。
E: Results obtained. Thanks for your hard work.

C: 占算结果已经拿到，辛苦了。
E: Results obtained. Thanks for your hard work.

C: 请随我来。
E: Come with me.

C: 我们继续占算吧。
E: Let's keep running our divinations.

C: 例行占算准备好了…
E: Routine divination ready...

C: 来吧，我这就展开「寻径指津」，你要多听多看多思考，不懂的就问我……
E: Come, then. I'm about to unfold the Pathfinder. You should listen, observe, and think lots. If you don't understand something, just ask me...

C: 谁说的！
E: Who said that!

C: 来吧。
E: Come on then.

C: 因为圈子素质差。
E: Because the community atmosphere is poor.

C: 很独特的「修复」方式…不是吗？
E: It's a unique method of "repair"... Don't you think?

C: 贵客，请先别着急离开，我还有话要说。
E: My distinguished guest, please don't rush to leave yet. I still have something to say.

C: 这是阿格莱雅女士留给你的奖励，我要回到她身边去了嗡。
E: Here's the reward from Lady Aglaea! I'm going back to her now.

C: 「在夜之瑕玷，光所不能触碰的地方，长龙击碎了神殿，只留下不熄的火光」。
E: "In the blemish of the night, wherein reach not the dawnlight, the Makrodrakon struck the temple, leaving flames untemperable."

C: 嗯…有位织者观仰陈迹，不免吊古伤今。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>布满苔藓的巨大雕塑前</color>感慨于过往的岁月，去那里找找看吧。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who gazes at the ruins, mourning both the past and the present. The golden thread brings tidings: They now stand before <color=#dbc291ff>the giant statue covered in moss</color>, lamenting the passage of time. Go there and find them.

C: 眼下这份预言还不完整，得把它的另一半找出来才行。
E: This prophecy is incomplete. We need to find its other half to uncover the full message.

C: 嗯…有位织者想要挑战天空。金丝带来消息，它正趴在<color=#dbc291ff>雕像装饰物的顶端</color>，打算靠自己的翅膀飞起来…它多半会失败的。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who wishes to challenge the sky. The golden thread brings tidings: They now lie low <color=#dbc291ff>on top of the statue's ornament</color>, yearning to soar on their wings... though they are likely to falter.

C: 呃…咱就算状态不佳，理智也还在，没必要去触这个霉头。
E: Oof... I may be in bad shape, but I still have some sense! There's no need to be getting mixed up in something like that.

C: 当浴池吉祥物。
E: Become a bath mascot.

C: 死人究竟有什么东西能值得一偷？桀桀，要是知道这个，就可以把它藏到「活人的世界」去！
E: What do the dead own that's worth stealing? Hehehe, if we figured that out, we could hide it in the "world of the living"!

C: 桀桀，巴特鲁斯大人之挚友！吾非巴特鲁斯大人，但吾明白，汝在彼之心里有特殊地位。
E: Hehe, noble friend of Lord Bartholos! I am not Lord Bartholos, yet I know of thy special standing in his affections.

C: 不过，在他们决定好猜哪只箱子之后，我并不会马上公布答案，而是打开一个他们没选的空箱子，然后说，「这只箱子是空的。现在，你要不要改变自己的选择？」
E: But after they made their pick, I wouldn't open it just yet. Instead, I'd pop open one of the others — an empty one — and say, "Look! This one's got nothing. Wanna change your pick?"

C: 桀桀桀，你就姑且认为，能在这里见到老巴特鲁斯是世界的小小奇迹吧！反正类似的奇迹你今后还会见到许多。
E: Hehehe... just think of it as a little miracle to see old Bartholos here! You'll start seeing a lot more of us anyway.

C: 嘿，伙计，你来的正好。你说，人类为什么要发明这么残忍的娱乐活动？
E: Hey, buddy, you came at just the right time. Tell me, why do humans invent such cruel entertainment?

C: 紫葡萄？紫葡萄在哪呢？
E: Purple grapes? Where are the purple grapes?

C: 还有还有，第四段最后的那句——「神明想看见世界：因此便有了{RUBY_B#光明}黑暗{RUBY_E#}」…在这里，前辈无法准确把握的泰坦语词意出现了两种截然相反的意思…那究竟代表什么呢？
E: Oh, and the last line of the fourth stanza... "The god wishes to see the world, and so {RUBY_B#light}darkness{RUBY_E#} came into being." The scholar was unable to precisely interpret the meaning of the Titan word here, and it contains two opposing interpretations. What does that mean?

C: 将机械插入「瑟希斯之心」后，它上面亮起了一盏类似发光二极管的小小绿灯。按来古士的说法，接下来只要「略等片刻」即可……
E: After inserting the device into the "Heart of Cerces," a small LED-like green light flickers on. According to Lygus, all that's left to do now is to "wait a little while..."

C: 能找到吗？
E: Can we ever find a soul?

C: 你将刚刚发生的事告诉了祭司……
E: You recount the events to the priest...

C: 这玩意儿能保护些什么？
E: What can this thing even protect?

C: 啊，这是！！！
E: Ah... This is—!!!

C: …即使羽翼尽散，大地生灵的笑靥使人驻足——天空子民的归宿，却仍是那片湛蓝。
E: ...Even with wings scattered, the smiles of the earth's creatures make you stop and look. And the place where Sky denizens belong remains that same blue expanse.

C: 我娘管持明叫「龙裔」。小时候听娘讲的故事里，持明族还都能化身巨龙哩，也不知是不是真的……
E: My mum calls the Vidyadhara "Long's Scions." When I was young, she told me stories of how the Vidyadhara could turn into dragons. I don't know if that's true...

C: 我会保守秘密的。
E: I will keep this a secret.

C: {NICKNAME}，看得见我说话吗？如果看见了，就随便点一下屏幕——
E: {NICKNAME}, can you see this message? If you do, just {LAYOUT_MOBILE#tap}{LAYOUT_CONTROLLER#press}{LAYOUT_KEYBOARD#click} anywhere on the screen —

C: 好一阵沉默，随后是黑塔的叹息：「我还指望祂会出现呢，算啦。我这就关掉『模拟宇宙』，一瞬间的事，你不会有任何感觉。稍后我们在现实里再谈。」
E: There is a long silence, followed by a deep sigh from Herta. "I was expecting THEM to appear. Never mind. I'll switch off the Simulated Universe then. It'll only take a second and you won't feel a thing. Let's chat back in reality."

C: 当然，往深了说，没那么简单…这个项目现在也遇到了很多问题，并不顺利……
E: Of course, if you want to get to the nitty-gritty, it's not that simple... This project has encountered plenty of hiccups along the way. It wasn't all smooth sailing.

C: 到底哪里升级了啦？
E: Just what did you upgrade?

C: 喂，图鉴装置在右边，别迷路了。
E: Hey, the Index is on the right. Don't go the wrong way.

C: 「居然没看见…」你听见黑塔仿佛咬牙切齿地嘟囔，「小小年纪，一点都不知道观察生活……」
E: "You didn't see it..." You can hear Herta muttering angrily with gritted teeth. "You are so young, yet you have no idea how to be observant..."

C: 有多个世界供你选择，难度循序渐进。
E: There are many worlds to choose from, with progressive difficulties.

C: 强化祝福？
E: Enhance Blessings?

C: 不能把现实的经验套用在这种敌人身上，换用新的打法吧。
E: You can't apply real-world experience to this kind of enemy. Let's switch up the rules of the game, then.

C: 数值怎么回事！
E: What happened to the numbers!?

C: 你相信这气味是种交流，攀谈者似古老旧友，而祂们的会晤非凡人可以妄想……
E: You believe the smell is a form of communication, and the speaker is akin to an old friend of yours.

C: 一种多变的声音从唇齿间挤出，如同雾气盖住你的耳朵，其间有上亿种调式音程——一个灰蓝色的影子笼罩住你。祂降身下来，友好地拢抱住琥珀王庞大而分散的头颅；祂似乎身形凑近…你终于听清祂的声音，是帝侯兵器同时发出的合音轰鸣，它们在祂身下如光芒般散开——
E: A voice that speaks in changing tones comes from between the lips and envelopes your ears like mist. In the meantime, there are <unbreak>100</unbreak> million tonal variations, and you are shrouded by a grayish-blue shadow. THEY descend and embrace the massive and scattered head of the Amber Lord. THEY seem to approach you, and you can finally hear THEIR voice clearly. It is a resounding chorus coming from the imperial weapons simultaneously. The weapons spread out beneath THEM like a beam.

C: 你知道那一粒粒跳动的紫焰并不是抚平焦虑的救赎，但你忍不住跌入灯笼诱歌般的温柔中。祂当真是头汹涌的古兽！——并非是曼妙的、旧日铜蓝的、带有海潮般凶猛力量的爱人。你要用理智抵挡这种声音。但你又忍不住…你真的忍不住…想被祂吃掉……
E: You know the flickering purple flames are not the antidote that can alleviate your anxiety, but you can't help being drawn to the gentle singing voice. The Aeon is an outright brutal Leviathan! It isn't a charming lover as powerful as the waves. You must resist the voice, but you just can't help it... You can't help... hoping to be eaten by THEM...

C: 是，我恨我的家庭。
E: Yes, I hate my family.

C: 那些你从未见过的存在。
E: It is an existence you've never seen before

C: 「我见到人类无法想象的奇观…我见到数十种不同的虫类缠绕，交合，而后诞生出全新的旁支；旁支再与旁支结合，恍若一朵变幻形态的玫瑰，花瓣相互耦合。虫群的繁衍恰似花朵散发出不同蜜味的信息素…丑陋与甜美相互堆叠…」
E: "I have seen wonders beyond the scope of human imagination... I have seen dozens of insects intertwine and give birth to entirely new offspring, which in turn weave themselves together like a shape-shifting rose with countless interlocking petals. The reproductive cycle of the Swarm is akin to a flower emitting pheromones and various scents... a breathtaking combination of monstrosity and beauty..."

C: 噢…令人怜爱的*跟屁虫*。
E: Oh... what an adorable *Tagger*.

C: 「贪饕」奥博洛斯于列神之战后期隐遁，下落不明。
E: Oroboros the Voracity vanished during the final phase of the war among Aeons. Their whereabouts remain a mystery.

C: 你用手抚摸他佝偻的背，内心升起一股幽暗的寒意——此地应乃是塔伊兹育罗斯命定的诞育之源与终结之地，但这里只有荒芜一片。
E: You caress touch his arched back with your hand, and a creeping chill rises within you — this should be the land of Tayzzyronth's fated beginning and end, but there is only desolation here.

C: 祂的气息扑在你的脸上，祂的声音变成了一群哭泣的伶人。
E: THEIR scent wafts over your face and THEIR voice changes into a chorus of weeping Mourning Actors.

C: 祂的气息扑在你的脸上，祂的声音变成了金属与黄金互相碰撞而发出的轰鸣。
E: THEIR scent wafts over your face and THEIR voice turns into a cacophonous clash between metal and gold.

C: 祂的气息扑在你的脸上，祂的声音变成了骰蛊里封存的无数记忆重合。
E: THEIR scent wafts over your face and THEIR voice turns into the overlap of countless memories sealed within the dice holder.

C: 一种纯粹的「仇恨」突然涌现。你打量着身边的芸芸众生：这些该受审的「罪名」…欺诈者、双面性的背叛、彻头彻尾的虚伪，以及无知的狂妄……
E: A pure kind of "Hatred" suddenly manifests. You take in the crowd around you. These "crimes" that should be judged... deceivers, two-faced betrayal, absolute hypocrisy, and ignorant egotism...

C: 一种纯粹的「仇恨」突然涌现。你打量着身边的芸芸众生：这些该受审的「罪名」…欺诈者、双面性的背叛、彻头彻尾的虚伪，以及无知的狂妄……
E: A pure kind of "Hatred" suddenly manifests. You take in the crowd around you. These "crimes" that should be judged... deceivers, two-faced betrayal, absolute hypocrisy, and ignorant egotism...

C: 停——不用回答，我不关心，只是随便找个开场白。
E: Stop... I don't need the answer, I don't care for it. It's just something random I say to begin a conversation.

C: 「什么玩意？」黑塔拦住了你，她把模拟宇宙暂停，皱了皱鼻子，「斯蒂芬•劳艾德向我保证——要神圣、庄重地觐见星神，他怎么敢把『觐见装置』做成这样？」
E: "What's the!?" Herta stops you and pauses the Simulated Universe. Her nose scrunches in annoyance as she complains, "Stephen Lloyd promised me that the audience with the Aeons would be done in a sacred and solemn way. Why is the Communing Device done like this?"

C: 「所以…现在你可能听不见什么动静。等到下个位面，『虫潮』开始蔓延时…{NICKNAME}，自求多福啦。」黑塔开始饶有兴致，「不过没关系，我们会看着的。」
E: "So... there's not much action at the moment. When The Swarm starts spreading in the next plane... {NICKNAME}, you'll have to pray for luck to be on your side." With an amused expression, Herta says, "Don't worry. We'll watch over you."

C: 你的思绪被拉回…是时候继续硬着头皮前进了。
E: You snap back to reality... It's time to brace yourself and move on.

C: 但我觉得也够了——最后做个总结，给这次的选题收个尾吧。
E: But I think this is enough. Let's make a final summary and wrap up this topic.

C: 帝皇鲁珀特•其二
E: Rubert the Emperor (II)

C: 有任何避免的机会吗？
E: Is it possible to stop it from happening?

C: 他们就这样进行一次又一次交流，持续时间如宇宙一样亘古。
E: Their interaction kept going on and on for what seemed to be as long as the universe's existence.

C: 判定有机：「精神香料」•其一
E: Judged as Organic: Mental Spices (I)

C: 判定「自我认知」 - 爱情重要。
E: Intra-Cognition Assessment — Love above all else.

C: 判定「自我认知」 - 我是无机。
E: Intra-Cognition Assessment — I am inorganic.

C: 你…是谁？一个飘荡在空间里的幽灵？不不不，从肉体中解脱出来的这个姿态，你们称它为「迷因」。在塔利亚，你的故乡，那个堆满了核废料和变异老鼠的地方，聆听到祈祷的祂点化了你。
E: Who... are you? A ghost, floating here in space? No, no — this liberation from the body is something known as a "meme." It was in Talia — your hometown, with all its nuclear waste and mutant rats — that THEY heard your prayer and revealed THEMSELF to you.

C: 竞拍开始！
E: Let the auction begin!

C: 之后半年，你们的足迹遍及大半颗星球，但从来不在一处地方停留太久，似乎在寻找着什么，又好像在逃避着什么。
E: For the following half a year, your footsteps have traversed the majority of the planet, but not lingered in any one place for too long. It is as if you are searching for something, or perhaps, running away from something.

C: 是人。
E: Humanity.

C: 成为首席学士。
E: Become a chief scholar.

C: 你听到更多声音，「权杖」内的回响，横跨上千光年的无数「权杖」里，同时发出了无数梅尼科的吼声。
E: You hear even more sounds — The echoes within the Scepters. The roars of countless Meniks simultaneously emit from the innumerable Scepters that have crossed thousands of light-years.

C: 「灵感就是这样，只需要一些波澜，就能浮现。正因如此，也很容易消失…」
E: "That's what inspiration is. All it takes is for some ripples to appear. But it is also the reason that it fades away just as easily..."

C: 「知识圆圈，你们或许听过这个概念。但，假如，我是说假如，我们自以为走出了圆圈，实际却一步也没能离开…」相对认知学派的话语渗进帕提维娅的思维，自我怀疑的种子开枝散叶——怎样才能证明自己的正确？在成果出现以前。
E: "The Circle of Knowledge... Perhaps you've heard of this concept before? Although, hypothetically... I'm only talking hypothetically, what if we just think that we have stepped outside our Circle of Knowledge, but actually have not managed to escape at all...?" The words of the School of Relative Cognition seep into Patavia's thoughts as seeds of self-doubt begin to sprout... How can one prove that they are correct before results are seen?

C: 她无数次诘问自己，如果当时走上自我加冕的道路，结局是否会有所不同？庸人与天才的距离，真的无法跨越吗？一定是自己太过平庸。如果接入核心的是那些更伟大的学士……或许他们就能解开那道难题。
E: She had asked herself this question over and over already: Would things have ended differently if she had chosen to crown herself? Is the distance between mundanity and genius really insurmountable? It must have just been that she was too unremarkable. Perhaps if one of the greater scholars of the time had connected to the nucleus... Maybe they could have solved the conundrum themselves.

C: 「你们两个的事情，我向来很关心。」阮•梅的手指搭在实验台上，细微的震动预示飓风将至。她不紧不慢地敞开窗，欣赏那道迫近的飓风。
E: "I've always been concerned about affairs involving you two." Ruan Mei's fingers rest on the lab bench, their subtle vibrations heralding the advent of a hurricane. She leisurely opens the window, admiring the furious gales raiding near.

C: 感冒带来的头疼脑热令决策树向「攻击性」的象限大胆偏斜了百分之二，最终总统签署命令，向邻邦发动战争，无数人因此丧生。
E: The headache and fever brought about by the cold caused the decision tree to boldly tilt towards the "aggression" quadrant by two percent. Eventually, the president signed an order to declare war on their neighboring confederation, resulting in countless deaths.

C: 「我收到了一张邀请函，以鲁珀特的复活作为封蜡。」声音保持着距离，却随时能将你们置于死地，「…以第五位天才加入你们可笑的项目为诱饵。」
E: "I received an invitation with Rubert's resurrection as its seal." The voice keeps its distance but is easily capable of ending you at any moment. "...with the fifth genius joining your laughable project as bait."

C: 有什么可玩的？
E: What's there to play?

C: 理所当然。
E: As expected.

C: 接着，她迟疑几秒，回头看你…僵持几秒后，她叹了口气，从实验台走下来。糕点的清香扑鼻而来。「来了…就正好帮我瞅瞅。这几个图案哪个是『完美作品』？」
E: She hesitates for a few seconds before turning around to look at you... After a moment of tense silence, she sighs and steps down from the bench. The mouthwatering scent of snacks permeates the air. "Since you're here, take a look at these patterns for me, and pick the one you think is the perfect masterpiece."

C: 这一次，你有所心理准备。当你看到栗色卷发的咕咕钟狂热粉丝再次向你走来时，你相信他真的决不放弃——但你也是有备而来！
E: This time, you are mentally prepared for it. When you see the cuckoo clock fanatic with curly chestnut hair walking in your direction, you are convinced that nothing will make him give up. However, you are ready to face him!

C: 你看了看手中紧握的地图…你的行进方向被阻塞了！你正准备绕路离开，却发现它的身旁聚拢着一些刚诞育的*孢子*。一些充满勇气的想法从你的心中绽开……
E: You check the map in your hand... and find that your way ahead is blocked! As you are about to take a detour, you notice some newly born *spores* gathering around the Lord of Eternal Slumber. A daring idea blossoms in your mind...

C: 你居然真的得到了命运的启发。上面写着：「终末」的揭晓…
E: Surprisingly, you have received a genuine revelation from fate. The talisman reads: "The Revelation of Finality..."

C: 你很快意识到，自己遭遇了银河史上第二无解的哲学难题——今天吃什么。
E: You immediately realize that you have encountered the second most challenging philosophical conundrum in the universe — What to eat?

C: 「就这点儿？我邻居家的节肢类保姆都比你们出手阔绰，」主持人狂热的呼喊几乎让你们融化，「再加注一倍，特立独行的寿司飞船，让你和空荡荡的钱包说再见！」
E: "That's it? Even my neighbor's anthropoid nanny spends more money than you." The host's passionate cries almost liquefy you. "Double the stakes. This unique sushi spaceship will spare you from ever being short on credits again!"

C: 你又一次回到修补匠的工房，仿佛对你的来访早有预料，他将一堆零件整齐地排列在桌上，兴奋地哼着小曲。
E: You once again return to the repairman's workshop. As if he had a premonition of your arrival, he lays out a pile of parts neatly on the table as he excitedly hums a little tune.

C: 骤然停滞的木船，在海面溅起波涛，借着星光，你得以看清前方的礁石。法吉娜的眷属们倾倒在其间，幽邃的歌声令你意乱神迷。
E: The abruptly-stopped dinghy splashes waves upon the sea's surface. Under starlight, you catch a glimpse of jagged rocks ahead. Phagousa's kin lie scattered among them, a haunting dirge clouding your mind.

C: 离开。
E: Leave.

C: 打开奇物商店。
E: Open the Curio Store.

C: 我听闻它对天空的屠戮。
E: I have heard tales of their carnage against the sky.

C: 没人真心信仰它。
E: No one truly believes in them.

C: 塞纳托斯不见踪影。
E: Thanatos is nowhere to be seen.

C: 它也曾孤身去往尼卡多利的身前。是时，蛮神正因法吉娜城邦的羞辱而举兵进攻，但满溢之杯却暗中指引子民，以石榴汁酿造琼浆。
E: They once went alone to face Nikador when the savage god was launching an attack on Phagousa's city due to humiliation, but the Chalice of Plenty secretly guided their people to brew divine nectar from pomegranate juice.

C: 当命运的果实坠地，是谁一口咬下，从无中创造出世界？
E: When Fate's fruit fell, who will take the first bite, creating a world from the void?

C: 当命运驻足不前，是谁行于尽头和彼岸，为众神开辟通途？
E: When Fate's Steps Stalled, who walks to the ends and beyond, forging pathways for the deities?

C: 你还要继续抬升吗？
E: Do you ascend further?

C: 唉，好难抉择啊，只能再苦一苦大地兽了，白天去农田，晚上去港口。
E: Decisions, decisions... In the end, you settle on the hardest path of all — both. The dromas will haul crops during the day and transport materials at night.

C: 就像蜂群采集花蜜，爱的羽翼是为那圣树中蛰居的泰坦找寻珍稀的赠礼。
E: Like bees collecting nectar, the wings of love sought rare gifts for the Titan dwelling within the Sacred Tree.

C: 还是星空更好。
E: Starry skies are still better.

C: 「嘻嘻，不用谢啦，喜欢就好。我们一起经历了那么多故事，就当是小小的纪念礼物吧。」
E: "Hehe, no need to thank me! I'm just glad you like it. After all the adventures we've been through together, consider it a little memento."

C: 好了，你回去收拾下东西，明天来我们科室报道吧。
E: Alright, you go tidy up your things then. Come and report to the department tomorrow.

C: 但就在刚才…我真的没想到，竟然能遇到同好！我理解你，真的！我跟你一样，看到箱子就非得上去开一下。
E: But just now... I never thought that I could find someone with the same hobby as me! I'm the same way — when I see a chest, I have to go over and open it.

C: 炖蛋？什么东西要拿来炖蛋？
E: Egg custard? What do you need egg custard for?

C: 崭新的语言涌入你的脑海。你只觉得头昏脑涨，头顶像是压有千斤巨石……
E: A completely new language floods your synapses. You feel dizzy, and a huge boulder seems to be weighing down on your head...

C: 你想起了自己曾做出的选择，你至今也无法确定它们是否会令你感到后悔……
E: You remember the choices you made, and how you still have no idea whether or not you will come to regret them...

C: 「实验」？什么实验？
E: An "experiment"? What experiment?

C: 你去医疗科查查吧？
E: Do you need to get a medical check-up?

C: 空间站有奇怪的气泡…
E: There are strange bubbles at the space station...

C: 空气中悬浮着一丛气泡，七彩的光华流溢其中，恍惚间形成似有深意的画面。靠近时，一个像是黑塔的女声不带感情地低语：可爱的宠物。
E: Bubbles are floating in the air with a colorful glow gliding on their surfaces. For some reason, they form an image that seems to carry a profound meaning. As you approach them, a female voice that sounds similar to Herta's murmurs monotonously, "Cute pet."

C: 这毛球在你们的施工队中广受喜爱，以至于你们几乎人手一只。你当然也有——你管他叫「大橘」——只因为它是橘色的。此刻，它正在你的肩头呼呼大睡呢。
E: These fluff balls are beloved among the construction team, so much so that practically every member has one. Of course, you do, too. You named yours "Big O" because it's orange. Your pet is currently snoring away on your shoulder.

C: 催促的话语戛然而止。正当你心生疑惑，想要回头确认他到底发生了什么事时…却只在黑暗中隐约发觉一张缀满毛发的血盆大口。
E: Ader's words are abruptly cut off. Just as you start to worry and want to turn around to see what happened to him... you faintly make out a giant hairy mouth dripping with blood in the darkness.

C: …幸好有我做点缀嗡~
E: ...But luckily I'm here to do a little embroidery~

C: 「不要靠近，不要靠近…」铁艺栅栏门如是说。
E: "Venture no closer, no closer..." the iron gate seems to say.

C: 我和邻居们都想离开这儿啊…可怎么也没办法打开这大门，只好定时来这儿透透气……
E: The neighbors and I wish to leave this place too... but we can't seem to get it open at all. All we can do is come out occasionally for some fresh air...

C: 喀喀喀喀…前面有可怕的气息传来，像墨汁一样漆黑，满是杀戮的阴冷腥味……
E: Crrk crrk crrk... I'm getting a really terrifying vibe from up ahead. It's jet black with this pungent fishy death smell...

C: 大家怎么还没来？
E: Why aren't they here yet?

C: 你在等人吗？
E: Are you waiting for someone?

C: 换个地方。
E: Find another spot.

C: <size=36>太会藏了吧！</size>
E: <size=36>You've hidden yourself too well!</size>

C: 那、那啥，您别不说话啊……
E: W—Well, say anything please...

C: 那个，你误会了…
E: Umm. I think you've got the wrong impression...

C: 四秒？
E: Every 4 seconds?

C: 究竟是谁设计出来的？到底要怎么过去啊喀！
E: Who designed this? How do we get through!

C: 什么？居然真的没有了，这可是大凶之兆啊！怎么会这样喀……
E: What? It's really gone? This is an omen of great woe! How could this have happened...

C: 一定是你在捣鬼吧，{RUBY_B#扎格列斯}两面窃贼{RUBY_E#}！
E: You're pulling my leg aren't you, {RUBY_B#Zagreus}you two-faced thief{RUBY_E#}!

C: 不行，这点数据根本得不出准确的结论，要不再尝一口吧喀……
E: Ugh, these data are not nearly enough for accurate conclusions. Maybe I should take one more taste, crrrk...

C: 好漂亮的蝴蝶…
E: How gorgeous these butterflies are...

C: 您好！欢迎来到贝洛伯格的「后巷」！
E: Hello! Welcome to Belobog's "back alley"!

C: 你没事了？
E: You're all right now?

C: 哼哼，让我试试就知道啦！
E: Heh heh. Let's see and find out!

C: 不错，思路清奇。于是，你挺起腰板，站到了桌子后……
E: Nice. That's some fresh thinking. So, you stand up and get behind the table...

C: <size=36>回家睡大觉咯！</size>
E: <size=36>Go home and get some sleep!</size>

C: 大家都躲好了吗？我要来抓你们了哦！
E: Ready or not, here I come!

C: 你出多少？
E: How much you got?

C: 要是他们真的懂，就会明白现在逃跑也无济于事了嗡……
E: Otherwise, they'd know running away now won't change anything...

C: 嘿嘿嘿，路过的{F#小美女}{M#小帅哥}，停一下，停一下。
E: Hehehe. Hey, {F#beautiful}{M#handsome}, stop right there.

C: 哎哟哟哟。你有什么心思，我会不明白吗？你跟我都不是什么好鸟……
E: Hey now. What's on your mind? Think I won't understand? You and I are bad birds of a feather...

C: 她在等你回去呢。
E: She is waiting for you to return.

C: 哎，多么嘴硬的一个人，嘴上说着无所谓，心里却在着急。
E: Ah, sharp words. Your words say you don't care, but your heart is frantic.

C: 你的喜好真的好奇怪哦。
E: You've got strange tastes, that's for sure.

C: 这很重要吗？
E: Is it very important to you?

C: 与其在这里担惊受怕，不如率先出击。你向来是横冲直闯的狂战士，擅自将你定性为盗贼游侠是对你的羞辱。冲吧，打完恶龙，这些财宝都是你的了。
E: Rather than being scared, it's better to just strike first. You've always been a rampaging berserker, and it'd be a disgrace to position yourself as a dextrous rogue. Bring it — just defeat the dragon, and all that treasure is yours.

C: 快退后！人类，这不是你应该插手的战斗。
E: Step back! Human, this is not your battle!

C: …你道歉没用，除非你们派景元将军亲自过来道歉。
E: ...You can't weasel your way out of this one, unless you send General Jing Yuan himself to apologize.

C: 你要是敢直接开打，我就敢提前开始哭！
E: If you dare to start a fight, I'll burst into tears first!

C: 老大，{F#她}{M#他}想求饶，要我说呀，可不能饶了{F#她}{M#他}。
E: Boss, {F#she}{M#he} is begging for mercy. I don't think we should give it to {F#her}{M#him}.

C: 我们都是负责<unbreak>10</unbreak>个花盆，凭什么你就能多拿一些？
E: Both of us planted ten pots of flowers. Why should you get more?

C: 商会清单该交给商会的人做？
E: Shouldn't you hand over the guilds' list work to the guild to do themselves?

C: 啊…这温度…这温度…真是恰到好处喀！
E: Ah... this temperature... is just perfect!

C: 功德比赛，正式开赛！
E: The Merit Tournament... officially begins!

C: 你是？
E: And you are?

C: 双手抱臂一下。
E: Cross both arms.

C: 我也看到了你的记忆。
E: I saw your memories, too.

C: 我不想让你受伤，你先好好躺着，这件事咱们后再谈谈。
E: I don't want you to get hurt. Just rest for now. We'll talk about it later.

C: 难道你就忍心用一枚大规模杀伤性武器去亵渎他们的信仰吗？你忍心打破这片宁静吗？
E: Do you have the heart to desecrate their beliefs with a weapon of mass destruction? Are you willing to break this peaceful tranquility?

C: 他都骂了些什么？
E: What was he chewing you out about?

C: 我看到有人吵架，就去借我兄弟的玉兆煽风点火，这么简单操作几下，就引来了许多人关注。接着就冒出一对傻蛋儿，说要约架。
E: I saw them going at it, so I borrowed my buddy's jade abacus and started fanning the fire. It was so easy. Before I knew it, it's gone viral. And then these two fools challenged each other to a fight!

C: 哈哈哈，不过说真的，他们见不见面都无所谓了，反正我这钱是挣够咯！一整年的「快乐茶」和点心钱，嘻嘻！
E: Hahaha, but to be honest, it doesn't matter if they meet at this point. I've earned enough to afford an entire year's worth of Immortal's Delight and snacks, hee-hee!

C: 想要和哈努兄弟一起惩奸除恶吗？现在正是时候，匹诺康尼需要你。
E: Wanna vanquish evil together with Brother Hanu? Well, now's the time: Penacony needs you.

C: 拿上你手边的风衣，戴上你兜里的墨镜，你也可以成为哈努兄弟——不要忘了帅气的绅士帽。
E: Just grab your coat, wrap on your shades, and you can be just like Brother Hanu. And don't forget that charming hat of yours.

C: 刚才是钟表小子的台词吗？你肯定是听错了。
E: Was that really Clockie's line? You must have misheard...

C: 敬梦境一杯，陌生人。
E: A toast to the Dreamscape, stranger!

C: 你想起帕姆说的位置，根据帕姆的规划，你确定电视机应该摆在这里。
E: You recall the location Pom-Pom mentioned. According to Pom-Pom's plan, you're sure that the television should be placed here.

C: 过了一会儿，你感到无聊…甚至有些恐高，你决定——
E: After a while, you start to feel bored... and a little acrophobic. You decide to...

C: 创造力的源泉…
E: The source of creation...

C: 你们别都喝通神了。
E: You guys better not overdo it.

C: 孩子，这是刻法勒的错。
E: That, child, is Kephale's fault.

C: 能仔细说说吗？
E: Can you tell me more about it?

C: 之前拜托三月七乘客带了几份美食给我，有什么「烤鸟翅」，还有「糖球炒视肉」，感觉口感都有点奇怪。
E: I asked March 7th to bring me a few snacks, like "roasted wings" and "sugarball-fried viscorpi," they both have a weird texture.

C: 果腹粮食
E: Comfort Food

C: 无论我怎么扫，在某个角落里总会有奇怪的绒毛钻出来。这是为什么呢？
E: No matter how much Pom-Pom sweeps, there's always this weird fluff coming out of one corner. What's that about?

C: {NICKNAME}乘客，你可以帮我找找配方放到哪里了吗？帕姆好像不记得了。
E: {NICKNAME}, can you help me find where I put my recipe? I forgot where I left it.

C: 你发现一张皱巴巴的纸片，先前应该是被人用力揉成了纸团。
E: You find a wrinkled up piece of paper, which must've been crunched up into a paper ball before.

C: 叫它「开拓植株」！
E: Call it "The Trailblaze Plant"!

C: 听上去你不太满意嘛？不过也情有可原，空间站现在好像有不少事情要处理。
E: Sounds like you didn't have the time of your life there. It's not hard to imagine why, as the space station has been quite busy lately.

C: 我偷偷制定了几套新的车厢灯光方案，但是一直没能找到合适的人选帮帕姆看看效果。
E: I've secretly formulated some lighting plans, but I haven't found the right person who can evaluate the lighting effects.

C: 亲近自然就是最好的放松思路，在这样的列车灯光中一定感觉很舒服吧？
E: Embracing nature is the best way to relax your mind. It must be very soothing to be under this kind of lighting.

C: 列车设施
E: Express Facilities

C: 要选择哪种方式由你决定，{NICKNAME}教官。
E: The choice is yours, Drillmaster {NICKNAME}.

C: {NICKNAME}教官，哈！哈！哈！
E: Drillmaster {NICKNAME}, bwahaha!

C: 那是当然，这怎么可能让你白出力呢？于情于理都说不过去啊。
E: Of course, you will. How can we make you work for nothing?

C: 这不过就是一次任务罢了，「不忍的情绪」能带来什么？差评如潮的续集而已。
E: What use is feeling "traces of pity" for the work you do? It's useless. It's just like how a classic movie doesn't need a terrible sequel.

C: 我看你是什么都不懂喔——小心，别输到哭着鼻子回家！
E: I see you know nothing. Just don't bawl your eyes out when you lose!

C: …我是谁，这重要吗？告诉你，我是正直的贝洛伯格人民公仆，荣誉的银鬃铁卫列兵！
E: ...I am an honorable Silvermane Guard and a righteous servant to the people of Belobog!

C: 这是我的自由，你管不着！
E: What I do is my right and it's none of your business!

C: …破坏狂，给我伏法吧！
E: ...Bow down, vandal!

C: 或者，你就干脆闭上眼、转过身，默默离开这里，当作今天在这里目击到的一切根本不存在——啊，当然还得祈祷那颗可能存在的炸弹不会危害公共安全。
E: Or, you could just turn a blind eye to all this, turn around, and leave this place, pretending everything you just witnessed has never even happened in the first place. But, of course, you will still have to pray that this potential bomb is not going to risk public safety.

C: 你果然是个正直的人。消耗「崇高道德的赞许」后，你就可以心安理得地打开这可疑的箱子了。上吧！
E: I knew you are a person of integrity. You will have nothing to worry about when you use a "Praise of High Morals" to open this suspicious suitcase. So, go ahead!

C: 你决定将它从墙上揭下。这样的杰作不能公诸于世——至少不能被她看到。
E: You decide to peel it off the wall. Such a masterpiece can scarcely be made public to the world — in any case, not to her at least.

C: 退一万步讲，这里搞不好藏着珍贵的道具呢！你可千万不能错过——成功将自己说服，你便开始了自己的「工作」……
E: Take one big step back here — there must be something precious hidden here! You can't miss out on whatever it is. Having convinced yourself, you begin with your "work"...

C: ——没错，我们还得把「情感」写入其中才行！要是你们有时间了，请一定要来帮帮我呀。
E: ...That's right, we have to code emotion into it! If you have the time, please come and give me a hand.

C: 您可以随时回到这里协助训练。再见！
E: You can come back here any time to practice. Goodbye!

C: 学习完成。即将进入下一个场景。
E: Learning complete. Initiating next scenario.

C: 可用余额不足。
E: Insufficient funds available.

C: …你在哪？
E: ...Where are you?

C: 是你小子！
E: There you are, punk!

C: 然而这人不知为何突然拂袖离去，却留下了摊开着的展阅，光幕中不断跃动着引人遐思的信息。
E: However, for some unknown reason, this person leaves without so much as an indication — leaving behind his flexible display for all to see with its constantly scrolling data on-screen.

C: 看上去似乎是仙舟上极为流行的话本，但从内容上看，你开始怀疑到底是什么人在看这种东西。你决定——
E: It seems like it's a very popular Xianzhou story, but judging by the content, you wonder what kind of people would actually read this thing. You decide...

C: 谨慎起见，你将左手伸了进去，因为你还要留一只惯用手来使用武器、牙刷和餐具。
E: You dip your left hand in as a precaution, keeping your dominant hand free to use a weapon, a toothbrush, or a fork in the future.

C: 这是什么鬼东西！
E: What the heck was that!?

C: 不过，一切皆有可能——尤其是仙舟人寿命跨度如此之长，这位来信者或许还在苦苦等待那「逍遥先生」的建议呢！
E: But everything is possible, especially given the longevity of the Xianzhou natives. The author of this letter may still be holding out for some advice from Mr. Carefree!

C: 呃…有没有一种可能——再看就该背下来了？
E: Er... Do you think if I read it one more time, I can actually memorize the whole thing?

C: 之后应该还有一些类似的事情需要您帮忙，到时候我们再联系吧。
E: There may be similar tasks in the future that we'll need your help with. We'll get in contact with you then.

C: 机巧鸟返航中…
E: Cycrane is returning...

C: 等你有所收获了之后，您再来找我，我再和您讲讲这枚小零件的价值。
E: If you manage to get something, come back to me and I'll tell you about the true value of this small component.

C: 这是什么名贵珍珠吗？
E: What priceless treasures are these?

C: 不好意思…
E: Excuse me...

C: 你们竟然真的是秘密组织？
E: Are you really a secret society?

C: 说罢，他又换上那副脸谱般的愤懑表情，重新投入到对路人的批判中。
E: He placed his indignant expression back on his face before throwing himself back into his people-watching and criticism.

C: 总之，为了您的安全，请千万不要再跟他有接触了！
E: In a nutshell, for your own safety, please don't have any contact with him again!

C: 来聊聊吧。
E: Let's have a chat.

C: 阿然专注地望着你，目光沉静、满含鼓励的意味。
E: Ran gazes at you intently, her eyes serene and filled with overtones of encouragement.

C: 不是什么不是！我告诉你，这样的垃圾放出来就是在污染环境！你知道一部烂片能对人的身心造成多么严重的危害吗？
E: "No" WHAT!? Let me tell you, this kind of trash actually pollutes the environment! Do you know how much harm a bad movie can do to a person's mind and body?

C: 我好歹也算个有头有脸的电影评论家，对烂片零容忍怎么了？
E: After all, I'm a respected film critic with zero tolerance for bad movies. And what of it?

C: 哼，如今就连这所谓的「梦想之城」也不过如此。何其可悲啊——在这无药可救的庸俗之中，艺术又该如何立足！
E: Hmph, even this so-called City of Dreams is like that nowadays. How sad — how could art ever hope to stand up among the hopeless vulgarity of this world!

C: 就是看不到领导们的滑稽嘴脸、不能怼人稍微有点无聊……
E: It's just, things are kind of boring if I can't see the funny faces of the bosses, and I can't diss people...

C: 年纪不大的时候就抢我的零食、弄坏我的玩具，还骗走了我所有的朋友……
E: When we were still small, she'd steal snacks off me, break my toys, and steal away all of my friends...

C: 想让梦境有趣但不至于扯淡，家族就必须找一位走过南闯过北的顾问才行。
E: To make the Dreamscape interesting without being nonsense, The Family had to find a consultant — someone who was very well-traveled.

C: 哈哈，那确实也是一种浪漫，不过我更喜欢这种…不寻常的浪漫。
E: Haha, that's indeed one kind of romantic ideal, but I prefer this kind of... unusual romance.

C: 的确，但如果他是个无名客，一切就都说得通了。毕竟他留下了那样的遗产。
E: True, but that would make a lot of sense if he was one of the Nameless. I mean, he left behind that inheritance.

C: 总而言之，我度过了一段无比空虚的日子，每天浑浑噩噩不知干些什么。等回过神来，我已经上了贼船、成为筑梦师了……
E: So to summarize: I spent a while bored out of my skull, confused, not knowing what to do. When I come back to my senses, I find myself working for the baddies already as a Dreamweaver...

C: 之前说过，我曾跟随民间无名客旅行过一段时间，后来分道扬镳了。这件事就是导火索。
E: As I said before, I traveled with some of the Nameless for a while, before we parted ways. This incident was the catalyst.

C: 厨师说：「我们还是决定把它吃掉。既然这玩意跟黄石牛长得差不多，肉质估计也差不到哪儿去」。
E: The chef said, "We still want to eat it. Since it looks similar to yellow boulder calves, the meat should taste the same."

C: 在复杂的利益计算后，统治者下令：一切资源优先提供给护盾发射器「天幕塔」，确保屏障正常运作。未经允许，普通居民不能私自架设照明工具。
E: After complicated profit calculations, their leader ordered that all resources should be seized for the shield-projector Canopy Tower to guarantee normal operations for the barrier. Regular citizens could not set up lights without obtaining prior authorization.

C: 这是必要的牺牲。
E: A necessary sacrifice.

C: 在生命的倒计时中，所有人再次看到了蓝天。
E: As they counted down towards their collective death, all the people glimpsed the blue sky once again.

C: 你在这里做什么？
E: What are you doing here?

C: 我需要一个没那么脸熟的人帮我收集信息。我得知道在那些个家族成员眼里，我们干的这些活到底有多少价值。
E: I need a fresh face to gather information for me, as I want to find out how The Family values our work.

C: …没关系，即便这次被他抢了功劳，凭我的聪明才智，一定还能想出更好的企划。
E: ...Yes, he takes the credit this time, but I'm going to let it go. As brilliant as I am, I'm sure I can come up with a better project.

C: 你是哪位，我和你很熟吗？
E: Who are you? Have we met before?

C: 不是那种缩在小屋里瞎捣鼓的穷酸发明家——你在这座城里见证的所有奇观，里面起码有三分之一都该被打上我的专利！
E: I'm not one of those third-rate inventors who tinker in their huts. No. At least a third of all the wonders you're seeing in this city were invented by yours truly!

C: 钱？怎么，我看着像缺钱的人吗？
E: Money? What the... Do I look like I need money?

C: 无所谓，你本来也没打算买这些没用的玩具。赶紧完成艾默里奇的任务吧。
E: But anyway, you're not planning on buying these weird toys anyway. Just finish Emmrich's task.

C: 抱歉，我不太能理解您的话，还请您说得再详细些。
E: Sorry, I didn't quite catch what you said. Could you be more specific?

C: 没问题！
E: No problem!

C: 我是星穹列车的开拓者。
E: I'm a Trailblazer from the Astral Express.

C: 我是钟表小子的好朋友！
E: I'm a good friend of Clockie!

C: 嗯，我知道啊。
E: I know.

C: 这、这是波波特先生决心和毅力的体现啊！就算他这么说了，难道堂堂星际和平娱乐，还能亏待他不成？
E: Th—This shows Mr. Popott's determination and perseverance! Even if he says so, can the esteemed Interastral Peace Entertainment really mistreat him?

C: 什么？我没听错吧！？
E: What? Did I hear you wrong!?

C: 放弃一切没什么可怕的。
E: There's nothing to fear in letting go of everything.

C: 到了演出开始的那天，我满怀期待地走上鸢尾花家系的剧场——那里除了她之外没有一个人，没有听众，没有伴奏的乐手，甚至没有自动乐团。
E: However, when the day of the performance arrived, I walked onto the Iris Family's stage with great anticipation, only to find that she was the sole presence there: No audience, no accompanying musicians, not even an automated orchestra.

C: 你为什么来到梦境？
E: Why did you come to the Dreamscape?

C: 不过嘛，要是你改变主意了，我倒是可以考虑再给你个机会。
E: Anyway, if you change your mind, I'll consider giving you another chance.

C: 多谢你，陌生人！是你教会了我这个道理，以后我再也不会动不动就自暴自弃了！
E: Thank you so much for this valuable lesson, stranger! I won't ever slide into self-destruction again!

C: 你教会了我…我想想…哦对！你教会了我「即使人生已经被逼到死角，还要尝试找到根救命稻草」这个道理！
E: Well... let me think... Yes! You made me realize I should always try to "find a way out even though my life seems to be a drought"!

C: 年轻人肯上进、能吃苦，很快就继承了老师的衣钵…<unbreak>18</unbreak>岁那年他出版了自己的第一部作品，漫画界一颗耀眼的新星横空出世……
E: Being diligent and resilient, it didn't take long for the youngster to pick up the skills from his master... He published his first work when he was <unbreak>18</unbreak>, marking the meteoric rise of a brilliant new star in the world of manga...

C: 你愿意帮忙？真是…太值得敬佩了。你所行之事足以让宇宙免于毁灭。
E: You can help? That's... a respectable move. Your actions will spare the universe from destruction.

C: 某支路过的无名客？
E: A Nameless who happened to pass by?

C: 越是美丽的环境，越不该遭受玷污。你肯定也这么认为，对不对？
E: Beautiful places shouldn't be defiled by pollution. You agree with that, don't you?

C: 我已经分不清了。我只知道自己在下手的时候并没有太多犹豫。
E: I can't even tell anymore. I just know that when I made my move, I did not hesitate for long.

C: 以这么低的价格卖给我们，多半还倒贴了不少进去。大恩大德，真是无以为报。
E: She must be taking a hit, letting us have the "toys" for such a low price. There really is no way to repay such magnanimous kindness.

C: 你怎么不向我道歉？
E: Why don't you apologize to me then?

C: 打开最后一个木桶！
E: Open the last barrel!

C: 明智的选择。收手吧，阿棒。这个世界还有其他美好等待你去体验。
E: A wise decision. Just let it go, batter. This world has countless other wonders for you to explore.

C: 场馆还在布置中，请您之后再来。
E: The venue is still being set up. Please come back later.

C: 晕…晕乎乎的，好恶心……
E: Dizzy... I'm so dizzy. I feel sick...

C: 这下好了！我们这儿正有些拿不定主意的东西，需要听听你的意见。
E: This is perfect! We've got a few things here that we just can't settle, we need your opinion.

C: 但是五指能怎么操作，难道只靠一根控制杆吗？驾驶员会头疼的。
E: But how will the five fingers be operated? Surely not with a single joystick? The driver will end up going insane!

C: 准确的说，是圆盘犁、播种机和喷水壶的三合一装置。
E: To be more precise, a three-part combination of a disk plow, a planter, and a watering system.

C: 如果造物工程一直这样大手大脚，过不了几年就揭不开锅了。
E: If they continue to be so wasteful with this project, it won't be long before they bust!

C: 造物之柱工程的材料量果然庞大，连这种废品都装了几箱子。
E: The number of materials needed for the Pillars of Creation project really is immense. Even scrap like this takes up multiple boxes.

C: 啾？别乱动，我正在思考怎么改进设计呢啾~
E: Tweet? Don't move. I'm brainstorming how to improve the design~

C: 这位茶杯倒出的泉水真是甘甜可口，和汽水小子的汽水一样好喝啾。
E: The spring water from this teacup is sweet and delicious. It's as good as the soda from Soda Boy.

C: 等等，该回大树了…下次绝对不会输给你的啾！
E: Hold on. I've got to go back to the Great Tree... I'll beat you next time, tweet!

C: 你根本不会说话！算了，谢谢你啾，我要离开了。
E: You can't talk at all! Forget it. Thank you, tweet. I'm leaving now.

C: 算了，下次一定要找个更加隐蔽的位置啾！
E: Forget it. I'll find a more secluded spot next time tweet!

C: 啾…被抓住了啾…可这里的风吹起来好舒服呀，风景也很漂亮啾……
E: Tweet... I've been caught... But the breeze is pleasant here, and the view is mesmerizing...

C: 好帅的硬派鸟啾…
E: It looks so dashing and tough, tweet...

C: 哼哼哼，这是专门为钟表小子建造的小屋，只有最亲近的朋友才会被邀请来做客啾～
E: Hehehe, this is a house built especially for Clockie — only close friends are invited as guests, tweet!

C: 但猫头鹰老师还说，其实折纸小鸟中也有不太合群的家伙…啾？这说的不会是我吧？
E: But Professor Owl also said that some origami birds aren't very social... Tweet? He wasn't referring to me, was he?

C: 猫头鹰老师说过，小鸟们应该互帮互助，一起丰富美梦小镇啾~在下现在正努力为小镇的兄弟姐妹搭造新的巢穴啾！
E: Professor Owl said we should help each other and make Dreamville a better place together, tweet! I'm building a new nest for my fellow birds in town, tweet!

C: {F#折纸鸟行了个花哨的礼，圆滚滚的身子原地转了一圈，最后轻轻地碰了碰你的手背。}{M#折纸鸟行了个花哨的礼，圆滚滚的身子原地转了一圈，定格一个疑似鞠躬的姿势。}
E: {F#The origami bird takes a fancy bow, then twirls its round body and touches the back of your hand gently.}{M#The origami bird takes a fancy bow, then twirls its round body and assumes what seems to be a bow.}

C: 哼哼…贫穷也是没办法的事情呢啾。
E: Heheh... Poverty can't be helped, tweet.

C: 看得见我吗？
E: Can you see me?

C: 仓鼠球骑士连破小镇记录！
E: Hamster Ball Knight broke the town record again!

C: 没有小鸟帮助的话，本公子一个人没法搬动胶卷啾！
E: I will not be able to move this film by myself, I need birdies to help me, tweet!

C: 我从这里飞出去，引开它们的注意，趁现在快走啾！
E: I'll fly out from here and distract them. You take the chance to run, tweet!

C: 这么大的动静，恐怕连老苍蝇和炸弹头也已经坐不住了啾。
E: Such a huge ruckus, I reckon not even Old Buzzfly and Bombhead can sit still, tweet.

C: 真正的杰作，它的绝大部分都藏在水下，观众能看到的，就只有水上的三根羽毛啾。
E: A true work of art like this would have most of its parts hidden underwater, with the only thing visible to the audience being the three feather pinions reaching out, tweet.

C: 铁卫小心翼翼地帮你分离了舌头和栏杆。不难想象，今天的趣闻很快就会在部队内部传开。
E: The Silvermane Guard carefully works to separate your tongue from the fence. You can already imagine news of this story spreading through the ranks like wildfire.

C: 那边的高音！
E: The sopranos and tenors over there!

C: 关于本次比赛的结果…
E: About this competition's results...

C: 可惜，没有一只小鸟进入决赛。
E: Alas, not a single birdie made it to the final.

C: 快乐美梦速速达！
E: Make your dreams a blast!

C: 学会了啾！
E: Got it, tweet!

C: 我是折纸大学的人事管理，接下来我会和你谈一下薪资待遇啾……
E: I'm from the Human Resource Department at Paperfold University, here to discuss your employee pay and benefits, tweet...

C: 坐在这儿，会有自己主演的动画片，会有超能力，会有一群朋友，会拯救世界！
E: If you sit here, you'll have your own animated film with you as the protagonist, and you'll have superpowers, friends, and save the world!

C: 我想打就打，你管不着！
E: I'll hit what I want. You can't stop me!

C: 这是做好事的先决条件。
E: This is a prerequisite for doing good.

C: 今后我也会一直看着你、支持你，直到这游戏关服的那天！
E: I will always keep watching you and supporting you, right up until the day that the servers close!

C: 嗯，确实漂亮。
E: Mmm, it really is beautiful.

C: 你目送永仁和建明一并离去，你不知道他们之间到底经历了什么，又为何如此。
E: You watch as Yongren and Jian Ming leave together. You find yourself wondering what they experienced together and why all of that happened.

C: 《开智之卷》？
E: The Manuscript of Wisdom?

C: 丹枢大人刚和我说，{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}是好人，让我可以和你玩～嘿嘿～
E: She just told me that you're a good person, and she said she'd feel safe if I played with you... Hehe...

C: 回收？这个石板是{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}的吗？还是说…它也和丹枢大人做的那些事有关？
E: Retrieve? Is this tablet yours, {F#miss}{M#mister}? Or does it... have something to do with what Lady Dan Shu did?

C: 回收《瘈狂之卷》？关于这本书的诅咒可是真实存在的！不能小瞧啊！
