E: Retrieve the Manuscript of Delirium? But this book is really cursed! You can't be too careful about it!

C: 「一旦阅读者未经过校验，这本书就会放出强大的电流，将读者放倒……」
E: "Once an unauthorized reader opens this book, it will release a powerful electric shock and knock them out..."

C: 「开盲盒试试！」在你暗自思忖仙舟供品可有什么讲究之处时，脑海中有道戏谑的声音响起，像奔雷撕破寂静的夜空。
E: "Try opening a mystery box!" Just as you're pondering what a Xianzhou specialty offering could be, a joking voice pipes up to tear asunder the calm night sky like a bolt of thunder.

C: 我不认识什么小风。
E: I don't know Xiaofeng.

C: 可以考虑一下。
E: Can I think it over?

C: 你说得对，我选择高维小抄。
E: You're right. I choose extra-dimensional cheating.

C: 桌子上放着一本颇有年头的小册子，封面上写着《合巹记》。
E: An old booklet lies on the table, with the words Wedding Wine on its cover.

C: 那我先再给你唱一遍啊——
E: So let me sing it to you first...

C: 你一个岁阳怎么挨打？
E: How does a heliobus get beaten?

C: 也许你是对的。
E: Maybe you're right.

C: 谢谢你陪我唱戏，{NICKNAME}。
E: Thank you for singing opera with me, {NICKNAME}.

C: 且为郎君燃烛光，骨为灯芯肉做香。
E: Candles flicker, casting shadows on the wall. My bones the wick, my flesh the fragrance's call.

C: 算了，我自己再想想吧。
E: Whatever, I'm going to have another think.

C: 所以，人类能不能借你的身体载我一路。
E: So, human: Could you please lend me your body to carry me across.

C: 嚯哈哈哈！我被你发现了…你是不是已经疲惫了？
E: Hohoho! You found me... Are you exhausted?

C: 黄金扭蛋机玩过了吗？
E: Have you played the Golden Capsule Machine before?

C: 离开。
E: Leave.

C: 这辆刚刚撞过人——或者被人撞过的车子停在原地，里面听不见半点声音。
E: The car that just hit someone — or got hit by someone — is stopped in place. No sound can be heard within.

C: 我并没有目睹全程。
E: I didn't witness the whole thing.

C: 哎，你们听说了吗？上次那件事出结果了。
E: Hey, did you hear? They reached a verdict on that accident.

C: …「还好」？你能说的就只有一句「还好」吗？
E: ..."Well?" "Have you been well?" is that all you have to say?

C: 但是，家族向我抛出橄榄枝的那天，我终于明白了：那是注定会纠缠我终生的诅咒，我是无法逃离它的。
E: But, when The Family extended an olive branch to me, I finally realized: This curse would haunt me for my entire existence, and I could never escape it.

C: 再见，小佩。
E: Goodbye, Pennie.

C: 这就是匹诺康尼啊…
E: So this is Penacony, huh...

C: 呀！竟然真的——
E: Oh! It's actually...

C: 我刚才在筑梦边境…
E: You know, I just went to the Dream's Edge...

C: 小女子…在此诚心恳求您。
E: I am... I am begging you.

C: 这件事太危险了…
E: That is too dangerous...

C: 我与他们相处甚久，早已是一心同体。实在不忍独自在外逍遥，却留同伴仍在此受苦。
E: I've been with them for so long, we've become inseparable. I cannot bear to be so far away while I know my companions are suffering in this place.

C: 请您…忘了我吧。
E: Please just... forget me.

C: 旅途罹患
E: A voyage through peril, fraught with woe,

C: 寂海拾花。
E: A lone flower plucked by the forlorn sea,

C: 抱歉，朋友，您可能有些误会了…啊，我指的是「追求」两个字。
E: I'm sorry, my friend. I think you might have got the wrong idea... Oh, I mean about the "pursuing" part.

C: 你在意那些干什么？这地方穿哈努皮套的演员也会说话。重要的是我们该怎么出去啊！
E: Why are you concerned with that? The actors who wear the Hanu costume here can talk too. Our priority now is to find a way out!

C: 「很忙，在团战，」她听起来既咬牙切齿又敷衍，「下次一定。」看来你今天是没机会了。
E: "I'm busy, in a raid." She sounds like she's speaking through gritted teeth and trying to get the conversation finished quickly. "Next time for sure." Looks like you're out of luck for today.

C: 天才俱乐部的阮•梅女士…记得你只和她有过一面之缘。
E: Madam Ruan Mei of the Genius Society... You've only met her once!

C: 也不怕真信徒来削你。
E: Are you not afraid the true disciples will crack down on you?

C: 或许过段日子，你就能在哪里看到一大群失忆的人突然出现的新闻。
E: Maybe you'll see the news reporting about a large group of people with amnesia suddenly appearing somewhere on the street sometime later.

C: 双手叉腰。
E: Put your hands on your hips.

C: 你来啦？
E: You here?

C: 家人，我理解你的心情。我是验证码输慢了点，后面就再也登不进去了，怎么刷新都没反应。
E: My man, I know just how you feel. I was just too slow with my verification code, and I couldn't log into the site again no matter how many times I refreshed the page.

C: 尽管将声音压到了最低，但做出这种违反公序良俗的事，你仍然感受到了内心的煎熬。为此，你必须提交一个「崇高道德的赞许」才能解脱。
E: Despite keeping your voice to a whisper, you can't help but feel tormented at doing something that violates public order like this. To free you of this feeling, you'll have to submit a Praise of High Morals.

C: 不知何时，你发现身后忽然多出了几个高大的身影。
E: You're not sure when, but at some point, you notice several tall figures suddenly standing behind you.

C: …我是正义的银河球棒侠！
E: ...I am the Galactic Baseballer of justice!

C: 我…即便您这么说，我还是有点紧张……
E: I... Even with your reassurance, I'm still a little bit worried...

C: 《乐园陌影》
E: "Stranger Than Paradise"

C: 当然，老板请稍等，我们去准备一下……
E: Sure thing. Please hang on for a moment while we make some preparations...

C: 和那枚硬币一样，盒子又附带了一张手写的卡片：「以此小礼，恭贺星穹列车喜提『晖长石号 / 开拓之尾号 / 塔塔洛夫号 / 飞翔时针号』。」
E: As with the coin, a handwritten card has been placed in this box: "I'd like to congratulate the Astral Express on acquiring The Radiant Feldspar / The Trailblaze's Stern / The Tatalov / The Soaring Clock Hand with this little gift."

C: …你确定你能联系到他们吗？
E: You're able to get into contact with them?

C: 侍从为无名客们介绍起放映机的使用方法和注意事项。
E: The attendant explains to the Nameless how the projector works and the relevant things to take note of.

C: 你决定——
E: You decide to...

C: 是手机，我开了录像模式！
E: I enabled video recording from my phone!

C: 一样的发色，一样的穿着，一样的瞳色，一样的身高。嫌疑人甲，你最熟悉的陌生人。
E: You and the other suspect have the same hair color, outfit, pupil color, and height. Suspect A is your most familiar stranger.

C: 我是星穹列车的列车组成员，这问题的答案只有星穹列车的成员才会知道。所以等{F#她}{M#他}回答完之后，十王司可以求证杨叔、姬子姐姐或者帕姆。
E: I am a crew member of the Astral Express, and only the Crew holds the answer to this question. The Ten-Lords Commission is welcome to verify the answer with Mr. Yang, Himeko, or Pom-Pom after {F#she}{M#he} has provided an answer.

C: 我好像没听见什么…
E: I don't think I hear anything...

C: 罗浮仙舟真是危机四伏啊。
E: Danger really lurks in every corner of the Xianzhou Luofu.

C: 人家建木是有持明族封印的，咱们没有通天的本事，一辈子都接近不了那里……
E: We're not omnipotent. The Ambrosial Arbor was sealed by the Vidyadhara. There was no way we could even get close to it.

C: …我想起来了，「W」为「向上」，「S」为「向下」，「D」为「向右」，「A」为往左。其他的字母无关紧要，只用分辨它们的顺序就可以了！
E: ...I remember now. "W" corresponds to "up," "S" to "down," "D" to "right," and "A" to "left." You only need to arrange them in the right order. The rest of the letters don't matter!

C: 好像并没有人看着你，包括*工作人员*。
E: No one, not even the staff, is looking at you.

C: 我是一件行李！
E: No, I'm luggage!

C: 咳咳，先容许我先介绍一下。这位仁科老师，在退役前是带着星槎方阵接受过元帅检阅的云骑教习，虽然现在只是个话痨的机巧鸟控。
E: Ahem, first, please allow us to introduce ourselves. This gentleman here is Master Renke. Before he retired, he was a Cloud Knight drillmaster who led a starskiff formation to undergo marshal inspection. Although now, he is no more than a babbling cycrane operator.

C: 不愧是年轻人，我正有此意。
E: I knew you'd get it, youngster! That's exactly what I hoped.

C: 绝不给你添麻烦！
E: I won't cause you any trouble!

C: 唉！年轻人，你注意过竞锋舰上面的表演方队吗？
E: Well! Youngster, have you ever noticed the Skysplitter display team?

C: 从来处来。
E: We come from whence we came.

C: 哼，我向来不喜暴力，对付贼人要用智取。只需让我看一眼便知贼人的破绽。招数动向，尽在掌握。
E: Humph, I have never been a fan of violence. Defeating a kidnapper is all about using your wits. Give me one look at this villain and I shall know his weaknesses, his movements, and his trends.

C: 抱歉，我实在没忍住。
E: Sorry, I could not help myself.

C: 我可是爷爷最喜欢的孙子！你们都别去，我一定要亲自营救他！
E: I am his favorite grandson! You all stay back, and I will save him myself!

C: 期待你们热血沸腾的组合技！
E: Show us a hot-blooded combo attack!

C: 约定之期已到，该告诉你们…我的真实身份了。
E: The appointed day has come, and it's time to tell you... my true identity.

C: 但旁边这个宝箱……
E: But the chest next to it...

C: 关掉它，省点能源。
E: Turn it off and save some energy.

C: 心理测试总是很准，很厉害！
E: The psychological assessment is always very accurate! How awesome!

C: 看起来，您既不喜欢黑色，也不喜欢红色。
E: It seems that you don't like black or red.

C: 试试「脑波扫描」。
E: Try the Brainwave Scan.

C: 经历过「粉霞天女」这件事，你已经懂得：没有什么比流言传得更快，同时，也没有什么比流言更具有搬弄是非的威力，这点的确令人生畏。
E: Your experience with the Rosy Celestial Maiden has taught you: Nothing travels faster than rumors, and nothing stirs more enmity than rumors. This is the most frightening fact about them.

C: 似乎不太对。
E: That doesn't sound right.

C: （把手伸进狮子嘴里）
E: (Put your hand into the lion's mouth)

C: 可是吼，此事疑点甚多，经过塔兰顿信徒的调查，发现城主最后接触过的只有几个人，他们各自的证言如下：
E: But some things didn't quite add up in this accident. According to investigations by Talanton's disciples, they found that there were only a few people the lord last interacted with. These were their testimonies:

C: 碰到了！要碰到了吼——别惊讶了，快把手抽出去，本狮害怕吼！
E: Your hand! Watch out! Stop being surprised and take your hand out. I'm scared!

C: 此处安睡超智能病毒…
E: Here lies the Supersmart Virus...

C: （看看翠缥色的布）
E: (Look at the emerald green fabric)

C: （检查布匹）
E: (Inspect the fabric)

C: 好害怕，我好不容易燃起的小小的灵智火花，不会就要这么熄灭了吧。善良的过路人，你能否施舍点柴火，助我燃烧得更长久些？
E: It took a long time for me to kindle this tiny spark of inspiration, and I'm afraid it will be extinguished! Kind stranger, will you give me some firewood so that I may burn a little longer?

C: 呼呼。看这跳动的火焰，纯净而神秘，温暖而永不熄灭，是否会让你想要撷取一缕，时刻带在身边？献出些许供品，如此便有收获。
E: *crackle* Look at this dancing flame. Pure, mysterious, warm, and everlasting. Beholding such a feat, do you want to draw a sliver and take it along? Make an offering and you shall have it.

C: 但…再坚硬的岩石也会风化，如你所见，现在只剩这么点了。
E: But even the hardest boulder will weather. As you can see, this is what little I have left.

C: 土地。
E: Land.

C: 我的球棒。
E: My baseball bat.

C: 更多垃圾桶。
E: More trashcans.

C: 那么现在，家族的贵宾开始为每个人敬酒，你也顺带着被敬到了一杯。这个时候你该怎么回应？
E: Now, imagine the VIP of The Family raising a toast to everyone, including you. How would you respond?

C: 唉，我堂堂流梦帮的副帮主，居然沦落到在大街上捡垃圾的地步。
E: *sigh* A dignified Dreamflux Gang vice-leader such as I, reduced to picking trash in the streets.

C: 到那时，宇宙将变得毫无阴霾，生命就像流水线一样奔向光明的未来。
E: When that time comes, the universe will be lucid, and life will flow like water, streaming toward a better future.

C: 徒弟没听明白…噢我懂了，你是想直接实战训练吗？没问题！
E: Your disciple didn't quite understand you... Ah, I see. You wish to teach me through actual combat, right? No problem!

C: 你是个垃圾桶。
E: You're a trashcan.

C: 学习，是最简单的事。
E: Learning, is the easiest thing to do.

C: 哀丽秘榭的建筑都是砖瓦结构，在大地兽眼里就像自助餐一样美味。你必须阻止它——
E: The village buildings are mostly made of bricks and tiles, basically an all-you-can-eat buffet for a dromas. You have to stop it...

C: 田边的土埂将你绊了一跤，你差点就要与麦田亲密接触了——不过有人拉住了你的手。
E: You trip over a ridge by the field and nearly take a dive into the wheat, but someone grabs your hand just in time.

C: 不知道有没有人和{NICKNAME}说过…你讲故事的神态仔细又专注，甚至比故事本身更吸引人呢。
E: Has anyone told you this, {NICKNAME}? You're so meticulous and focused when you tell stories, you become more captivating than the stories themselves.

C: 你是昔涟，还是迷迷？
E: Are you Cyrene or Mem?

C: 安全高于一切。你尝试推开木马腹部隐藏的活门，却发现…门板纹丝不动。
E: Safety first. You try to push open the hidden door in the horse's stomach, only to find... It's shut fast.

C: 必要的伪装罢了。我与你相同，都是趁乱混进城内，打算刺探疯王的情报，顺便送几个倒霉蛋去见塞纳托斯。
E: It is no more than a necessary disguise. Much like you, I took advantage of the chaos of battle to make my way into the city. I came to seek out information on the Mad King and send a few unlucky fools to meet Thanatos along the way.

C: 她是…红色头发，穿红色衣服的年轻女性…说话的态度很凶……
E: She... She is a young woman. She has red hair and wears red clothing... She speaks with a ferocious attitude...

C: 你意识到，方才与你对话的存在已经远去。但过段时间回来看看，或许…会有新的发现？
E: You realize the being that just spoke to you has disappeared. But maybe when you return after some time, there might be... new discoveries?

C: 好难受…唔……
E: Nngh... I don't feel good...

C: 毫无疑问，你曾在故事里见过这个庞大的木制道具，瞧它那高高昂起的头颅，以及宽广到足以装进好几个人的空洞腹部——所有特征都与你的认知相符。
E: No doubt you recognize this massive wooden prop from tales of old — its proud head held high, its cavernous belly large enough to hold several people — every detail matches the stories you know.

C: 「要不多来几个吧」
E: Why not add a few more states?

C: 黑色…被驱散了。我看到了很多面孔，银灰色的面孔，看到了一束火焰，银灰色的火焰…虽然很暗，但并没有熄灭。
E: The darkness... has been driven away. I see many faces, silver-gray in shade. I see a flame, a silver-gray flame... Though dim, it has not gone out.

C: 我也不冷。
E: I'm not cold, either.

C: 我就算是饿死，死在城外头，跳进重渊，也不会接受你们的嗟来之食！
E: I would rather starve to death, perish outside the city, or throw myself into the Abyss than accept your condescending charity!

C: 我必须…我一定要……
E: I must... I have to...

C: 活泼可爱的小狗狗，从它摇晃的尾巴间，你能感受到它对你的热情。
E: A cute and lively puppy. You can tell by its wagging tail that it likes you.

C: 见？！你在说些什么呢！
E: Have I seen that lord? What are you talking about?

C: 那个…
E: Um...

C: 真困啊，难道这就是所谓的倦怠时间么…？干脆睡一会儿吧。
E: I'm so sleepy. Is this the so-called burnout time? I better go back to sleep.

C: 算了，看你一脸呆样，恐怕也不是那些有坏心思的人。
E: Fine. Looking at your face, I assume you are not a bad person.

C: 这个空间站有个最愚蠢的规则，就是把人才与知识，按照死板的科室进行划分。
E: The stupidest rule of the space station is to divide talents and knowledge rigidly based on departments.

C: 不过你能看出我身上的穿搭风格与妆容安排，想来也是一位关注时尚的小年轻呢。
E: However, I guess you are a stylish youngster yourself if you can see my fashion style and my makeup.

C: 群里有一场闹剧…
E: There was some drama in that group...

C: 关于空间站…
E: About the space station...

C: 我明白了。
E: I see.

C: 萍萍姐说，空间站的科员都姓温，这可能是他们成为科员的一种仪式吧。
E: According to Wenfry, "Wen" is the official last name of space station researchers. It might be some sort of initiation ritual for them.

C: 但没想到还有你这么高的科员，没想到「人类」的品种如此不稳定，真是令我大失所望。
E: I'm surprised to see a researcher as tall as you. It's disappointing for me to see the human species being so unstable.

C: 你听到了富有节奏感的哼唱，精神满满的音调让你感觉劳动真光荣。
E: You hear the humming of a rhythmic tune. The energetic tune makes you feel proud of your labor.

C: 你问吧…虽然我现在没有心情，我不保证能回答你所有问题。
E: You can ask... although I'm not in the mood. I can't promise I'll answer all your questions.

C: 有缘再见。
E: Until we meet again.

C: 下来…呜呜…玩！
E: Get down here... Wubbie... Play!

C: 我被设计来为空间站提供各类服务与支援，我出现在这里是因为有人吩咐我来修复破损区域。
E: I'm designed to provide all kinds of services and support for the space station. Someone sent me here to fix a damaged area.

C: 滴…滴……
E: Beep... Beep...

C: 滴…滴……
E: Beep... Beep...

C: 倘若只事关货物，我自然乐意一试。可此事关乎两位泰坦的名誉，没有足以服众的仲裁人现场公证，我不敢贸然行动。
E: If it was just about the goods, I would be more than happy to try them out. But it concerns the honor of two Titans. Without a testifying arbitrator that can convince the crowd, I wouldn't dare jump the gun.

C: 兵器，泰坦铸造？不可能，但是，愿意旁观。
E: Weapons, forged by Titans? Impossible, it is. But observe, willing I am.
Uhh...

C: 这位客人，您这都还没买呢，不要趁火打劫！
E: You didn't even buy anything! Stop trying to make things up!

C: 再来！我就不信了，你还能一口气打碎十面盾牌不成！
E: Again! This can't be real! Let's see you smash ten shields in one strike!

C: 算了吧，感觉有点危险…
E: Forget it. Something doesn't feel right about this...

C: 所以你用你灵活的双手掀开了箱体的盖子，里面是一瓶布满灰尘的不明液体。从外观来看，似乎是某种饮品，因为你在瓶身上看到了象征着法吉娜的纹样。
E: So, you use your nimble fingers to tear open the box's cover and find a dusty bottle containing an unidentified liquid. Looking at it, you imagine it must be some kind of drink, as the bottle has a symbol of Phagousa on it.

C: 「圆」的知识先于现实的圆形东西而存在，「阿卡索斯」同样如此。
E: Knowledge of "circles" existed before real objects that are round. "Icatus" is the same.

C: 好姑娘，波瑟芬妮…真是个勇敢的好姑娘……
E: Good girl, Possephone... You really are a good, brave girl, aren't you...

C: 没错！我相信以她的能力，从那混蛋手中脱身一定不成问题。
E: Yes! I believe that with her capacities, she'll have no problem escaping from the clutches of that terrible man.

C: 一个孩子？也许看到了，也许没有，我的记性总是不好…或许几枚利衡币能让我想起来？
E: A child? Maybe, maybe not. My memory ain't what it used to be... But maybe a few Balance Coins will get it working again?

C: 你爸妈呢？也不管管…
E: Where are your parents? Do they not discipline you...?

C: 女孩缓缓朝着楼下走去，步伐蹒跚，但始终没有倒下。
E: The girl walks down slowly, her steps stilted, yet never quite toppling over.

C: 重磅新闻！都来听啊！
E: Breaking news! Gather around and listen up!

C: 看来，这就是实际发生的情况：黑潮无情地从普通人身上碾过，不留下一丝怜悯。
E: It looks like this is exactly what happened: The black tide swept through, crushing most people without a shred of mercy.

C: 残酷的是…即便再坚定的信仰，也注定无法跨越所谓「此在」本身的极限。
E: The cruel part is... even the most unwavering faith cannot overcome the limits of "this existence" itself.

C: 对了…我…我还有个不情之请。如果方便的话，可以拜托你顺带留意一下小提图斯的情况吗？我和他家老头子也算交情不浅，着实有些放心不下。
E: And... one more thing, if I may. Could you possibly check on young Titus too? His father's an old friend, and I'm concerned.

C: …怎么样，有什么发现吗？
E: ...Any luck? Did you discover something?

C: 算了吧。
E: I'll pass.

C: 那刻夏，我以前和你辩论的时候或许不曾提起：我很早就志愿为树庭奉献自己的一生。
E: Anaxa, I may have not mentioned this in my previous debates with you, but I vowed to dedicate my life to the Grove long ago.

C: 我已不是过去的我！
E: I'm not the same as I used to be!

C: 算了吧，一看就知道是智商税。
E: Forget about it. Looks like it's just gonna fool the foolish.

C: 很神奇吧，爱情的力量。
E: The power of love, isn't it amazing?

C: （悲悯地沉默）
E: (Remain silent in sorrow)

C: 没人知道！
E: No one knows!

C: 赛飞儿…那是谁？
E: Cipher... Who's that?

C: 果然，不出你所料，说话的不是刻法勒——而是那名守卫。
E: Just as you suspected, it's not Kephale speaking — it's the guard.

C: 以及以尼卡多利长矛铸造，什么都能击破的「最强之矛」！
E: And the "strongest spear," forged from Nikador's pikes, capable of piercing through anything!

C: 不错，够结实。把它放在门口吧。
E: Hmm, they seem sturdy enough. Put it by the doorway.

C: 不可能！神谕绝对不会错的。
E: Blasphemy! The prophecy can't be wrong.

C: 虽说是个情急之下的意外，但看那孩子开心的模样，我觉得这谎撒得很值。真希望她现在还相信着啊！
E: It was just an unexpected moment born of desperation, but seeing how happy it made the kid, I thought it was a worthwhile lie. I really hope she's still keeping the faith now!

C: 是这么回事啊…我明白了。
E: So that's how it was... I understand.

C: 除了目睹，我也曾哭泣、也曾阻拦，但你最终总会义无反顾地离开。
E: I not only witnessed it, I cried and tried to stop you, but you would always leave without hesitation in the end.

C: {NICKNAME}，可以请你帮个忙吗……
E: {NICKNAME}, could you help me with something...

C: 看习惯就好了。
E: You'll get used to it.

C: 这就是开拓吧。
E: I think that's what's known as trailblazing.

C: 而他却不知道，也正是我们这种连低温都无法应对的脆弱生物，才有办法挣脱重力的束缚，在宇宙中穿梭自如……
E: He never realized that human fragility is also the greatest driver of our accomplishments. Our bodies never conquered the cold, but our minds ensured that we never had to. Now we travel the stars...

C: 那…我恐怕也没有踏上旅途的必要了吧。
E: ...then perhaps there won't be any reason for me to go on the journey with you after all.

C: 虎克大人，开始冒险吧。
E: Ready to start our adventure, Boss Hook?

C: 哼，那是你没有见过我们一起过煦日节的时候！诊所可漂亮了！
E: Hmph! That's because you've never seen what the clinic looks like in the Solwarm Festival! It's fabulous!

C: 其实帕姆很恐怖的…
E: Pom-Pom can be scary sometimes...

C: {NICKNAME}就是{NICKNAME}，答应得真爽快！
E: I should've known you'd be cool with it, {NICKNAME}!

C: 说好了，下次来机械屋找我，姐姐给你免费！
E: It's a deal then. Next time you need something done in the workshop, I'll do it for free!

C: 哎，说得我也好奇起来了…要不，干脆找个时间去北方山谷里看看好了！
E: You know what? Mr. Yang got me excited about it too... Let's find a time to head into the northern valleys and check it out!

C: 接下来要怎么参观？按照列车游览路线么？
E: What should we see next? Do we just follow the Express tour route?

C: 这是铁卫全军为报答列车拯救了贝洛伯格，特意为你们准备的礼物。
E: This is a gift from the Silvermane Guards, to show our gratitude towards those who saved Belobog.

C: 惊讶什么？
E: What's so shocking?

C: 呜，糟了，好难受…早知道应该关闭重力模拟的……
E: Ooh, drats, what a drag... should have known to turn off the gravity simulator...

C: 看它优哉游哉的样子，就知道这列车一时半会儿还走不了。
E: Judging by how bored they look, my guess is we won't be leaving any time soon.

C: 而且跟它们聊天还挺有趣的！你有机会的话也去找它们聊聊吧。
E: And they're pretty fun to talk to! You should try it when you've got the chance.

C: 人老了，我也没什么追求了，平平淡淡也挺好。
E: I'm getting old, and I don't have much that I want anymore. A peaceful life is good enough.

C: 灾难！这就是一场纯纯粹粹、彻彻底底的灾难！
E: A disaster! An absolute, complete disaster!

C: 好的好的！那个…我不是按你教我的来聊天嘛，我以为你喜欢这么讲话呢。
E: Okay okay! Well, I'm just talking in the way you taught me to. I thought you liked this.

C: 不打扰你了。
E: I'll leave you to it.

C: 没什么别的想问了。
E: No other questions.

C: 洛奇走后，你还好吗？
E: Is everything all right without Rocky around?

C: 不是啦，那个在贝洛伯格也能喝到啊。
E: No, You can drink that in Belobog as well.

C: 家里应该也差不多吧？
E: Isn't it the same in your family?

C: 唔…请教了很多东西。
E: Um... lots.

C: 要是能通过自己的双手，让雅利洛-VI回到鼎盛时的样子…想想就让人热血沸腾！
E: If I could find a way to turn the clock back on Jarilo-VI... Just thinking about it makes me excited!

C: 那并非仙舟象棋，规则却相差不大。列车长见本座对此有兴趣，便将规则传授于我。
E: It isn't Xianzhou chess, but the rules are similar. The conductor saw me expressing an interest and graciously decided to teach me.

C: 罗浮横遭大难，本与星穹列车无关，但列车组还是仗义相助，帮罗浮安然渡过此劫。蒙受了星穹列车这么大的恩情，却一直没来得及答谢你们。
E: The sudden catastrophe that the Luofu suffered was unrelated to the Astral Express, yet your Crew gallantly provided assistance and helped us through this trial. The Astral Express has helped us so much, but I still haven't managed to thank you.

C: …都没有？嚯，有趣…纯粹建立在「私人信用」之上的合作关系，居然能开展得如此顺利…真不简单！
E: Nothing...? Hmm, interesting... So it's all based on interpersonal credit? Huh, I'm amazed everything runs on something so fragile!

C: 布洛妮娅…
E: Bronya...

C: 星神，命途，派系…这些概念如此遥远，却又切实存在。
E: Aeons, Paths, and factions... These concepts all feel so distant to me, yet their existence cannot be denied.

C: 其实我也没见过真正的兔子，只是在书本里看到过资料和插图。第一眼见到帕姆的时候，我就在想……
E: Actually, I've never seen a rabbit in real life, I've only seen pictures and read about them in books. So when I first saw Pom-Pom, I thought...

C: 学会了人类语言的兔子…被变成了兔子的人？
E: A rabbit that learned to speak...? Or a person that was turned into a rabbit?

C: 尤其是我。
E: Especially me.

C: 支持！
E: I support you!

C: 雅利洛-Ⅵ，从这里看过去就只有这么大……
E: Jarilo-VI is tiny from here...

C: 不容易。普通人可是极易被环境影响的。
E: It's no small feat. The average person is easily swayed by their environment, after all.

C: 如果只把纸本书视作一种载体，未免也太肤浅了。
E: To see paper books merely as vessels would be too simplistic.

C: 如果只把纸本书视作过时的信息载具，未免也太肤浅了。
E: To see paper books merely as vessels would be too simplistic.

C: 如果{NICKNAME}需要的话，我可以随时为你推荐。
E: If you ever want any recommendations, {NICKNAME}, just let me know.

C: 就好比现在，我感觉那边的角落充满怨气，还有一道意义不明的凝视。
E: Just like right now, I feel like that corner is filled with resentment, and there's a mysterious gaze upon me.

C: 你的手腕…！
E: Your wrist...!

C: 你看看，对不对味儿？
E: Look, is this all right?

C: 年少的时光稍纵即逝，但那些灿若繁星的回忆却是成长的礼物，值得被永远珍藏。
E: Days of youth are fleeting, but those shining memories are gifts of growing up, and they deserve to be treasured forever.

C: 呼…这么一看，我的努力还远远不够。
E: Phew... It looks like I still have a long way to go.

C: 每顶假发都能带来不一样的风格，感觉对练习妆容搭配来说也是一项全新的挑战！
E: Every wig brings out a different style. It feels like a new challenge every time I try a different do!

C: 他们真的从来不笑？
E: Is it true that they never smile?

C: 听说你第一次见到她的时候被吓了一跳。忆者以模因的方式游走世间，有时的确会引发他人产生一些无端的联想。
E: I heard she gave you quite the fright the first time you met. Memokeepers travel the world the same way as memetic entities do, and sometimes they trigger unnecessary associations.

C: 帕姆说：请随意。
E: Pom-Pom says: Be my guest.

C: {NICKNAME}，想来一场占卜，测算一下未来的运势么？
E: {NICKNAME}, how about a divination to see what your future holds?

C: 我曾见证你无畏的勇气与不屈的信念，纯美骑士团的大门永远为你敞开。
E: I once witnessed your dauntless courage and tenacious will. The gates of the Knights of Beauty are always open to you.

C: 朋友啊，喏，就在你面前。
E: My friend, he's right in front of you.

C: 嘿！在找什么呀？
E: Hey! What are you looking for?

C: 这么神秘的话…不妨带我去看上一看，让我多领会领会它的神秘？
E: If it's that mysterious... could you let me take a look, so I can better understand its mysteriousness?

C: 恩公莫不也是谜语人？开玩笑的，我知恩公是在拿我逗乐。
E: Are you a Riddler too now, benefactor? I'm kidding. I know you're only poking fun at me.

C: 那可以多加点钱，把真心一起买了。
E: So you pay extra for the "true" part?

C: 要是找到了什么珍惜的动物物种，记得告诉我喔。
E: Remember to tell me if you find any rare animal species.

C: 他可是我的赞助商啊…唉，我为什么遇到这样的事情！要是处理不当，出城的计划就泡汤了……
E: But he's my sponsor... *sigh* Why do I always get into trouble like this? If I don't get this right, my plan to get out of the city will fall flat...

C: …短期来看，我似乎有机会一跃进入上流社会！但是莱家树敌无数，在政坛缺乏根基。一旦莱家失势，或者华莱士被莱家抛弃……
E: ...In the short term, it'd be my expressway to the upper classes! But the Limesteins have so many enemies, and no real foundation in political circles. If they were to lose their influence, or if Wallace were to be disowned by his family...

C: 咦？看你这副模样…有点与众不同啊。
E: Hmm? You look... special.

C: 我还有些想问的。
E: There's something else I want to ask.

C: 现在你再看看，那还是一片平平无奇的雪地吗？那分明是一座静待开掘的金山！
E: Now when you look at those fields again, do they still look like snow-covered dust bowls? They're unexplored gold mines!

C: 我想请教…
E: If I may, I'd like to ask...

C: 天才的杰作——也许文笔不是顶尖的，但故事里满溢的狂想令人惊叹。贝洛伯格人被困在雪里七百年，想象力都枯竭了，这部作品点燃了人们对雪原之外的事物的渴望…
E: A Masterpiece of a true genius. Maybe the language still has room for polishing, but the wild passion weaved into the plot is other-worldly. For seven hundred years the people of Belobog have been trapped in the snow, their imagination taken away. This book reignited people's desire to look beyond these snow-covered lands...

C: 「我求着你不要远去，请你带着我一同离去……」
E: "Don't leave me alone. Take me with you..."

C: 他是最完美的男子…他是我看过的书里最温柔的人啦。他有恰到好处的幽默感，既温柔体贴又内敛克制……
E: He's the perfect man... He is the kindest character I've ever read about. He has the right sense of humor. He's caring, thoughtful, and restrained...

C: 最近怎么样？
E: How have things been?

C: 花店是要上新吗？
E: Is the florist selling anything new?

C: 不过…虽然不知道我还能撑多久，但我姑且还是会再坚持一段时间试试看的。和你聊天很开心，谢谢你。
E: I don't know how long I'll be able to hold on... but I will try to stick with it a little longer. It was nice chatting with you. Thanks.

C: 贝洛伯格供暖的人连这么简单的问题都想不清楚，那我上我也行啊！
E: If the people at Belobog Heating can't figure out such a simple problem, then leave it to me!

C: 要我说，前任守护者可可利亚还没走多久，你布洛妮娅就已经要筹备什么「壁外调查团队」…这根本是毫无决策能力的体现！
E: Do I need to spell it out for you? The former Guardian has passed away not long ago, and now you've got Bronya jumping at the chance to organize a "survey team beyond the walls..." This clearly reflects her inability to make good policy!

C: 咳，打印机的事过去以后，又过了一段时间，我在商业区的一个巷子里又撞见了那个蓝毛。
E: Ahem, sometime later, after the counterfeiting scam, I bumped into that same blue-haired guy again in an alley in the Commercial District.

C: 那当然是因为这件事关系到我们互助会的根本利益了。
E: Obviously, this issue involves the Association's fundamental interests.

C: 纠察贪污腐败，惩治恶党奸徒…再不济也得涉火涉骗吧？
E: Corruption-related, with evil organizations or personnel involved. Or at least arms smuggling... or scams...

C: 哼哼，这你可问对人了。你喜欢什么类型的书？
E: You came to the right person. What kind of books do you like?

C: 是是是，我知道那些怪物害得有些人没了家园，但有手有脚的找份工作很难吗？凡事总不能让环境迁就你，你得去适应环境，懂吧？
E: I know some people lost their homes because of the monsters, but is it that hard for able-bodied people to find jobs? You can't let your situation dictate your predicament, instead you have to adapt. Do you get me?

C: 没什么事，我先走了。
E: Nothing. Sorry, I have to go.

C: {M#大哥哥}{F#大姐姐}不知道吗？诊所里的其他小朋友每天都会给我送小礼物呢～
E: You didn't know? The kids in the clinic give me gifts every day.

C: 只是，在诊所里，有很多小朋友的爸爸妈妈都不知道去了哪里，而阿丽娜的爸爸妈妈偶尔还会来看人家……
E: A lot of kids in the clinic don't have moms and dads, but my mom and dad come to see me sometimes...

C: 做一天，然后躺三天，这就是我的工作准则。
E: My philosophy is to work for one day and relax for three.

C: 意味着你可以不出工了！
E: It means you don't have to work anymore!

C: 我想问你…
E: I'm wondering...

C: 啊，又见到{M#大哥哥}{F#大姐姐}了！我在执行虎克老大的机密任务呢！
E: Ah, it's you again! I'm on a classified mission from Boss Hook!

C: 呃，不是问你这个啦…
E: I wasn't asking about that...

C: 请问您是要住店，还是想来杯宾馆特色下午茶？
E: Are you staying with us? Or would you like to try our special afternoon tea?

C: 没错。毕竟我们平时都需要隐秘行动，所以不能在外声张自己的身份——这也是我最初请你帮忙时有所犹豫的原因。
E: That's right. We usually act in secrecy and don't announce our identities, which is why I hesitated to ask for your help.

C: 最近过得怎么样？
E: How have things been?

C: 基本上到这里就完事了，最后就是我根据鉴定难度收费的环节而已。
E: Basically, that's it. The last step is I'll charge according to the difficulty of appraisal.

C: 欸，我说出声了吗？抱歉……
E: Eh, did I say that aloud? Sorry...

C: 哟，{NICKNAME}。没想到你还没走啊——怎么，还在留恋贝洛伯格？
E: Hey, {NICKNAME}. I didn't expect you to still be here — don't tell me you've fallen in love with Belobog?

C: 娜塔和奥列格头儿每天都在四处奔忙，帮忙协调上下层区的贸易重启。我对商业、经济什么的一窍不通，不想去给他们添倒忙。
E: Nat and Oleg run around every day, helping to coordinate getting trade started again. I don't know a thing about commerce, so I don't wanna bother them.

C: …咦？这不是被大守护者通缉的「外来者」嘛！铁卫正满世界找你们呢！
E: ...Huh? Aren't you that outsider who's wanted by the Supreme Guardian!? The guards are out hunting all over the place for you!

C: 这姑娘手脚麻利，干起活来毫不含糊…难怪她在技术部任职的时候能一个人揽下来那么多脏活累活。
E: This girl is so nimble and good at her work... No wonder she was able to handle so much manual labor by herself over at the Technology Division.

C: 而且，我能看得出来，她是真心喜欢机械工程。要是再让她回到技术部那种乌烟瘴气的地方去，那就太可惜了……
E: Moreover, I can tell she loves mechanical engineering. It'd be such a pity to send her back to that stuffy vibe over at the Technology Division...

C: 好吧，我尊重你的选择。
E: Okay, I respect your choice.

C: 老样子：矿石封装检查，军备例行维护之类的。
E: Same old, same old. Ore pack inspection, maintaining armaments—stuff like that.

C: 好家伙。
E: Oh boy.

C: 接下来就是鼓手了——这位可是个重量级人物！你要不猜猜是谁？给你点提示，这位也是银鬃铁卫的一员。
E: The next one is the drummer — this one will shock you! Do you want to guess who it is? Here's a hint — they're also a member of the Silvermane Guards.

C: 好像没什么想聊的了。
E: That's all for now.

C: 我已经安排了铁卫协助司法大臣继续侦办这起腐败案件。那位大臣是个手腕强硬的角色，估计要不了多久就能查个水落石出。
E: I've dispatched some guards to assist the Minister of Justice in the investigation of this corruption case. The minister handles cases with an iron fist, so I suppose it won't be long before they get to bottom of this.

C: 虽然事后她亲自向我道歉了，我也明白这是自己工作上的疏漏，但这件事还是给我上了一课…最好不要擅自插手佩拉的工作。
E: She personally apologized to me after that, and I also acknowledged my tardiness, but that matter sure taught me a lesson... It's best not to get involved in Pela's work.

C: 如果实在有困难的话，克拉拉也会请教史瓦罗先生的…{NICKNAME}{F#姐姐}{M#哥哥}不用担心哦。
E: If it's really too hard, I will seek Mr. Svarog's advice... Don't worry, {F#Miss}{M#Mister} {NICKNAME}.

C: 加入鼹鼠党有什么好处？
E: What are the perks of joining The Moles?

C: 好哇，你还想聊什么嘛？
E: Sure thing, what else do you want to talk about?

C: 哟，又见面了，{NICKNAME}！我还以为你们老早就启程去摘星星了呢。
E: Yo, we meet again, {NICKNAME}! I thought you all left to save the world or something already.

C: 顾不上尊严顾不上生死只想去找他的爸爸妈妈
E: Life, death, and honor the struggle persists, finding his parents his solitary wish

C: 踢踢踏踏，踢踢踏踏，黑暗中伸出了她的爪牙
E: Scraping of claws, gnashing of teeth, evil intent hears the sound of his feet

C: …嗯哼。
E: ...uh-huh.

C: 你可能没有听过这个组织…大守护者可可利亚还在任的时候，我们的工作被叫停，也就从公众视野里淡出了。
E: You probably haven't heard of this organization... Our job got called off during Supreme Guardian Cocolia's tenure, and we faded out of the public eye.

C: 我很喜欢和姐姐在一起。她性格开朗，多才多艺，我很佩服。
E: I really like hanging out with my sister. She's so cheerful and is so talented in so many things. I admire that about her.

C: 自从决定留下次元扑满 / 扑满 / 泡泡 / 毛球 / 白色恶魔 / 肥大 / 扑满侠 / 扑神之后，这只扑满的脾性变得更加自由了。它随心所欲地往返于空间站和列车间，仿佛特意追寻你的脚步。
E: Ever since you decided to keep Warp Trotter / Trotter / Bubbles / Puffball / Ivory Menace / Chunky Chops / Turbo Trotter / Trotterlord, this Trotter's temperament has become even more unrestricted. It roams as it pleases between the space station and Express, as if specifically following your footsteps.

C: 扑满试图引起你的注意，它不愿被忽视。
E: The Trotter is trying to get your attention. It does not want to be ignored.

C: 谁能拒绝一只可爱的小冰原熊的邀请呢？你走上前……
E: Who could reject an invitation from an adorable little arctic bear cub? You start to approach...

C: 人怎么还没来……
E: Why's nobody here yet?

C: 这小子睡了几天了？
E: How many days has he been sleeping?

C: 物资的数目正确吗？
E: Do we have the right amount of supplies?

C: 歌德大饭店隆重上新，另急招新菜品测试员！
E: The Goethe Grand Hotel is finally reopening, and they're looking to recruit some new taste-testers!

C: 虎、虎克她……
E: H—Hook, she...

C: 你别把老大供出来啊……
E: Don't just sell her out like that...

C: …怎么还倒回去了？
E: ...Why did you start jumping back?

C: 去罗浮看灯笼鱼…
E: I wanna go to the Luofu and see the "lantern fish"...

C: 卢卡哥哥就是最强的！
E: Luka is the best player ever!

C: 这位市民您好，您现在看到的这件展品是……
E: Greetings, citizen. This exhibit you're admiring is...

C: 不知道铁卫武器威力有多大…
E: I wonder how powerful the Silvermane Guards' weapons are...

C: 一般人嘛，想知道的无非就是自己的吉凶祸福，以求对未来有一种掌控感。确实，人身在命运的洪流里，会有个大致的方向。但吉凶之事……
E: Most people just want to know about their fortunes and have some sort of control over their future. In truth, everyone moves in a general direction in the great stream of destiny, but when it comes to actual good or ill luck...

C: 玩具、门铃、透金镜～展阅、冰箱、油烟机～星槎、玉兆、按摩椅～二手、修理、高价收～
E: Toys, doorbells, flexible displays!~ Shelves, refrigerators, extractor fans!~ Starskiffs, jade abaci, massage chairs!~ Second hand, or broken, I buy them all!

C: 陈机铺以前是我师父经营的门店。这些年他临近蜕生，便将这些差事一五一十全部交付于我。其实我一开始也是丝毫不感兴趣的。
E: My teacher used to run it, but he handed over everything to me since it was almost time for him to undergo his hatching rebirth. I never cared for this place in the slightest, to begin with.

C: 我读书不多，可能很难回答你…这样吧，店内前排放着的都是些畅销书，他们成为畅销书肯定是有原因的，你看这些如何？
E: I don't really read that much, so I can't really recommend anything... Well, the front of the shop is where we keep our bestsellers. There's gotta be a reason why they're bestsellers. Why not start there?

C: 看见了，看见了…要是西衍先生，恐怕会对此感兴趣吧。
E: I see, I see... Mr. Xiyan would probably be interested in this.

C: 催、催什么？
E: Wh—What's the rush?

C: 大约因为我只是一个蘑菇。
E: It's probably because I'm just a mushroom.

C: 哎！我若是当初投胎在仙舟，现在高低是个优秀企业家！
E: *sigh* If only I had been born on board the Xianzhou! I would be a successful entrepreneur by now!

C: 不是这个……
E: Not that...

C: 虽然我本来就不喜欢打架啦…但即使是猎群里的那些暴力分子，也时不时地要去和其他猎群、丰饶民，甚至泯灭帮交换些资源的。
E: I may not enjoy fighting, but even the more violent members of the pack have to go trade resources with other packs' members, other Denizens of Abundance, or the Annihilation Gang.

C: 不过最近这市场大环境是一天比一天差了！本来我们集团前景一片光明，不仅交易额节节攀升，集团规模也扩大到了三人……
E: However, the general market conditions have been on the down lately! Originally, our group had a bright future. Our transaction volume was rising, and we even expanded operations and recruited a third person...

C: 何必单恋……
E: Why carry the torch...

C: 仙舟有句老话说得好哇——「棋逢对手，将遇良才」……
E: There's an old saying aboard Xianzhou, "A match in ability, is a match made in heaven"...

C: 你就这么和第一次见到的人说话吗？
E: Is this how you talk to people you've just met for the first time?

C: 如果您将来有机会给我们地衡司业务评分的话，还麻烦您给提提意见——就说觉得应该加个带刀侍卫的职位，谢谢。
E: If you ever get the chance to give us a rating, please can you make this suggestion? That the Realm-Keeping Commission should have some armed guards. Thanks a lot!

C: 真该好好休息休息了，我脑子里已经计划好放假要做的事了…得抽几天到处逛逛，吃点小吃什么的…光是想想就觉得安逸。
E: I can really use a break, and I already have plans in my mind for what I want to do during the vacation... I'll spend a few days going on a trip and enjoying good food... just the thought of it puts me in a good mood.

C: …景元…景元？！
E: ...Jing Yuan... Jing Yuan!?

C: 您说是「骗」——呃…这我只能说，见仁见智。
E: You might call it "swindling" — but that's like, just your opinion, man.

C: 嗐，我说这建木怎么就这般不懂事，真晦气…要我说帝弓司命干脆把它连根毁了得了，看着就烦人！
E: Tsk, why is the Ambrosial Arbor so insensible? What a downer... The Reignbow Arbiter should have uprooted it instead of letting it remain as an eyesore!

C: 人生的前五百年，景元一直是一名相声演员，那位大师也是他最好的搭档。
E: Jing Yuan spent the first <unbreak>500</unbreak> years of his life as a crosstalk comedian. His comedy mentor was also his perfect partner on stage.

C: 你应该也看出来了，仙舟上很多日常物品都有着精巧繁复的外观…提灯上有栩栩如生的鱼，铃铛上有精致可爱的小狮子，无人机是鸟类和瑞兽……
E: You've probably noticed the intricate and complex designs for all the household appliances on Xianzhou... Lifelike fish suspended into a lamp, exquisite lions carved into doorbells, drones designed to look like birds or mythical beasts...

C: 在我们工造司老手艺人眼里，物件的精致与华美，恰恰是它「实用性」的一环。老夫反倒觉得你们那些光秃秃的「手电」和「旅行箱」缺乏很多「实用性」哩！
E: To us Artisanship Commission veterans, intricacy and detail are just one part of an object's practicality. On the contrary, I just so happen to find the sparseness of your "flashlight" and "suitcase" technology to be rather impractical!

C: 咳咳…二十岁那年，我从皇家法学院提前毕业，二十四岁就成为了法学博士…一年后就考下了法官的资格证……
E: *cough*... When I was <unbreak>20</unbreak>, I graduated from the Royal Academy of Laws, becoming a Doctor of Law at <unbreak>24</unbreak>... A year later, I passed the qualification examination to become a judge...

C: 我还有事，先走了。
E: I'm busy, so I'll be heading off.

C: 能怎么办呢？总不能烂在我手里了吧…哎，我不是说赛伯邑超导合金会烂掉，我是说自己不能什么都没赚到就回老家了。
E: What can I do? I can't just leave them to rot... *sigh* I don't mean that Cybercity superconducting alloys could ever actually rot. I just mean that I can't go back to my hometown with my tail between my legs and nothing to show for it.

C: 我怀疑他是来做慈善的，不是做生意的。一开始我也不想介意，后来想了想，我在外行商这么多年，怎么能在这种土老帽面前示弱。
E: I suspect he's here for charity instead of business. I didn't mind at first, but after thinking it through, as an experienced traveling merchant, how could I show any weakness in front of this oaf.

C: 哎，我没有办法将这种事情叫作「经验」，请老爷见谅呀。
E: Hey, but I wouldn't call this any kind of "experience." Please forgive me.

C: 我只是想亲口告诉您…您战斗的身姿非常帅气，我这辈子都不会忘记。
E: I just wanted to tell you that... Your battle posture was incredible. Awesome. I will never forget how you looked for as long as I live.

C: 不过您看，十王司根本没有看上去那么可怕。恐怕整个银河，也只有十王司愿意接纳像我这种无法融入社会的人了。
E: But as you see, the Ten-Lords Commission isn't that scary. I'm afraid in all the cosmos, only they will accept a social outcast like me.

C: 平时工作强度大吗？
E: Is work usually stressful?

C: 唷，明明这里有这么多闲人，偏偏来找我……
E: Hmph, why'd you have to pick me out of all these lazybones here...

C: 呵呵，我俩很熟？您真是说笑了，我上班的时候基本见不着她人，我可没有自信说「我和青雀很熟」。
E: Hah, us? Close? You must be a comedian or something. I hardly ever see her at work, so I can't possibly say that we're "close."

C: 她的私事，我也不好瞎说。
E: I shouldn't gossip about her private matters.

C: 小孩子干这行？
E: They let kids do this?

C: 是啊！我委托你做的海岸巡逻，甚至还只是护珠人平时工作的一小部分呢。
E: Indeed! The coast patrolling task that I entrusted to you is actually just a small part of a Pearlkeeper's duties.

C: 虽说这儿放着他们「割舍不下的东西」，但都是些旧情难忘的小物件：什么定情的挂坠、老友的书信、或是自己的作品……
E: Even though it's all stuff people "struggle to let go of," it's really all just small sentimental trinkets: Engraved love pendants, letters from old friends, or even works they've personally created...

C: 到头来，它们就成了压箱底的旧货。咱就只好勉为其难，定时把它们卖出去了嘛。
E: So really they're just out-of-fashion goods consigned to the bottom of the heap. I have no choice but to sell them off regularly.

C: 行呀，客人要是不嫌弃，咱们多聊一会儿也行。不过，要是有其他客人来了的话，我们俩的闲谈就停下吧。
E: Okay, we can keep chatting on if you wish. However, if another customer comes along, I'll have to attend to them.

C: 这么一想，我觉得还是应当回到丹鼎司，继续做这个破医士。也许我什么都做不了，但总比什么都不做要强。
E: At that thought, I decided to remain a healer at the Alchemy Commission. I might not be able to accomplish anything huge, but it's better than nothing.

C: 你怎么就成为丹士长了？
E: How did you become the chief alchemist?

C: 说是出了什么大事，云骑军正在排查，一切事项都得延后，哎，我就被晾在这儿了。
E: I was told that something huge had happened, and the Cloud Knights were doing an investigation, so everything had to be put off. So, I'm left here, clueless.

C: 啊？「内幕消息」？又出什么事了？我怎么什么动静都没听到。
E: Huh? Lowdown? What happened again? How come I didn't hear anything?

C: 就这样我的罪名就像滚雪球一样越滚越大，滚着滚着就被送进了幽囚狱。这次我要是再跑出去，估计就真没地方可以去了。
E: That's how my criminal record just started to snowball, and it kept snowballing until I found myself in The Shackling Prison. If I actually do manage to make it out of here, I don't think they'll have anywhere else that can hold me.

C: 建木之灾前她就算出「卦象涨落在艮、坎之间，其势大凶」，然而突如其来的卜卦结果既没能指出时间因由，也无法重现，没有卜官能够采信她。
E: Before the disaster in Ambrosial Arbor happened, she already saw the trigram vacillate between the Mountain and Water trigrams to a terrible degree. Yet, the sign that came suddenly didn't point to a specific time and reason and couldn't be shown again. Therefore, no diviners took her divination seriously.

C: 准确来说，是金人巷的经营权。
E: To be more precise, we are planning to obtain the right to operate this alley.

C: 现在就想跟您咨询一下。
E: I'd like to ask something.

C: 劳务中介…这个词语我应该是没说错吧？就是给人介绍工作的。
E: I said, I'm an employment agent... I think that's the right term? I basically put people in jobs.

C: 以后有机会再聊吧。
E: I'll catch you again next time.

C: 我说过你这人目光敏锐，要不了多久就知道我在做什么了。
E: As I said, I believe you're sharp enough to figure out in due time what I've been doing.

C: 别看我这小店平平无奇，整个长乐天最有魅力的顾客都会来这里喝茶。当然了，您要是感兴趣，请带着故事来小店里坐坐。
E: My tea house may be inconspicuous, but the most influential persons in Exalting Sanctum would come here for tea. Of course, you are free to take a seat here and share your stories.

C: 不瞒您说，做我这一行，无论愿意不愿意，都得学会与人聊天，想聊点什么？
E: To be honest, being the owner of a tea house means you simply have to chat with your customers. So, what would you like to talk about?

C: 怎么会呢？这可是探索烈焰浓茶味觉的边界，我们是在做正确的事。
E: Of course not. We are doing the right thing by expanding the known sensory boundaries of Flaming Potent Tea.

C: 仙舟人为什么不喜欢修理旧物？
E: Why don't the Xianzhou residents repair old things?

C: 没什么事了，你先忙吧。
E: It's nothing. I shouldn't keep you.

C: 我有事就先走了。
E: Now if you'll excuse me.

C: 我想卜算一下凶吉祸福。
E: I wish to know my fortune.

C: 首席技术研发官是做什么的？
E: What are your responsibilities as the Chief Technical R&D Officer?

C: 将军不让你买了？
E: Does the general not allow you to buy them?

C: 嗯嗯，老师慢走。来日若有机会，还希望能和老师切磋一二。
E: Take care! I look forward to sparring with you one day.

C: 不用跟本姑娘客气，本姑娘向来助人为乐。你要是有什么问题，或是遇到了什么困难，随时来找我。
E: No worries, as I enjoy helping people. If you have any questions or find yourself in trouble, just come to me.

C: 但总觉得…我好歹是曜青来的，本身也是闲不住的性格，结果这次罗浮生变，我怎么感觉自己没起什么作用似的？
E: But I can't shake the feeling that I should be doing more. I mean, I'm not one to sit around, and given my background from the Yaoqing, I should've played a bigger role in the recent events.

C: 就聊到这里吧，青雀。
E: Let's call it a day, Qingque.

C: 你既然问到了「快乐工作」，那你是问对人了，我可是精通「快乐工作」这门艺术的大师。
E: Well, you've come to the right person, as I've mastered the art of being happy at work.

C: 好呀好呀，咱聊点什么呢？
E: Sure, okay! What do you want to talk about?

C: 当然演了！你不会以为小桂子我是那种，在网上火了以后就忘了初心的笨蛋主播吧？
E: Of course! You don't think that I'm one of those idiot streamers that gets famous online and completely forgets who I am, do you?

C: …希望{NICKNAME}能理解。
E: ...I hope you understand, {NICKNAME}.

C: 困死我了，困死我了，快困出魔阴身了…唷，{NICKNAME}大人，查岗来了？
E: I'm so tired... I'm so tired... My tiredness is enough to get me mara-struck... Oh, are you here on inspection, {NICKNAME}?

C: 还有别的事，先不聊了。
E: I got to go. Talk to you later.

C: 我是金人勾魂使四卅七号。金人勾魂使是一种金人型号，而四卅七号则是我的编号。
E: I am Aurumaton Spectral Envoy No. <unbreak>437</unbreak>. Aurumaton Spectral Envoy is an aurumaton model, and No. <unbreak>437</unbreak> is my serial number.

C: 那怎么会，景元老兄…呃，景元将军是我们「广云袖」的贵宾，享有贵宾礼遇呢。
E: Of course not, Jing... ahem, General Jing Yuan is an esteemed guest of our Cloudbreadth Sleeves. It's only natural he be treated as one.

C: 感觉你对科技产品过于狂热了…
E: I sense that you're a real fiend for tech...

C: 客人愿意帮我，麻烦事在没发生之前就能结束，小店自当感激不尽。
E: If you could help conclude a trouble before it started, I would very much appreciate that.

C: 我好像知道发生什么了。
E: I think I know what happened.

C: 实在谈不上。我这「赎珠阁」开张数百年，就没有遇到什么暴利的机会，全是小本生意，只够勉强营生。
E: Not at all. The Jeweler's Pagoda has been open for hundreds of years, but I've never had a chance to make a killing. It's all slow and steady, and I can barely make ends meet.

C: 可这建木之事非同凡响，闹得人心惶惶的，咱们当铺也不例外，我也是土生土长的仙舟人嘛，这阵仗还是第一次见。我甚至一度考虑要不要关门大吉窝家里躲着去。
E: But the Ambrosial Arbor is no ordinary crisis. It put everyone on edge, and my pawn shop was no exception. Even as someone born and raised on Xianzhou, it was the first time I have seen something as serious as this. I even considered closing my shop to hide at home.

C: 别光说这茶了，你说说书吧。
E: Don't just tell me about tea. Tell me one of your stories.

C: 先生的话本该更新了吧？
E: It's time for you to update your story, isn't it?

C: 我喜欢喝浓的。
E: I like it strong.

C: 乘客？你们那儿没有我能做的工作吗，那就算了，我对你们这艘星舰不感兴趣了。
E: Passenger? Have you got nothing around here that I can do? Forget it then. I'm not interested in this starship of yours any longer.

C: 不能接受。
E: I wouldn't.

C: 嗯！不好意思，我们之前认识吗？
E: Oof! Sorry, have we met?

C: 你犯了什么罪？
E: What crime did you commit?

C: 仙舟不允许丰饶孽物滋生，因此也定下了严格的律法，约束长生种的行为。
E: Xianzhou forbids the propagation of the Abominations of Abundance, and laid down strict laws to restrain the long-life species' behavior.

C: 实际上，我也接受审问好些次了…你听说过仙舟俗语「罄竹难书」吗？他们就是这样形容我的，「作案前后跨度过大」，直到现在还没处理完。
E: Actually, I've already been interrogated multiple times already... Have you ever heard of Xianzhou saying "one-too-many"? That was how they described my crimes — "great disparity before and after my crimes." They have yet to finish processing my misdeeds.

C: 你拿我当故事会了？不过我倒是没意见啦…这次就给你讲一个比较好玩的故事吧。
E: Do you take me for some storyteller? Not that I mind... I'll tell you something more fun this time.

C: 我本来打算糊弄过去，就请他看看打火机和幻戏。这人倒也厉害的，压根不信什么神仙法术，坚称是我使了障眼法，派兵拘走了我。
E: I initially intended to dupe him, so I just showed him a cigarette lighter and some immersia. This man was a tough sell though, and he didn't believe a word of it. He insisted that I resorted to illusive trickery, and had his men arrest me.

C: 但这次实在没办法了，我启动了金人。那两个金人过来，面对着传统工艺制造的监狱，赤手空拳就给它拆掉了。
E: But now I had no choice but to activate them. They marched into the prison and tore the primitive bars open with their bare hands.

C: 昨晚风可太大了。我本来还在睡觉呢，只听着神策府那边儿传出了哐哐砸地的声音。早上我到星槎海一看，哎哟，有一尊石狮子被风给刮到港口来了。
E: The wind last night was roaring. I was asleep, but then I heard the sounds of something being smashed over at the Seat of Divine Foresight. And when I came to Starskiff Haven this morning, gosh, a stone lion had been blown by the wind all the way to the harbor.

C: 那就再聊个五块钱的。
E: Alright, give me another skit worth my penny.

C: 哈哈哈哈，我看出来了，你也是对仙舟文化好奇的化外民。
E: Hahaha, I can tell! You're an Outworlder with a curiosity for Xianzhou culture.

C: 我叫霍华德，是星际和平公司的贸易专员，这次来仙舟也是为了一点技术交流的缘分，幸会。
E: The name's Howard. I'm a trade commissioner for the Interastral Peace Corporation, or IPC. I've come here to trade tech with Xianzhou. A pleasure to make your acquaintance.

C: 幸会，我是{NICKNAME}。
E: It's a pleasure to meet you, I'm {NICKNAME}.

C: 没别的事情了，辛苦了。
E: That's all. Keep up the good work.

C: …你可真敢问啊，仙舟有仙舟的规矩，我们不该高声谈论。
E: ...You sure ask hard-hitting questions. Xianzhou has rules — we should not be talking about this in public.

C: 不过，我倒也不是一直在干这个工作。再往前几百年，我是一艘商船的队长；再往前几百年，我是黉学里的商学教授……算啦，都只是工作罢了。
E: However, several centuries back, I was a captain of a trade ship. Centuries before that, I was a business professor in a lyceum... Never mind, they're just jobs.

C: 驭空大人将「鸣火」交托于我，让我替停云好生操持。我看着那些她的旧部下，实在不知道要怎么向他们解释现状……
E: Madam Yukong entrusted me with the Whistling Flames to take care of for Tingyun. Looking at her former subordinates, I honestly didn't know how to explain the situation to them...

C: 自私？你说的也不全对，拒绝「存护」，他们连自私都做不到。
E: Selfish? You are too generous. Rejecting Preservation is worse than selfish.

C: 那你加油，我先走了。
E: Keep up the good work. I must be going now.

C: 你好怪啊。
E: You're weird.

C: 那需要甲类驾照…
E: That requires a Class-A license...

C: 真是太感谢了！
E: Thank you so much!

C: 我这次出航，不知道要多久才会回来了…即使要两百年，你也会等我吗？
E: I'm not sure how long I'll be away for this time... Perhaps two hundred years. Will you wait for me?

C: 都说了有东西作祟，工造司都把术算机拖回去维修啦。长点心吧你！
E: I told you something was up, and the Artisanship Commission ended up recalling a computational device for repairs. Pay attention!

C: 幸亏那时他在星际和平公司混得还可以，才搞到了最后一张离开的船票……
E: Luckily, he had contacts at the IPC, so he managed to get on the last ship out of there...

C: 南帝说参加完什么盛会就来会会朋友，我相信他。
E: The Southern Emperor said he'd meet a friend after attending some banquet. I believe him.

C: 说实话，我不太相信这是他的遗物，尽管这真的很像……
E: Honestly, I have trouble believing this is what he left behind, even if it looks really authentic...

C: 这次张贴广告是你负责的？
E: Are you responsible for the poster this time?

C: 知道了，知道了。
E: I know, I know.

C: 离开镇妖塔。
E: Leave the suppression tower.

C: 这世道真是变了，现在的人活得实在毫无乐趣……
E: This world really has changed. People nowadays have no joy in their lives...

C: 人们为了钱出卖自己的生命，爱情和忠诚；又用钱买下他们本不可能买到的时间、快乐和死亡……在这个过程里，我见过太多太多奇妙的事情。
E: People sell off their life, love, and loyalty for money. Then, they use that money to buy the time, happiness, and death that they could never have afforded before... I have witnessed many miraculous things throughout this process.

C: 嗯嗯，我会陷入休眠，而当我醒来，照片里的世界会陪伴我。
E: Mmm, I'll fall asleep and when I wake up, the world in the photo will be with me.

C: 你问对人了。燎原的碎片们散落已久，关于腾骁的记忆，许多岁阳早已模糊不清了。但唯独我还记得……
E: You're asking the right person. Ignamar's fragments have long been scattered, and Teng Xiao's memory is fuzzy for many heliobi. Yet I remain, the only one who remembers everything...

C: 他和如今这个…神策将军，完全没有一丝相像的地方。他是个纯粹的武人，来去直截了当。不知他为何竟选了这么一个奸猾狡诈的继任者……
E: There's absolutely nothing in common between him and this current... Divine Foresight. He is a pure warrior, blunt and straightforward in every way. Who knows why he'd choose a successor as crafty and cunning as this one...

C: 不过，人家和那些只会上班填数据的{RUBY_B#公共木人桩}货色{RUBY_E#}不一样，我身上装着痛觉模拟器，有着更为真切的打击反馈。
E: But, I'm obviously different from those {RUBY_B#public wooden dummy}data pushers{RUBY_E#} who just clock in. I'm outfitted with pain simulators that can receive impact feedback more realistically.

C: 打我！求求你了！
E: Hit me! Please!

C: 不要因为我是娇花而怜惜我！
E: Don't look down on me just because I'm a delicate little flower!

C: 我按照前世笔记上面的方式修炼，果然武功大进。这么说吧，在武学这条路上，我是出生在起跑线的人。我学「我」自己，这可不算作弊吧？
E: I trained according to the instructions left behind by my previous self, and my martial arts inevitably improved. On the path of martial arts, I am someone who was born at the starting line. It's not considered cheating if I learn from myself, is it?

C: 在外人看来，本座是权欲熏心，又或者酷爱征伐，才会如此渴求持节将兵吧…这样的流言我听过不少，倒也无所谓。
E: Outsiders might see me craving military authority, then surmise that I am power-hungry or fanatical about warfare... I've heard many such rumors and have paid them no mind.

C: 这字我咋看不懂？
E: How come I don't recognize this character?

C: 真是一首好诗！好诗！
E: What a beautiful verse! Well done~

C: 你就只是在吹牛吧？
E: Are you just bragging?

C: 也对。那下个月给他们涨工资！
E: That's right. Then they should get a raise next month!

C: 看着这一箱货物价格…
E: That's the price for one crate?

C: 就当是对心境的磨炼吧。
E: I'll see it as a chance to train myself to be tougher.

C: 强身健体，不容错过！怎么样，感兴趣的话可以进来免费跟练哦！
E: Don't miss the opportunity to keep fit! Come in for a free trial session if you are interested!

C: 魁首大人决不会失败的！纵有千军万马，云骑也不可能克服魔阴身的障碍！
E: The master primus will never fail! Even with all their power, the Cloud Knights will never be able to overcome the woes of mara!

C: 不过要是那样，昏光庭院发挥的场所可就更少啦。
E: But if that happens, there would be a lesser need for the Twilight Courtyard.

C: 不便在于，人心所思所想、掩于神色之下的情绪，诸多本可凭借金丝知晓的细末之事，如今我要重新学着去「阅读」了。
E: The inconvenience lies in having to relearn how to "read" all those subtle details... People's thoughts and desires, the emotions hidden beneath their expressions. Things I used to easily discern through the golden threads.

C: 好温馨的互动感。
E: Such a heartwarming interaction.

C: 留下与我们共进晚餐吧，也讲讲那些星空的故事。想吃点什么？
E: Stay for dinner with us and share those stories of the starry skies. What would you like to eat?

C: 赛飞儿是受人景仰的大英雄！
E: Cipher is a legendary hero that everyone looks up to!

C: 别提了，那一世我用谎话替奥赫玛延续千年白昼的事，已经被大伙传开了。
E: Don't even mention it. Everyone's already spreading the story about how I used lies to extend Okhema's eternal day in that lifetime.

C: 这不是口嫌体正直吗？
E: So his words and actions don't match?

C: 呵呵，这只是一枚普通的大地兽蛋。
E: Hehe. It's just a regular dromas egg.

C: 咦？
E: Huh?

C: 我只是借此机会考验一下你的医术罢了。可别太得意忘形哦，树庭女孩。
E: I was just taking the chance to test your medical skills. Don't get too full of yourself, Grove girl.

C: 说话不能没有礼貌，小飞儿。对医生，要尊重！
E: Mind your manners, Little Ciphy. Show some respect to the doctor!

C: 有什么希望我铭记的东西吗？
E: Is there anything you want me to remember?

C: 容我再思考一下。
E: Let me think about it.

C: 荒笛？吉奥里亚的至伟造物，无缘得见的历代大地之主，原来是它……
E: Terravox? The greatest creation of Georios, the unseen ruler of the earth through the ages... so it was you...

C: 呜嗡……
E: Grumph...

C: 还以为你会对大地兽祛魅。
E: I thought you'd strip away the mystique of the dromases.

C: 呜嗡…放心，我还没有老迈到那个份上。
E: Grumph... Don't worry. I'm not that old yet.

C: …都不知道你这话我该怎么接了。
E: ...Is that really something one can boast about?

C: 我看小说里有「一朝悟透，胜过百年修行」的说法。
E: I've read novels where they say, "having a eureka moment is better than a hundred years of hard training."

C: 我的嘴像要被烧伤了！
E: My mouth feels like it was burnt!

C: 兄弟再坚持一会。
E: Hang in there, brother.

C: 有什么，不就打输了么？
E: Come on, it's just a loss.

C: 快递包装采用了鹤运物流最先进的防腐保鲜技术，确保刑期五百年以内的客户刑满释放时，仍然可以感受到跨越时间的售后服务。
E: To preserve and maintain the freshness of its contents, the delivery packaging utilizes the cutting-edge technology of the Heron Express. This ensures that customers set to be released within the next <unbreak>500</unbreak> years can still experience the after-sales service that transcends time.

C: 唯有停止思考才能浇灭永恒的疯狂
E: Only by stopping their thoughts can one eliminate eternal madness

C: 脏的不是我，是世界
E: It is not me that it is dirty. It is this world.

C: 步离人。
E: A borisin.

C: 毛发旺盛的囚犯。
E: A convict with extreme hair growth.

C: 嘁，被发现了。
E: Tsk, I've been discovered.

C: 再见了，敏锐的家伙。
E: So long, perceptive one.

C: 一只精美的纸鸢，位列仙舟孩子最爱玩具排行榜第二，仅次于合金超可动神霄雷府总司驱雷掣电追魔扫秽天君。
E: A beautiful kite is the second most popular toy among Xianzhou children, just behind the alloy Lightning-Wielding Thunder-Clapping Spirit-Squashing Lord.

C: 哈？你再想想！我觉得你不配使用浮梯。
E: Hah? Think more seriously! I don't think you're fit to use the levitator.

C: 你真是个天才。
E: You're a genius.

C: 卢卡赢了！太开心了！
E: Luka won! I'm over the moon!

C: 博识学会认为这种花卉很可能有某种意义上的「情绪」，原因是其毫无缘由的明暗变化——毕竟心情不好的时候，谁都不想发光。
E: The Intelligentsia Guild believes that the flower is very likely to have different moods. It is because the brightness of its glow will change for no reason. After all, no one wants to glow when they are in a foul mood.

C: 一幅绘有天舶司标志的宣传画，出自谁人之手已不言而喻。
E: It is a poster with the logo of the Sky-Faring Commission. It is obvious who is its issuer.

C: 一艘小型货运星槎，看起来要比通常的星槎笨重许多。
E: A small freight starskiff that looks way bulkier than a normal starskiff.

C: 这一列案牍库的铭牌上标注着「大敌 • 孽物」。
E: The plate on this file repository is labeled "Nemesis — Abomination."

C: 「星际和平公司总部计有七个部门：『市场开拓部』、『业务巩固部』、『战略投资部』、『筑材物流部』、『技术研发部』、『人才激励部』、『传统项目部』。」
E: "The headquarters of the IPC consists of seven departments: Marketing Development Department, Business Consolidation Department, Strategic Investment Department, Building Material Logistics Department, Technology Department, Talent Motivation Department, and Traditional Project Department."

C: 「受『寿瘟祸祖』侵蚀的世界散落于银河各处，这些世界原本具有各自多样的生态系统和文明，但在药师行过后却一律坠入了长生诅咒，在孽物折磨下行将崩溃。」
E: "The worlds suffering from the corrosion of the Plagues Author are scattered across the cosmos. These worlds, which initially had diverse ecosystems and civilizations, have fallen under a curse of immortality following Yaoshi's corrosion and succumbed to the torture of abominations."

C: 其实神策府的每一尊石狮子都有自己的名字。它们遵守古老的仙舟武德，会在战斗之前向对手报名致意——但如今通晓其名的活人已是屈指可数了。
E: Every stone lion at the Seat of Divine Foresight has a different name. Abiding by the traditional Xianzhou martial art ethics, they will greet their opponents by introducing themselves before the start of a battle. But now, few living people know their names.

C: 呃…这是现场采访哦？
E: Er... You know this is a live interview.

C: 「『小型中子辐射炸弹』已绑定，请勿离开本机感应范围——爆炸倒数计时将在无法感应到注册者生物信息时立即启动。」
E: "Mini-neutron bomb has been linked. Please do not leave the vicinity of our sensors. Countdown to detonation will start immediately if registrant's biometric data cannot be sensed."

C: 「机巧鸟不应该被鹤运物流奴役！它们应该在天空中自由飞翔！——放生帮。」
E: "Cycranes aren't slaves for the Heron Express! They should soar freely in the sky! — The Unshackled."

C: 一只快递盒，有部分已被不明液体浸湿。密封数字单据的货品名称表示该货物将被用于放生。
E: A courier package that is partially saturated by an unknown liquid. The digital label clearly states that the item inside will be used for a controlled release.

C: 「你在我身边时，我试图背诵你！像学宫里的学童背诵最动人的诗！我阅读着你，一字一句地试着记住你！」天啊，这人真的爱用感叹号。
E: "I try to memorize you when you're around, like I'm learning to admire the most romantic poem as a student at the academy! I scrutinize the sentences that represent you and try to remember every single one of them!" The writer must be a fan of the exclamation point.

C: 命运自会安排好一切——现在还不到你出手的时候。
E: Everything is destined. Now isn't the time for you to meddle with the affairs.

C: 「你吃了什么不干净的东西？你为什么在不停打颤？」你无声发问。
E: "Did you eat things that had gone bad? Why are you trembling?" You ask in your mind.

C: 当我们喝「茶」时，我们喝的是「茶叶」在液体中的萃取物。杜氏茶庄的每一款饮品中都放了茶叶，完全符合以上定义。
E: When we drink "tea," what we are drinking is the extract from "tea leaves" in a liquid. Every drink from Du's Teahouse contains tea leaves, so they completely fit this definition.

C: 「但他们错了——你眼前这束花便是例证。我用三百年的青春，找到了几万年来未曾被发现的新方法，培育出了这束蓝玫瑰，只为了将它送给你，我的爱人。」
E: "But they were mistaken. These flowers before you is the proof. I spent three hundred years of my life to search for a new method that has not been discovered over these tens of thousands of years, and created this blue rose just for you, my love."

C: 完全没听说过这个乐队。
E: I've never heard of this band before.

C: 不准质疑！先相信！
E: Cast your doubts aside! Stay strong!

C: 酒店的金库门，边缘是一张巨大的唱片。倘若大堂的音乐停止，便是有人要取出极其贵重的东西。
E: The door to the hotel vault, bordered with a huge record. If the lobby music stops, it means that someone is going to try and remove something extremely valuable.

C: 《梦境的数种拟像》
E: Dreamscape: A Catalog of Simulacra

C: 挂在门口的标语：我们制造真理。
E: A slogan hangs on the door: We create the truth.

C: 如果你想在梦中享受豪华的酒店套房，这会是你的不二之选。
E: If you wish to enjoy a luxurious hotel suite in your dream, there is no better choice.

C: 你看完了书，却怎么也记不住它的内容——据说人从梦中醒来后也是如此。
E: You finish reading the book, but somehow can't remember its contents. It's said that this phenomenon is the same for someone who has just woken up from a dream.

C: 那个时候，她为什么要说「对不起」呢？她脑海中所想的会是什么呢？倘若你们动作再快一点的话，那傻丫头是不是就不用死了呢？
E: At that moment, why did she apologize? What was she thinking? If you had reacted faster, would that silly girl not have died?

C: 我还有事，先走一步。
E: I should get going.

C: 惠特克爵士的脸上浮现一丝笑意，其中夹杂着嘲弄、蔑视和怜悯。
E: Sir Whittaker's face breaks into a smirk of mockery, disdain, and sympathy.

C: 何其可笑！我本寄希望于能找到一个独立而睿智的灵魂，可我最终得到的是什么？
E: How ironic! I had pinned my hopes on finding an independent and wise soul, but what do I get in the end?

C: 在这座梦想之城，每个人都有向上走的路，缺少的只是机遇…和些微的运气。
E: In this city of dreams, everyone wants to scale the ladder of success, but they lack opportunity... and a little luck.

C: 我们愿意为您提供这样的窗口。要是不抓住机会，落到底层可就怨不得人了。
E: And we would like to provide that window of opportunity to you. If you miss out, don't blame us for landing flat on your feet.

C: 那些客房真的很迷人，对吧？居然能把整个星球都打造成酒店，这份想象力和执着的决心可太了不起了。
E: Those rooms are mesmerizing, no? To turn the entire planet into a hotel — that type of creativity and determination are to be admired.

C: 从那时起，不管走到哪，总能看见有人跟着我…您瞧，那边几个假装在等车的就是！
E: From that day on, no matter where I went, I would notice people following me... Look, like those few people pretending to be waiting for pick-ups!

C: 是场面描写不够血肉模糊吗？是剧情发展不够惊险刺激吗？是节奏不够紧张、气氛不够压抑吗？
E: Are my descriptions not visceral enough? Is my plot development not harrowing and thrilling enough? Is the pace lacking, the ambience not suppressive enough?

C: 我其实不喜欢待在演播厅。那间屋子的门噪音超大，就像…就像一只濒死的伊须磨洲海豚。
E: I don't actually like being in the studio. The door to that room is super noisy, just like... just like a dying Insumousu dolphin.

C: 我的学生，我亲手培养出来的好学生，她拿走了属于我的一切——舞台，光芒，声音，前程……
E: She was my student, the prize student I taught with my own two hands. She took away everything that belonged to me: The stage, the lights, my voice, my future...

C: 为了匹诺康尼的福祉，我居然不得不和理想背道而驰…真是讽刺。
E: It's just... ironic that I have to betray my own ideals for the sake of Penacony.

C: 变！给我变！
E: Transform! I say, transform!

C: 冥冥之中，你感受到了一种…熟悉，仿佛它是你失散多年的{M#兄弟}{F#姐妹}一样。
E: Somehow, you feel a sense of... familiarity. It's as if the trashcan before you is your long-lost {M#brother}{F#sister}.
<size=28>NOOOOOO!!!</size>

C: 你在这里做什么？
E: What are you doing here?

C: 是啊，我是养子。
E: Yes, I'm their adopted son.

C: 这位智械仰望着天空，对周围的一切都不作反应，包括你。
E: The Intellitron gazes into the sky, not reacting to the surroundings, which include you.

C: 见到韦和小佩的时候…我很难用语言形容自己当时的心理活动。
E: When I saw Wes and Pennie... I found it difficult to describe my feelings at that time.

C: 我的身份并不重要，{F#小姐}{M#先生}！一位长得像广告牌的推销员，或者一只干着推销员工作的广告牌？
E: My identity is not important, {F#miss}{M#sir}! Am I a salesman that happens to resemble a billboard, or a billboard stuck in the role of a salesman?

C: 我正在寻找我的爱人！她是匹诺康尼的珍宝，人群中最耀眼的启明星，所有人都会被她吸去目光——即使是广告牌也不例外！
E: This is my love that I am searching for! She is the treasure of Penacony, the brightest star in the crowd, catching everyone's attention — That's right, not even a billboard is exempt!

C: 再见了，{F#美丽的小姐}{M#英俊的先生}，祝您旅途愉快——如果您以后在某处遇见她，请务必替我递上一句话：「有只广告牌在中央车站前等你，它会一直等下去的！」
E: Farewell, {F#beautiful lady}{M#handsome gentleman}, I wish you a pleasant journey... If you happen to meet her somewhere, please tell her one thing for me: "There is a billboard in front of the Golden Central Station waiting for you. It will always be waiting for you!"

C: 嘀嗒、嘀嗒！我第一次在钟表上听到如此轻盈的计时声，到底是哪里的变化？
E: Tick tock, tick tock! This is the first time I've heard such a light chiming on a clock. What is different here?

C: 嗯…好吧，我知道那些段子很不专业，但确实好玩。谁叫我疯狂地爱上了脱口秀呢。
E: Well... fine. I admit those jokes were not professional, but they were fun. I suppose it's my own fault for falling head over heels for stand-up comedy.

C: 那双手保养得当、指节修长，翻飞跃动激起黑白分明的波浪。
E: Well-maintained and adorned with slender knuckles, they flutter and leap, creating waves of black and white.

C: 家族是什么？
E: What is The Family?

C: 总之，有困难，找猎犬。
E: Anyway, come to us Bloodhounds if you're in trouble.

C: 我向来工作之余就喜欢来这里放松放松心情，小友之后若是得了空，记得多来找我多聊聊啊！
E: I like to relax here after work. If you ever find the time, don't forget to stop by and have a chat!

C: 我还挺喜欢你的…要不你就别走了？想要什么只管开口，只要是用钱能满足的需求，我都可以帮你实现。
E: I like you quite a bit... How about you stay here? All you have to do is ask — as long as it can be settled with money, I can make all your wishes come true.

C: 不过，或许就是因为你目前还别无所图，我才与你说了这么多吧……
E: Then again, perhaps it's because you've shown no ill intent so far, that I've spoken so much to you...

C: 我？我只是一位在宇宙中旅行的演奏家，在各个世界了解当地的音乐形式，再把我自己的音乐带到这个世界。
E: Me? I'm just a musician traveling the universe, learning about local music on various worlds and bringing my own music to these worlds.

C: 自动乐团、托腔机巧、义体奏乐宏…这些东西让我们乐手数年乃至数十年、数百年的勤学苦练都失去了意义！
E: The automated orchestra, musical accompaniment ingenia, artificial music creation... These are the things that render the years, decades, and even centuries of hard work by us musicians utterly meaningless!

C: 布罗娜看着自动乐团，嘴角颤动起来——她开始发出不屑的嗤笑。
E: Brona looks at the automated orchestra, the corners of her mouth twitching as she exudes a scornful sneer.

C: 是对买车感兴趣吗？我们的车行随时欢迎您。
E: Interested in buying a car? You are always welcome at our dealership.

C: 何必反思过去？何必焦虑未来？我们唯一要做的就是享受当下，纵情玩耍。
E: Why dwell on the past? Why worry about the future? The only thing we need to do is enjoy the moment and have fun!

C: 比方说…只要触发某个开关就能调转重力、让人在墙上走？这种功能到底有什么用？花里胡哨的，很有趣吗？
E: For example... What if there's a switch that could turn off gravity and allow people to walk along walls? Is this function useful? Is it fun to get wrapped up in this nonsense?

C: 那些可悲的建筑大师们，苦心孤诣一辈子所构想出来的「建筑艺术」，还远远不如一个马桶！
E: The "art of architecture" that these pitiful architectural masters have spent their entire lives striving to conceive is not even equal to a simple toilet!

C: 嗯，如果遇上任何困难，请及时联系「猎犬」。
E: If you need any assistance, please don't hesitate to contact us Bloodhounds.

C: 皮皮西开始分泌出奇怪的汗水……
E: The "Pepeshi" starts to secrete an unusual sweat...

C: 这才刚到高潮部分…
E: The story is reaching its climactic part...

C: 问得好，问得好！初来乍到的客人，还不知道「窥梦电话」的神奇之处！
E: A wonderful question! Please allow me to introduce you to the wonders of the Dreampeek Call, dear new guest!

C: 我要用什么才能把你留住？我给你迅捷的启动、帅气的漂移、稳定的急刹。我给你一辆飞车紧紧拥抱着地面的安全感。
E: How do I win your heart? By having me, you'll enjoy a swift start of the engine, the ability to make cool drifts, and a reliable emergency brake. Even though I move fast, I can still offer you a sense of security.

C: 坐稳咯。我们现在就出发。
E: Sit tight, we're setting off right now.

C: 送我去「黄金的时刻」。
E: Bring me to the Golden Hour.

C: 这最后一个脆筒似乎有些特别——准确的说，它的形状有些不妙。不过你还没来得及感到不适，巧克力味的甜筒就已经在你嘴里融化了。
E: This final cone is quite special. To be more precise, it has an odd shape. Before you can feel the discomfort caused by the difference, the chocolate-flavored cone has already melted in your mouth.

C: 「你可说不准天上何时掉馅饼。」
E: "You can't tell when the windfall will come."

C: （保持沉默）
E: (Remain silent.)

C: （保持沉默）
E: (Remain silent.)

C: 如果雕像能多多获取「金表钞」里藏着的力量，早晚有一天，美梦小镇的所有人就都能看到我的模样啦！
E: The more energy the statue acquires from Clock Credits, the sooner everyone in Dreamville can see me!

C: 这不是明摆着的嘛？此时此刻，您就是整个梦境十二时分里最闪耀的那颗幸运星！
E: Isn't it pretty obvious? You're the shiniest lucky star across all Twelve Hours in the Dreamscape!

C: 梦境特产，如假包换。
E: Dreamscape's specialty, guaranteed genuine or your money back.

C: 我…原本也算个小有名气的梦泡艺术家，代表作有《漆皮木偶与太空仓鼠》、《第十三个时刻》、《迷因的野餐》……
E: I... was a dream bubble artist of small renown, with my representative works being Patent Leather Puppet and Space Hamster, The Thirteenth Moment, and Meme's Picnic...

C: 嗯…这么说或许有些扫兴，但抱歉，我现在还没准备好谈论关于他的话题。
E: Well... I'm sorry for disappointing you, but I'm not ready to talk about him at the moment.

C: 我承认他在「梦与心灵」领域的研究无人可及，但这不意味着他能成为一个独裁者、能掌握对思想和话语的生杀大权！
E: Indeed, his research in the field of dreams and psychology was unparalleled, but that didn't give him the right to be a tyrant! Or to decide whether some thoughts and speech should exist!

C: 唯一值得庆幸的是，我们暂时还看不到那么一天。
E: The only good thing is that such a day won't be happening in the near future.

C: 直到现在，那副战甲依然披挂于我身。
E: I'm still wearing the armor now.

C: 关于匹诺康尼…
E: About Penacony...

C: 你不能外出吗？
E: Can you not leave?

C: …多了俩什么？
E: ...Gaining a couple of what?

C: …我？哈哈，我已经在厌恶它了，因为我回到了这里。
E: ...Me? Haha, I already hate my home... because now I'm back here.

C: 零食呢？我向您倾情推荐美梦脆筒，就像广告上说的——「您能够品尝到美梦的味道」！
E: Then what about a snack? I would recommend the Dreamy Cone! You know, the ad says: "Taste the flavor of your dreams!"

C: 没错，我是天天关心家族的人才引进政策，天天算那些乱七八糟的没用积分…但人生总得有点奔头吧？
E: That's right, I keep my eye on The Family's talent acquisition policies and count those useless, ridiculous credits every day... But people need ambition, right?

C: 想听听你对我的看法。
E: I want to know what you think about me.

C: 能做到这点，就已经比沉陷在梦境中、只知道享乐的人们要好太多了。我认为您相当优秀——不是恭维，是真心这么觉得哦。
E: Your empathy already makes you far better than the people drowning in this Dreamscape and only seeking to indulge in fun. I think you are quite outstanding — It's not flattery. I really do this so.

C: （进行搭讪）
E: (Chat)

C: 安抚心灵的神奇饮品，要是能在梦境里推广开来该有多好啊。
E: A magical drink that soothes the soul. It'd be wonderful if it could spread far and wide in the Dreamscape.

C: 隐夜鸫的工头说了，只要努力工作，总有一天我也能以宾客而非修理工的身份走进来。
E: The supervisor from Nightingale told me that if I worked hard, the day would come when I could be here as a guest and not someone doing construction.

C: 真好，离开以后，你一定会遇上很多有趣的事情吧。
E: Great. You'll have all sorts of interesting things happen after you leave.

C: 前段时间生病去医院走了一遭，好不容易屯的钱一下子又没了不少，天天这么干哪可能不生病，完全就是个无底洞。
E: I got sick a while back and went to the hospital. All the money I worked so hard to get went down the drain. How can I not get sick when I work this hard every day? It's a vicious cycle.

C: 那些高高在上的家伙有把我们当作人吗？我们只是齿轮和零件！损耗了就扔掉。工厂零件还要定期花钱保养呢。
E: Do the higher-ups even see us as people? We're nothing more than cogs and gears! We're easily replaceable. Even factory components require maintenance.

C: 当然可以，亲爱的。如果是你的话，我将很乐意献上宝贵的下班时间。
E: Of course you can, darling. I'd be more than willing to spend my precious off-hours with you.

C: …失敬失敬。各位的事迹我听说了，感谢你们让我离谐乐大典的舞台更进一步。
E: ...Excuse me. I've heard about your deeds. Thank you for bringing me one step closer to center stage at the Charmony Festival.

C: 所以，你懂吗？我的意思是…虽然神主谱写的每个音符都同样重要，但有的音符比其他音符更重要…我是说，更*同谐*，哈哈。
E: So then, do you get it? What I mean is... despite every note being created with equal importance by the Great One, in actual fact some notes are more important than others... I'm saying, some of them are more Harmonious, haha.

C: 请。
E: Please.

C: 呜。其实…超级骇客的故事，都是骗你的。你不会生气吧？
E: *sob*... actually... all those stories about being a super hacker? They were lies. You're not mad at me, are you?

C: 我喜欢你制造的彩虹。
E: I loved the rainbow that you made.

C: 不瞒你说，我可是盛会巨星。
E: To be honest with you, I won Festive Superstar.

C: 只要哨子一响，全世界的人都能立马进入状态，根本用不着我多费口舌。这样一来，我的语言模组的故障率就大大减小了，使用寿命也能延长好几倍。
E: One blow of the whistle and everyone just falls into place without me having to waste my breath. That reduces my speech module's failure rate and stretches out its lifespan several times over.

C: 红哨小姐连续发出一阵短促、欢快的哨音，连片场的空气中都飘满了她对工作的热爱。
E: Miss Red Whistle lets out a series of short, cheery whistles. Her passion for work seems to even permeate the very vibe of the film set.

C: 我刚到这的时候，也尝试过重拾老本行。可没过多久我就想通了，就算夺来了东西，也没法带回现实啊，那何必还要冒这个风险？
E: When I first got here, I tried picking up my old profession. But it didn't take me long to realize that I couldn't take any of the stuff I pilfered back to the real world. So, what's the point of taking that risk?

C: …我先走了。你也最好离他远点，这人多半是偷渡来的，在流梦礁待久了就会成这样。
E: ...I'm getting out of here. You should stay away from him, too. He probably came here as a stowaway, spent too long in the Dreamflux Reef, and ended up like this.

C: 我不知道该怎么形容那个地方…它就像是「黄金的时刻」的翻版，但…是活的。没错，字面意义上的「活的」。
E: I don't know how to describe that place... It was like a duplicate of the "Golden Hour," but... It was alive. That's right, exactly what it sounds like... It was "alive."

C: 我受够了，真的受够了——但我有时候竟然还觉得他们说得有道理…就我现在这种状态，真的是能用*好*来形容的吗？
E: I've had enough. I really have... But, sometimes I do think that they have a point... Can I really call the state of my life now good?

C: 实际上，那群受害者都有一个共同之处——现在你已经知道它是什么了。不过我当时并没有直接想通，反倒因为过度思考而有些神志不清……
E: In reality, all of the victims had one thing in common... Now, you know what that is. But back then, I didn't put it together straight away. If anything, I overthought it so much that I ended up even more confused...

C: 所以我才打算让你先探探路，把家族为我布下的陷阱都踩干净。结果呢？我在第五层，家族在第一层。
E: That's why I wanted you to explore the route first so that you could trigger all the traps laid for me in advance. But, where did that leave me? I'm here on the fifth level, and The Family is on the first.

C: 除了那俩骚扰我的公司喽啰外，什么麻烦都没有。啧啧，感觉还有点平淡呢……
E: Aside from the two IPC minions who messed with me, there were no other troubles. Tsk, it almost feels a little boring.

C: 待的时间一长，我也有些喜欢这个地方了——主要是喜欢那个巨大的忆质空洞——它让我想起了宇宙。
E: As time has passed, I've come to like this place... I enjoy the giant memoria void more than anything... It reminds me of the universe.

C: 受伤之后，我的身体一天不如一天了，最近就连入梦的时候也会感觉疲惫。
E: Since I was injured, my health has been worsening by the day. Recently, I've been feeling fatigued even when entering the dream.

C: 工作这么清闲吗？
E: Is your work really so relaxing?

C: 唉，我其实一直很清楚钟表小子是个虚拟形象…也许我是时候该从年少时的幻梦中走出来了。
E: *sigh* I'm aware that Clockie is merely a fictional figure... Perhaps it's time for me to let go of the fantastical dreams of my youth.

C: 未必，想想那些为匹诺康尼献出生命的人，还有几人知晓他们的名字？
E: Not necessarily. Think of those who sacrificed their lives for Penacony. How many still know their names?

C: 再见。
E: Goodbye.

C: 此外，本店还售卖由我们自己录制的黑胶唱片…如果你觉得无聊了、或是心情不太好，都可以来这里转转。
E: We also sell our own vinyl records here... Come here and flip through some if you're ever bored or feeling down in the dumps.

C: 哔哔哔，我是智械。
E: Bibibi! I. Am. Intellitron.

C: 现实的食品滋养我们的肉体，梦境中的食物充实着我们的精神。从某种意义上说，精神食粮的重要性一点也不逊色于现实中的食物。
E: Real food nourishes our bodies, while Dreamscape food enriches our spirit. In a way, spirit fuel is no less important than real food.

C: 今天破例给小家伙们放假一天——要来和我比试吗？啾啾？
E: I made an exception today and gave the little fellas the day off. How about a race with me? Tweet tweet?

C: 在这里，蛮荒中暗含生机、无序中透出安宁…我可以将它变为理想中的乌托邦、变为货真价实的「美梦」。
E: Here, where life is concealed within wilderness, where slivers of peace emerge from disorder... I can turn them into an ideal utopia, into a true dream.

C: 现在回想起来，是勇气、运气、志气…更重要的是「同谐」的信仰与家族的支持，才让我走上了致富的道路！
E: Looking back, it was courage, luck, will... and more importantly, my faith in the Harmony and The Family's support that allowed me to walk the path of fortune!

C: 年轻人，努力吧！累了就喝一瓶苏乐达！
E: Keep it up, young one! Have a sip of SoulGlad if you're ever tired!

C: 最近我老是想不起一些东西的名字，手上拿着手机，却在找手机在哪……
E: I haven't been able to remember the names of some things recently. Or I've got my phone in my hand, but wonder where it is...

C: 哦~顾客，我好开心，好开心呀！
E: Ohh customer, I'm delighted, so delighted!

C: 我的信用点多的是！
E: I have more than enough credits!

C: 男人没有回答，只是平静地注视着你。但你明白这并非拒绝。
E: The man does not reply and continues to observe you calmly. However, you know that he's not rejecting your request.

C: 那明晚……
E: Well then, how about tomorrow night...

C: 「我们这可是一艘豪华客船，怎么能没有水手，体验太不真实了。」
E: "We're supposed to be on board a luxury passenger ship. How could there be no sailors at all? This experience is so unrealistic."

C: 负责宰杀祭祀物的人——一种特定场合中的大厨。
E: Even someone who leads the preparation of sacrificial offerings can be considered a specialty chef.

C: 当我第一次看到自己的信用点多出一个零时…
E: But the first time I saw the extra zero at the end of my credit total...

C: 真希望能早点发现别的佐证啊……
E: I wish we can find some other evidence soon...

C: 此时你留恋的，并不是一口值千金的顶级牛排，而是母星一碗平平无奇的牛肉盖饭。」
E: "Now, what you crave most isn't the premium steak with the expensive price, but a humble bowl of beef rice from your home planet."

C: 你的心中升起疑惑——
E: You suddenly have some misgivings.

C: 可后来事情败露了，星际法庭以「走私星际保护动物罪」给我判了个死刑。
E: Until we were found out. I was given the death penalty by the Interastral Court for the crime of "smuggling protected interstellar animals".

C: 「你意外落入星际监狱。星际法庭毫不留情，给出最严重的判罚！
E: "In a twist of fate, you find yourself cast into the Interastral Prison. The merciless Interastral Court has handed down its harshest sentence to you!"

C: 我的前期投入全都打了水漂…哎，真是倒霉。
E: All my initial investments have gone down the drain... Alas, such unfortunate luck.

C: …在这个世界上只有不断赚钱才能不断前进，才能活下去…可惜啊，我老人家的生命已经要到头了，或许我这辈子都不能达到总监那个职级了吧……
E: In this world, you have to keep making money to move forward and survive... It's sad to think my life is nearing its end and I might never get to hold the title of director...

C: 幸亏带了艾丽卡，有她给我撑场面，加班都倍儿有面子，状态也比以前好了不少！就好像年轻了十岁…不，二十岁！
E: Thank goodness I brought Erica along. With her here to amp up my status, putting in extra work hours becomes something to gloat over. Heck, I even feel much better than before! It's as though I've become ten... no, twenty years younger!

C: （糟了…怎么把心里话不小心说出来了……）
E: (Oh no... How did I accidentally say what I'm thinking...)

C: 贵客光临，汪！客人您好，苏乐达最近搞活动，想来点吗？汪！
E: Welcome, esteemed guest! Woof! SoulGlad is currently running a promotion! Would you like to get some? Woof!

C: 你的名字是怎么回事？
E: What's up with your name?

C: 能给我说说你的故事吗？
E: So, tell me about your story?

C: 好的，稍等，等我检查下预案——根据我们的预算，目前只支持原储备的三种方案。方案详情如下：
E: Okay, please wait a moment while I check the proposals. Hm, our current budget can only support three predetermined designs:

C: 我选塔塔洛夫！
E: I'll go with Tatalov!

C: 谈谈你的生活。
E: Let's talk about your life.

C: 毕业是不可能毕业的，这辈子都不可能毕业的！这里面蕴含着一点人生的智慧，我比其他小年轻要更早领悟到。
E: I'll never ever graduate, not in this lifetime! That's just some life wisdom that I managed to comprehend before the other youngsters did.

C: 被邀请的不止有当年的赛车选手和杰出学生，各学院代表、校长也会出席，传闻格拉克斯校长还在第一届预热派对上喝了个酩酊大醉呢。
E: Other than stellar students and those participating in the race, representatives from each academy and the dean will also be invited to the party. Psst, word has it Dean Glaux got totally plastered at the inaugural kick-off party!

C: 原来你是真喜欢那位啊？
E: So, you're serious about her?

C: 皮皮西…皮皮西…到处都对皮皮西人另眼相待，我真是受够了！
E: Pepeshi... Pepeshi... Everyone treats us so differently just because we're Pepeshi. I've had enough!

C: 结果，连带孙子来玩的老教授开得都比我快，还快了整整半圈。很遗憾吧，对那些本就瞧不起皮皮西的人，我的失败又巩固了他们心中的偏见。
E: In the end, even an old professor who had brought his grandson along for a fun ride drove faster than me. They beat me by half a lap! It's a shame, right? I failed and only reinforced the views of those people who already looked down on Pepeshi.

C: 听够了，满意了？那就去玩你自己的吧。
E: You've heard enough to satisfy you? Go and entertain yourself then.

C: 可如今我越发觉得，我们和他们、这里和那里，其实没有什么本质上的区分——
E: But now I realize, more and more, that there is no difference between us and them, between our planet and theirs...

C: 怎么样，我的好助手，准备好和我一起探索「折纸大学七大不可思议」中的第八个——「睡蕉小猴」了吗？
E: What do you think, my trusty assistant? Are you ready to explore the eighth of The Seven Wonders of Paperfold University — the Slumbernana Monkey?

C: …这是什么新流行的搭讪方式？我怎么没在派对上听人说过。
E: ...Is this some new pick-up tactic? Why didn't I hear about this at a party?

C: 兄弟，你摸起来好舒服。
E: Bro, your fluff ball feels nice.

C: 谢谢，但还是请您先预祝我顺利毕业吧。
E: Thank you, but I think you should wish for me to successfully graduate first.

C: 你有事情要找我吗？
E: Do you need me for something?

C: 是…什么事呢？
E: What... is it?

C: 没什么想问的了。
E: There's nothing else I want to ask.

C: 别太得意忘形。艺术是条看不见尽头的路，走的越远，才越会觉得慌张。要是以为自己现在很厉害，就大错特错了！
E: Don't get full of yourself. Art is a road with no finish line — The further you go, the more unsure you will be. You'd be gravely mistaken if you think you're already good enough!

C: 过奖，只是小股东罢了。
E: You're too kind. I'm just a minor shareholder.

C: 但是…音乐的理念、艺术的精神，还有我的坚持都是不会变的！
E: But... the ideas about music, the spirit of art, and my resolution will never waver!

C: 哼，要是还有下次，我会向学校申请的。和音乐相关的事务，只能由谐乐学院决定，其余学院都不行。
E: Hmph, if there comes a next time, I will make a request to the school — That all affairs regarding music will only be decided by Charmony Academy. The other academies don't cut it.

C: 我完全同意！
E: I totally agree!

C: （写下严肃的寄语）
E: (Write a serious message)

C: 虽然我的戏份不多，不过能进入芮克先生的剧组已经很开心了！有这么高票房的出道作，接下来我要更努力才行！
E: I didn't have much screen time, but I'm super happy to be in Mr. Reca's production crew! With a box office hit like this in my debut, I have to work even harder now!

C: 那你研究筑梦技术了吗？
E: So, have you been studying dreamweaving?

C: 我想问…
E: I want to ask...

C: （写下煽情的寄语）
E: (Write an emotional message)

C: 「失踪的代工厂家，瘫痪的售后服务，不懂事的同型号产品，破碎的他…」
E: "A missing subcontractor, a disabled after sales service, a clueless product of the same model, a shattered him..."

C: 我的名字，来自于姬子女士对我{RUBY_B#虚空万藏}前任主人{RUBY_E#}说的最后一句话。
E: My name, is the last thing Lady Himeko said to my {RUBY_B#Void Archives}previous owner{RUBY_E#}.

C: 提问：为什么「碎星王虫•斯喀拉卡巴兹（拟造）」如此坚硬？
E: What do you call the wife of a Swarm insect?

C: 尽管其中一处…令我相当怀念。
E: There is but one place that lingers in my thoughts, though.

C: 去摘下那颗星星吧！超越所有的对手，变得比任何人都要闪闪发光。
E: Pluck that star! Surpass all competitors and shine brighter than everyone else.

C: 做梦人的梦中你看见薄暮下的高耸穹顶、微风中的莽苍旷野、荒漠上的广袤夜空……
E: Inside the dreamer's dream, you spy a towering dome in the twilight, a zephyr fluttering through the great wilderness, the vastness of the night sky as it spans the wastelands...

C: 你无法克制打开它们的欲望，随手拿起一盒礼物便开始探索，可惜里面既没有闪光的石头，也没有任何你感兴趣的东西。
E: You cannot push down the desire to unwrap them, and randomly pick up a box of presents to begin your exploration. Alas, there are no shimmering stones inside, nor anything that piques your interest.

C: 泳池是游泳的地方，不是用来跑步的，您的行为已经严重干扰到别的客人了！
E: A swimming pool is a place meant for swimming, it's not a place for running around. Your behavior has already severely affected the other guests!

C: 泳池是游泳的地方，不是用来跑步的！
E: A swimming pool is a place meant for swimming, it's not a place for running around!

C: 你看我像钟表小子吗？
E: Do you think I look like Clockie?

C: 能订制去月球的梦吗？
E: Can you make a custom dream about going to the moon?

C: 怎么只有苏乐达…
E: Why is there only SoulGlad...

C: 花钱的感觉就是爽！
E: Spending money feels so good!

C: 这里面流的…是苏乐达？
E: The "water" flowing in here... is SoulGlad?

C: 啊，我的知更鸟…
E: Ah, my dear Robin...

C: 修缮完成后想去哪里？
E: Where do you want to go once it's all fixed up?

C: 汪！
E: Woof!

C: 你不说我都忘了，公园那边冰淇淋杂耍表演就要开始了，我们快过去吧。
E: Oh, thank you for reminding me! I almost forgot the ice cream acrobatic show at the park is about to start. Let's go there.

C: 放在哪一格来着…
E: Which compartment did I put it...

C: 热砂大酒店半价折扣活动。
E: Scorchsand Grand Hotel half-off event.

C: 我就打了个盹儿，怎么赛场都空了？
E: I just dozed off for a bit, why is the entire hall empty?

C: 真的假的，别吓我啊…
E: For real? Don't scare me...
