C: 宾客不要乱跑，乖乖等待接受调查。
E: Esteemed guests, please stay in place and wait for your turn.

C: 业界认为，本次海选可谓是近年来最为热闹的一期，比赛过程中涌现出的诸多人才，更是让不少大公司都亲自下场。
E: The industry generally believes this to be the most exciting audition in recent years. Plenty of amazing contenders have surfaced during the competition, attracting the direct participation of numerous major companies.

C: 快让我离开，耽误了后续的演出，你担得起责任吗？
E: Let me leave right now. You think you can shoulder the responsibility of me missing the upcoming performance?

C: 这块有点老化了…
E: This one's a bit worn out...

C: 所以冠军是势在必得？
E: So the champion's a shoo-in?

C: 本次参赛的目标是？
E: What's the goal of your participation in the auditions this time?

C: 算了，别打听这些了。反正巡航结束我们都得回去了。
E: Forget it. I'm not asking anymore. We have to return once the cruise ends anyway.

C: 我早知道了，我听轮班的同事说，他们还搞了个什么临时的「典当行」，说是什么心愿都能达成，传得神乎其神，我都想下班去看看了。
E: I knew that already. My shift coworker told me. They've even established some pop-up Pawnshop, something about being able to grant any wish. All this miracle talk is spreading like wildfire, and even I wanna go take a look when I get off work.

C: 很难说，家族的骄傲不会轻易屈服，尽管实际情况可能会迫使他们做出决定。
E: Hard to say. The Family's pride will not allow them to easily bend to the acquisition, even if current circumstances force them into a decision.

C: …我见到知更鸟了！
E: ...I see Robin!

C: 你在许多地方都见过老奥帝的画像，但财富学院保存的这幅才是原版，价值不菲，而且还是老奥帝亲自卖给折纸大学的。
E: You've seen Old Oti's portrait in many places, but this one in Fortune Academy is the original — Nigh priceless, and it was Old Oti who personally sold it to Paperfold University.

C: 很想复述给你听，但旁白要保持客观超然的严肃性，并不是写冷笑话的地方。
E: I wish I could recount them, but the narrator must remain objective and serious. This isn't the right time for jokes.

C: 直到某天，有个高喊着「要让世界变得更热闹」的学生闯了进来，强行占据了这间教室，并将你们吸纳为了她的新社团成员。
E: Until one day, some student barges in, shouting "Saving The World By Overloading It With Fun," then takes over this classroom and subsequently absorbs you two as her new club members.

C: …「{NICKNAME}社」。
E: ...The {NICKNAME} Club.

C: ——可喜可贺，可喜可贺。
E: ...Sincere congratulations.

C: …噢！不太明白为什么突然说这个，既然是夸奖，就先谢谢你啦。
E: ...Oh! I don't know why you suddenly said that, but I appreciate the compliment.

C: 喵~
E: Meow~

C: 不准随意上床。
E: No jumping on the bed.

C: 进入潮汐的馈赠
E: Enter Tidal Bounty

C: 很抱歉让您看到我如此失礼的模样，但请放心……
E: I'm sorry for showing such an unsightly scene to you, but please rest assured...

C: …这是哪里？我不是…在浴场？
E: ...Where am I? Am I... in the bath?

C: 即便是这样，你还敢继续喝吗？
E: Even so, do you still dare to drink more?

C: 那你可能要失望了，我并没有什么值得讲述的过去。无非是在元老院上班的爷爷遭遇了一场政治刺杀，结果全家只有我幸存了下来。
E: Then I'm sorry to disappoint. My background is pretty ordinary, except for the fact that my family was targeted in an assassination due to my grandpa's position in the Council of Elders, leaving me as the sole survivor.

C: 「欢迎来到刻法勒庇护的奥赫玛，远道的异乡人。这里是翁法罗斯的最后乐土，也是由黄金裔守护的永恒之城。」
E: "Outlanders from distant lands, welcome to Okhema, the sanctum under the watchful eye of Kephale. This is the Eternal City, shielded by the vigilant Chrysos Heirs, the last paradise in Amphoreus."

C: 沉默中黎明未曾逝去\n凝滞里生命尚存希望
E: Dawn lingers, silent in its eloquent grace.\nHope shines bright amidst the world's stagnant embrace.

C: 「且看黄金裔们如何堕落，被无尽的欲望吞噬折磨；鲜血染红了河流与大地，战斗的呼喊声仍未止息。」
E: "Chrysos Heirs, tormented by their insatiable yearning. Bloodied rivers, soil tainted, battle cries echoing, burning."

C: 嗯，您看起来可真清闲，真让人羡慕…虽然我也差不多。
E: Mm, your apparent idleness is enviable... even if it is similar for me.

C: 我买了！
E: I'll take it!

C: …不过小灰只是看几眼就能学会欧洛尼斯奇迹，听上去也是一件不可能的事情…难道，小灰真的是天才？
E: ...That being said, you took one look at Oronyx's Miracle and learned how to use it. That should've been equally impossible... Could Tribbie be wrong and you are a genius all along?

C: 想听听你的故事。
E: I would like to hear your story.

C: 不，别在意。可能只是风声吧。我有时会去浴池里泡泡，人们说法吉娜的恩赐能洗去一切污秽，但...但为什么我洗不掉那些记忆呢？
E: No, don't pay them any mind. It's probably just the wind. Sometimes I go to the public baths. People say that Phagousa's blessing can cleanse all impurities, but... But why can it never wash away those memories?

C: 昨晚，我梦见我回到了家乡。一切都那么平静，那么美好。然后突然间，黑潮从地底涌出，吞噬了一切。我想跑，但我的腿像灌了铅一样。
E: Last night, I dreamt that I returned to my hometown. Everything was so quiet and beautiful. Then, suddenly, the black tide poured out from the earth and devoured everything. I wanted to run, but my legs felt heavy.

C: 需要倾诉的话，可以找我。
E: If you ever need to talk, you can come to me.

C: 在奥赫玛，我们相信欢宴不仅仅是享乐，更是一种社交和交流的方式。通过共饮，人们放下戒备，敞开心扉。这种氛围下，往往能产生最富创造力的想法。
E: In Okhema, we believe that feasts and parties are not simply opportunities to enjoy a good time. We believe that they are also an important method of socializing and communication. It is through drinking together that people drop their guards and open their hearts. It is this kind of atmosphere that is the richest with creative ideas.

C: 这么多？！
E: That many!?

C: 你要是想买陶瓦工艺品的话，可以去西塔罗斯的铺子瞧瞧，他家的东西质量都有保障，就是最近要排很久的队。
E: If it's ceramic artworks you're after, you can check out Theodoros' store. His stuff is all fantastic, quality guaranteed — but it takes a while to get through the queue.

C: 这个嘛，得看你究竟想要占卜什么——像我这种塔兰顿的信徒，向来都是讲究等价交换的。
E: Well, that all depends on what kind of prophecy you want. As a disciple of Talanton, I believe in equivalent exchange.

C: 借你吉言，但是…
E: Thank you for your auspicious words, but...

C: 你要是喜欢大地兽，希望你能多来看看它们，它们再怎么反常，表现出来还是很温柔粘人的…而且…说不定哪天它们就恢复正常了呢！
E: If you like dromases, I hope you can come visit them often. No matter how weird they might be, they're still always gentle, cuddly, and... maybe one day they'll make a return to normal!

C: 浴场为什么不让你进去？
E: Why aren't you allowed in the baths?

C: 讲讲你的故事！
E: Tell me your story!

C: 真要说有什么特别的，大概就是我有家不回，天天住在浴场里这件事吧？
E: If there was something special... I guess it would be the fact that I never spend any time at home and always stay at the baths.

C: 嗐——也不是什么复杂的故事，不过是有点讨厌自己的原生家庭，不是很想回去抛头露面罢了。
E: Ah... It's not a particularly complex story. I just don't like the home I come from and don't really want to show my face back there.

C: 理想的荣耀之死是与一位强大的敌手搏至无憾，但大多数战士没有那样的机遇。有些人会退而求其次，在战场上随便找个厉害的家伙打成一团，好让自己死得不丢份……
E: The ideal honorable death is for them to find a powerful foe on the battlefield and fight with no regrets, but the majority of warriors will not have this opportunity. Some of them settle for the next best thing and randomly find someone powerful on the battlefield to fight, so they can die with some semblance of honor...

C: 克拉特鲁斯大人是王翼冠军，专职辅佐欧利庞王。作为老兵，他经验丰富，战甲和身上满是刀痕——荣耀的象征。
E: Lord Krateros is a King's Aegis, whose sole duty is to assist King Eurypon. His experience is unrivaled as a veteran soldier, and both his body and armor bear countless scars — all symbols of glory.

C: 还给我…还给我…明明是我和你们共享的…不懂得回报的、自私的凡人…真是……
E: Give it back... to me... I was the one who shared it with you... Selfish mortals who are oblivious to reciprocation... are really...

C: 秘酿浓郁的风味连通全身的感官，渔船开始颠簸，风雨欲来——
E: The ambrosia's thick flavor surges through all your senses, and the fishing boat starts to sway, heralding the approach of a storm...

C: 你优秀的防诈骗意识让你起了疑心，在对方的纠缠不休下，你打开地图选择锚点传送走了——
E: Your excellent mental scam radar alerts you, and amidst the other party's persistence, you open up your map, choose an Anchor and teleport away...

C: 不必惊慌，我并无揭穿你们的打算。
E: Do not panic. I have no intention of exposing you.

C: 近来睡得怎么样？
E: How's your sleep been lately?

C: 你不知道，但你的热情一定打动了他——也可能没有。
E: You can't be certain, but surely your enthusiasm has made an impression — although it might not have.

C: 嗯。
E: Yeah.

C: 照你的说法，逻辑学课堂可就一文不值了，但别忘了，你是从那毕业的。
E: If that is true, logic classes would be completely worthless. Let us not forget that this was your major.

C: 学者看到阿卡索斯，会联想起它悠久辉煌的历史。但我们都清楚，他们脑海里的阿卡索斯，绝不是「阿卡索斯」，总是在这方面或那方面有些差别。
E: When a scholar sees Icatus, they will think of its long and glorious history. However, we understand clearly that the Icatus in their minds cannot be "Icatus." It is always different depending on which aspect they are looking at.

C: （质疑：结论有误。）
E: (Question: The conclusion is flawed.)

C: 果然，我早猜到这样的推论无法蒙混过关。但异乡的智者，你刚才的驳斥也为我提供了新的论证思路。
E: I knew that it would not be so simple as just presenting my deduction without justification. However, your rebuttal just now has presented me with a new line of thought, wise one from beyond.

C: （论证：是通过认知得到的。）
E: (Theory: We learn through our cognition.)

C: 嗯？抱歉，我没注意到有人来了。你也对这面墙感兴趣吗？
E: Oops, sorry, I didn't notice you there. Are you interested in this wall too?

C: 「艺术能触动人心，唤起对过去的记忆。但更重要的是，它应当让人看到未来的可能。」
E: "Art does more than just stir emotions and revive memories. It opens our eyes to future possibilities."

C: 门扉时喂五块，是和它拉近关系，践行时喂两块，是为了让它解馋。最主要的要等离愁时大家都睡去的时候，大地兽们会围一起嘟嘟吃饭，这才是它们的正餐。
E: Give them five pieces at Entry Hour to build a bond, and two pieces at Action Hour to curb their cravings. But their main meal is at Parting Hour when everyone else is asleep. That's when the dromases gather together to munch — it's their dinner time.

C: 它们只吃土吗？
E: Do they only eat earth?

C: 这次又听说了些什么？
E: What did you hear this time?

C: 我猜，万敌是你的偶像？
E: I guess Mydei is your idol?

C: 怎么样，我没说错吧？都是些不值一提的小东西罢了。
E: How about those? I wasn't wrong, was I? Just some insignificant little things.

C: 我看你就是想破坏我们家的声誉！亏我一直以来还当你是好兄弟，真是知人知面不知心！
E: I think you're just trying to ruin our family's reputation! I always thought of you as a good brother, but turns out I was wrong! You can't judge a person just by their face!

C: 瞧你问的——肯定不能！
E: What a question — definitely not!

C: 所以要是缺利衡币，我就专画黄金裔和他们的逐火之旅，报酬刚好够我买新颜料的开销——你是不知道那些好用的颜料到底有多贵，有些还得从大地兽的碗里抢。
E: So if I'm short on Balance Coins, I'll just focus on painting the Chrysos Heirs and their Flame-Chase Journey. The payment will be enough to cover the cost of new paints — you have no idea how expensive those good paints are. Some even have to be taken from the bowls of dromases.

C: 听闻这番言论，围观人群无不发出嗟叹的声音。但耳尖的你，似乎在嘈杂中捕捉到了某句异样的话语。你很确定自己并没有听错。
E: Hearing these words, the onlookers exhale a collective groan. But your sharp ears seem to pick up s strange phrase within the din. You are positive you have not misheard.

C: 或许，我可以尝试演奏。
E: Maybe I can try playing it.

C: 呵…传闻总是跑得比乐声还快。刚才您也在场，应该听到那些对话了吧。
E: Hee... News does travel faster than music. You were there as well just now, and I suppose you must have heard some things.

C: 最重要的是，这里是自由的！没有人管我，告诉我该研究什么，不该研究什么。我可以尽情地思考那些看似不着边际，但可能改变整个翁法罗斯的伟大理论！
E: Most importantly, this is the epitome of freedom! No one to stick it to me, tell me what I should be working on or otherwise. I can ruminate on the most far-fetched of concepts that may turn out to be grand theories that can change the whole Amphoreus!

C: 好，接下来我自己找点办法消磨时间……
E: All right, I'll find some other way to kill time next...

C: 哎，你有所不知，外界总喜欢传些不着调的谣言，什么我能看到奥赫玛的过去啦，我的眼睛因为受泰坦的赐福而不堪重负啦。
E: Oh, you might not be aware, but there are all sorts of wild rumors out there. People say I can see into Okhema's past, or that my eyes bear the heavy gift of a Titan's blessing.

C: 塔米拉。
E: Tamila.

C: 你接着忙吧。
E: I'll leave you to your work.

C: 「自然对数的圆周率倍的单位虚数幂再加一等于零，所以泰坦的权能至高无上，证毕！」
E: "The power of pi times the natural logarithm, raised to the power of the imaginary unit plus one, equals zero, thereby proving the absolute power of the Titan. Q.E.D."

C: 不论如何，我本希望在他加入之后，协会能够吸引到一些更年轻的同好，从而可以开展更多的活动…唉。
E: I had hoped his joining would bring in more young people so we could do more together, but alas.

C: …啊，能得到阁下的认同，实在不胜荣幸…感激涕零…嘶嘶。
E: ...Oh, to receive your acknowledgment is the greatest honor... I am deeply grateful.

C: …阁下怎么沉默了？…地狱笑话又是什么意思？
E: Why are you silent? And... what does this phrase "black comedy" mean...?

C: 纷争之新神…万敌！
E: The new god of Strife... Mydei!

C: 没问题，我随时奉陪！
E: Sure. Feel free to find me any time!

C: 或许正是因为这份荣耀与担当，归乡的游子终结了悬锋王朝千年以来沐血代冠的传统。命运果真被他战胜了。
E: Perhaps it was precisely this honor and responsibility that allowed the homecoming wanderer to end the thousand-year Kremnoan tradition of being crowned in blood. Fate was indeed conquered by him.

C: 袭击树庭的怪人…到底是何方神圣？
E: The strange entity who attacked the Grove... who could they be?

C: 勒索？开什么玩笑，瞧好了，这可是账单——上面的人都欠我钱！
E: Extortion? Don't be ridiculous. Take a good look — this is an accounting ledger. Everyone on it owes me money!

C: 哈哈，谈不上什么打扰，请慢走。
E: Haha, feel free to come back if you want to talk. Take care.

C: 「我留下开拓的遗产就在…」
E: "I left my trailblazing legacy at..."

C: 什么情况？
E: What's going on?

C: 是奥德里西安…算了，无妨。有人问起时，只要说是尤里萨帮了你便好。
E: Odressian. It's fine. If someone asks, just say that Ulysse helped you.

C: 履行贵族义务，参与议会的讨论，为城邦与民众谋求长存，我为此职责深感自豪。可惜，我的一票与民众的一票相当，奥赫玛还是太过保守了。
E: Performing my noble duties, participating in council discussions, and seeking long-term solutions for the survival of the city-state and its people. I take great pride in this responsibility, but alas, my vote is equal to any other. Okhema remains overly conservative.

C: 你的进展如何了？
E: How is your progress?

C: 如果这次危机过去，预言中的新世界却还尚未到来…那么届时，我还会在这里，欢迎您再度光顾浴场。
E: If this crisis passes and the prophesied new world hasn't arrived... I'll still be here, ready to welcome you back to the baths.

C: 只是眼下，卫士们还在为保护圣城而努力着，我们这些公民也该积极承担责任，共同挺过这最艰难的时刻。
E: For now, the guards are still fighting to protect the Holy City, and we citizens must also take responsibility and stand together to endure this most difficult time.

C: …但浴池照常开放，您可以自由使用。只是侍者们…基本都下班了，还请谅解。
E: ...But the bath pools remain open, and you are free to use them. However, most of the attendants... have already gone off duty, so I ask for your understanding.

C: 你的两个小伙伴去哪儿啦？
E: Where are your two little companions?

C: 这个世界观是能看到灵魂的。
E: This worldview does allow us to see souls.

C: 啊，怎么回事，我们…怎么在说乱七八糟的话？
E: Ah, what's happening? Why are we talking... such nonsense?

C: 阁下，收起你的哀容吧——迈德漠斯必不愿见此。
E: Please, cast aside your grief — Mydeimos would not want you to grieve.

C: 即便灵魂真的会去往再创世后的世界，但这一刻，死亡带来的恐惧和伤痛仍是真实的。
E: Even if souls really do travel to the world after Era Nova, the fear and pain of death at that moment remain real.

C: 英雄阁下，你要是无处可去，不如也呆在这吧。吉奥里亚伴随着我们，没事的，都会没事的……
E: If you've got nowhere else to go, hero, why not stay here with us? With Georios watching over us, everything's going to be okay... It's going to be okay...

C: 小奇美拉，怎么小小一只呢？快快长大，让我看看你会变得多可爱吧。
E: Little Chimera, Little Chimera, why are you so small? Hurry up and grow up, so I can see how cute you'll be!

C: 偷偷告诉你，白厄哥可是注定要成为大英雄的人！这可是「神谕牌」说的，是{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}的旨意呢！
E: Let me tell you a secret: Mr. Phainon's destined to be a great hero! This is from the oracle cards. It's the will of {RUBY_B#the Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}!

C: 泉水煮沸后沁人心脾的甘甜，恰到好处地和白白芋的甜香糅合在了一起迷。
E: Once boiled, its crisp sweetness blended perfectly with the scent of white taro, memi.

C: 嗯…有位织者好奇妖精居所的内部结构。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>带有梯子的树屋门前</color>，想要参观拜访呢。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who is curious about the interior construct of the fairy's residence. The golden thread brings tidings: It is <color=#dbc291ff>in front of a door to a treehouse with a flight of stairs</color>, hoping to pay a visit.

C: 聊聊你的过去吧。
E: Let's talk about your past.

C: 暂时不聊啦，干杯！
E: Let's stop here for now, cheers!

C: 谢、谢谢你！我不擅长主动说话，请、请你见谅！
E: Th—Thank you! I'm not used to opening a conversation, so p—please go easy on me!

C: 啊？我、我可没有自己的秘密，只有一个公开的秘密——
E: Huh? I—I don't have any secrets I'm hiding, only an open one—

C: 暂时不聊啦。
E: Done chatting for now.

C: …喝…继续喝呀…敬海瑟音大人……
E: ...Drink... Keep drinking... Lady Hysilens...

C: 海瑟音在上，让本狮用一个绝妙的故事告诉你，本狮对蜜酿的掌握程度究竟如何吧！
E: By Hysilens, allow me to tell you with an extraordinary story. We shall see how well you know your honey brews!

C: 我找齐了这里的所有若虫。
E: I've found all the nymphs here.

C: 「哎呀，看来你还记得我说的话嘛：故事总会有戛然而止的时候。」
E: "Looks like you still remember what I said: Every story has to come to an end."

C: 是锅具有问题吗？
E: Is it the cookware?

C: 小奇美拉是吧，严格来说它们不算是刻法勒造物…不过可爱这点我倒是同意。
E: The little chimeras eh? Strictly speaking, they're not Kephale's creations... but I do agree that they're adorable.

C: 嘬嘬嘬！宝宝！你是一块蓝莓白巧大蛋糕！
E: *smooch* Oh my sweetie! Aren't you just a huge slice of blueberry white chocolate cake?

C: 若是一味地追求丰产而不停耕种，却疏于对土地加以养护，那么迟早有一天，我们赖以生存的根基就会被榨干。
E: If you simply pursue abundant harvests and spend all your time reaping without nurturing the land, one day the very foundation of our survival will dry up and wither.

C: 你不是也有吗！
E: Yours too!

C: （拿出一枚艾迪恩代币）
E: (Take out an Aideen Token)

C: 当然还是在围绕珍稀物种领域啦。那些小家伙们可比你们这种大人有意思多了！
E: Rare species of course. Those little creatures are so much more interesting than human grown-ups!

C: 我还有些事情搞不懂…
E: There's something I can't wrap my head around...

C: 而且……我总是觉得，身边会突然出现一道裂缝。而那些怪物，就会从裂缝里缓缓走出来……
E: And... I always feel like a crack might suddenly appear next to me. And those monsters will slowly emerge out of the crack...

C: 我没什么要问的了。
E: That's all I have to ask.

C: 爬上来不就行了？
E: Why don't you just climb up here?

C: 水车坏掉了…
E: The water wheel is broken...

C: 你带来了若虫吗，贵客？我想家了……
E: Did you bring any nymphs, honored guest? I'm a little homesick...

C: 绘有瑟希斯枝叶的彩窗。它们曾是夜帷的深蓝，如今是烈阳的金黄。这，就叫做「玻璃」二象性。
E: A stained-glass window adorned with Cerces foliage. Once midnight blue like the night's veil, now golden yellow like the blazing sun. This is what we call the "duality of glass."

C: 好，我这就安排上！
E: Alright, I'll get right on it!

C: 这就破防了？我还没开始骂人呢。别以为高级祭司是个多尊贵的身份，没了圣女大人，你们什么也不是。
E: That rattled you already? I haven't even started cursing yet. Being a high priest doesn't make you noble. Without the Holy Maiden, you are nothing.

C: 年纪轻轻就拯救世界？太酷了！
E: Saving the world at such a young age? That's so cool!

C: 没错，说不定这些土是什么颜色一点差别都没有，更别说什么无糖款了——
E: Right. For all we know, these dirt clumps might not differ regardless of their colors. And calling them "sugar-free"? That's pushing it—

C: …好吃？
E: ...Yummy?

C: 听你话里话外这意思，裁缝女，原来你是打算拉我们合伙呀？
E: From the way you're talking, seamstress, sounds like you're trying to rope us into a partnership, huh?

C: 好搭档，如果去万敌的图书馆，你最想看什么类型的藏书？
E: Hey partner, if you could visit Mydei's library, what kind of books would you most want to check out?

C: 原先，我想把「侵晨」托付给你，但它见证了太多无谓的杀戮，恐怕不是件合适的礼物。
E: Originally, I wanted to entrust Dawnmaker to you, but it has witnessed too much pointless bloodshed. I fear it wouldn't make for an appropriate gift.

C: 歌耳戈之子，迈德漠斯，向你致意。
E: Mydeimos, son of Gorgo, sends his regards.

C: 我选的「会更胖一些」。
E: I chose, "A bit chubbier."

C: 有什么希望我铭记的东西吗？
E: Is there anything you want me to remember?

C: 迈德漠斯，黄金厨神之王！
E: Mydeimos, the Chrysos God-King of Chefs!

C: 你好啊，贵客，我们再次见面了，于这方新创的天地中。
E: Hello there, honored guest. We meet again in this world newly wrought.

C: 「时光硕果」有什么用？
E: What's the use of the Fruit of Time?

C: 「神话之外」？时光归墟里，竟然会有通往这地方的入口？
E: Exomyth? There's actually an entrance to that place in the Ruins of Time?

C: 果然，行走于无名之途上的人，一定能发现这处巧思。不枉我将观众席的入口与那片空间相连。
E: As expected, those who walk the nameless path will surely discover this clever design. It wasn't in vain that I connected the audience entrance with that space.

C: 但谁又能断言，我们不是一座更大洞穴中的囚徒呢？
E: But who can say for sure that we aren't just prisoners in an even bigger cave?

C: 流动的光路，很像金线呢~
E: The flowing light path really looks like a golden thread~

C: 想了解我们这些「无名客」的事情？可以哦，我尽量长话短说。
E: You want to understand more about the Nameless? Sure, I'll keep it short.

C: 我的伙伴们在很远的地方——故乡…借助星穹列车，我也寻找着回去的办法。毕竟那里还有人在等我。
E: My friends are far away... I hope to find a way back home with the Astral Express' help. People are waiting for me to go back, after all.

C: 列车在不同世界间行驶，时间的流动也变得模糊不清了呢……
E: The Express traverses through different worlds, and the flow of time can become blurry...

C: 正常人谁会看后记啊。
E: Who reads the postscript anyway?

C: …你是打哪儿来的？咋，找我有事？
E: ...Just where did you pop out from? Do you need me for something?

C: 行，来搭把手——帮我先把教学场地布置一下。
E: Alright, come give me a hand. Help me set things up.

C: 这么快就回来了，我的工具你准备齐了？
E: That was quick. Have you already managed to get all the teaching props ready?

C: 不过我有的是办法测你。这不，场地已经给你搭好了，你上手实操给我看！
E: But, I have a way to test you. See, the test rig has been set up for you already. Show me how you'll go about operating it!

C: 没什么想问的了。
E: That's all the questions I have.

C: 哈哈，光是会调度矿车可不行啊。不过你要是想替了这小子倒是十拿九稳。
E: Haha, being able to operate mine carts isn't enough by itself. But you're more than qualified to replace this brat.

C: 哈哈，可以啊！真希望这臭小子能多学学你……
E: Haha, not bad! I wish this stupid brat would learn a thing or two from you...

C: 滴答！不行，为了双倍加班费，我还不能睡！
E: Tick-tock! No, it's double the pay for overtime! I can't sleep yet!

C: 滴答，即使真的如此…虚幻的世界还是有不少美好的事物。
E: Tick-tock, even if it's true... the false world still has many beautiful things.

C: 当我成为一个更优秀的表后，也会拥有更多朋友吧。
E: When I become a more outstanding clock, I might have more friends too.

C: 滴、滴答！飞碟堡你要吃吗？我煎的汉堡肉，宾客们吃了都说好！
E: Tick, tick-tock! Want a Floatdisc Burger? The guests all say that the burger patties that I make are delicious!

C: {NICKNAME}，您还在空间站呀？
E: Are you still in the space station, {NICKNAME}?

C: …好了，我知道了。看来，得麻烦你去趟<color=#dbc291ff>城郊雪原</color>了——不出意外的话，他人应该就在那里。
E: ...Got it. Looks like I'll have to task you with a trip to the <color=#dbc291ff>Outlying Snow Plains</color>. If everything goes as planned, he should be over there.

C: 辛苦你了，{NICKNAME}。我这就去把画挂上去……
E: Good work, {NICKNAME}. I know just where to hang it...

C: 哦？快让我看看…这小子，挺厉害的嘛。
E: Oh? Let me see... He's pretty darn good.

C: 又见面了，{NICKNAME}。你来得正巧，<color=#dbc291ff>博物馆修理间</color>刚送来一批需要修复的文物。
E: You again, {NICKNAME}. You're just in time: The <color=#dbc291ff>museum workshop</color> has just received a batch of artifacts that need restoring.

C: 我已经找到「宝藏」了。
E: I've found the "treasure".

C: {NICKNAME}，你觉得…这样描述是否合适？
E: Do you think this description is appropriate, {NICKNAME}?

C: 在母亲大人治下，最为知名的法令便是「封锁上下层区」。一方面，这一举措稳固了贝洛伯格的后方，可也确实造成了太多无谓的牺牲——人们对此意见多有分歧。
E: Under mother's rule, the most well-known decree was the "blockade of the Overworld and the Underworld." On one hand, this measure secured Belobog's rear, but it also resulted in many unnecessary sacrifices, causing much controversy among the people.

C: 母亲大人从未遗忘治愈世界的梦想，但却因某些原因在精神层面上持续遭受折磨，最终积劳成疾，变成了彼时无情而寡欲的模样。
E: Mother never forgot her dream of healing the world. But due to certain reasons, she suffered continued torment, both mentally and physically, which eventually led to her becoming the unfeeling and indifferent person you know today.

C: …对不起，我或许掺入了太多私人情感。
E: ...I'm sorry. I may have injected too many personal feelings.

C: 你可以随时回到这里，点映想看的内容。
E: You can always come back and review the content you would like to see.

C: 对呀对呀。
E: Yeah, yeah.

C: 太、太好了。
E: C—Certainly.

C: 连前阵子仙舟上出那么大的事儿她都没表现出一点脆弱的样子。但突然有一天，她回来时就变成了那样…我、我也想不出别的可能了。
E: We had such a huge crisis on the Xianzhou a short while ago, but she didn't show a single sign of weakness back then. Yet she came home one day and started to act in this way... I—I can't think of other possibilities.

C: 嘿嘿。
E: Heehee.

C: 虽然我不在意，但拍摄理应经过别人同意，请让我看看你的照片。
E: Look, I don't mind, but photography should be done with the subject's consent. Please show me your photos.

C: 呃…看来是误会。不过你真的不想要我的照片吗？免费也不要？
E: Err... Looks like there's been a misunderstanding. But are you sure you don't need a photo of me? Not even a free one?

C: 你对机兵们解释了你的来意，但它似乎并不理解。
E: You try explaining your intentions with the automatons, but they don't seem to understand.

C: 有什么关系嘛！外出看诊的名医，也会对仙舟各地有什么好吃好玩的地方真是了如指掌啊。雇了我可绝不会让你吃亏的！
E: Yeah, so what? I go out all the time to see patients, so I know the food establishments around here like the back of my hand. I'm the best tour guide around!

C: 有什么好吃的推荐吗？
E: Do you have any recommendations?

C: 如果你平时有空的话，请到码头上来找我。
E: Just come see me at the dock when you have time.

C: 我也会收集有关金人巷的各类情报，<color=#dbc291ff>其中包括商铺的情报，以及各种传闻。</color>解决各类事件，也能对复兴有所帮助。
E: I keep tabs on all the goings-on in Aurum Alley, <color=#dbc291ff>including rumors and the latest gossip</color>. If we can solve some of the problems in the community, it could help in rejuvenating Aurum Alley.

C: 就让他得逞吧，下次就不会了。
E: He fooled us this once, but he won't fool us next time.

C: 追问
E: (Continue questioning)

C: 金人巷码头运输效率低下、成交量低，根本没有创造价值，这就是经营不善的证据。
E: The inefficient shipping and low volume of transactions at the Aurum Alley dock — which does not create any value at all — are clear evidence of poor management.

C: 你还没学狗叫呢？
E: I don't hear barking...

C: 啊——够了！
E: Ugh — enough!

C: 作为玩具有些太惊悚了。
E: ...that's missing the rest of its body.

C: 你们把飞来飞去的机巧鸟也算进去了。
E: You included the delivery cycranes in your math.

C: 交给我吧。
E: Leave it to me.

C: 这不需要提醒。
E: Thanks for the reminder.

C: 这是今天唯一的好消息了。
E: That's the only good news today!

C: 拜托了，就这最后一句了。
E: Last one, please!

C: 但现在至少我明白了一件事，公司并不只有一张面孔。
E: Now I understand, the IPC has many faces.

C: 现在你可以离开这里了。
E: You can get outta here now.

C: 哈哈哈哈，{NICKNAME}你回来了，我收到客人的信息，你已经准确将货物送到了。这一路上没出问题吧？
E: Hahaha, {NICKNAME}! You're back! I heard from the client that you've delivered the goods as requested. Any problems along the way?

C: 星芋啵啵，不加冰，两倍糖。
E: Startaro bubble tea. No ice, double sugar.

C: 熟练运用请假语是打工人的基础技能哦。
E: Proficiency surrounding the language used when requesting leave is a basic skill for salary workers.

C: …这是青雀小姐送给我的《琼玉牌秘技丛集》，这是青雀贿赂我的证据。
E: ...This is the Celestial Jade Techniques 101 that Miss Qingque gave me! It's evidence of her bribery.

C: 你这就是在承认商会肯定经营不好码头。
E: So you admit that the Merchant Guild mismanaged the dock.

C: 空口无凭，<color=#dbc291ff>拿出证据来呀</color>。
E: Empty rhetoric — <color=#dbc291ff>let's see some evidence</color>.

C: 出示
E: (Present evidence)

C: 追问
E: (Continue questioning)

C: 你们从历史中学到了不少，学会了嘴硬与诡辩，却对真正的教训视而不见。
E: You have indeed learned — about wordplay and logic traps — while ignoring the true lessons.

C: 要去「同功坊」的话，我们接下来该怎么走？
E: How do we go to Artistry Hardware from here?

C: {NICKNAME}，本来按照你先前帮忙规划的物流路线，金人巷的商铺生意都红火了不少，没想到反倒是我这里出了岔子。
E: Thanks to the logistics route you helped plan, {NICKNAME}, our business has been booming in Aurum Alley, but I never expected that something would go wrong on my end.

C: 等搜集齐了再给我吧。世玲现在手里还有别的事情要忙呢……
E: Just hand the stuff to me once you're done collecting. I have other matters to attend to right now...

C: 保密可以，得加钱。
E: I can zip it, but that's gonna cost you extra.

C: 吓死我了……
E: So scared...

C: 嘿朋友，你听说过「仰望星空」吗？
E: Hey, friend, ever heard of Stargazer?

C: 但…天哪，真有人能凑够<unbreak>12</unbreak>个朋友出来吃披萨吗？
E: But... Oh my, can anyone really round up <unbreak>12</unbreak> friends to share a pizza?

C: 听说你进来之前有两把刷子。修复工作就交给你了，我去为你打掩护。咱们汇合点再见。
E: I heard you were good at these things, so I'll leave the repair work to you. I'll cover for you. See you at the meeting point later.

C: 对吧？我也有同感。虽然没有确凿的证据，但身为一名记者，有些时候直觉就是第一驱动力。
E: Right? I feel that way too. I may not have concrete evidence, but as a reporter, sometimes you have to rely on your hunches.

C: 在白日梦酒店被彻底封锁之前，我就听说过一些传言：在某些特定的时刻，那座酒店中会突然冒出<color=#dbc291ff>意义不明的奇怪画作</color>，甚至可能将迷途的宾客吸入诡异的梦境空间中。
E: Before the Reverie hotel was completely locked down, I overheard a few rumors: At certain hours, a <color=#dbc291ff>strange painting of ambiguous meaning</color> would suddenly appear in that hotel, and perhaps even mislead guests, sucking them into an otherworldly Dreamscape.

C: 奇怪的是，凡是有过类似经历的宾客，事后在被人询问时却都回忆不起来自己遭遇的具体细节。我不相信他们的集体失忆是一种巧合——这一定跟家族有关。
E: What's stranger is that, when inquired, the guests who had experienced the incident couldn't recall what happened to them. I don't believe that their collective memory loss is a coincidence — it must have something to do with The Family.

C: 我们试着触碰一下它吧，{F#小姐}{M#先生}——不管这幅画背后有什么，我相信它一定能带我们接近被家族掩盖的真相。
E: Let's try to establish contact with it. No matter what happens behind that painting, I trust it will definitely bring us closer to the truth that The Family is trying to hide.

C: 你该多加锻炼。
E: You should work out more.

C: 老实说，{F#小姐}{M#先生}，我稍微有些不耐烦了。我不知道这位汉密尔顿在现实里是个什么样的人，但我觉得他还挺有当谜语人的潜质的。
E: Honestly, I'm getting a little impatient. I don't know who this Hamilton guy is in the real world, but I think he's got the potential to be one of the Riddlers.

C: 刷盘子确实不容怠慢。
E: You can never be too wary of dishwashers.

C: 这又不是我的错～你不相信啊～那你跟我一起上节目，这期就拍你了～
E: This isn't my fault! If you don't believe me, come on and join the show! You'll be the star of this episode!

C: 就在你靠近屏幕时，眼前的画面却突然模糊了起来。你头晕目眩，眼前闪过许多节目的画面，耳畔同时响起的几个嘈杂的声音还在不断讨论着什么……
E: As you edge closer to the screen, the image on it suddenly blurs, leaving your head spinning. The scenes of multiple TV programs are flashing before you, and you can hear a clamorous discussion going on nearby...

C: …在正式开始工作前，有件事必须告诉你。这家酒吧——正式名字叫「惊梦酒吧」——确实有它的特别之处。
E: ...Before we start, I need to give you a heads-up. The name of this place is "Dreamjolt Hostelry," and there's something unique about it.

C: 它们的具体情况都记在这本<color=#dbc291ff>问题手册</color>里，你可以翻翻看，在接待过程中有什么需要备忘的，也可以随时写进去。
E: You can find details about their conditions in this <color=#dbc291ff>Troubleshooter</color>. Feel free to flip through it and jot down stuff in it.

C: 呜——你就是存心捉弄我，把你咬成碎片汪！
E: *whimper*... You're clearly messing with me. I'll tear you into pieces, woof!

C: 放、放过我吧！…我诚挚认错，我真心道歉，我向全世界受欺负的狗狗说对不起！
E: L—Let me go! ...I know I was wrong. I'm truly sorry, and I'll apologize to every dog around the world who has ever been bullied!

C: 汪！那是我最爱的宝物，当然很重要哇！并且…并且……
E: Woof! It's my precious treasure! Of course, it's important. And... and...

C: 我故意惹人生气，也是想引起注意。不然…都没有人关注我……
E: I made him angry on purpose because I wanted him to notice me. If I didn't do that... no one would pay attention to me...

C: （它们的关系…应该是恢复正常了吧？）
E: (Looks like they've... patched things up?)

C: （到底发生了什么…分别去问问它们的想法吧。）
E: (What's going on here...? I should talk to them separately and find out what they really think.)

C: 不过还是要感谢您，发现了我真正的心意。这下可没法再逃避了呀。
E: Anyway, thanks for helping me figure out my true feelings. I won't run away anymore.

C: 叫你别哭了！！！
E: Stop crying already!!!

C: 我来帮你解决烦恼。
E: Sure, I'll help you solve your problems.

C: 哇嘎嘎嘎嘎！说什么蠢话呢傻狗，就凭你那可怜的小脑瓜…嘿，还想骗我们？
E: Mwahahahaha! What nonsense are you talking about, silly dog? You think you can fool us... with that pathetic tiny brain of yours?

C: 而我的方法，则是收集无名客的「开拓经历」。
E: The way I help is by collecting the trailblazing experiences of the Nameless.

C: 这些事现实中到底发生过吗？
E: So, did these things all really happen?

C: 在这段期间，你所付出的一切，或多或少，都会为那些即将踏上旅途的无名客献上一份助力…即便是最遥远的未来，新启程的无名客也会收到你的祝福。
E: Every effort you have put in during this time, no matter how big or how small, will become a source of strength for all the Nameless who are about to start their journeys... Even in the distant future, new Nameless who begin their adventure will be recipients of your blessing.

C: 「从银河遥远的过去向你发来最新的问候！」
E: "I send you the latest greetings from the distant cosmic past!"

C: 谁知道呢？在我的记忆里，他一直是个温柔的好老爸。
E: Who'd have known? In my memory, he was always a great and gentle father.

C: 该死的哈努兄弟，愿所有的石头都诅咒你，让你永远都这么渺小，这么孤独！
E: Darn you, Brother Hanu! I hope all the stones curse your name, so that you will be small and lonely for the rest of your life!

C: 说吧，准备给我推销什么？
E: Spill it. What do you want to sell to me?

C: 它们两个再演下去，舞台就要被它们的垃圾话填满了……
E: If these two keep up the act, the stage will be filled with all their trash talk...

C: 是吗？但你们的财务报告里可不是这么说的啊——
E: Are you sure? The financial report of your company seems to tell a different tale though...

C: 这个嘛…您应该也知道，克劳克影业是那位神秘的「钟表匠」创办的企业。
E: Well... As you know, Clock Studios was established by the mysterious Watchmaker.

C: 其实这部影片是……
E: In fact, this movie is...

C: 我也要感谢你，{NICKNAME}。以这部影片为契机，肯定会有越来越多的人重新拾起被遗忘的过去，拾起清醒的火种，然后点亮未来——
E: I want to thank you too, {NICKNAME}. With the help of this movie, I'm sure more people will pick up their forgotten past, ignite the flame of wakefulness within them, and brighten their future...

C: 扣动扳机就可以向追兵开炮了！嘭嘭嘭——
E: Just pull the trigger and you'll start firing at the pursuers! Pewpewpew!!!

C: （打开宝箱）
E: (Open the chest)

C: 充满浪漫与魔法的<color=#dbc291ff>《美梦仙踪》</color>——是还有想要补拍的镜头吗？
E: The most romantic and magical Dreamjoy Ascension — are there any scenes you wish to reshoot?

C: 要是想看自己的拍摄成果，就去找那位「剧团经纪人」吧。
E: If you want to see what you shot, go look for that Troupe Agent.

C: 有问题随时联络，苏乐达为您服务！
E: Feel free to contact me if you run into any problems — SoulGlad is at your service!

C: 天啊，苏萨先生确实死在了战场上，但这种情节放在动画里还是有点残酷…算了，现在的观众就好这口。
E: Wowsers, Mr. Sousa may have indeed died on the battlefield, but that detail's still a little cruel for an animation... Whatever. Audiences today adore that.

C: 但不管他是啥，我都对这只鳄鱼一无所知——亲爱的导演，要不你来帮我想点好点子吧！
E: But no matter who that person is, I know absolutely nothing about this crocodile — so could you help me riff some good ideas please, Director?

C: 他们可能是匹诺康尼的筑梦师。
E: They could be the Dreamweavers of Penacony.

C: 再见。
E: Goodbye.

C: 我想看的就是这个！
E: Now THAT'S what I want to see!

C: 好玩！还想继续玩！
E: It was fun! And I want to play more!

C: 简单来说，外面各方人马都发布了一些委托，是捞油水的大好机会，大哥他觉得你挺合适的，想把你内推到公司那儿。
E: Put simply, every man and his dog out there have issued assignments, and they're a great way to make some money. Wen Shiqi thinks you'd be suitable, and wants to do an internal recommendation for you to the IPC.

C: 再说了，我又不是「公司」的人，空间站可是黑塔女士罩着的呢，就算她老人家不在线，天花板塌了也有艾丝妲站长顶着嘛。
E: And besides, I'm not in the IPC. The space station comes under the auspices of Madam Herta and even if she wasn't online, Lead Researcher Asta is there to keep the sky from falling.

C: 就像梦泡一样，这部影片储存着热砂盛典相关的「记忆」。但在对这部进行安全检查的时候，一位员工消失在了影片之中，与我们失去了联系……
E: Just like a dream bubble, this film stores the memories related to the Scorchsand Festival. But during the review process, a staff member got lost in the film...

C: 这…我们也是为了你的安全着想。自从会场差点被一个包裹炸成废墟之后，家族规定我们必须对入梦物品进行检查，请见谅。
E: Well... It was all precautionary measures taken for your personal safety. Ever since that one time when the arena almost got blown up to smithereens by a suspicious package, The Family has explicitly demanded all items to be thoroughly inspected before they are allowed entry into the dreamscape. Please understand.

C: 这部影片是为你制作的，可能也只有你可以救出那位员工了……
E: This film is dedicated to you. Perhaps only you can save that staff member...

C: 可以，太可以了！二位有着卓越的表演才能，我都要看哭了！
E: Of course! Absolutely! I was this close to tears. Both of you possess exceptional acting talent!

C: 你们的表演甚至超过了原作！简直…简直…简直就——
E: Brilliant! Your portrayal outdoes the original! It's simply... simply... simply —

C: 所以…我是个可有可无的失败的钟表，对吗？
E: ...I'm just an expendable failure of a clock, aren't I?

C: 看吧，我的内心早已空无一物了。
E: See, I'm just empty inside.

C: 你看，我们都是钟表，都是一家人！我想帮助你，让你快乐起来！可以告诉我，你的烦恼是什么吗？
E: You see, we're all clocks, we're family! I want to help you be happy! Tell your pal Clockie what's troubling you!

C: 别担心，这位姑娘，我已经精准定位到它缺失的零件了！
E: Don't worry, miss. I've already pinpointed its missing parts!

C: 呵呵，这对我来说绝不是一份嘉奖——没有创作者会希望自己的作品只能用廉价的方式刺激感官。
E: Hehe, this is not a reward for me. No creator would be satisfied by their work only offering cheap thrills.

C: 加…加…拉……
E: Gal... lag... her...

C: 特别鸣谢
E: Special Thanks To

C: 提供「末日幻影」
E: Provide Apocalyptic Shadows

C: 「如果祂想终结一切，为何向过去预警？如果祂想拯救一切，为何带来末日？如果一切终归寂灭，那我们存在的意义是什么？」
E: "Why send warnings to the past if THEY want to end everything? Why bring about the apocalypse if THEY want to salvage everything? What is the meaning of our existence if everything is bound to be reduced to nothingness in the end?"

C: 然而札乌姆并不是只有战争一种顽疾。凭空出现的灰色浪潮如同瘟疫蔓延。两个对立政权则彼此怀疑对方使用了违禁的超自然武器。
E: Yet, war wasn't the only bane Zaum was facing. A gray tide that emerged out of nowhere started spreading like a plague. Two opposing political forces suspected each other of using forbidden supernatural weapons.

C: 智慧的原野上不止有「天才」的大树，每一朵花蕾的存在都不可或缺。
E: Wisdom's realm extends beyond the towering individual trees known geniuses. Each unassuming flower bud is essential.

C: 我们到了。梦想之地的风景总是令人眼花缭乱，博识学会的那位先生对此颇有怨词。
E: Here we are. The scenery in the Land of the Dreams is always captivating, although that gentleman from the Intelligentsia Guild did not find it to suit his tastes.

C: …不会是剑侠幻戏吧？
E: ...Could it possibly be immersia about swordmasters?

C: 茶馆的事，我可以既往不咎。不过嘛，你们质疑我司的安保能力，我不可能装作听不见，毕竟当着这么多客户的面，我这托运的生意还做不做了？
E: Well, I can overlook the terrible tea, but now that you're questioning my security, I can't let it slide. After all, I have a courier business to run, and with so many clients watching, that just wouldn't look too good now, would it?

C: 你光是学猪叫还不够！你还必须向不夜侯的小老板娘道歉，你还必须向仙舟剑术道歉！
E: Squealing isn't enough! You also need to apologize to the owner of the Sleepless Earl, and take back what you said about Xianzhou swordplay!

C: 我们家三月让着一只手也能打！
E: Our March can totally crush those mechs, even with one hand tied behind her back!

C: 对啊，对啊。
E: Make him squeal, make him squeal!

C: 这只能说明那是赛博僵尸。
E: That could only mean that it's a cyber-zombie.

C: 九叔是咱们的工作人员…
E: He's a member of our staff...

C: 呜…我输了…连这样的训练都没办法应对，我肯定打不过斯科特……
E: I've lost... If I can't even handle this kind of training, there's no way I'll beat Skott...

C: 彦卿和云璃肯定可以。
E: It wouldn't be a problem for Yanqing or Yunli.

C: 三月七，我们的条件是什么来着？
E: What were the terms again, March?

C: 你不认识我没有关系，{NICKNAME}，介绍一下。
E: It's okay if you don't know who I am. Introduce me to him, {NICKNAME}.

C: 这是太卜司的著名卜者青雀！
E: This is Qingque, a renowned diviner from the Divination Commission.

C: 拒绝…？你放心，椒丘先生辛苦做出来的药，我绝不会浪费！
E: Reject...? Don't worry, I'll never waste the medicine that you worked so hard to make!

C: 这和说好的需求不一样啊？
E: This is different from the request!

C: 椒丘向你们晃了晃玻璃瓶，瓶内大概装着<unbreak>500</unbreak>毫升「赤龙血」。
E: Jiaoqiu shakes the glass bottle in front of you, within it containing about five hundred milliliters of Crimson Dragon Blood.

C: 啊？这么多？！灵砂小姐不会休克了吧？
E: Wha—? That much!? Is Miss Lingsha alright up there?

C: 勇气可嘉，拿去吧！
E: Brave soul, take it!

C: 试试这些离谱的萨满手段，总比守着废铁要好。
E: It's better to try these unorthodox shamanism stuff than to sit here and watch the scrap.

C: 降灵术的准备已经妥当了。接下来，只要按照顺序输入就完事了。
E: The preparation for the Seance Arts is done. Next, I just need to key in these in order, and we're good to go.

C: 什么仙舟俗语，一听就是你乱编的。
E: When did Xianzhou have such a saying? I'm sure you're just making it up.

C: 不寂寞，因为还有数不清的工作陪着我……
E: I'm not lonely. Look at all this never-ending work I have to keep me company...

C: …现实好复杂哦。
E: ...Reality is so complicated.

C: 我从一些朋友那儿听说了你的事，我想咱们俩应该是颇为相似的。
E: I've heard about you from a number of friends in Penacony, and I believe that you and I are quite similar.

C: 开始今日拍摄。
E: Let's begin today's shoot.

C: 好吧，如果还需要补拍，欢迎随时过来。
E: Alright. If you need to retake any pictures, you can come back anytime.

C: 后续你有什么计划？
E: What are your plans from here?

C: {NICKNAME}，作为同好，你可要连着我的份多多翻找！祝你未来好运亨「桶」。
E: {NICKNAME}, as a fellow enthusiast, you must take on my share of the trashcan diving, too! May you enjoy your wildest fan-trash-ies!

C: 它们正在学习如何给「朋友」过生日。到时候，你的朋友们会被绑在椅子上，被围着唱三万三千三百三十三遍生日快乐歌！天呐，天下还有比这个更残忍的酷刑吗？！
E: They're currently learning how to celebrate a friend's birthday. When that time comes, your friends will be tied to a chair, surrounded, and have the Happy Birthday song sung to them <unbreak>33,333</unbreak> times! Is there any crueler fate in this world!?

C: 一阵金光闪过，小桶宝力获得了桑博的「友谊魔法」。
E: With a bright flash of light, Litter Pony obtains Sampo's Magic of Friendship.

C: 话虽如此，在「夹层世界」的骚乱彻底平息之前，我还会在这里再待机一阵，以防那些家伙突然杀个回马枪。如果你愿意协助我清理余氛，就回来这里找我吧。
E: Saying that, I shall remain here a while longer until the disturbance in the "Betweenwhere" is completely calmed, just in case those guys decide to come back for a second round. If you are willing to help me wipe out their remaining forces, you can come and find me here.

C: 嘿！为了小桂子，我们一定要取胜！
E: Hoo! For Lil Gui, we will emerge victorious!

C: 所以…{NICKNAME}，我想正式请求你做我的教练！
E: So... {NICKNAME}, I would like to officially ask you to be my coach!

C: 其实我已经修复好一部分资料了。但玲可说，一定要让你第一个看，因为这枚玉兆的主人是你的人生偶像。
E: And I've actually already restored part of the information. But Lynx said that you have to be the first one to look at it, because the owner of this jade abacus is your idol.

C: 真的吗？我文化低，可真的会信哦！
E: Are you sure? I'm not well-read, so I might really believe you!

C: 我一直有些好奇…虽然雅利洛-Ⅵ恢复了和外界的联系，但咱们一直都是和公司打交道，为什么突然要去参加这个叫「罗浮」的地方的格斗大赛？
E: I've always been a little curious... Though Jarilo-VI has restored contact with the outside worlds, we've always just been communicating with the IPC. Why are we suddenly participating in this fighters' tournament in this Luofu place?

C: 我们仔细核对过了。这封通讯邀请函它确实来自罗浮，但比对了一下它的印戳……
E: We've double-checked. This invitation did indeed come from the Luofu, but after checking the stamp...

C: 幻觉？我看是借口！让人打了一顿就连比赛都放弃了？
E: Hallucinations? Just excuses, I bet! He's bowing out just because he got thrashed?

C: 哎…卢卡选手现在真的很消沉，对什么都提不起劲。我给他点了两斤烤肉，想让他吃些好吃的，开心一点。但他…无精打采地吃光了。
E: ...Luka's really down in the dumps now, and he can't lift his spirits up for anything. I ordered a couple pounds of grilled meat for him so he might have a feast to cheer him up, but he just sat there all moody and devoured the lot.

C: 太好了，刚才看你那么消沉，我也觉得很难过。
E: That's fantastic. I was sad seeing you so depressed just now.

C: 我转身离去？我认输？这与我冲上去拼一把有什么本质区别吗？因为无论怎么选，当时我的命都不在我自己手里。
E: Turn around and leave? Accept defeat? How is that any different than taking a desperate stand? No matter what I chose, my life wasn't in my own hands.

C: 你是谁？你不属于这里！你不该在这里！你是…异物！
E: Who are you? You don't belong here! You should not be here! You are... invaders!

C: 请你们等着瞧吧！
E: Just you wait and see!

C: 「独立参赛者•铁臂」？怎么搞的神秘兮兮的……
E: "Independent Contestant: Iron Arm"? Why so mysterious...

C: 这位「铁臂」选手相当神秘。我查了一下，他之前几场比赛，竟然都穿着厚重的斗篷，根本看不出相貌…大概是向主办方要求过，要隐瞒自己的真实身份吧？
E: This contestant is quite mysterious. I looked him up and found out that he always wore a heavy cloak in his previous matches, so his face was concealed... Perhaps he asked the organizers to hide his real identity?

C: 卢卡选手现在成了全银河炙手可热的明日之星，未来一定还有很多参加大型比赛的机会。
E: Now that Luka is the hottest rising star in the whole cosmos, he'll definitely have lots of chances to participate in major tournaments in the future.

C: 就葬在这儿吧，毗梨喜欢阴冷的环境。这会给他一种归巢的感觉。
E: This is a good burial place. Virya always loves cool shady spots. He'll feel like it's back in his nest.

C: 奢摩，在竞锋舰的下层擂台，我会为你和卢卡安排一场重赛。和你期待的不同，这场比斗没有观众的欢呼，也不会有掌声，罗浮仙舟上没有任何人会知道这次比赛的结果。
E: Samatha, I will arrange your rematch with Luka in the Skysplitter's lower-floor arena. It will be different from what you hoped — there will no bustling cheers of spectators, nor will there be raucous applause. No one on the Xianzhou Luofu will know the outcome of this match.

C: 真不愧是我认识的{NICKNAME}教练，说话就是有水平！
E: That's the Coach {NICKNAME} I know. Such poise!

C: 请问{NICKNAME}教练，你如何评价这两人的私交？
E: I'd like to ask Coach {NICKNAME}: How do you see their relationship?

C: 这种事情与比赛无关，我只是教练，不方便评价。
E: This matter has nothing to do with the fight. I'm just here to coach. No comment beyond that.

C: 不要小看扑满哦！
E: Don't underestimate the Trotters!

C: 亲爱的观众朋友们，欢迎回到星天演武仪典叩关赛的擂台！
E: Dear spectators, welcome back to the Luminary Wardance Knockout Match Arena!

C: 你恢复的怎么样，就让老子亲自复诊一下吧！准备好接招了吗？
E: I'll personally check on your recovery! Are you ready to catch these blows?

C: 这就走了？我们下场以后再聊聊天呗？
E: You're leaving so soon? Can we have a chat after we get off the arena?

C: {NICKNAME}教练的见解，很有道理，但希望下次能让我也听明白！
E: Coach {NICKNAME}'s understanding is very rational, but I hope I can also understand your words next time!

C: 感谢{NICKNAME}教练的精彩答复，今天的采访环节到此结束，请各位来场的媒体朋友有序离场。
E: Thank you, Coach {NICKNAME}, for your insightful answers. Today's Q&A ends here. Media personnel, please leave the area in an orderly and civil fashion.

C: 大方自信就是美…
E: Beauty lies in generosity and confidence...

C: {NICKNAME}教练的心态真好。
E: You really look on the bright side, Coach {NICKNAME}.

C: 请你立刻出去！
E: Please remove yourself from the premises immediately!

C: 来吧，让我们制胜一击！兄弟姐妹们！不要给他第二次机会！
E: Come, let's deal the winning blow! Don't give him another chance!

C: 这破魔方我真是受够了…
E: I'm really tired of this dang cube...

C: 你还记得这游戏的规则吗？需要我提供教学服务吗？
E: You still remember the game's rules? Need me to give you a tutorial?

C: 只要玩一把，你就什么都想起来了！
E: You'll remember everything once you play!

C: 不管怎么说，我都是这交感幻戏里的虚拟陪玩。就算态度再恶劣，也必须对你有求必应。这破差事干的多糟心啊！
E: Doesn't matter. I'm a virtual NPC in this Empathic Immersia. I'm still at your beck and call regardless of my attitude. This whole affair is so annoying!

C: 好精妙的设计，居然把我都难住了。
E: What an amazing design. Can't believe it's tripping me up.

C: 歌舞•忍者，阁下就放心吧——缭乱•忍侠AKA乱破，定不辱使命。
E: Worry not, Songstress Ninja, my lord — the Dazzling Ninja Hero AKA Rappa never sullies her duty.

C: 重在参与！开心就好！音乐万岁！喔喔——
E: Participation is key! What matters is that you have fun! All glory to music! Ohhhhh!!!

C: 银河球棒侠，全年无休不放假。
E: The Galactic Baseballer, and I've never taken a day off.

C: 无需心急，经历过在下的修行，阁下定会有所长进。
E: Stay composed. Once you undergo my training, you will surely see improvement.

C: 派对…仅听名号就能知晓我等的音律将令忍徒们雀跃，也确实与折纸村当下的喧闹相称！
E: Party... Just hearing the name itself, one would know that we sound ninjas will send the other ninja into a rapture, and it matches the bustle of Paperfold Town!

C: 你确定这是我能听懂的吗？
E: You sure I'm going to understand this?

C: 对啦！我在检查舞台设备的时候，发现里面还存有一首未完成的曲子。
E: Oh right! When I was checking on the stage equipment, I noticed there was an unfinished track inside.

C: 黑塔女士最近在忙很重要的测试，不会管这种小事的。
E: Madam Herta's been busy with some important tests recently. She wouldn't bother with such trivialities.

C: 你的热情与技巧都经受住了考验，你的决心和能力都是万中拔尖，你是当之无愧的——桶之说唱之巅。
E: Your passion and skill have stood the test, your resolve and talent outshine the rest. You are the one, true, undisputed — champ of the trashcan rap, no less.

C: 找到帮手了吗？
E: Have you found any help?

C: 答案：此流程与选拔规范不符……
E: Answer: This process does not comply with selection specifications...

C: 垃圾桶不是最聪明的，也不是成绩最好的，结构简单，外形朴素，但在我看来，它却是——
E: Trashcans may not be the most intelligent, and they may not get the best grades... Their structure may be simple and their appearance basic but, in my eyes, they are...

C: 纯美的践行者能从小小的盆栽中看到美的理念，垃圾桶亦是如此。
E: A pathstrider of Beauty can see the beauty in even a simple potted plant, and the same goes for a trashcan.

C: 别在训练室里玩颜料罐啊！
E: Don't mess around with paint cans in the rehearsal room!

C: 请拿出充分的气势，随在下奔赴音律•猎场！
E: Please work up your full momentum and follow me to our Sound Hunting Ground!

C: 难道艾尔菲是在骗我？
E: You mean Arfey was lying to me?

C: 本人从未参与群内任何讨论。
E: I've never participated in this group's discussions before.

C: 我觉得…有点奇怪。艾尔菲同学在演出开场前突然失踪，而结束后立刻，学院代表们就在排练室了，感觉像是…故意等着看我们出糗。
E: I think... something's off. Arfey's sudden disappearance just before the show, and how the academy's reps were already in the rehearsal room right after the performance ended... It's almost as if... they were waiting for us to make a fool of ourselves.

C: 此外，既然得知吉他•忍徒是被贼人所困，作为忍首，在下绝不能置之不理。
E: Also, now that we've learned Ninja Initiate Guitar has been imprisoned by scoundrels, I cannot stand idle as Head Ninja.

C: 我来帮你！
E: Let me help you!

C: 乱破同学反复向我强调，和你共同行动会有收获。如果是考察音乐的话，也不是不行。
E: Rappa has constantly emphasized to me that working together with you will be rewarding. If it's for assessing music, it should be okay.

C: 随他们怎么想吧。麻烦您了。
E: They can think what they want. Appreciate the help.

C: 没问题。
E: No problem.

C: {NICKNAME}•忍者
E: Ninja {NICKNAME}

C: 去完成你的使命吧。但要记好了——音乐，无法被任何东西击败！
E: Go complete your destiny. But remember... Our music ain't gonna be drowned!

C: 没骗人吧，这生意够简单？
E: See? I'm not lying to you. This business is really this easy.

C: 不过听说那酒馆会自己找上有故事的人，我看您也是个搞「欢愉」的人才，说不定哪天就收到邀请了？哈哈。
E: But I hear that the tavern will actively seek those out with stories. You look like a talent with a penchant for "elation." Perhaps you might receive an invitation one of these days? Haha.

C: 得亏我温世齐大哥聪明，他总说：「情况越混乱，咱们就越是有机会捞点油水」。听说你最近也去匹诺康尼了，我就跟他承包了个「专项委托」回来。
E: Good thing my big bro Wen Shiqi is smart. Like he always says: "The more chaotic a situation is, the greater the chance of us profiting." I heard you recently went to Penacony too, so I contracted a special assignment with him.

C: 好啦，具体内容刚刚我已经在终端上同步给你了，你可以回去慢慢研究，在空间站里还是不要声张为好。
E: Okay, I've just sent you the details on the terminal. You can pore over the file on your own — it's not wise to be so ostentatious in the space station.

C: 不好了！你们快看我拍的这些照片…怎么会这样啊！
E: This is bad! You guys, look at the photos I shot... How did they end up like this!

C: 油炸西瓜条、爆炒天蛾丝烩饭、油封咖啡豆鸭腿……
E: Deep-fried Watermelon Sticks, Explosive Stir-fried Shredded Skymoth Risotto, Confit Coffee Bean Duck Legs...

C: 列车长刚刚专门为你设立的帕～
E: I only just invented it for you!

C: 虽然是清除害虫…但听起来还挺恐怖的，真的要用这种方法吗？
E: I understand this is pest control... but it all sounds horrifying. Do we really need to use this method?

C: 三月，规则不是这样的。游戏已经结束了，咱们输了。
E: March, that's not how the rules go. The game is over. We lost.

C: 丹恒毫不犹豫地诬陷三月七是步离人。他步步紧逼，三月七百口莫辩，最终莫名其妙地认罪了。
E: Dan Heng unhesitatingly frames March 7th as the borisin. He presses persistently with every word, leaving March 7th a bundle of nerves, finally even inexplicably admitting that she's the borisin.

C: 没听说过。
E: Never heard of that.

C: 「盾构机队」实在太帅了！在其他地方可看不到7个队员合体成机器人的大场面。
E: The Shield Foundation Fleet is too awesome! It's not every day you get to see a seven-member team combine into a robot.

C: 没关系，敬爱的列车长，我不会和无礼的锅盖头一般见识。
E: It is all right, beloved conductor. I will not stoop to the level of such an impolite lid-head.

C: 至少它们两个能和睦相处，这是件好事帕～
E: At least they're on good terms with each other, so that's good!

C: 莫非是在幕布后……
E: Could it be behind the curtain...?

C: 面子值几个美育学分？影展评出的奖项才重要。
E: How many art credits is your shame worth? The exhibition's evaluation awards are what's imperative.

C: 三月老师有何吩咐？
E: What do you need, Master March?

C: 扶我起来……
E: Help me up...

C: 拍得不错！我刚刚偷瞄了眼标价…咱们还是快些给照片起个名，离它远一些吧。
E: Not bad! I sneaked a peek at the price... We'd better name the photo and keep our distance from it.

C: 像是克劳克影业动画片的名字…怎么也把本姑娘编排进去了？
E: Sounds like the title of a Clock Studios cartoon... Why'd you include me in the title though?

C: 实不相瞒，我来匹诺康尼闯荡这么久，这还是第一次获得登台机会。看到这张照片，我的家人一定会认可我来匹诺康尼打拼的决定！
E: To be frank, I've been on Penacony so long, but this is the first time I've gotten a chance to be on stage. With this photo, my family will surely approve of my decision to strive for my dream on Penacony!

C: 趁它们没下场，快拍一张！
E: Quick, snap a shot while they're still on the stage!

C: 不如叫…「岁阳雅集」？
E: How about... "Heliobi Literati"?

C: 感觉藿藿的样子有些奇怪…
E: I think Huohuo's looking a little strange...

C: 彦卿师傅，你怎么也在这儿？
E: Master Yanqing, what're you doing here?

C: 即便是一只偶然入镜的蝴蝶，也应当不断扇动翅膀，扰乱一副画面，一座城市，一颗星球，直到……
E: Even a butterfly that strays into frame should continuously beat its wings, disrupting a painting, a city, and a planet, till...

C: 热烈的掌声和欢呼声里，三月七接过了「最佳新人奖」的奖杯。
E: Amidst raucous applause and cheers, March 7th accepts the "Best New Artist" trophy.

C: 对不起！
E: Sorry!

C: 战势千变万化，不可全依典籍记载。若二位不介意，可随我移步城外的空地，我愿在实战中向你们演示，只要此举能精进联盟的战术。
E: Battle situations are volatile and fluid. Strategic texts should not be wholly relied upon. If you two don't mind, walk with me to a field outside the city. I would be willing to demonstrate to you in actual combat, as long as my pointers will refine the alliance's tactics.

C: 卷轴上的符文亮起，回应着你的来意；信徒们齐声念诵，赞词在你的脑海中回响——
E: The runes on the scroll are glowing, responding to your intent. Disciples chant in unison, their praises echoing in your mind...

C: …卷轴纸张窸窣传来久远的话语，一群人无法逃离的命运得以被闻见：
E: ...The scroll's rustling paper brings words of distant past, and the fate of a group of people unable to flee can be heard:

C: 伟哉，吾主尼卡多利；壮哉，战争之魂不朽。
E: Great is our Lord Nikador. Glorious is the immortality of the soul of war.

C: 可爱嗷呜！
E: What a cute awoo!

C: 现在，它们的监工是我了。
E: Surveilling them is my job now.

C: 现在说这些也没意义，你们还是<color=#dbc291ff>想想该怎么提高小队的工作成绩吧。</color>得先定个小目标……
E: It's pointless to say all this now. You guys better <color=#dbc291ff>think about how to increase the squad's work performance. </color>A mini milestone has to be assigned...

C: 我的队伍，名字就叫做——
E: My squad's name is...

C: 对。还不愿意相信的话，我把这张排名表贴到你常泡的浴池墙上如何？让所有来往的客人都看看，一个无能的管理员是怎么毁掉整支队伍的。
E: That is correct. If it's still hardly believable to you, how about I paste this leaderboard list on the wall where you regularly soak in your bath? All guests will be able to witness how an incapable administrator destroys their own squad.

C: 花园布置的工作太多了？
E: The Garden's assigning too much work?

C: 我早就猜到了！
E: I knew it!

C: 老大说，你们都是虫子！击败你们这种弱队，根本不用费力气！
E: Boss said, you're all worms! Defeating such a feeble squad as yours requires zero effort!

C: 哈哈哈哈。愚蠢的人类，别忘了，你现在的领队是谁安插进来的。
E: Hahahaha. Foolish humans, don't forget who recommended the one to lead your squad.

C: 既然树庭选择以这种方式将知识传授给你，那就一定有它的道理。
E: Since the Grove elects to impart knowledge to you through such a method, it must have its reasons.

C: 公民们，「豹豹碰碰大作战」迎来了最终的冠军赛，赛程尚未开始，热情的浴场观众们已经翘首以盼，期待着激动人心的对决现场。
E: Citizens, the Seal Slammers Championship is about to begin! The arena is already buzzing with excitement as the crowd eagerly awaits the thrilling matches ahead!

C: 风堇选手，面对泡泡从前的搭档{NICKNAME}选手，你有什么话要说吗？
E: Hyacine, do you have any words for Bubbles' former partner {NICKNAME}?

C: 原来连泡泡自己都没有意识到，它不光是想要独当一面，而是想要挑战它眼中最强大的对手——{NICKNAME}！
E: It turns out even Bubbles didn't realize — it wasn't just about making it alone, but about challenging the one he sees as the strongest rival — {NICKNAME}!

C: 怎么，怕了？不敢接下「诡计」之半神的挑战，这「冠军」的含金量掺水了吧。
E: What's the matter? Scared? Too afraid to take on the demigod of Trickery? Guess that "championship" just lost some of its shine, huh?

C: <color=#dbc291ff>而你要去参加「豹豹碰碰大作战」，并获得最终的冠军奖杯。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>And you must take part in Seal Slammers and win the final trophy.</color>

C: 突然你感觉像是从高处摔了下来，掉在了地面上。
E: Suddenly, you feel like you're falling from a great height, crashing onto the ground.

C: o((-'ω´- )o「就这样挺好…」)∋
E: o((-'ω´- )o "This feels just fine..." )∋

C: 半场开香槟，等着被翻盘吧！
E: Not so fast. Time to play my reverse card!

C: o((•'ω´• )o「我们有『预言之子』在，不会任人欺负」)∋
E: o((•'ω´• )o "The Prophesied One is with us! We won't take your bullying anymore!" )∋

C: 冷静一下，避免你已经忘记了前不久那个荒唐的梦境，我必须要提醒你一下。
E: Hold right there. In case you've already forgotten about that silly dream, here's an obligatory reminder from me:

C: 许多年之后，面对逐火之旅的终局，{NICKNAME}会回想起，被询问是否参加「豹豹碰碰大作战」的那个遥远的上午。
E: Many years later, when facing the finale of the Flame-Chase Journey, {NICKNAME} recalls that distant morning, so long ago, when {F#she}{M#he} was asked to participate in Seal Slammers.

C: …哇！小灰，*我们*就知道你会来。
E: Wow! Little Gray, we knew you'd come.

C: 比赛要开始了，来我的商店里消费一番，备好足够数量的小海豹吧。
E: The matches are about to begin. Shop to your heart's content at my place, and prepare enough baby seals.

C: 这有个{F#小美女}{M#小帅哥}可不可以？
E: How about a {F#pretty girl}{M#handsome guy}?

C: 这可怎么办？前面的两条已经依次应验，现在只差最后一条了——「金海豹杯」真的会碎掉吗？
E: What should we do? The two previous prophecies have already come true, there's only the last one left — will the Gold Seal Cup really be broken?

C: 你们备好一个赝品奖杯，我用一瞬间的神速把真正的奖杯替换下来。这样一来，就算有人听信了假预言去搞破坏，也不知道破坏掉的是假的咯！
E: Prepare a fake trophy, and I'll use a single instant to switch it with the real trophy. That way, even if anyone believes the false prophecy and breaks the trophy, they won't know that they've broken a fake!

C: 各位，泡泡有一个想法，既能把大家的注意力吸引过来，又能打破{NICKNAME}的预言梦。
E: Everyone, Bubbles has an idea, it'll draw everyone's attention and also break {NICKNAME}'s prophetic dream.

C: 离开你以后，泡泡会用新的实绩证明自己！让{NICKNAME}发自内心地认可泡泡。
E: Once Bubbles leaves you, Bubbles will prove themself with new accomplishments! This will let {NICKNAME} recognize me wholeheartedly.

C: 后来列车的乘客人数逐渐减少，这项传统也就不怎么被提及了。
E: But the number of passengers eventually waned, so this tradition has faded out.

C: 这名号听起来怎么有点耳熟…
E: Now why does that name sound familiar...

C: 嗯？还有什么问题吗？
E: Mmm? Any more questions?

C: 不过，您不必担心！您的专属球笼赛车已经送来了。
E: But don't worry! Your exclusive Spheroid racer has already arrived.

C: 油门已经焊死了，开始比赛吧。
E: Get the pedal to the metal and start the race already.

C: 咱们还等着您到店剪彩呢，那现在算是天赐良机…咱们立刻开店。

C: 啾啾！
E: Tweet tweet!

C: 它说「可以再玩一局」。
E: It's saying "I can't turn down a game!"

C: 你还活着啊？
E: You're still alive?

C: 求求你，再宽限几天吧。
E: Please, I just need a few more days.

C: 哈哈，其实我也已经下载好了，就等下班了呲。
E: Haha, I've already downloaded it too, just waiting for work to end, bzzt!

C: ——我不要这样的惊喜啊！
E: This is NOT the kind of "moment of delight" I had in mind!

C: 碰巧来酒吧的我，遇见碰巧在这里调饮的你。概率很低，但不等于零。
E: I happened to walk into the lounge. And you happened to be here mixing drinks. Low probability doesn't mean zero.

C: 这下不是应声虫了。

C: 佩佩大君，驾到汪！

E: That was a brutal move, Sparkle...

E: Mr. Yang, are you blind? I'm right here!

C: 在告别之前，就像寻常的调饮师那样，把我当作偶然路过、且不会再来的过客，为我调一杯特饮，再说一番漫不经心的闲话吧。
E: Before we part, just do what any drinksmith would, treat me like a passerby who won't return. Fix me a special drink, and let's share a few idle words.

C: 提问：为什么舒翁强烈反对把自己的头像印在酒吧的玻璃杯上？
E: Question: Why does Siobhan only allow pictures of her face to be printed on their finest liquor glasses?

C: 这正是这杯调饮的效果。

E: Which Aether Spirit's gonna dominate the next Aetherium Wars patch?

C: 呼…呼…呼……
E: Zzz... Zzz...

C: 那你要我做什么？
E: What exactly do you want me to do?

C: 我们到了，这里你应该不陌生吧？
E: We're here. This place should be familiar to you, right?

C: 好了{NICKNAME}，你可以先休息下，我们要整理刚才的测试数据，之后还请你继续参加接下来的测试。
E: Alright, {NICKNAME}, you can take a break now. We need to organize the test data we just collected. After that, we'll need you to continue with the next round of test.

C: 通过两次测试，你已经基本熟悉了「货币战争」的运行机制，更多细节可以在后续的深入测试中慢慢探索。
E: After two tests, you've become familiar with the basic mechanics of Currency Wars. You can explore more details in subsequent in-depth tests.

C: 「若想炼制『九转升天丹』，『冰火玄莲』可是必不可缺的一味药材啊！」
E: "The Icefire Lotus is utterly indispensable when concocting an Elixir of Dragon Oil!"

C: 「错啦错啦，现在你在环境中不过是个小鸟，你得引开这些妖怪啊。」
E: "No no no no, right now you are merely a small birdie, fluttering about to distract these monsters."

C: 还有个同伴也来到了仙舟…
E: There's this other companion who also came to Xianzhou...

C: 雕像会说话诶！
E: A statue — that can talk!

C: 我只知道那些宝物大致的方位，却不知道它们的具体位置。
E: I only know the general vicinity of the treasure but not the exact location of everything.

C: 我好恨呐…
E: I hate it...

C: 这碎星绝尘剑，乃是饮月之乱时丹枫所用的神器。
E: This Star-Shattering Blade of Truth is a divine artifact once wielded by Dan Feng during the Sedition of Imbibitor Lunae.

C: 所幸我依然留存着前世回忆，依稀记得在丹鼎司某处，丹枫将藏有熔金的地点绘成图示，留在司内某处。也许，找到这张图示，宝藏自然现世。
E: Fortunately, I still retain memories from my previous lives, and can dimly recall that Dan Feng has hidden a map somewhere deep in the Alchemy Commission that shows where the Ignis Aureliae is. Perhaps we can find this, and the treasure will be practically revealed to us.

C: 顺其自然吧！
E: Go with the flow!

C: 幻胧不长那个猩猩样！
E: Phantylia does not look like THAT!

C: 在下要赶紧回趟家，洗洗脸、刮刮胡子、换身衣裳…咱们下次再见吧！
E: I have to get home, wash up, shave, change my clothes... So much to do. See you next time!

C: 以你的「理解」层次，或许我的这些前辈经验的确是「谜语」吧。
E: Based on your level of "understanding," perhaps my seniority and experience really does seem like a "riddle."

C: 这杯的比例是九比一，为那些嫌「烈焰浓茶」不够「烈」的客户调制而成。
E: This one, with a ratio of nine to one, is prepared for those who think my tea is too bland.

C: 哎哟，居然输了，难道这是上个版本的攻略？客人，不好意思啊，等我进了新货再来吧。
E: Ah, I can't believe I lost! Is this a strategy guidebook for the last update? My apologies, dear customer, please find me again when I've updated my stock.

C: 潜爆机兵已报废，请重新挑战
E: The Automaton Stealth Bomb has been disabled. Please restart the challenge

C: …你怎么一脸嫌弃啊？
E: ...Why do you look so unimpressed?

C: 所以，埃里克，他们怎么会来威胁你呢？发生什么事了？
E: So, Eric, why did they threaten you like that. What happened?

C: 那，就交给{M#哥哥姐姐}{F#姐姐们}了！我先回家了，老爹还在家里等着我呢。
E: It's settled then! I need to go home now, my dad's still waiting for me.

C: 根据程序，它们只会乖乖听玩家的话，忠实地执行玩家的指令…而不是像现在这样。
E: According to their programming, Aether Spirits are supposed to obediently follow a player's commands and faithfully execute their instructions... which doesn't seem to be the case right now.

C: 三月，交给你了！
E: You give it a shot, March.

C: 总之，我们就带着这个小家伙一起参加庆典吧！接下来，就该给它取个好听的名字……
E: Alrighty then, let's take this little fella with us to the festival! Now, I think it's time we came up with a catchy name for them...

C: 好久不见。
E: It's great to see you, too!

C: 哼哼…哼哼？
E: Oink... Oink?

C: 我对他们的监控终端后台做了些小小的调整——我以全息投影出现在这里的话，他们通过监控画面是看不到我的。
E: I made a few sneaky modifications to her surveillance terminal. Whenever I show up here as a hologram, she won't be able to see me on the camera feed. Cool, right?

C: 你啊，还能是谁？艾丝妲又不在这里。
E: You, of course, it's not like Asta's here.

C: 现在哭还来得及。
E: There's still time to cry.

C: 唉，我真是越来越讨厌有钱人了……
E: Seriously, these financially fortunate types are starting to get on my nerves...

C: 操作矿车
E: Operate Mine Cart

C: 嘿嘿，乔瓦尼先生说得对。决胜乐园的徽章已经都集齐了…接下来就只等大赛开幕咯！
E: Mr. Giovanni is right, we got all the Victory Zone Mastery Marks... All we need to do now is wait for the final showdown!

C: 哇，果然是这样！
E: Woah, it actually works!

C: 来进行「超链接对决」吧！
E: Let's have a "Hyperlink Match"!

C: 对，就是公司为了推广《以太战线》，多撺掇玩家来线下参加庆典，就让我在这儿杵着给你们发东西。
E: That's right, the IPC asked me to work this stall and hand out gifts to players to promote Aetherium Wars, and encourage players to come to the festival in person.

C: 好，我继续我的苦差事，你加油吧。
E: Alright, let me get back to my hard labor. Good luck!

C: 制作组也没实装认输的功能啊……
E: Seems the devs forgot to include a surrender option...

C: 我听别的小朋友说，你们也要来参加锦标赛，就专门跑来看了……
E: I heard the other kids saying you were gonna be in the championship, so I came here specially to see you...

C: 贝洛伯格的英雄——{NICKNAME}与三月七——！
E: The Heroes of Belobog — the Trailblazers, {NICKNAME} and March 7th!

C: 嗯…倒也有这个原因！但咱主要还是为了参加锦标赛才来到这里啦。
E: You could say that! But the main reason I'm here is to take part in the championship!

C: ——但，如果你们不能赢过托帕小姐，这一切都将成为空谈。
E: However, to lock horns with her, you'll have to best Miss Topaz first.

C: 你们还是带着那小家伙走到了这里…果然不出我所料！
E: Just as expected, you and the little trotter made it to the final!

C: 哈哈，明白！我倒是可以给你们一个建议——「匹诺康尼」——那可是宇宙中最大的游乐场，想要找乐子的话去那里准没错。
E: Haha, I understand! If I may make a suggestion, how about Penacony? It has the biggest amusement park in the universe — a perfect place to have some fun.

C: 对阵——上届庆典的「冠军首席」，星际和平公司「战略投资部」总监——托帕！
E: They'll be facing off against the IPC's very own Director of Strategic Investment, and previous Aetherium Wars champion — Miss Topaz!

C: 我们想借这个网站获取信息，再打着解决灵异事件的幌子暗中调查。
E: We can get our leads from this website and then investigate them posing as paranormal investigators.

C: 哈哈，听我的侍卫彦卿提过。你可是罗浮上少有能令他失去佩剑，空手而返的人。
E: Haha, my retainer, Yanqing, has mentioned you. You are one of the only people on the Luofu that was able to deprive him of his sword.

C: 那么，景元将军，咱们就在这绥园里一决胜负如何？！若我获胜，就任我自由来去——
E: Very well then, General Jing Yuan — how about we settle our score right here in Fyxestroll Garden? If I win, I must be free to come and go as I please...

C: 被封禁在洪炉里的岁阳多得很，每个都有可能。出于报复，出于好奇，出于饥饿…我怎么知道会是哪个拐走了你们的龙女？
E: There are countless heliobi that escaped from the Creation Furnace, and every one of them could have done such a thing. It could have been vengeance, curiosity, or simply hunger... So how would I know which one abducted your Dragon Lady?

C: 要怎样你才肯投降？
E: What are your terms of surrender?

C: 既然无话可说，就别烦我了，小东西。
E: If you have nothing to say, then run along and let me be.

C: 不过，我觉得，如果是尾巴，凭它张扬的个性…还真有可能在网上留下些踪迹。
E: I can't help thinking that if Tail is out there, there'll be traces of him on the Internet. He had a big personality...

C: 尾巴…唉，当务之急是尽快镇压那些还在作乱的岁阳。
E: Tail... The important thing right now is stopping the heliobi from causing chaos.

C: 话说回来，你为什么还要回来淌这趟浑水啊？岁阳可不好对付啊……
E: That being said, why did you decide to come back into this mess? Dealing with heliobi isn't an easy task...

C: 连我也开始觉得有点瘆人了……
E: Ugh, now I'm starting to get the heebie jeebies...

C: 被人管束，被人禁锢，就会想着要逃离，这不是天性吗。是那些总想着纠正行为的大人，那些觉得你该做什么的人有问题才是。

C: 就是这个人啊。你们看这个帖子。
E: It's this girl. Here, look at this post.

C: 摇一摇「同心火铃」试试。我们在离太卜大人这么近的地方摇动铃铛，想必能进入她与岁阳共有的幻境中。
E: We could try ringing the Harmonic Chime... If we're close enough, we should be able to enter the heliobus's illusion.

C: 「爽到不行」？
E: Too much of a good thing?

C: 不打扰了，寒鸦小姐正在镇妖塔等着你们呢。

C: 通知完毕，是不是该去太卜司看看情况了？

C: 啊啊啊啊啊！别动摇，符玄！不要抗拒我！不要被这个丫头的花言巧语骗了！

C: 遇、遇到凶险…素裳小姐，你可不要吓我呀。以那个天才少年的剑术，有什么妖物能伤到他？
E: D—Danger...? Miss Sushang, don't scare me like that — what kind of evil would be strong enough to pose a threat to Yanqing?

C: 我明白了！
E: Understood!

C: 你不也被我骗过吗？哈哈哈哈。
E: I tricked you, didn't I?

C: 尾巴…其实被我收在此处。
E: I've been keeping Tail here, all along...

C: 你这个火焰团子！到底是怎么回事？难不成寒鸦小姐，你一直都知道吗？
E: You flaming furball! What the heck is going on!? Did you know about this the whole time, Miss Hanya?

C: 明白！
E: Yes ma'am!

C: 保护仙舟免受岁阳侵害，还有比这更正的正事吗？
E: What could be more important than protecting the Xianzhou from the threat of heliobi?

C: 很神秘。
E: It's very mysterious.

C: 美丽的女士，方便单独聊天么？
E: Beautiful lady, may I have a few words with you alone?

C: 道歉？何必呢，你们做的事都是正确的。对你们来说，这最重要，不是吗？
E: Apologize? What for, you're just doing what's right. That's all you care about, isn't it?

C: 不要贸然靠近她。
E: Don't approach her carelessly.

C: 跃迁1次
E: Make 1 Warp

C: 青总请看！我们充分理解玩家不喜欢你一回我一回的回合制模式，我设计了即时投掷琼玉牌互相战斗的模式，称之为「琼玉争霸」！
E: President Qing, look! We fully understand that our players do not enjoy turn-based combat, so we have designed a real-time Jade Tile battle mode named: "League of Jade Tiles"!

C: 凶宅…闹鬼…我已经嗅到了粉丝数上涨的气息了。
E: A haunted house... A ghost... I can already smell our followers increasing!

E: ...I actually want to find Tail more.

C: 哇哦，竟然是卡芙卡的通缉令。
E: Woah, there's a wanted poster for Kafka!

C: 精致的保险箱。看上去像是放着贵重物品的保险箱，上面还附着一张便条，似乎是提醒自己以免忘记密码。接下来就该输入密码了……
E: An exquisite safe that looks to be holding precious items. There is a note attached. It seems to be reminding the owner of the password. Let's try inputting the password...

C: （输入密码）
E: (Enter the password)

C: 等等，闹鬼不是岁阳导致的吗？
E: Wait! Isn't the haunting caused by heliobi?

C: 我们可以分头行动。
E: We can split up to cover more ground.

C: 嗯，我去地衡司问问。
E: Okay, I'll go to the Realm-Keeping Commission and ask around.

C: 有什么问题吗？
E: Is there a problem?

C: 你们目送着阿月离去的身影，直至隐没在夜色中，这才松了口气。
E: You watch A-Yue as she leaves until she's lost to the night, before letting out your own sigh of relief.

C: 我用机巧鸟救下过驭空的千金。
E: I once used a cycrane to rescue Madam Yukong's daughter.

C: 但是每当回到列车上，和姬子姐还有杨叔说说话，逗逗丹恒，拉着{NICKNAME}一起看车窗外的星星，我就觉得……
E: But whenever I return to the Express to chat with Himeko and Mr. Yang, tease Dan Heng, or get {NICKNAME} to watch the stars from the train windows with me, I feel...

C: 我再想想。
E: Let me think about it.

C: 再见。你们的生命尺度与时间观念截然不同，尽管一时相会，但你明白……
E: Farewell. Your duration of life and sense of time are entirely different, and though you only met briefly, you understand that...

C: 年轻人就是有朝气啊。
E: Young people sure are full of energy.

C: 我…其实我…我是你的粉丝，我见你在上面征集投稿什么的，还说会实地走访，我就想着会不会有机会见到你。
E: I... actually I... am one of your fans. I saw you were soliciting contributions and that you were making real life trips around, so I wondered if I might get a chance to try and meet you.

C: 都这么熟了，还是别客套了。
E: We're all friends around here. No need to be so polite.

C: 机器冒烟，我的脑子会不会也…
E: If there's smoke coming out of the machine, will my brain also...

C: 你可以去找其他无名客呀。
E: Go find another Nameless.

C: 嘟啦啦，这个好好玩哦！
E: Bwa ha ha! This is so fun!

C: 既然造物之间的需求不同，有的喜欢玩乐，有的喜欢清净，有的比较邋遢，有的爱干净……
E: Different creations have different needs: Some like to have fun, some like to be quiet, some are sloppy, and some are germaphobes...

C: 集合完毕，开始拍照
E: All together now. Time to take some photos.

C: 你确实很像阮•梅女士，所以我才一直跟着你……
E: You really do look very similar to Miss Ruan Mei. That's actually why I keep following you around...

C: …就这样，{NICKNAME}取得了胜利。{F#她}{M#他}的威名再一次传遍了整个银河。
E: ...And just like that, {NICKNAME} was victorious. {F#Her}{M#His} fame spread throughout the cosmos once again.

C: 啊，有客人来了。算了，我也不自讨没趣了，你和游辞慢慢交流感情吧。我回去工作了。
E: Ah, a customer. Forget it then. You and Youci take your time getting acquainted. I'll get back to work.

C: 你有什么目的？
E: What do you want?

C: <size=28>夫人它…它又离家出走了！</size>
E: <size=28>It's Madam! She... she's run away again!</size>

C: 对不起。我不是有意要瞒着您，只是…打算给您一个惊喜。
E: I beg your pardon. I did not intend to keep it concealed from you, I merely wished to... bring you a surprise.

C: 呜呜呜呜呜呜……
E: Boohoooo...

C: 「…你的选择是？」
E: "So... what's your choice?"

C: 这条狗弄丢了我的房卡，我要它给我找回来，就那张，其余的都不行。
E: Hey, this dog lost my room card, and I want it back. Just the one that's lost, not the others.

C: （咦，这个房间在发生变化。）
E: (Huh? This room is changing.)

C: 呜咕，这么随便的吗。
E: Whoa... that's so casual.

C: 是不是还缺了点什么？总感觉哪个地方不太对呢。
E: But there's still something missing. Something just doesn't feel right.

C: 告诉我，你到处将这些遭到遗弃的怪物带回来，目的是什么？
E: Tell me, what's your purpose in bringing back these abandoned monsters?

C: 我有名字，叫做「小星星」。
E: Wait, I already have a name. It's Starlet.

C: 汪！你说话的语气好奇怪哇，像那些客人一样！
E: Woof! You're talking in a weird way just like those guests do!

C: 对，要记住了，这就是你的名字。以后我，还有酒吧里的怪物们都会这么称呼你。
E: Yeah, that's your name. Don't forget it, because that's what all the monsters and I will call you at the lounge.

C: 嘻嘻，您这是想打听舒翁的感情状况吗？
E: Heh, trying to peer into Siobhan's love life, huh?

C: 但是我拒绝。
E: I refuse.

C: …细说？
E: ...Care to explain?

C: 整天闹哄哄的骰子，还有个傻不啦叽的闹钟。会动的物件看多了，渐渐也就分不清了。
E: There's a noisy dice and a stupid alarm clock. Once you've seen too many animated objects, you'll struggle to tell them apart from real people.

C: 我骗你的。
E: That's a lie, actually.

C: 哼。我想也是。
E: Hmph, I kind of figured.

C: 说的和心里想的完全不同，我顶讨厌这种类型！不像我，从来不隐藏炽热的心！哈哈！
E: What they say is completely different from what they really think. I hate that type! Unlike me! I never hide my fiery soul! Haha!

C: …感觉你还要说很长时间，先给我来杯饮料。就要第一次点的那杯，你还记得么？
E: ...Looks like we'll be talking for quite a while. Get me a drink first, the same one I ordered the first time. Do you still remember?

C: 你记错了。
E: You've got it all mixed up.
Hmm...

C: 我是个孤儿，不知道父母是谁，没记事的时候就被遗弃在了「白日梦酒店」里，鸢尾花家系的家主梅芙恩收养了我，把我作为未来的明星培养长大。
E: I'm an orphan, and I never knew who my parents were. I was abandoned at the Reverie Hotel before I was old enough to remember anything. Maeven, head of the Iris Family, adopted me and raised me as a future star.

C: 在我的心目中，您已经达到了和舒翁相近的水平！我还会来拜访的，向您致敬！
E: In my heart, you've already achieved the same level as Siobhan! I'll come back to visit and pay tribute!

C: 汪！我想去哪就去哪，想说什么就说什么，谁都管不着！
E: Woof! I go wherever I please and say whatever I want. There's nothing anyone can do about me!

C: 什么都不做的话，对方根本不会注意你。自己开心才是最重要的哇！
E: If you don't do anything, no one will notice you. All that matters is that you are happy.

C: 看你也挺累的，不如现在开始跟我练习吧！给我调杯<color=#dbc291ff>大份浓浓的</color>饮料，我就教你该怎么和人接触哇。
E: I see you're pretty tired. Why not start practicing with me? Make me a <color=#dbc291ff>large and strong</color> drink and I'll teach you how to interact with people.

C: 喝完了饮料，该教你怎么说话了。咳咳，听好哇……
E: After drinking this, it's time to teach you how to talk. Hehe, listen up...

C: 别拍马屁了，长话短说…
E: Don't butter me up. Let's get to the point...

C: 有位流光忆庭的技术人员在那儿，先前我们在邮件里交流过几次…在她的帮助下，我得以提取出这团玩意——
E: I met a technician from the Garden of Recollection there, with whom I had exchanged several emails before... With her help, I managed to extract this stuff...

C: 非常简单，随便打打就过了。
E: This game is just a piece of cake.

C: 汪
E: Woof

C: 跟随苏乐达天团的喷射节奏，在轮到你的时候<color=#f29e38ff>点击屏幕</color>。
E: Follow the beat of SoulGlad Idol Group's sprays and <color=#f29e38ff>tap the screen</color> when it's your turn.

C: 当垃圾桶下方的电视屏幕全部亮起后，<color=#f29e38ff>点击屏幕</color>开始表演。
E: When all the TV screens under the trashcan light up, <color=#f29e38ff>tap the screen</color> to begin the performance.

C: 使用哈努兄弟的火箭筒，<color=#f29e38ff>击碎出现的所有立牌</color>吧！
E: Use Brother Hanu's launcher to <color=#f29e38ff>destroy all the stands</color>!

C: 那个虚有其表的闹钟…不提也罢。但要是有人想破坏这里，它绝对会第一个出来阻止。
E: Oh, that pompous alarm clock... let's not mention him. But if someone tries to mess with this place, he's always the first one to jump in and stop the trouble.

C: 就是那种穿…穿啥来着…黑色西装的！碰见就想逮住我，吓得我都掉小珍珠了。结果你猜…怎么着，他们根本就不敢进来哈哈！
E: They were all wearing... something like... black suits! They wanted to arrest me when they saw me. I was so shocked I got teary-eyed. And in the end, guess what... they don't even dare to step foot in here. Hahaha!

C: 欸？这几份文件…是不是有点？《美梦剧团的生产后护理》、《苏乐达的一百种喝法》，他们平时都看的啥啊。
E: Huh? These documents... seriously? Postpartum Care for Sweet Dreams Troupe, and A Hundred Ways to Drink SoulGlad...? What the heck are they reading in their leisure time?

C: 这不太好吧？
E: Are we really doing this?

C: 不错嘛，很高兴见到你还保持着最基本的警觉…放心吧，我的投影经过了特殊的加密处理，目前只有你能看到。
E: Not bad! Glad to see you've still got your wits about you. Don't worry, my hologram is encrypted. You're the only one who can see it right now.

C: 你做了什么……
E: What did you do?

C: …我同意什么了？
E: ...What did I agree to?

C: 谢谢你把我从要了鸟命的噪音里解救出来，就算你合格了啾！
E: I'm going to mark you as having cleared it since you saved me from that horrendous noise that could drive even a bird crazy, tweet!
...tch.

C: 多少局都没问题！
E: We can play as many rounds as you like!

C: 确实方便，我刚刚根本没认出来，哈哈…所以知更鸟小姐也是来这里测试游戏的吗！我觉得这个游戏超好玩诶……
E: So convenient that I couldn't even recognize you at all, haha... So, are you also here to test out the game, Miss Robin? I think it's a really fun one...

C: 啾啾——这边啾啾啾！
E: Tweet tweet — this way, tweet tweet!

C: 听起来确实不错。
E: It does sound promising.

C: 看起来卢卡选手需要一些时间调整一下心态…我们在这里等等他吧。
E: It looks like Contestant Luka needs some time to clear his head... Let's wait for him here.

C: 真没想到卢卡是这样的人！
E: I never thought Luka would be like this!

C: 卢卡 卢卡 卢卡
E: Luka Luka Luka

C: 但是今天…我又出现了很强烈的幻觉……
E: But today... I had a very strong hallucination...

C: 难道就让舆论这么乱说吗？
E: Are we just going to let the public opinion slander me like this?

C: 说的没错，只要肯等待，所有风波都会过去。但你需要等上很久，而时间是最昂贵的。
E: You're right. All storms pass eventually, but waiting takes time, and time is costly.

C: 你这又是在演什么戏？
E: What act are you putting on now?

C: 当然…不只是为了这个。我来是为了送一封活动邀请函给卢卡选手。
E: Not just for that. I'm here to deliver an invitation to Luka for an event.

C: 斯蒂芬去哪儿了？
E: Where did Stephen go?

C: 这个环节以后就取消吧。
E: Alright alright. We'll leave this part out from now on.

C: 噗，快再讲几个冷笑话～
E: Ahaha, keep the dad jokes coming!

C: 衷心感谢与您同行的这段时光，并祝您未来旅途愉快。请继续操作。
E: Thank you for all the time we've spent together. May your journey hereafter be a pleasant one. You may now resume reformatting.

C: 我桌子上这是…<color=#dbc291ff>「星穹列车值日排班表」</color>？
E: What's this on my desk... <color=#dbc291ff>Astral Express Duty Roster</color>?

C: 早哦{NICKNAME}乘客，昨天睡得好嘛？
E: Good morning, Passenger {NICKNAME}! Did you sleep well last night?

C: 但总有一天，总有一天，黑塔也会震惊于我的收藏！哼！
E: But someday, someday, Herta will be astonished by my collection! Hmph!

C: 也许有些人每次泡咖啡都能抵达既定的结果，但这不是我喜欢的方式。每次踏上旅程，都应有些新发现，不是吗？
E: Some people might achieve the same result every time they brew coffee, but that's not how I like to do it. Every journey should bring some new discoveries, don't you think?

C: …谁说不是呢？不过多亏了这段往事，我们才有大赚一笔的机会。
E: ...Isn't it? But it's also thanks to these events of the past that we have an opportunity to strike it rich.

C: 没有目击者就是完美的潜入。
E: Any infiltration can be considered flawless if there's no one around to witness it.

C: 更多房间意味着更多可能性！
E: More rooms signify more possibilities, right?

C: 在附近转转。
E: Check out the nearby area.

C: 呜！嗡！（姐姐好，我是新的！）
E: Grumph! Grumph! (Hi, big sis! I'm the new one!)

C: 好厉害…要是蒙上眼睛的话，我肯定分不出是你们谁用的祷言。
E: Amazing... If I covered my eyes, I definitely wouldn't be able to tell which one of you used the prayer.

C: 这就已经中学二年级了？
E: Huh? The rebellious phase already?

C: 呜嗡，呜嗡……
E: Grumph, grumph...

C: 啊！二位回来啦！实在抱歉，刚刚接到个有点赶时间的任务，兽皇已经带着「贝茜摩丝」它们先走了。另外…是发生什么状况了吗？
E: Ah! You two are back! I'm so sorry, but I just got an urgent mission and Beast Emperor already left with "Behemoth" and the others. By the way... did something happen?

C: …话是这么说，该担心的还是会担心。万一遇上发了疯的泰坦眷属…或者它乱吃野外不干净的土，吃坏了肚子怎么办？
E: ...Well then, but you can't help worrying. What if it runs into some crazed Titankin? What if it eats something dirty out in the wild and gets sick?
Grumph~~~

C: 你二话不说，将块状物送入口中，并在驮子 / 小地兽 / 大撕垃 / 地宝 / 开拓者二世 / 大奇美拉 / 乌拉诺斯 / 地大地大大眼睛的注视下，试着感受蕴藏在那份苦涩中的心意。
E: Without a second thought, you pop the chunk into your mouth, and under Beast of Burden / Mini Dromas / Dromasilla / Dromy / Trailblazer Jr / The Great Chimera / Uranus / Dromasmas's gaze, try to appreciate the sincerity in its bitterness.

C: 发生什么事了？
E: What happened?

C: 少说怪话，赶快把糕点给我。
E: Cut the snark and hand over those pastries.

C: 餐馆店长，正式上任！
E: Restaurant Manager, reporting for duty!

C: 别在意。要是一口气就达到目标的话，多没意思呀。
E: Don't sweat the details. If you reach the top right away, it'd ruin all the fun, wouldn't it?

C: 小白，*我们*来帮你看着！
E: Snowy, we'll help you keep an eye out!

C: 图案中轴线与门框对不上，边缘也超出不少。该朝右侧移动才是。
E: The center of the design doesn't line up with the door frame, and the edges are sticking out. You need to move it to the right.

C: 说起来，先前还有位厨师应聘了主厨职位。
E: Speaking of which, wasn't there another person that applied for the chef position earlier?

C: 放心啦，*我们*和小白会尽可能简单处理的，保证小灰一眼就能看懂！
E: No worries! We and Snowy will keep things super simple. You'll understand everything at a glance!

C: 这么好吃？让我也尝尝。
E: That good, huh? Alright, let me have a taste too.

C: 我从不担心。不会有人尝不出鲜血蜜酿和白开水的差别吧？
E: I'm not worried about this. Surely folks can taste the difference between sanguine honey brew and boiled water?
Hah...

C: 哈哈哈哈…哈哈哈哈哈！
E: Hahahaha...HAHAHAHAHA!

C: 第一，农田产能并非说减就能减、如此方便操作之物。
E: First, crop productivity isn't something you can just dial down. It's not that simple.

C: *我们*负责送货！很快就会到家门口了！
E: And *we* take care of all the deliveries! They'll be at your doorstep in no time!

C: 不会还有个坏消息吧？
E: You don't also have bad news, do you?

C: 众所周知，老师待人极其严格，从不轻易夸奖大地兽之外的学生。但是！
E: As everyone knows, the professor is extremely strict and almost never praises any student other than dromases. But!

C: 敬妖精餐馆。
E: To the fairies' restaurant.

C: 从这里望去，能把整场宴会尽收眼底呢。
E: From here, you can take in the entire feast at once.

C: 至于最甜的菜…呵，想来她们心中其实早有答案。
E: As for the sweetest dish... Heh, I'm pretty sure they already know the answer in their hearts.

C: 性价比永远是最终的追求，人性本来如此，妖精自然也不例外。
E: Value for money is always the ultimate pursuit. It's human nature, and fairies are no exception.

C: 受凯撒所托，我在迷境内布设了金线。往后，各位可自由使用万帷网了。
E: At the Imperator's request, I've been setting up golden threads across the Maze. You'll now be able to access the World Wound Web freely.

C: 两位农林专家还在讨论着诸如「显性与隐性」、「分离与融合」之类的学术词汇，暂时别去打扰了吧。
E: The two agricultural experts are still deep in conversation, tossing around academic terms like "dominant vs. recessive" and "segregation and recombination." Best not interrupt for now.

C: 想看你做饭的样子。
E: I just want to see you cook.

C: 好像忘了什么事…但不重要！总之，店长想开店的时候，就随时找我迷！
E: Feels like I forgot something... but whatever! Just hit me up whenever you wanna open up for business, mem!

C: AMPHOREUS://DATA//ChrysosHeirs//*.core
