C: 无瑕因记忆而璀璨，故事于回望中圆满。\n自旅途中铭记的诗篇，前往书中将其写下。
E: Flawlessness shines due to memories, and stories find completion by looking back.\nThe verses memorized through your travels. Head to the book and write it down.

C: 听说是悬锋城的传统。\n以<color=#9e5738>鲜血</color>滋养身躯。
E: People considered it a Kremnoan tradition,\nto sustain their bodies with <color=#9e5738>fresh blood</color>.

C: 「但是有更多不幸的人们……\n他们迷失的是命运的方向。」
E: "However, there are many more unfortunate souls...\nwho have lost their direction in life."

C: 世间所有孩子都喜嬉戏，\n缇里西庇俄丝也不例外。
E: Every child in the world loves to play,\nand Tribios is no exception.

C: 而后，她静静地飘离，\n传入孩子耳中的话语，\n唯有一句哀怆的预言。
E: Then, she quietly departs,\nAnd the only words her child hears,\nIs a prophecy of forlorn melancholy.

C: 两位少女于麦田嬉戏，\n脚步如鹿般轻灵，\n浅洼里踩出层层涟漪。
E: The two girls frolicked in the wheat fields,\nFleet as doe deer,\nMaking ripples in the shallow puddles and pools clear.

C: 唱着歌的小妖精，\n带着善良的旅人，\n来到<color=#9e5738>「迷路迷境」</color>。
E: The singing fairy\nguides the kind traveler\nto the <color=#9e5738>Membrance Maze</color>.

C: 巨龙同样梦见自己的轨迹，\n那是来自苍穹，\n亦或苍穹之外的吐息。
E: The giant dragon dreamed also of their own path,\nThat great breath from the heavens,\nOr perhaps from beyond even the heavens.

C: 离开凯撒的王都后，\n巨龙以其脊背托庇所见小兽，\n却遭贪图肉食的城邦围猎。
E: After leaving the Imperator's capital,\nThe Giant Dragon shelters small beasts upon its back,\nOnly to be hunted by city-states hungry for meat.

C: 「所谓『不朽』，并非一颗宝药…」\n「而是一座桥梁。」
E: "The Permanence is not a panacea..."\n"But rather a bridge."

C: 凡此种种，语焉不详。
E: Many such rumors abounded, with no origin found.

C: 她会在黎明到来前迎来死亡。
E: She will die before the dawn comes.

C: 在那冥海的深处，\n有一个魅影翩跹的国度。
E: In the depths of the Sea of Souls\nWas a kingdom of dancing ghosts.

C: 「若你实在烦恼，」\n「就饮下这祝涌之樽中的蜜酿……」\n「然后安心投身到宴会中吧。」
E: "If you're truly troubled,"\n"Then imbibe the honey brew in this blessed chalice..."\n"And throw yourself into the feast, at ease."

C: 清醒的她，\n开启了最后一次献唱。
E: Now sober,\nShe begins one last song.

C: 少女目送他离开， 心中涌起怅惘。 「克莱门汀，和我一起准备些东西吧…」 「我希望这里…变得更加亮堂。」
E: The girl watches the patient leave, And her heart swells in sorrow. "Clementine, prepare some things with me..." "I want this place... To be brighter tomorrow."

C:
这里的屋顶有彩色的梦呓，
这里的草坪有日光的甜蜜。

微风轻拂，并无冷意，
只催醒俏皮的风铃与陶笛。
E:
Multicolored dreams on the rooftop now reside,
And the lawns contain the sweet whispers of sunlight.

A soft breeze passes, with no hint of cold,
Only serving to wake the playful chimes and ocarinas of delight.

C: 捏塑天象的泰坦伟力，\n降下了最般配的恩赐。
E: The brawn of the Titan who molded stars,\nGranted a boon fitting and fair.

C: 少女收下了这份礼物，\n因为在它身上，\n她嗅到了云朵的芬芳。
E: The girl still took this gift,\nFor from the little creature,\nShe smelled the scent of clouds distant.

C: 曾有人如此奉劝——\n「或许您的野心…\n也该在遗愿中提及。」
E: Someone once suggested —\n"Perhaps your ambition...\nShould also find its place among your final wishes."

C: 直到酒馆地板上躺满了人，执棋少女才从沙发后面站起，蹦蹦跳跳地向柜台走去。
E: Only when the tavern floor was littered with bodies did the chess-playing girl finally emerge from behind the sofa, skipping merrily towards the counter.

C: 「什么问题？」
E: "What question?"

C: 多年以后，在目送名为风堇的黄金裔登上天空之时，阳雷龙骑塞涅俄丝会想起被族人放逐至地表，与那座行走的山峦相遇的时刻。
E: Years later, as she watched Hyacine the Chrysos Heir ascend to the heavens, Seliose the Daythunder Dromas Knight would remember the moment when she was exiled to the surface by her people, and her encounter with that walking mountain.

C: 蔺草枯萎，麦田燃烧，风铃在怪物的嘶吼中摇晃。
E: The bulrush withered, the wheat fields burned, and wind chimes swayed amidst the monsters' roars.

C: 黑衣剑士缓缓地呼出一口气。「试问…其名？」
E: The black-clad swordmaster slowly exhales. "Tell me... its name?"

C: 「汝将碎裂▀▄█…碎裂█▄…随……劣▀▄█……」这一天，缇里西庇俄丝再次听到了泰坦的神谕，依然模糊不清，像被黑潮扼住了喉咙，但她已经知晓自己要去的方向。
E: "You shall shatter▀▄█... shatter█▄... sha... tter▀▄█..." On this day, Tribios heard the Titan's prophecy once again, still unclear, as if choked by the black tide, but she already knew which direction she must take.

C: 几年以后，奥赫玛传来讯息，拯救无数城邦于危难之间的「昏光骑士」即将造访圣城。黄金裔领袖阿格莱雅亲自出城迎接，定睛一看，在巨型翼兽的背上有位熟悉的面孔。
E: Years later, news arrived from Okhema that the "Twilight Knight," savior of countless city-states in times of crisis, would visit the holy city. Aglaea, leader of the Chrysos Heirs, personally went out to welcome her. As Aglaea focused her gaze, she spotted a familiar face atop the giant winged beast.

C: 众人将目光投向那位后厨的救世主。白厄慌张地摆起手，「伙伴，你们是了解我的，如果是我……」
E: All eyes turned to the deliverer of the kitchen. Phainon flailed his hands in protest. "Guys, you know me, if it were me..."

C: 路径：浪漫。原动力：节制。\n注释：高度自我抑制，以外部需求为唯一优先解。\n出现变异的电信号，以高度利他行为锚定决策逻辑。过程中，生存权重逐渐降低，转化为符合「纯美」的自我牺牲。对其余电信号具备强亲和力。
E: Track: Romance. Primum Mobile: Temperance.\nNote: Highly self-repressed, with external demands as the sole priority solution.\nA mutated electrical signal. Its decision logic is anchored by highly altruistic behavior. In this process, its survival priority gradually decreases, transforming into self-sacrifice that aligns with the Beauty. It also possesses a strong affinity for other electrical signals.

C: 嘿，亲爱的观众，这次故事的主角是我们熟知的超级大坏蛋——石头老板！很久以前，他奴役着『噩梦小镇』的镇民们，在镇中无恶不作，只为得到美丽的垃圾。他喜欢垃圾，他相信收集足够多的垃圾就能召唤被遗忘的垃圾桶之王，让所有的鳄鱼成为伟大的垃圾桶之民——他就是这么奇怪的鳄鱼。\n
E: Hey there, viewers. The protagonist of this story is the one big bad egg who we're all very familiar with: Boss Stone! A long time ago, he subjugated the townsfolk of Nightmareville and did all kinds of wicked deeds — all so he could get his hands on beautiful trash. He adored trash. He believed that by collecting enough trash, he would be able to summon the forgotten King of Trashcans, making all crocodiles the citizens of the great trashcan — that's how quirky he was.\n

C: \n\n辛克尔正在为空间站内部的信任危机而烦恼。我们简单聊了聊，她推测黑塔要找的可能是呜呜伯，但这结论可能不太对。最后<color=#dbc291ff>辛克尔向我推荐了小阿德勒</color>，据说他是界种科最了解奇物的人。
E: \n\nHinkel is troubled by the confidence crisis within the space station. We had a brief chat, and she speculated that what Herta is looking for is a Wubbaboo, but this isn't certain yet. In the end, <color=#dbc291ff>Hinkel recommended me to look for Adler</color>. Apparently he is the person who knows the most about Curios in the Department of Ecology.

C: 初次踏入「黄金的时刻」，你很难形容这座城市带给你的感受。\n有趣的评价。我看出来了，你是个喜欢思考的人…不会轻易下判断。\n不如先卸下那些繁杂的思想武装，投入盛会之城的怀抱中。当然，时刻长个心眼总不会错…如果你不想反被这座城市吃干抹净。
E: It's hard to define what this city makes you feel when you initially enter the Golden Hour.\nWhat an interesting remark. You're a thinker, I can tell... You don't make quick judgments.\nWhy don't you discard your complex psychological defenses and throw yourself into the embrace of this city of festivities for a little while? Though, do remember to keep some wits about you, lest the city swallows you all.

C: 要是没人和我聊天，我就闷得要命。但在列车上的时候，姬子很忙，杨叔很忙，帕姆很忙，丹恒倒是不忙，可他不喜欢聊天……
E: I get really bored when no one's talking to me. When we're on the Express, Himeko and Mr. Yang are pretty busy, but Dan Heng's usually free. He doesn't like chatting though...

C: 如果把流萤的人生比作游戏，标签估计会有：动作，困难，单人，速通…谁都想玩这样的游戏，但谁都不想要这样的人生。
E: If Firefly's life was a game. It'd probably be a high-difficulty, single-player, action/speedrun thing... Everyone wants to play games like that, but no one wants a life like that.

C: 一切，都是星辰的选择。
E: Everything is ordained by the stars.

C: 艾丝妲资助过一些特殊的孩子，阿兰也是其中之一吧。
E: Asta provided financial assistance to a few exceptional children — I assume Arlan was one of them.

C: 时不再至，请随我一同出战！
E: It's now or never. Fight with me!

C: 加强防御。
E: Strengthen our defenses.

C: 你好，我是娜塔莎，贝洛伯格下层区的医生，哪里不舒服么？过来坐吧，让我看看。
E: Nice to meet you, I'm Natasha — an Underworld doctor. Feeling sick? Take a seat, let me take a look.

C: 克拉拉：你好…我是克拉拉，可以成为我的家人么…就像史瓦罗先生一样。\n史瓦罗：有我在，{NICKNAME}就是你的家人。
E: Clara: Hello... I'm Clara. Wanna be in my family? ...Like Mr. Svarog?\nSvarog: As long as I'm here, {NICKNAME} is your family.

C: 我只有一个小小的愿望，希望能在未来的大守护者前混个脸熟，任何形式都可以——让我挨打也行！
E: My only wish is to get acquainted with the supreme guardian-to-be. Any introduction will do — even a painful one!

C: 要是没有什么严重的伤病，我尽量不去打扰娜塔莎大姐头。需要她帮助的人太多，我不想因为自己的马虎大意拖累他们。
E: Unless my injuries are serious, I try my best not to bother Natasha. Too many people need her help, they shouldn't have to suffer for my carelessness.

C: 很好，继续涨，不要停！
E: Awesome! Let's ride the wave!

C: 我平生最怕麻烦，麻烦不只分大小，还分远近。如何布局谋划，还得劳神费力哪……
E: For all of my life, I've been scared of trouble. There are major troubles and minor ones, distant ones and close ones. They need plans, preparations, and all things that need effort...

C: 你好，「星穹列车」的客人，我是「罗浮」天舶司的驭空，欢迎来到仙舟做客。
E: Hello, guest from the Astral Express. I am Yukong from the Luofu's Sky-Faring Commission. Welcome to the Xianzhou.

C: 今天…会是繁忙的一天么。
E: Another busy day ahead of us?

C: 那个人同我一样，内心开了一个洞。无论做些什么，都无法将它填上。越努力尝试填补，就越精疲力尽。
E: He is just like me — there is a hole in his heart. No matter what he does to fill it, the hole remains. The harder he tries, the more exhausted he becomes.

C: 或许对你有用。
E: This could serve you well.

C: 景元将军的笑容，其中到底有几分掩饰，几分实意——每次见他，我都不禁疑惑。当然，这并非他的问题，而是我的。
E: How much of that smile of his is genuine, how much of it is hiding something — Every time I see him, I can't help but wonder. Of course, this isn't his problem. It's mine.

C: 是啊，已经结束了，很快吧？
E: Yeah, it's over already. Fast enough for you?

C: 夜色，如影随形。
E: The night follows you like a shadow.

C: 不算什么。
E: That was nothing.

C: 全仰仗恩公~
E: All thanks to your guidance, benefactor~

C: 别溜达了。小孩子早点回去睡觉，不然长不高。
E: Enough gallivanting, kid. Better get to bed early, or you won't grow.

C: {NICKNAME}身上展露的秉性，始终像第一天结识你那般奇妙有趣。
E: {NICKNAME}'s inherent qualities, are as beguiling and engaging now as they were on the day we first met.

C: 纯美骑士团成员甚少会面，但我们奉行相同的「骑士道」，各自来往于不同星球，向宇宙每个角落播撒女神美名。
E: The Knights tend to operate in solitude, spreading the grace of the Goddess far and wide across the universe. Nevertheless, we follow the same code of chivalry.

C: 黑暗，就此止步。
E: The darkness ends here.

C: 真理的美妙之处在于，即使没人理解它，它也不会改变。我本人也是如此。
E: The beauty of truth is that it never changes, even when no one understands it. Well, that's true for me, at least.

C: 准备好浪费人生了吗？
E: Ready to squander the remainder of your days?

C: 愚者千面，游戏人间…你，会找到答案么？
E: A thousand faces in a thousand places... can you find the answer?

C: 热烈又清新的「记忆」…如此美好，有幸同行。
E: A passionate and refreshing "memory"... I'm honored to travel alongside such beauty.

C: 离终点，应该不远了。
E: The final stop is close.

C: 没有退路，只能向前。
E: There's no turning back from here.

C: 我是「白日梦酒店」的门童米沙，欢迎来到匹诺康尼，请这边走，我来为你搬运行李！
E: Hi there, I'm Misha, a bellboy at The Reverie Hotel. Welcome to Penacony. This way. Oh, here, let me grab those bags for you!

C: 时间久了，酒店角角落落的机械部件也会出些故障…如果能修好的话，我还是不想更换新零件……
E: After a while, the machinery tucked away in the corners of the hotel tends to break down... But if I can fix them, I will. I don't like to swap out old parts for new...

C: 我们曾互为敌手，但他坚定的意志和不渝的信念，值得我致以最崇高的敬意。
E: We were once adversaries, but his steadfast will and unwavering beliefs deserve my utmost respect.

C: 应受此难。
E: This trial is fitting.

C: 别客气！这顿我请。
E: Don't worry! This one's on me.

C: 大岚神在上，何等强劲的邪祟……
E: By the Great Lan above, such formidable evil...

C: 眼神很锐利，他应该没近视吧？喜欢戴眼镜的人大多深藏不露，可惜我没什么时间，不然也想查查他的过去。
E: He has sharp eyes. He's not actually near-sighted, right? Those who like to wear glasses often conceal themselves behind those lenses. Pity I don't have a lot of free time — otherwise I'd like to pry into his past, too.

C: 全部点亮就好了。
E: Just light everything up.

C: 我好爱这顶帽子，戴着喜欢，戴着高兴。
E: I looove this hat. I like to wear it, and it makes me happy!

C: 裁断之时。
E: Time for resolution.

C: 幸会，海洋的战士。
E: Well met, soldier of the Ocean.

C: 一分理性、两分渴望、三分激情…灵魂别无他物。
E: One part reason, two parts longing, three parts passion... A soul is nothing more than that.

C: 看来表演的时机还不错。
E: Looks like it's not a bad time for a performance.

C: 你我虽并肩作战，但目的各自不同。
E: Though we fight side by side, we do not share the same goal.

C: 信神谕，不如信我。
E: You're better off believing in me than believing in prophecies.

C: 言尽于此。
E: I have nothing left to say.

C: 我自有把握。
E: I have it under control.

C: 嗯，拿去熔了吧。
E: Mmm, go melt it down.

C: 小时候，我常常会幻想自己同一位从异邦而来的勇者修习剑术，斩杀魔怪，踏上拯救世界的旅途…现在，这梦想算是成真了么？
E: When I was a child, I often imagined myself learning swordplay from an outland hero, cutting through monsters, and then embarking on a journey to save the world... I guess that dream came true.

C: 万敌大人的恢复速度异于常人，即使受了重伤，需要我来治疗，他也会同我谈笑风生…唔…这么说来，往往这时他总会比平日里更健谈一些。
E: Lord Mydei's regenerative abilities are way faster than that of an ordinary human. Even when he's badly wounded and requires my help, he still talks and jokes as if nothing's wrong... Strange... now that I think about it, he seems way chattier than usual during those moments.

C: 那位如绿海豚般灵动的智者，他的「表演」令人叹为观止——不过，若能加上一些音乐与深海蜜酿，定然会更让听众沉醉。
E: That sage, agile like a green dolphin... His "performances" are awe-inspiring. Although, if they were accompanied by some music and deep-sea honey brew, they would surely be even more enchanting to all who listen.

C: 一份情报换百个利衡币，捷足爵，意下如何？
E: One piece of intelligence for one hundred Balance Coins. How does that sound, Dux Celeripes?

C: 烈阳爵，以黎明照彻黑夜吧。
E: Pierce the darkness with dawn, Dux Solaris.

C: 棋子只识敌我两方，孰不知宇宙远不止黑白二色。翁法罗斯的终点也不过是银河的起点，我必将奔赴更渺远的群星。
E: On the board, there is only black and white, only foe and friend, but the universe is so much vaster than two simple shades. The end of Amphoreus is nothing more than the first step into the cosmos, and I will march toward those far-off lights.

C: 听话，该登场了~
E: Be good now... It's your time to shine~

C: 别担心，闭上双眼……
E: Don't worry... Just close your eyes...

C: 专注眼前，我来抵挡攻势。
E: Focus on what's ahead. I'll hold off their attacks.

C: 三月，是时候展现你真正的技术了。
E: March, time to show us what you're really made of.

C: 无论过去多久，我都会等你♪
E: I'll wait for you no matter how long it takes ♪

C: 以爱为因，涤荡憎恨。
E: Cleanse hatred with love.

C: 这点程度，果然难不倒你呀！
E: I knew something like this couldn't stop you!

C: 进攻的时机来了。
E: Time to go on the offensive.

C: 坚不可摧。
E: Indestructible.

C: 切换属性显示模式
E: Switch stat display mode

C: 对话继续
E: Continue Dialogue

C: 射击
E: Shoot

C: 切换查看
E: Switch View

C:
◆ 简介 ◆
阅读最后的艾格勒启目集，挑战镌写在史诗里的强敌。

◆ 活动规则 ◆
● 活动开启后，每日将会开启新的挑战关，共计5关。
● 每一个挑战关拥有三种难度：「简单」「困难」「噩梦」，完成前一个难度的挑战后，解锁下一个难度。
● 每一个挑战关拥有一个独特的关卡机制，「噩梦」难度下，该机制强度大幅提升。
● 进入战斗时，触发所有角色的秘技效果。编队中存在多个无法同时生效的秘技效果时，按编队顺序优先触发靠前的角色的秘技效果。
● 完成「噩梦」难度挑战，将会获得「SS」的评价。
● 「简单」「困难」难度下，敌方强度受「均衡等级」影响；「噩梦」难度不受影响。
● 「简单」「困难」难度下开拓者可以选择试用角色参与挑战，「噩梦」难度下无试用角色。

◆ 常驻奖励 ◆
● 挑战关卡获取「常驻奖励」。
E:
◆ Introduction ◆
Read the final Aquila enlightenment and challenge the formidable foes inscribed in the Epic.

◆ Event Rules ◆
● After the event begins, a new Challenge Stage will unlock daily, for a total of 5 stages.
● Each Challenge Stage has three difficulty levels: "Easy," "Hard," and "Nightmare." Complete one difficulty level to unlock the next.
● Each Challenge Stage has a unique stage mechanic that is greatly enhanced in "Nightmare" difficulty.
● When entering combat, Technique Buffs of all characters are triggered. When multiple incompatible Technique Buffs exist in the team lineup, they will be triggered in order of character position.
● Completing a "Nightmare" difficulty challenge will earn you an "SS" rating.
● Enemy strength is affected by the Equilibrium Level in "Easy" and "Hard" difficulties; "Nightmare" difficulty is unaffected.
● Trailblazers can select trial characters for "Easy" and "Hard" difficulties, but trial characters are not available in "Nightmare" difficulty.

◆ Permanent Rewards ◆
● Challenge stages to obtain Permanent Rewards.

C: 敌方召唤物被全部消灭，【蚀心影魔】的伤害减免效果移除！
E: All enemy summons defeated! "Corrupting Shadowfiend's" DMG Mitigation effect removed!

E: Reply from the Dreammaster

C: 愿我们在清醒的现实再会。
E: May we meet again in reality.

When a chimera with "Blessing" is defeated, it will rejoin the battle with <color=#dc6f33><unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> <icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=1 width=1 height=1>HP</color>. This effect can trigger up to 1 time.

C: 对战开始或被召唤时：对<icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=0 width=1 height=1>生命值最低的对手造成<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>点伤害
E: At the start of combat or when summoned: Deals <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> DMG to the opponent with the lowest <icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=0 width=1 height=1>HP.

E: This is gonna be fun to watch.

C: 我没有感情。
E: I have no feelings.

C: 您回应我了！回应我了！
E: Thou hast answered me! Yea, answered me!

C: 《神降》
E: Theophany

C: 天性贪心的「焚化工」，先后背叛过「毁灭」命途与流光忆庭。\n独行于寰宇，她试图穷尽活着的任何可能。
E: A Cremator, greedy by nature, who has betrayed both the Path of Destruction and the Garden of Recollection.\nAlone she traverses the cosmos, seeking to exhaust every possibility of being alive.

C: 格拉默铁骑
E: Glamoth's Iron Cavalry

C: 敌方全体目标造成的伤害大幅提高。
E: Greatly increases DMG dealt by all enemy targets.

C: 背道者的来信
E: A Letter from an Apostate

C: 蛀蚀盘根
E: Corroded Weaving Roots

C: 我方全体目标造成的伤害提高<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>；我方目标施放攻击后，对被攻击的敌方目标添加自身属性对应的弱点，该效果在敌方目标从弱点击破状态恢复时移除。
E: Increases all ally targets' DMG by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>. After an ally target uses an attack, applies Weakness corresponding to this unit's Type to the attacked enemy target. This effect is removed when the enemy target recovers from Weakness Break state.

C: 谁？
E: Who?

C: 你说的话，我真的会信哦
E: Since it's you, I might really believe that

C: 记忆是梦的开场白
E: Memories are the Prelude to Dreams

C: 对我方全体造成虚数属性伤害，并使所有可以行动的「旧梦的回声」对我方全体造成虚数属性伤害。技能施放后，恢复「旧梦的回声」的韧性。
E: Deals Imaginary DMG to all targets, and makes all "Echoes of Faded Dreams" that can take action deal Imaginary DMG to all targets. After using this ability, restores Toughness for "Echoes of Faded Dreams."

C: 「『齐响诗班』神主日」召唤四个「旧梦的回声」，「旧梦的回声」受到的伤害均由「『齐响诗班』神主日」承受。自身和「旧梦的回声」受到弱点击破时，行动额外延后。且自身每层韧性被击破后，对我方施加【<u>在光明中行</u>】。
E: "Harmonious Choir" The Great Septimus summons 4 "Echoes of Faded Dreams". The DMG taken by the "Echoes of Faded Dreams" is completely redistributed to "Harmonious Choir" The Great Septimus instead. When this unit and "Echoes of Faded Dreams" become Weakness Broken, additionally delays action. For every stack of this unit's Toughness that is broken, apply <u>Walk in the Light</u> to the Party.

C: 锁定我方全体目标，进入【点亮未来】状态，下次行动施放【赞美艾格勒】。
E: Locks on to all targets and enters the "Light the Future" state. "Praise Aquila" will be used with next action.

C: 在梦中的
E: Vaneggiando

C: 造物的工
E: Work of Creation

C: 流萤呼唤知更鸟，请她借一步说话。流萤称美梦的十二时刻存在异常，她和大丽花怀疑「梦主」的真面目。
E: Firefly beckoned Robin for a private word. She told her that something was off about the Twelve Hours of Dreamjoy, and she and The Dahlia suspected the true identity of the Dreammaster.

C: 所以别担心，这一幕并非现实。它来自一件你无比熟悉的事物……
E: So don't worry. This scene isn't real. It comes from something you're all too familiar with...

C: 就算付出了这么多代价，机会也只有一次。
E: Even after paying such a heavy price, we only get one shot at this.

C: 抱歉，哥哥，我……
E: Sorry, brother, I...

C: 那…稍微走开几步吧，我有一些猜想。会有些风险，如果发生了什么，不必管我。
E: Then... take a few steps back. I have a few conjectures. There might be some risk... If anything happens, don't worry about me.

C: 显然，歌斐木得到过忆者的帮助——那枚光锥不在我们手中，恐怕要无功而返了。
E: Clearly, Gopher Wood had help from a Memokeeper, and since that Light Cone isn't in our hands, I fear we'll be returning empty-handed.

C: 有点眼熟，她是……
E: She looks familiar, she's...

C: 你在现实中的客房倒是意外朴素……
E: Your guest room in reality is surprisingly modest...

C: 至于我的失声，我仍然需要继续追查。也许，我的确一直戴着面具，而又不自知。
E: As for my loss of voice, I still need to keep investigating. Perhaps I've been wearing a mask all along without even realizing it.

C: 实话说，我没有相信你的理由。
E: To be honest, I have no reason to trust you.

C: 我很喜欢匹诺康尼，作为游客。这是我第一次做梦，匹诺康尼甚至比我想象中还要美好。
E: I really like Penacony, as a tourist. This is my first time dreaming, and Penacony is more wonderful than I imagined.

C: 你怎么……
E: How did you...

C: 我更希望没这回事，我可不想因为与你的交集，引起忆庭的注意。
E: I wish that wasn't the case. I'd rather not draw the Garden's attention because of my association with you.

C: 你没隐藏好自己的虚弱。虽是「石心十人」，此时此刻，料理起来却不难。
E: You haven't hidden your weakness well. Even though you're one of the Ten Stonehearts, right now, you'll be easy enough to handle.

C: 看来我相当好运，能在这里发现什么，我很期待。
E: Looks like I'm pretty lucky! I can't wait to see what I'll discover here.

C: 抱歉，我想过去看看，马上回来。
E: Sorry, I want to go check that out real quick. Be right back.

C: 很好，身份已确认——欢迎你，特工「机甲大亨」。请到下一步接头地址，我们的人会在那里等你。
E: Perfect, identity confirmed. Welcome, Agent Mech Tycoon. Please proceed to the next rendezvous point. Our people will be waiting for you there.

C: 可这来不及改变任何事了。
E: But it's too late to change anything now.

C: 如何彰显公义
E: How shall righteousness be shown?

C: 放心，<color=#dbc291ff>我改变不了任何事</color>。即便我幡然醒悟，也只是让梦主求得心安。
E: Don't worry, <color=#dbc291ff>I can't change anything</color>. Even if I have a sudden awakening, it would only give the Dreammaster peace of mind.

C: 你的朋友，她试着逃离命运，最终只得到相同的结局。此时此刻，你也亦然。
E: Your friend tried to escape destiny, only to meet the same end. And now, here you are, no different.

C: 那您可以自己去死，砂金先生，我们的时候未到。

C: 都这会了，就别攀关系啦——你的哥哥，已经不存在了哦？现在，你应该叫祂「太一」。
E: Oww, you're still trying to play the family card at this hour? Your brother doesn't exist anymore. As of now, you'd better call THEM... Ena.

C: …那舒翁女士的答案，会和我的很像呢。
E: ...It seems that your answer is really similar to mine.

C: 您也问过我「因何而唱」，我想，这两个问题，我可以一起回答。

C: 休想！拉扎莉娜献出生命，才守护了美梦的过去！

E: You know, I often wonder if everything I'm doing right now is just a whimsical gift from "destiny." That I haven't really decided anything, but merely being tossed around at its mercy.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>但这个世界上，一定不再需要人的君王。</color>
